We evaluate performance using absolute relative error, root mean squared error, and the area under the sparsification error. Quantitative results show that the representations perform similarly, while 10 bin log-normal and 5 bin evidential learning perform best across metrics. Our experiments demonstrate that uncertainty estimation can be successfully integrated into event-based monocular depth estimation, and be used to indicate pixels with reliable depth.

analysis.tldr: 利用事件相机和不确定性建模进行单目深度估计，比较多种事件表示和不确定性框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 事件相机具有高时间分辨率、高动态范围等优势，但现有方法缺乏对深度估计不确定性的建模，限制了其在安全关键应用中的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何从单目事件流中预测每像素深度分布并量化不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同事件表示（如时空体素网格、CSTR、TORE）在深度估计性能上相似，其中10 bin对数正态和5 bin证据学习表现最佳；不确定性估计可有效指示可靠深度像素。
analysis.method: 使用U-Net架构，结合高斯、对数正态和证据学习三种不确定性框架，输入六种事件表示，在合成数据上训练并在真实序列上微调。
contributions: 首次将不确定性估计集成到基于事件的单目深度估计中
系统比较了六种事件表示和三种不确定性框架的性能
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据和真实序列上评估，使用绝对相对误差、均方根误差和稀疏化误差下面积等指标。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅使用U-Net架构，未探索其他网络结构
不确定性估计的实用性需在更多下游任务中验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用事件相机和不确定性建模进行单目深度估计，比较多种事件表示和不确定性框架。

papers.title: bViT: Investigating Single-Block Recurrence in Vision Transformers for Image Recognition
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) are built by stacking independently parameterized blocks, but it remains unclear how much of this depth requires layer specific transformations and how much can be realized through recurrent computation. We study this question with bViT, a single-block recurrent ViT in which one transformer block is applied repeatedly to process an image. This architecture preserves the iterative structure of a deep ViT while removing layer specific block parameterization, providing a controlled setting for studying recurrence in vision. On ImageNet-1K, a 12-step bViT-B achieves accuracy comparable to standard ViT-B under the same training recipe and computational budget, while using an order of magnitude fewer parameters. We observe that recurrent performance improves with representation width, with wider bViTs recovering much more of the performance of standard ViTs than narrow variants. We interpret this behavior as implicit depth multiplexing, where a shared block expresses multiple step-dependent computations through the evolving hidden state. Beyond ImageNet classification, bViT transfers competitively to downstream tasks and enables parameter-efficient fine-tuning. Mechanistic analyses of activations, attention and step-specific pruning show that the shared block changes its effective behavior across recurrent steps rather than simply repeating the same computation. Our results suggest that a large fraction of ViT depth can be implemented through recurrent reuse, provided that the representation space is sufficiently wide.

analysis.tldr: bViT 通过单块循环 Vision Transformer 证明，在足够宽的表示空间中，深度 ViT 的大部分层可被循环复用替代，参数效率显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准 Vision Transformer (ViT) 通过堆叠独立参数化的块来构建深度，但深度中多大比例需要层特定的变换、多大比例可通过循环计算实现尚不清楚。研究这一问题有助于理解 ViT 的深度机制并提升参数效率。
analysis.problem: 探究 ViT 深度中是否可以通过单块循环复用替代独立参数化的多层，以及这种替代在何种条件下有效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 循环性能随表示宽度提升而改善，宽 bViT 比窄变体恢复更多标准 ViT 的性能；机制分析表明共享块在不同循环步骤中改变其有效行为，而非简单重复相同计算。
analysis.method: 提出 bViT，一个单块循环 Vision Transformer，其中单个 transformer 块被重复应用于处理图像，移除层特定参数化，保留迭代结构。
contributions: 提出 bViT 架构，以极少的参数实现与标准 ViT 相当的 ImageNet-1K 精度。
揭示循环性能依赖于表示宽度，并解释为隐式深度复用机制。
展示 bViT 在下游任务上的竞争性迁移能力和参数高效微调潜力。
通过机制分析证明共享块在不同循环步骤中执行不同计算。
analysis.experiments: 在 ImageNet-1K 上，12 步 bViT-B 在相同训练配方和计算预算下达到与标准 ViT-B 相当的精度，参数少一个数量级；并迁移到下游任务。
limitations: 仅验证了图像识别任务，其他视觉任务（如检测、分割）未涉及。
循环步数固定为 12，未探索最优步数或自适应步数。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: bViT 通过单块循环 Vision Transformer 证明，在足够宽的表示空间中，深度 ViT 的大部分层可被循环复用替代，参数效率显著提升。

papers.title: GenMed: A Pairwise Generative Reformulation of Medical Diagnostic Tasks
papers.abstract: Data-driven medical AI is traditionally formulated as a discriminative mapping from input $X$ to output $Y$ via a learned function $f$, which does not generalize well across heterogeneous data and modalities encountered in real-world clinical settings. In this work, we propose a fundamentally different, generative paradigm. We model the joint distribution $P(X,Y)$ using diffusion models and reframe inference as a test-time output optimization problem. By guiding the generative process to match observed inputs, our framework enables flexible, gradient-based conditioning at inference time without architectural changes or retraining, effectively supporting arbitrary and previously unseen combinations of observations. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong performance across standard and cross-modality medical image segmentation, few-shot segmentation with only 2 or 4 training samples, degraded-input segmentation, shape completion from sparse and partial observations, and zero-shot application to demonstrate generality. To support these evaluations, we curated and released a large-scale text-shape dataset derived from MedShapeNet. Our results highlight the versatility of generative joint modeling as a foundation for reusable, task-agnostic medical AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 将医学诊断任务重新定义为生成式联合建模，通过扩散模型实现灵活推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统判别式医学AI在异构数据和模态上泛化能力差，难以适应真实临床场景。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可泛化、任务无关的医学AI框架，支持跨模态、少样本和退化输入等场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出生成式范式GenMed，用扩散模型建模联合分布P(X,Y)，将推理转化为测试时输出优化问题，通过梯度引导匹配观测输入。
contributions: 提出基于扩散模型的生成式医学诊断框架，无需架构修改或重训练即可支持任意观测组合。
构建并开源大规模文本-形状数据集（源自MedShapeNet），并在多种任务上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在标准/跨模态医学图像分割、少样本分割（2或4样本）、退化输入分割、稀疏形状补全和零样本任务上评估，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量联合数据分布建模。
测试时优化可能增加推理计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将医学诊断任务重新定义为生成式联合建模，通过扩散模型实现灵活推理。

papers.title: LLaVA-CKD: Bottom-Up Cascaded Knowledge Distillation for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are successful in addressing a multitude of vision-language understanding tasks, such as Visual Question Answering (VQA), but their memory and compute requirements remain a concern for practical deployment. A promising class of techniques for mitigating this concern is Knowledge Distillation, where knowledge from a high-capacity Teacher network is transferred to a considerably smaller Student network. However, the capacity gap between the two networks is both a blessing and a curse: the smaller the Student network, the better its efficiency, and the larger the Teacher, the more knowledge it carries; yet, beyond a point, the larger capacity gap between the two leads to worse knowledge transfer. To counter this effect, we propose a bottom-up cascaded knowledge distillation (CKD) framework. Instead of treating knowledge transfer as an activity involving one high-capacity Teacher (or an ensemble of such), inspired by human formal education systems, we introduce one (potentially, more) additional Teacher(s) of intermediate capacity that gradually bring the Student network to the next level, where the next (higher-capacity) Teacher can take over. We provide a theoretical analysis in order to study the effect of cascaded distillation in the generalization performance of the Student. We apply the proposed framework on models build upon the LLaVA methodology and evaluate the derived models on seven standard, publicly available VQA benchmarks, demonstrating their SotA performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自底向上的级联知识蒸馏框架，通过引入中间容量教师逐步缩小师生容量差距，提升VLM蒸馏效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型视觉-语言模型（VLM）在视觉问答等任务中表现优异，但内存和计算需求限制了实际部署。知识蒸馏是一种有前景的压缩技术，但师生模型之间的容量差距过大时，知识迁移效果会变差。
analysis.problem: 如何在大容量教师与小容量学生之间存在较大容量差距时，有效进行知识蒸馏，提升学生模型的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 师生容量差距既是优势也是劣势：学生越小效率越高，教师越大知识越多，但过大的容量差距会导致知识迁移效果变差。
analysis.method: 提出自底向上的级联知识蒸馏（CKD）框架，引入一个或多个中间容量教师，逐步将学生模型提升到更高水平，再由更高容量的教师接管。
contributions: 提出级联知识蒸馏框架，通过中间教师逐步缩小师生容量差距，改善知识迁移。
提供了理论分析，研究级联蒸馏对学生泛化性能的影响。
在基于LLaVA的模型上应用该框架，在7个标准VQA基准上取得SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在7个标准公开VQA基准上评估，展示了SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能增加训练复杂度，需要设计多个教师模型。
理论分析可能仅适用于特定假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自底向上的级联知识蒸馏框架，通过引入中间容量教师逐步缩小师生容量差距，提升VLM蒸馏效果。

papers.title: Product-of-Gaussian-Mixture Diffusion Models for Joint Nonlinear MRI Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Recently, diffusion models have attracted considerable attention for magnetic resonance image reconstruction due to their high sample quality. However, most existing methods rely on large networks with opaque time-conditioning mechanisms, and require offline coil sensitivity estimation. This results in limited interpretability of the reconstruction process and reduced flexibility in the acquisition setup. To address these limitations, we jointly reconstruct the image and the coil sensitivities by combining the parameter-efficient product-of-Gaussian-mixture diffusion model as an image prior with a classical smoothness prior on the coil sensitivities. The proposed method is fast and robust to both contrast and anatomical distribution shifts as well as changing k-space trajectories. Finally, we propose a more expressive parameterization of the image prior which improves results in denoising and magnetic resonance image reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于高斯混合乘积的扩散模型，用于联合非线性MRI重建，无需离线线圈灵敏度估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型用于MRI重建时依赖大型网络和不透明的时间调节机制，且需要离线线圈灵敏度估计，导致可解释性差、采集设置灵活性低。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖离线线圈灵敏度估计的情况下，实现高效、可解释且鲁棒的MRI联合重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将参数高效的乘积高斯混合扩散模型作为图像先验，与线圈灵敏度的经典平滑先验结合，联合重建图像和线圈灵敏度，并采用更具表达力的图像先验参数化。
contributions: 提出一种联合重建图像和线圈灵敏度的扩散模型方法，无需离线估计。
引入乘积高斯混合扩散模型作为图像先验，提高参数效率和可解释性。
提出更表达力的图像先验参数化，改善去噪和MRI重建结果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂噪声模型适应性有限。
高斯混合先验可能无法捕捉所有图像细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于高斯混合乘积的扩散模型，用于联合非线性MRI重建，无需离线线圈灵敏度估计。

papers.title: Hypergraph-Enhanced Training-Free and Language-Free Few-Shot Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Few-shot anomaly detection (FSAD) has made significant strides, yet existing methods still face critical challenges: (i) dependence on task- or dataset-specific training/fine-tuning, (ii) reliance on language supervision or carefully hand-crafted prompts, and (iii) limited robustness across domains. In this paper, we introduce HyperFSAD, a novel FSAD framework that is training-free, language-free, and robust across domains, offering a powerful solution to these challenges. Built upon DINOv3 and a hypergraph-based inference mechanism, our approach performs inference without any task-specific optimization or text prompts, while remaining competitive. Specifically, we replace sensitive nearest-neighbor / top-$n$ matching with \textbf{Sparse Hyper Matching}: \textit{sparsemax} first selects the most relevant support patches, which are then aggregated into a \textit{hyperedge} as compact normal evidence to suppress background noise and distractors. We further introduce \textbf{Dual-Branch Image Scoring}, which fuses \emph{spatial anomaly evidence} from the patch-grid anomaly map with \emph{global semantic deviation} captured by support-aware CLS matching, yielding a robust image-level anomaly score in a strictly visual manner. Notably, all components of HyperFSAD are purely visual, eliminating the need for labor-intensive hand-crafted text prompts. Under the stringent training-free and language-free setting, HyperFSAD achieves state-of-the-art performance across six datasets spanning four industrial datasets (MVTecAD, VisA, MPDD, BTAD) and two medical datasets (RESC, BraTS).

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、无需语言提示的少样本异常检测框架HyperFSAD，通过超图推理和双分支图像评分实现跨域鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有少样本异常检测方法依赖任务特定训练/微调、语言监督或手工提示，且跨域鲁棒性有限，亟需一种无需训练、无需语言且跨域鲁棒的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 解决少样本异常检测中依赖任务特定训练、语言提示以及跨域鲁棒性不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于DINOv3和超图推理机制，提出Sparse Hyper Matching（用sparsemax选择最相关支持块并聚合为超边作为正常证据）和Dual-Branch Image Scoring（融合空间异常图和全局语义偏差），所有组件纯视觉，无需训练和语言提示。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练、无需语言提示的少样本异常检测框架HyperFSAD。
引入Sparse Hyper Matching和Dual-Branch Image Scoring，有效抑制背景噪声并提升跨域鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在MVTecAD、VisA、MPDD、BTAD四个工业数据集和RESC、BraTS两个医学数据集上达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能对极度稀疏的样本支持不足。
超图构建的计算开销在实时场景中可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练、无需语言提示的少样本异常检测框架HyperFSAD，通过超图推理和双分支图像评分实现跨域鲁棒性。

papers.title: Segment Anything with Robust Uncertainty-Accuracy Correlation
papers.abstract: Despite strong zero-shot performance, SAM is unreliable under domain shift due to Mask-level Confidence Confusion (MCC), where a single IoU-based mask score fails to reflect pixel-wise reliability near boundaries. Motivated by the contrast between texture-biased shortcuts in neural networks and shape-centric processing in human vision, we model out-of-domain variation as appearance shifts and non-rigid deformations that jointly stress calibration. We propose Segment Anything with Robust Uncertainty-Accuracy Correlation (RUAC) for robust pixel-wise uncertainty estimation under appearance and deformation shifts. RUAC adds a lightweight uncertainty head, trains it with a collaborative style-deformation attack that jointly perturbs texture and geometry, and applies Uncertainty-Accuracy Alignment to ensure uncertainty consistently highlights erroneous pixels even under adversarial perturbations. Across 23 zero-shot domains, RUAC improves segmentation quality and yields more faithful uncertainty with stronger uncertainty-accuracy correlation. Project page: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出RUAC方法，通过协同风格-变形攻击和不确定性-精度对齐，提升SAM在域偏移下的像素级不确定性估计可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: SAM在零样本场景下表现优异，但在域偏移时因掩码级置信度混淆（MCC）导致不可靠，即基于IoU的单一掩码分数无法反映边界附近的像素级可靠性。
analysis.problem: 解决SAM在域偏移下像素级不确定性估计不准确的问题，特别是外观和变形联合扰动导致的校准失效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到神经网络存在纹理偏置捷径，而人类视觉依赖形状处理，这种差异导致域偏移时SAM出现MCC现象。
analysis.method: 添加轻量级不确定性头，使用协同风格-变形攻击联合扰动纹理和几何进行训练，并应用不确定性-精度对齐确保不确定性在对抗扰动下仍能突出错误像素。
contributions: 提出RUAC框架，实现鲁棒的像素级不确定性估计
设计协同风格-变形攻击，模拟外观和变形联合偏移
在23个零样本域上验证了分割质量和不确定性-精度相关性的提升
analysis.experiments: 在23个零样本域上评估，RUAC提升了分割质量，并实现了更忠实的不确定性估计和更强的不确定性-精度相关性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定攻击策略，泛化性需进一步验证
轻量级头可能在高复杂度场景下性能受限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RUAC方法，通过协同风格-变形攻击和不确定性-精度对齐，提升SAM在域偏移下的像素级不确定性估计可靠性。

papers.title: Thinking with Novel Views: A Systematic Analysis of Generative-Augmented Spatial Intelligence
papers.abstract: Current Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) struggle with spatial reasoning tasks requiring viewpoint-dependent understanding, largely because they are confined to a single, static observation. We propose Thinking with Novel Views (TwNV), a paradigm that integrates generative novel-view synthesis into the reasoning loop: a Reasoner LMM identifies spatial ambiguity, instructs a Painter to synthesize an alternative viewpoint, and re-examines the scene with the additional evidence. Through systematic experiments we address three research questions. (1) Instruction format: numerical camera-pose specifications yield more reliable view control than free-form language. (2) Generation fidelity: synthesized view quality is tightly coupled with downstream spatial accuracy. (3) Inference-time visual scaling: iterative multi-turn view refinement further improves performance, echoing recent scaling trends in language reasoning. Across four spatial subtask categories and four LMM architectures (both closed- and open-source), TwNV consistently improves accuracy by +1.3 to +3.9 pp, with the largest gains on viewpoint-sensitive subtasks. These results establish novel-view generation as a practical lever for advancing spatial intelligence of LMMs.

analysis.tldr: 通过生成新视角图像辅助空间推理，提升多模态大模型的空间智能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多模态大模型在需要视角依赖理解的空间推理任务中表现不佳，主要受限于单一静态观测。
analysis.problem: 如何利用生成式新视角合成来增强多模态大模型的空间推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 新视角生成的质量与下游空间推理准确率紧密相关；迭代多轮视角细化可进一步提升性能。
analysis.method: 提出Thinking with Novel Views (TwNV)范式，由Reasoner LMM识别空间歧义，指示Painter合成新视角，再结合额外证据重新审视场景。
contributions: 提出TwNV范式，将生成式新视角合成集成到推理循环中。
系统分析了指令格式、生成保真度和推理时视觉缩放三个关键因素。
analysis.experiments: 在四个空间子任务类别和四种LMM架构上，TwNV一致提升准确率1.3到3.9个百分点，视角敏感子任务提升最大。
limitations: 依赖生成模型的质量，低质量合成可能限制提升。
多轮迭代可能增加推理计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过生成新视角图像辅助空间推理，提升多模态大模型的空间智能。

papers.title: CausalGS: Learning Physical Causality of 3D Dynamic Scenes with Gaussian Representations
papers.abstract: Learning a physical model from video data that can comprehend physical laws and predict the future trajectories of objects is a formidable challenge in artificial intelligence. Prior approaches either leverage various Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) as soft constraints in the form of PINN losses, or integrate physics simulators into neural networks; however, they often rely on strong priors or high-quality geometry reconstruction. In this paper, we propose CausalGS, a framework that learns the causal dynamics of complex dynamic 3D scenes solely from multi-view videos, while dispensing with the reliance on explicit priors. At its core is an inverse physics inference module that decouples the complex dynamics problem from the video into the joint inference of two factors: the initial velocity field representing the scene's kinematics, and the intrinsic material properties governing its dynamics. This inferred physical information is then utilized within a differentiable physics simulator to guide the learning process in a physics-regularized manner. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CausalGS surpasses the state-of-the-art on the highly challenging task of long-term future frame extrapolation, while also exhibiting advanced performance in novel view interpolation. Crucially, our work shows that, without any human annotation, the model is able to learn the complex interactions between multiple physical properties and understand the causal relationships driving the scene's dynamic evolution, solely from visual observations.

analysis.tldr: 从多视角视频中学习3D动态场景的物理因果模型，无需显式先验即可预测长期未来帧。
analysis.research_motivation: 从视频数据中学习物理模型以理解物理定律并预测物体未来轨迹是AI的挑战，现有方法依赖强先验或高质量几何重建，限制了泛化性。
analysis.problem: 如何仅从多视角视频中学习复杂动态3D场景的因果动力学，无需显式先验或高质量几何重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CausalGS框架，包含逆物理推理模块，将视频中的复杂动力学解耦为初始速度场（运动学）和内在材料属性（动力学）的联合推断，并通过可微物理模拟器以物理正则化方式引导学习。
contributions: 提出无需显式先验的因果动力学学习框架CausalGS，仅从多视角视频中学习。
通过逆物理推理模块解耦运动学和动力学因素，实现长期未来帧外推和视角插值的SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在长期未来帧外推任务上超越SOTA，并在新视角插值上表现先进，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖多视角视频输入，单视角场景适用性未知。
物理模拟器的可微性可能限制复杂场景的扩展。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从多视角视频中学习3D动态场景的物理因果模型，无需显式先验即可预测长期未来帧。

papers.title: FrequencyCT: Frequency domain pseudo-label generation for self-supervised low-dose CT denoising
papers.abstract: Despite extensive research on computed tomography (CT) denoising, few studies exploit projection-domain data characteristics to mitigate noise correlation. To address this, this work proposes FrequencyCT, the first zero-shot self-supervised method for pseudo-label generation in the frequency domain for low-dose CT denoising. Leveraging the characteristic of the frequency domain that largely isolates noise from clean signals, a regional low-frequency anchoring technique is proposed. Phase-preserving amplitude modulation and mask perturbation in the high-frequency region generate pseudo-label data for self-supervision. The fluctuating noise variance in the projection domain prompts truncation of the generated samples to stabilize the network's optimization gradient. Evaluation results on multiple public and real-world datasets confirm the clinical application potential of this research, which will have a revolutionary impact on the field of denoising. The code can be obtained from this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出首个频域零样本自监督方法FrequencyCT，利用低频锚定与高频扰动生成伪标签用于低剂量CT去噪。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CT去噪方法很少利用投影域数据特性来抑制噪声相关性，导致去噪效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在无配对数据条件下，利用频域特性生成有效伪标签以实现低剂量CT自监督去噪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 频域能较大程度分离噪声与干净信号；投影域噪声方差波动导致网络优化梯度不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出FrequencyCT，包含区域低频锚定技术、相位保持幅度调制和高频掩码扰动生成伪标签，并通过投影域样本截断稳定梯度。
contributions: 首个频域零样本自监督伪标签生成方法用于低剂量CT去噪
提出区域低频锚定和相位保持幅度调制等关键技术
analysis.experiments: 在多个公开和真实数据集上评估，确认临床应用潜力。
limitations: 可能对高频细节保留有限
投影域截断策略的通用性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个频域零样本自监督方法FrequencyCT，利用低频锚定与高频扰动生成伪标签用于低剂量CT去噪。

papers.title: Polygon-mamba: Retinal vessel segmentation using polygon scanning mamba and space-frequency collaborative attention
papers.abstract: Retinal vessel segmentation is crucial for diagnosis and assessment of ocular diseases. Notably, segmentation of small retinal vessels has been consistently recognized as a challenging and complex task. To tackle this challenge, we design a hybrid CNN-Mamba fusion network that integrates polygon scanning mamba and space-frequency collaborative attention mechanism for the detection of small vessels. Considering that the traditional mamba architecture with horizontal-vertical scanning may compromise the topological integrity of target structures and result in local discontinuities in small retinal vessels, we present a polygon scanning visual state space model (PS-VSS) to identify small vessel structural features by multi-layer reverse scanning way. Which effectively preserves pixels connectivity, thereby substantially mitigating the loss of information pertaining to small vessels. Furthermore, as we all known that the spatial domain prioritizes positional and structural information, while the frequency domain emphasizes global perception and local detail components, a space-frequency collaborative attention mechanism (SFCAM) is introduced within the skip connection to extract efficient features from the spatial and frequency domains. This strategy empowers the model to dynamically enhance the key features while effectively suppressing clutters. To assess the efficacy of our model, it was tested on three publicly available datasets: DRIVE, STARE, and CHASE_DB1. Compared to manual annotations, our model demonstrated F1 scores of 0.8283, 0.8282, and 0.8251, Area Under Curve (AUC) values of 0.9806, 0.9840, and 0.9866, and Sensitivity (SE) values of of 0.8268, 0.8314, and 0.8484 across three datasets, respectively. The effectiveness of our model was validated through both visual inspection and quantitative analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出多边形扫描Mamba和空频协同注意力机制，提升视网膜小血管分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 视网膜血管分割对眼科疾病诊断至关重要，但小血管分割因拓扑结构易断裂、信息丢失而极具挑战。
analysis.problem: 传统Mamba的水平-垂直扫描会破坏小血管的拓扑完整性，导致局部不连续；空间域和频率域特征未有效协同。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统Mamba扫描方式导致小血管像素连接性丢失，产生局部不连续；空间域侧重位置结构，频率域侧重全局细节，两者互补。
analysis.method: 设计混合CNN-Mamba融合网络，包含多边形扫描视觉状态空间模型（PS-VSS）以多层反向扫描保留像素连接性，以及空频协同注意力机制（SFCAM）在跳跃连接中动态增强关键特征并抑制杂波。
contributions: 提出多边形扫描Mamba（PS-VSS），通过多层反向扫描保留小血管拓扑完整性。
引入空频协同注意力机制（SFCAM），融合空间和频率域特征提升分割性能。
analysis.experiments: 在DRIVE、STARE、CHASE_DB1三个公开数据集上测试，F1分数分别为0.8283、0.8282、0.8251，AUC分别为0.9806、0.9840、0.9866，灵敏度分别为0.8268、0.8314、0.8484。
limitations: 可能仅在视网膜血管分割任务上验证，泛化性未知。
计算复杂度可能较高，未提及推理速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多边形扫描Mamba和空频协同注意力机制，提升视网膜小血管分割精度。

papers.title: SenseBench: A Benchmark for Remote Sensing Low-Level Visual Perception and Description in Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Low-level visual perception underpins reliable remote sensing (RS) image analysis, yet current image quality assessment (IQA) methods output uninterpretable scalar scores rather than characterizing physics-driven RS degradations, deviating markedly from the diagnostic needs of RS experts. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) present a compelling alternative by delivering language-grounded IQA, their visual priors are heavily biased toward ground-level natural images. Consequently, whether VLMs can overcome this domain gap to perceive and articulate RS artifacts remains insufficiently studied. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{SenseBench}, the first dedicated diagnostic benchmark for RS low-level visual perception and description. Driven by a physics-based hierarchical taxonomy that unifies both non-reference and reference-based paradigms, SenseBench features over 10K meticulously curated instances across 6 major and 22 fine-grained RS degradation categories. Specifically, two complementary protocols are designed for evaluation: objective low-level visual \textit{perception} and subjective diagnostic \textit{description}. Comprehensive evaluation of 29 state-of-the-art VLMs reveals not only skewed domain priors and multi-distortion collapse, but also \textit{fluency illusion} and a \textit{perception-description inversion} effect. We hope SenseBench provides a robust evaluation testbed and high-quality diagnostic data to advance the development of VLMs in RS low-level perception. Code and datasets are available \href{ this https URL }{\textcolor{blue}{here}}.

analysis.tldr: 首个遥感低层视觉感知与描述诊断基准，揭示VLM在遥感退化感知中的领域偏差与幻觉问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感图像质量评估方法输出不可解释的标量分数，无法满足遥感专家对物理退化诊断的需求；VLM虽能提供语言化的质量评估，但其视觉先验偏向地面自然图像，能否克服领域差距感知遥感伪影尚未充分研究。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门评估VLM在遥感低层视觉感知与描述能力的诊断基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估29个VLM发现：领域先验偏斜、多失真坍缩、流畅性幻觉以及感知-描述反转效应。
analysis.method: 提出SenseBench基准，包含基于物理分层分类法的10K+实例，覆盖6大类22种遥感退化，设计客观感知与主观描述两种互补评估协议。
contributions: 首个针对遥感低层视觉感知与描述的诊断基准SenseBench
基于物理的分层分类法统一无参考与全参考范式
系统评估揭示VLM在遥感退化感知中的多种失败模式
analysis.experiments: 在29个SOTA VLM上进行了全面评估，发现领域偏差、多失真坍缩、流畅性幻觉和感知-描述反转效应。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖22种退化类别，可能未涵盖所有遥感退化类型
评估主要基于现有VLM，未涉及针对遥感微调的模型
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个遥感低层视觉感知与描述诊断基准，揭示VLM在遥感退化感知中的领域偏差与幻觉问题。

papers.title: VeloGauss: Learning Physically Consistent Gaussian Velocity Fields from Videos
papers.abstract: In this paper, we aim to jointly model the geometry, appearance, and physical information of 3D scenes solely from dynamic multi-view videos, without relying on any physical priors. Existing works typically employ physical losses merely as soft constraints or integrate physical simulations into neural networks; however, these approaches often fail to effectively learn complex motion physics. Although modeling velocity fields holds the potential to capture authentic physical information, due to the lack of appropriate physical constraints, current methods are unable to correctly learn the interaction mechanisms between rigid and non-rigid particles. To address this, we propose VeloGauss, designed to learn the physical properties of complex dynamic 3D scenes without physical priors. Our method learns the velocity field for each Gaussian particle by introducing a Physics Code and a Particle Dynamics System, and ultimately incorporates Global Physical Constraints to ensure the physical consistency of the scene. Extensive experiments on four public datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms achieves state-of-the-art performance in both Novel View Interpolation and Future Frame Extrapolation tasks.

analysis.tldr: VeloGauss通过物理编码和粒子动力学系统从视频中学习3D高斯粒子的速度场，实现物理一致的动态场景建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法仅将物理损失作为软约束或集成物理模拟到神经网络中，无法有效学习复杂运动物理，且缺乏物理先验时难以正确建模刚性与非刚性粒子的交互机制。
analysis.problem: 如何从动态多视角视频中联合建模3D场景的几何、外观和物理信息，而不依赖任何物理先验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VeloGauss，为每个高斯粒子学习速度场，通过引入物理编码和粒子动力学系统，并施加全局物理约束确保场景的物理一致性。
contributions: 提出一种无需物理先验即可学习复杂动态3D场景物理属性的方法。
在四个公开数据集上的新视角插值和未来帧外推任务中达到最先进性能。
analysis.experiments: 在四个公开数据集上进行了实验，在新视角插值和未来帧外推任务中取得了最先进性能。
limitations: 可能对大规模场景或长时间序列的计算开销较大。
物理约束的全局性可能在某些局部细节上不够精确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VeloGauss通过物理编码和粒子动力学系统从视频中学习3D高斯粒子的速度场，实现物理一致的动态场景建模。

papers.title: DeepSight: Long-Horizon World Modeling via Latent States Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving systems are increasingly integrating Vision-Language Model (VLM) architectures, incorporating text reasoning or visual reasoning to enhance the robustness and accuracy of driving decisions. However, the reasoning mechanisms employed in most methods are direct adaptations from general domains, lacking in-depth exploration tailored to autonomous driving scenarios, particularly within visual reasoning modules. In this paper, we propose a driving world model that performs parallel prediction of latent semantic features for consecutive future frames in the bird's-eye-view (BEV) space, thereby enabling long-horizon modeling of future world states. We also introduce an efficient and adaptive text reasoning mechanism that utilizes additional social knowledge and reasoning capabilities to further improve driving performance in challenging long-tail scenarios. We present a novel, efficient, and effective approach that achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on the closed-loop Bench2drive benchmark. Codes are available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在BEV空间预测未来帧潜在语义特征的驾驶世界模型，实现长时域建模，并在闭环基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统虽引入VLM架构，但推理机制多直接迁移自通用领域，缺乏针对驾驶场景的深度探索，尤其在视觉推理模块中。
analysis.problem: 如何实现面向自动驾驶的长时域世界建模，并利用文本推理提升长尾场景下的驾驶性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在BEV空间中对连续未来帧的潜在语义特征进行并行预测，实现长时域世界状态建模；同时引入高效自适应文本推理机制，利用社会知识和推理能力改善长尾场景表现。
contributions: 提出一种驾驶世界模型，通过预测未来帧潜在语义特征实现长时域建模。
设计高效自适应文本推理机制，提升长尾场景下的驾驶性能。
在闭环Bench2drive基准上达到SOTA结果。
analysis.experiments: 在闭环Bench2drive基准上评估，达到SOTA结果。
limitations: 可能依赖BEV空间表示的质量。
长尾场景的泛化能力需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在BEV空间预测未来帧潜在语义特征的驾驶世界模型，实现长时域建模，并在闭环基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: EnergyLens: Interpretable Closed-Form Energy Models for Multimodal LLM Inference Serving
papers.abstract: As large language models span dense, mixture-of-experts, and state-space architectures and are deployed on heterogeneous accelerators under increasingly diverse multimodal workloads, optimising inference energy has become as critical as optimizing latency and throughput. Existing approaches either treat latency as an energy proxy or rely on data-hungry black-box surrogates. Both fail under varying parallelism strategies: latency and energy optima diverge in over 20% of configurations we tested, and black-box surrogates require hundreds of profiling samples to generalize across model families and hardware. We present EnergyLens, which uses symbolic regression as a structure-discovery tool over profiling data to derive a single twelve-parameter closed-form energy model expressed in terms of system properties such as degree of parallelism, batch size, and sequence length. Unlike black-box surrogates, EnergyLens decouples tensor and pipeline parallelism contributions and separates prefill from decode energy, making its predictions physically interpretable and actionable. Fitted from as few as 50 profiling measurements, EnergyLens achieves 88.2% Top-1 configuration selection accuracy across many evaluation scenarios compared to 60.9% for the closest prior analytical baseline, matches the predictive accuracy of ensemble ML methods with 10x fewer profiling samples, and extrapolates reliably to unseen batch sizes and hardware platforms without structural modification, making it a practical, interpretable tool for energy-optimal LLM deployment.

analysis.tldr: EnergyLens 通过符号回归从少量 profiling 数据中推导出可解释的闭式能量模型，用于多模态 LLM 推理服务的能量优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着 LLM 架构多样化和多模态工作负载增加，推理能量优化变得与延迟和吞吐量同等重要。现有方法要么将延迟作为能量代理，要么依赖数据密集的黑盒代理，两者在变并行策略下均失效：延迟与能量最优配置在超过 20% 的测试配置中不一致，且黑盒代理需要数百个 profiling 样本才能泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何从少量 profiling 数据中推导出可解释、物理意义明确且能准确预测 LLM 推理能量的闭式模型，以支持能量最优的部署配置选择。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 延迟和能量最优配置在超过 20% 的测试配置中不一致，表明延迟不能作为能量的可靠代理；黑盒代理需要大量 profiling 样本才能跨模型族和硬件泛化。
analysis.method: 使用符号回归作为结构发现工具，从 profiling 数据中推导出一个包含 12 个参数的闭式能量模型，该模型以系统属性（如并行度、批大小、序列长度）表示，解耦张量并行和流水线并行贡献，并分离预填充和解码能量。
contributions: 提出 EnergyLens，一种可解释的闭式能量模型，仅需 50 个 profiling 样本即可拟合。
在多种评估场景下，EnergyLens 的 Top-1 配置选择准确率达到 88.2%，远超最接近的先前分析基线（60.9%）。
EnergyLens 的预测精度与集成 ML 方法相当，但 profiling 样本需求减少 10 倍，且能可靠外推到未见过的批大小和硬件平台。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了 Top-1 配置选择准确率（88.2% vs 60.9%）和与集成 ML 方法的比较。
limitations: 模型参数固定为 12 个，可能无法捕捉所有硬件或架构的细微能量特性。
依赖 profiling 数据，对于全新架构或硬件可能需要重新拟合。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EnergyLens 通过符号回归从少量 profiling 数据中推导出可解释的闭式能量模型，用于多模态 LLM 推理服务的能量优化。

papers.title: TIE: Time Interval Encoding for Video Generation over Events
papers.abstract: Director-style prompting, robotic action prediction, and interactive video agents demand temporal grounding over concurrent events -- a regime in which 68% of general clips and over 99% of robotics/gameplay clips contain overlapping events, yet existing multi-event generators rest on a single-active-prompt assumption. However, modern video generators, such as Diffusion Transformers (DiT), represent time as discrete points through point-wise positional encodings. This formulation creates a fundamental dimension mismatch: temporally extended intervals and overlapping events are mathematically unrepresentable to the attention mechanism. In this paper, we propose Time Interval Encoding (TIE), a principled, plug-and-play interval-aware generalization of rotary embeddings that elevates time intervals to first-class primitives inside DiT cross-attention. Rather than introducing another heuristic interval embedding, we show that, within RoPE-compatible bilinear attention, TIE is characterized by two basic principles: Temporal Integrability, which requires an event to aggregate positional evidence over its full duration, and Duration Invariance, which removes the trivial bias toward longer intervals. Under a uniform kernel, this characterization yields an efficient closed-form sinc-based solution that preserves the standard attention interface and naturally attenuates boundary noise through interval integration. Empirically, TIE preserves the visual quality of the base DiT model while substantially improving temporal controllability. In our experiments on the OmniEvents dataset, it improves human-verified Temporal Constraint Satisfaction Rate from 77.34% to 96.03% and reduces temporal boundary error from 0.261s to 0.073s, while also improving trajectory-level temporal alignment metrics. The code and dataset are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出时间区间编码（TIE），将时间区间作为DiT交叉注意力的一等公民，显著提升视频生成中重叠事件的时间可控性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成器假设单活跃提示，无法处理实际视频中普遍存在的重叠事件（68%通用片段、99%机器人/游戏片段），而DiT的点式位置编码无法表示时间区间和重叠事件。
analysis.problem: 解决视频生成中重叠事件的时间区间表示问题，使DiT能够感知事件持续时间并实现精确时间控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Time Interval Encoding (TIE)，一种基于RoPE的区间感知编码，通过时间可积性和持续时间不变性两个原则，推导出闭式sinc解，作为即插即用模块嵌入DiT交叉注意力。
contributions: 提出TIE，将时间区间作为DiT交叉注意力的一等公民，解决点式编码无法表示重叠事件的问题。
通过时间可积性和持续时间不变性两个原则，推导出高效的闭式sinc解，保持标准注意力接口并自然衰减边界噪声。
analysis.experiments: 在OmniEvents数据集上，TIE将人工验证的时间约束满足率从77.34%提升至96.03%，时间边界误差从0.261s降至0.073s，并改善了轨迹级时间对齐指标。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于RoPE的DiT架构，对其他注意力机制的泛化性未知。
实验仅在单一数据集上进行，未在更多样化的视频生成场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时间区间编码（TIE），将时间区间作为DiT交叉注意力的一等公民，显著提升视频生成中重叠事件的时间可控性。

papers.title: GemDepth: Geometry-Embedded Features for 3D-Consistent Video Depth
papers.abstract: Video depth estimation extends monocular prediction into the temporal domain to ensure coherence. However, existing methods often suffer from spatial blurring in fine-detail regions and temporal inconsistencies. We argue that current approaches, which primarily rely on temporal smoothing via Transformers, struggle to maintain strict 3D geometric consistency-particularly under rotations or drastic view changes. To address this, we propose GemDepth, a framework built on the insight that an explicit awareness of camera motion and global 3D structure is a prerequisite for 3D consistency. Distinctively, GemDepth introduces a Geometry-Embedding Module (GEM) that predicts inter-frame camera poses to generate implicit geometric embeddings. This injection of motion priors equips the network with intrinsic 3D perception and alignment capabilities. Guided by these geometric cues, our Alternating Spatio-Temporal Transformer (ASTT) captures latent point-level correspondences to simultaneously enhance spatial precision for sharp details and enforce rigorous temporal consistency. Furthermore, GemDepth employs a data-efficient training strategy, effectively bridging the gap between high efficiency and robust geometric consistency. As shown in Fig.2, comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that GemDepth achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple datasets, particularly in complex dynamic scenarios. The code is publicly available at: this https URL

analysis.tldr: GemDepth通过显式嵌入相机运动先验和交替时空Transformer，实现了3D一致的视频深度估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频深度估计方法在精细区域存在空间模糊和时间不一致问题，尤其在旋转或剧烈视角变化下难以保持严格的3D几何一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现视频深度估计中精细细节的空间精度与跨帧时间一致性的统一，并保证3D几何一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基于Transformer的时间平滑方法在旋转或视角变化下无法维持3D几何一致性。
analysis.method: 提出GemDepth框架，包含几何嵌入模块（GEM）预测帧间相机姿态生成隐式几何嵌入，以及交替时空Transformer（ASTT）捕捉点级对应关系，同时增强空间精度和时间一致性。
contributions: 提出几何嵌入模块（GEM）显式注入相机运动先验，赋予网络3D感知和对齐能力。
设计交替时空Transformer（ASTT）同时提升空间细节和时间一致性。
采用数据高效训练策略，平衡效率与几何鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上达到最先进性能，尤其在复杂动态场景中表现优异。
limitations: 可能对极端运动或遮挡场景的鲁棒性有限。
几何嵌入模块依赖相机姿态预测精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GemDepth通过显式嵌入相机运动先验和交替时空Transformer，实现了3D一致的视频深度估计。

papers.title: Improving Human Image Animation via Semantic Representation Alignment
papers.abstract: The field of image-to-video generation has made remarkable progress. However, challenges such as human limb twisting and facial distortion persist, especially when generating long videos or modeling intensive motions. Existing human image animation works address these issues by incorporating human-specific semantic representations, e.g., dense poses or ID embeddings, as additional conditions. However, conditioning on these representations could decrease the generation flexibility. Moreover, their reliance on RGB pixel supervision also lacks emphasis on learning necessary 3D geometric relationships and temporal coherence. In contrast, we introduce a novel approach named SemanticREPA that leverages these semantic representations as supervision signals through representation alignment. Specifically, we begin by training a structure alignment module that aligns the structure representations obtained from video latents with video depth estimation features. We then fix the pretrained module, and utilize it to provide additional supervision on the structure representations of the diffusion models, achieving structure rectification to generate coherent and stable human structures. Simultaneously, we develop an ID alignment module to align the ID representations of the generated videos to face recognition features. We further propose to use the predicted structure representations to refine identity restoration in relevant regions. With structure and ID alignment, our method demonstrates superior quality on extended character motions and enhanced character consistency.

analysis.tldr: 通过语义表示对齐提升人体图像动画生成的质量与一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像到视频生成中，人体肢体扭曲和面部畸变问题突出，尤其在长视频或剧烈运动时；现有方法依赖密集姿态或ID嵌入等语义表示作为条件，降低了生成灵活性，且RGB像素监督缺乏对3D几何关系和时序一致性的强调。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲生成灵活性的前提下，提升人体图像动画中人体结构的稳定性和身份一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法依赖额外语义表示（如密集姿态、ID嵌入）作为条件，导致生成灵活性下降；同时，仅使用RGB像素监督难以学习必要的3D几何关系和时序连贯性。
analysis.method: 提出SemanticREPA方法，通过表示对齐利用语义表示作为监督信号：1）训练结构对齐模块，将视频潜变量的结构表示与视频深度估计特征对齐，然后固定该模块为扩散模型提供结构监督，实现结构矫正；2）开发ID对齐模块，将生成视频的ID表示与人脸识别特征对齐，并利用预测的结构表示优化相关区域的身份恢复。
contributions: 提出利用语义表示作为监督信号而非条件，通过表示对齐提升生成质量。
设计结构对齐模块和ID对齐模块，分别改善人体结构稳定性和身份一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖深度估计和人脸识别特征的准确性。
对齐模块的额外训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过语义表示对齐提升人体图像动画生成的质量与一致性。

papers.title: DuetFair: Coupling Inter- and Intra-Subgroup Robustness for Fair Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Medical image segmentation models can perform unevenly across subgroups. Most existing fairness methods focus on improving average subgroup performance, implicitly treating each subgroup as internally homogeneous. However, this can hide difficult cases within a subgroup, where high-loss samples are obscured by the subgroup mean. We call this problem \textbf{intra-group hidden failure}. To solve this, we propose \textbf{DuetFair} mechanism, a dual-axis fairness framework that jointly considers inter-subgroup adaptation and intra-subgroup robustness. Based on DuetFair, we introduce \textbf{FairDRO}, which combines distribution-aware mixture-of-experts (dMoE) with subgroup-conditioned distributionally robust optimization (DRO) loss aggregation. This design allows the model to adapt across subgroups while also reducing hidden failures within each subgroup. We evaluate FairDRO on three medical image segmentation benchmarks with varying degrees of within-group heterogeneity. FairDRO achieves the best equity-scaled performance on Harvard-FairSeg and improves worst-case subgroup performance on HAM10000 under both age- and race-based grouping schemes. On the 3D radiotherapy target cohort, FairDRO further improves worst-group Dice by 3.5 points ($\uparrow 6.0\%$) under the tumor-stage grouping and by 4.1 points ($\uparrow 7.4\%$) under the institution grouping over the strongest baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出DuetFair双轴公平框架，通过FairDRO方法同时提升医学图像分割的组间适应性和组内鲁棒性，缓解组内隐藏失败问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学图像分割公平性方法主要关注提升子组平均性能，但忽略了子组内部的异质性，导致困难样本被掩盖，即组内隐藏失败问题。
analysis.problem: 解决医学图像分割中因忽视子组内部异质性而导致的组内隐藏失败问题，实现组间公平和组内鲁棒。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到现有公平方法将子组视为同质，导致高损失样本被子组均值掩盖，即组内隐藏失败现象。
analysis.method: 提出DuetFair双轴公平框架，包含分布感知混合专家（dMoE）和子组条件分布鲁棒优化（DRO）损失聚合，同时优化组间适应性和组内鲁棒性。
contributions: 首次识别并定义医学图像分割中的组内隐藏失败问题。
提出DuetFair框架和FairDRO方法，联合优化组间和组内公平性。
在三个医学图像分割基准上取得最佳公平缩放性能，显著提升最差子组性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Harvard-FairSeg、HAM10000和3D放疗靶区数据集上评估，FairDRO在Harvard-FairSeg上取得最佳公平缩放性能，在HAM10000上提升最差子组性能，在3D数据集上最差组Dice提升3.5-4.1点。
limitations: 可能依赖子组标签的可用性。
方法复杂度较高，可能增加训练开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DuetFair双轴公平框架，通过FairDRO方法同时提升医学图像分割的组间适应性和组内鲁棒性，缓解组内隐藏失败问题。

papers.title: Simultaneous Long-tailed Recognition and Multi-modal Fusion for Highly Imbalanced Multi-modal Data
papers.abstract: Long-tailed distributions in class-imbalanced data present a fundamental challenge for deep learning models, which tend to be biased toward majority classes. While recent methods for long-tailed recognition have mitigated this issue, they are largely restricted to single-modal inputs and cannot fully exploit complementary information from diverse data sources. In this work, we introduce a new framework for long-tailed recognition that explicitly handles multi-modal inputs. Our approach extends multi-expert architectures to the multi-modal setting by fusing heterogeneous data into a unified representation while leveraging modality-specific networks to estimate the informativeness of each modality. These confidence-guided weights dynamically modulate the fusion process, ensuring that more informative modalities contribute more strongly to the final decision. To further enhance performance, we design specialized training and test procedures that accommodate diverse modality combinations, including images and tabular data. Extensive experiments on benchmark and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach not only effectively integrates multi-modal information but also outperforms existing methods in handling long-tailed, class-imbalanced scenarios, highlighting its robustness and generalization capability.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态长尾识别框架，通过置信度引导的动态融合提升不平衡多模态数据性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长尾识别方法局限于单模态输入，无法利用多模态数据的互补信息，而真实场景中数据常呈长尾分布且包含多种模态。
analysis.problem: 如何同时处理多模态融合和类别不平衡问题，使模型在高度不平衡的多模态数据上实现鲁棒识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 扩展多专家架构至多模态，通过模态特定网络估计每个模态的信息量，并用置信度权重动态调制融合过程，同时设计适应不同模态组合的训练和测试流程。
contributions: 提出首个同时处理长尾识别和多模态融合的框架。
设计置信度引导的动态融合机制，有效整合异构多模态数据。
在基准和真实数据集上验证了方法的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在基准和真实数据集上进行实验，结果表明方法有效整合多模态信息并优于现有长尾识别方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖模态特定网络的设计质量。
未讨论计算开销或对缺失模态的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态长尾识别框架，通过置信度引导的动态融合提升不平衡多模态数据性能。

papers.title: M$^2$E-UAV: A Benchmark and Analysis for Onboard Motion-on-Motion Event-Based Tiny UAV Detection
papers.abstract: Tiny UAV detection from an onboard event camera is difficult when the observer and target move at the same time. In this motion-on-motion regime, ego-motion activates background edges across buildings, vegetation, and horizon structures, while the UAV may appear as a sparse event cluster. To explore this practical problem, we present M$^2$E-UAV, a benchmark and analysis setup for onboard motion-on-motion event-based tiny UAV detection. The processed M$^2$E-UAV benchmark contains 87,223 training samples and 21,395 validation samples across four scene families: sunny building-forest, sunny farm-village, sunset building-forest, and sunset farm-village. We provide M$^2$E-Point, a point-based event baseline, and M$^2$E-Point + IMU, an IMU-conditioned variant, to analyze the role of inertial cues under onboard motion-on-motion detection. M$^2$E-Point encodes events as $[x,y,t,p]$ point sets, extracts local event structure with EdgeConv, and predicts event-level UAV foreground scores, from which bounding boxes are derived via DBSCAN. Our validation-stage analysis shows that point-based event modeling is a strong baseline, while simple IMU conditioning provides only marginal aggregate gains. Under the train/validation split, M$^2$E-Point achieves 0.9673 F1 and 0.5501 mAP50-95, while the IMU-conditioned variant reaches 0.5561 mAP50-95 with only marginal aggregate changes, serving as an initial baseline for future exploration in this domain. Code will be ready in this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出首个面向机载运动-运动事件相机微小无人机检测的基准M²E-UAV，并给出基于点的基线方法M²E-Point。
analysis.research_motivation: 机载事件相机在观测者和目标同时运动时，背景边缘噪声严重，微小无人机检测极具挑战，现有基准和方法缺乏对此场景的专门研究。
analysis.problem: 解决机载事件相机在运动-运动场景下微小无人机的检测问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出M²E-Point基线，将事件编码为[x,y,t,p]点集，使用EdgeConv提取局部事件结构，预测事件级无人机前景分数，再通过DBSCAN聚类得到边界框；并引入IMU条件变体。
contributions: 构建了首个面向机载运动-运动事件相机微小无人机检测的基准M²E-UAV，包含87,223训练样本和21,395验证样本，覆盖四种场景。
提出了基于点的基线方法M²E-Point及其IMU条件变体，为后续研究提供初始基线。
analysis.experiments: 在M²E-UAV基准上验证，M²E-Point达到0.9673 F1和0.5501 mAP50-95，IMU条件变体达到0.5561 mAP50-95，IMU仅带来边际提升。
limitations: IMU条件化带来的性能提升有限，可能需更复杂的融合策略。
仅基于点的事件表示，未探索其他事件表示（如体素网格）的潜力。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个面向机载运动-运动事件相机微小无人机检测的基准M²E-UAV，并给出基于点的基线方法M²E-Point。

papers.title: OpenSGA: Efficient 3D Scene Graph Alignment in the Open World
papers.abstract: Scene graph alignment establishes object correspondences between two 3D scene graphs constructed from partially overlapping observations. This enables efficient scene understanding and object-level relocalization when a robot revisits a place, as well as global map fusion across multiple agents. Such capabilities are essential for robots that require long-term memory for long-horizon tasks involving interactions with the environment. Existing approaches mainly focus on subscan-to-subscan (S2S) alignment and depend heavily on geometric point-cloud features, leaving frame-to-scan (F2S) alignment and open-set vision-language features underexplored. In addition, existing datasets for scene graph alignment remain small-scale with limited object diversity, constraining systematic training and evaluation. We present a unified and efficient scene graph alignment framework that predicts object correspondences by fusing vision-language, textual, and geometric features with spatial context. The framework comprises modules such as a distance-gated spatial attention encoder, a minimum-cost-flow-based allocator, and a global scene embedding generator to achieve accurate alignment even under large coordinate discrepancies. We further introduce ScanNet-SG, a large-scale dataset generated via an automated annotation pipeline with over 700k samples, covering 509 object categories from ScanNet labels and over 3k categories from GPT-4o-based tagging. Experiments show that our method achieves the best overall performance on both F2S and S2S tasks, substantially outperforming existing scene graph alignment methods. Our code and dataset are released at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出统一高效的3D场景图对齐框架OpenSGA，融合视觉-语言、文本和几何特征，并构建大规模数据集ScanNet-SG，在帧到扫描和子扫描到子扫描任务上均达到最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D场景图对齐对于机器人长期记忆和多智能体地图融合至关重要，但现有方法依赖几何点云特征且局限于子扫描到子扫描对齐，缺乏对帧到扫描对齐和开放集视觉-语言特征的探索，同时现有数据集规模小、物体多样性有限。
analysis.problem: 如何实现开放世界中高效且准确的3D场景图对齐，包括帧到扫描和子扫描到子扫描两种任务，并解决现有数据集不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一框架，融合视觉-语言、文本和几何特征与空间上下文，包含距离门控空间注意力编码器、基于最小成本流的分配器和全局场景嵌入生成器，实现大坐标差异下的精确对齐。
contributions: 提出OpenSGA，一个统一高效的3D场景图对齐框架，支持帧到扫描和子扫描到子扫描任务。
构建ScanNet-SG大规模数据集，包含超过70万样本，覆盖509个ScanNet类别和3000多个GPT-4o标签类别。
analysis.experiments: 在帧到扫描和子扫描到子扫描任务上，所提方法均取得最佳整体性能，显著优于现有场景图对齐方法。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视觉-语言模型，在极端开放场景下泛化性有限。
数据集虽大但仅基于ScanNet，可能缺乏真实机器人场景的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一高效的3D场景图对齐框架OpenSGA，融合视觉-语言、文本和几何特征，并构建大规模数据集ScanNet-SG，在帧到扫描和子扫描到子扫描任务上均达到最优。

papers.title: Adaptive Context Matters: Towards Provable Multi-Modality Guidance for Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Super-resolution (SR) is a severely ill-posed problem with inherent ambiguity, as widely recognized in both empirical and theoretical studies. Although recent semantic-guided and multi-modal SR methods exploit large models or external priors to enhance semantic alignment, the fusion of heterogeneous modalities remains insufficiently understood in practice and theory. In this work, we provide the first theoretical modeling of multi-modal SR, revealing that prior methods are bottlenecked by sub-optimal modality utilization. Our analysis shows that the generalization risk bound can be improved by strengthening the alignment between modality weights and their effective contributions, while reducing representation complexity. This theoretical insight inspires us to propose the novel Multi-Modal Mixture-of-Experts Super-Resolution framework (M$^3$ESR) that employs generalization-oriented dynamic modality fusion for accurate risk control and modality contribution optimization. In detail, we propose a novel spatially dynamic modality weighting module and a temporally adaptive modality temperature scheduling mechanism, enabling flexible and adaptive spatial-temporal modality weighting for effective risk control. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our M$^3$ESR significantly boosts generalization and semantic consistency performances, which confirms our superiority.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态混合专家超分框架M³ESR，通过动态模态融合提升泛化与语义一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 超分辨率是严重病态问题，现有语义引导和多模态方法虽利用大模型或外部先验增强语义对齐，但异质模态融合在实践和理论上理解不足。
analysis.problem: 多模态超分辨率中模态利用次优，导致泛化风险高和语义一致性差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 理论分析表明，先验方法受限于次优模态利用，泛化风险界可通过加强模态权重与其有效贡献的对齐并降低表示复杂度来改进。
analysis.method: 提出M³ESR框架，包含空间动态模态权重模块和时间自适应模态温度调度机制，实现灵活的自适应时空模态权重以优化风险控制。
contributions: 首次对多模态超分辨率进行理论建模，揭示模态利用瓶颈。
提出M³ESR框架，通过动态模态融合提升泛化与语义一致性。
analysis.experiments: 大量实验表明M³ESR显著提升泛化和语义一致性性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模态组合，泛化性需进一步验证。
动态权重机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态混合专家超分框架M³ESR，通过动态模态融合提升泛化与语义一致性。

papers.title: Automated Detection of Abnormalities in Zebrafish Development
papers.abstract: Zebrafish embryos are a valuable model for drug discovery due to their optical transparency and genetic similarity to humans. However, current evaluations rely on manual inspection, which is costly and labor-intensive. While machine learning offers automation potential, progress is limited by the lack of comprehensive datasets. To address this, we introduce a large-scale dataset of high-resolution microscopic image sequences capturing zebrafish embryonic development under both control conditions and exposure to compounds (3,4-dichloroaniline). This dataset, with expert annotations at fine-grained temporal levels, supports two benchmarking tasks: (1) fertility classification, assessing zebrafish egg viability (130,368 images), and (2) toxicity assessment, detecting malformations induced by toxic exposure over time (55,296 images). Alongside the dataset, we present the first transformer-based baseline model that integrates spatiotemporal features to predict developmental abnormalities at early stages. Experimental results present the model's effectiveness, achieving 98% accuracy in fertility classification and 92% in toxicity assessment. These findings underscore the potential of automated approaches to enhance zebrafish-based toxicity analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个斑马鱼胚胎发育异常检测的Transformer基线模型和大型数据集，实现高精度自动化分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 斑马鱼胚胎是药物发现的重要模型，但当前依赖人工检测，成本高且劳动密集；机器学习虽有潜力，但缺乏大规模标注数据集。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、精细标注的斑马鱼胚胎发育图像数据集，以及能早期预测发育异常的自动化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建大规模高分辨率显微图像序列数据集，包含对照和化合物暴露条件，并设计首个基于Transformer的模型，融合时空特征以预测早期发育异常。
contributions: 发布了大规模斑马鱼胚胎发育显微图像序列数据集，包含精细时间级别的专家标注。
提出了首个基于Transformer的基线模型，整合时空特征实现早期异常检测。
analysis.experiments: 在生育力分类（130,368张图像）和毒性评估（55,296张图像）两个基准任务上，模型分别达到98%和92%的准确率。
limitations: 仅针对单一化合物（3,4-二氯苯胺）进行毒性评估，泛化性待验证。
模型复杂度可能较高，实际部署需考虑计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个斑马鱼胚胎发育异常检测的Transformer基线模型和大型数据集，实现高精度自动化分析。

papers.title: Automated high-frequency quantification of fish communities and biomass using computer vision
papers.abstract: Quantifying fish community structure is essential for understanding biodiversity and ecosystem responses in a changing environment, yet existing survey methods provide limited high-frequency, quantitative observations. Conventional approaches, including catch-based methods, underwater visual censuses, and environmental DNA metabarcoding, either require intensive labor or lack reliable estimates of abundance and biomass. Here, we develop an automated framework for quantifying fish communities from underwater video using computer vision. Using videos acquired with a custom-made stereo camera system, the framework integrates deep learning-based fish identification, multi-object tracking, and 3D reconstruction to estimate species-level abundance and biomass. We applied the approach to a reef fish community over a 20-day period with hourly daytime observations, revealing dynamic fluctuations in species richness, abundance, and biomass associated with changes in species composition. By comparing fish communities estimated from visual census and environmental DNA surveys, we demonstrate that our method provides complementary strengths for continuous, non-invasive, and quantitative monitoring of consistently observed species. This approach provides a scalable foundation for long-term monitoring and advances the capacity to resolve fine-scale temporal dynamics in fish communities.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于计算机视觉的自动化框架，从水下视频中高频量化鱼类群落丰度和生物量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有鱼类群落调查方法（如捕捞、水下目视普查、环境DNA）要么劳动强度大，要么缺乏可靠的丰度和生物量估计，无法提供高频定量观测。
analysis.problem: 如何从水下视频中自动化、非侵入地实现物种级别的丰度和生物量高频量化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成深度学习鱼类识别、多目标跟踪和3D重建的自动化框架，处理定制立体相机系统获取的视频。
contributions: 开发了从水下视频自动量化鱼类群落丰度和生物量的完整框架。
通过20天每小时观测展示了物种丰富度、丰度和生物量的动态变化。
与目视普查和环境DNA比较，证明了方法在连续、非侵入、定量监测方面的互补优势。
analysis.experiments: 在珊瑚礁鱼类群落上进行了20天每小时白天观测，并与目视普查和环境DNA调查结果比较。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量立体相机系统，部署成本较高。
对光照、水质等水下环境条件敏感，可能影响识别和跟踪精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于计算机视觉的自动化框架，从水下视频中高频量化鱼类群落丰度和生物量。

papers.title: Uni-Synergy: Bridging Understanding and Generation for Personalized Reasoning via Co-operative Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) excel in general tasks but struggle to bridge the gap between personalized understanding and generation. Prior works largely rely on implicit token-level alignment via supervised fine-tuning, which fails to fully capture the potential synergy between comprehension and creation. In this work, we propose Sync-R1, an end-to-end reinforcement learning framework that jointly optimizes personalized understanding and generation within a single, explicit reasoning loop. Through this unified feedback process, Sync-R1 enables personalized comprehension to guide content creation, while the resulting generation quality reciprocally refines understanding within an integrated reward landscape. To efficiently orchestrate this dual-task synergy, we introduce Sync-GRPO, a reinforcement learning method utilizing an ensemble reward system. Furthermore, we propose Dynamic Group Scaling (DGS), which adaptively filters low-potential trajectories to reduce gradient variance and accelerate convergence. To better reflect real-world complexity, we introduce UnifyBench++, featuring denser textual descriptions and richer user contexts. Experimental results demonstrate that Sync-R1 achieves state-of-the-art performance, showcasing superior cross-task reasoning and robust personalization without requiring complex cold-start procedures. The code and the UnifyBench++ dataset will be released at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出Sync-R1框架，通过协同强化学习统一多模态模型的个性化理解与生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 统一多模态模型在通用任务上表现优异，但在个性化理解与生成之间仍存在鸿沟，现有方法依赖隐式token级对齐，未能充分挖掘两者协同潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个显式推理循环中联合优化个性化理解与生成，实现双向协同增强。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Sync-R1框架，包含Sync-GRPO（集成奖励系统的强化学习方法）和Dynamic Group Scaling（动态过滤低潜力轨迹以减少梯度方差并加速收敛）。
contributions: 提出Sync-R1，首个端到端强化学习框架，在统一推理循环中联合优化个性化理解与生成。
引入Sync-GRPO和Dynamic Group Scaling，实现高效的双任务协同训练。
构建UnifyBench++数据集，包含更密集的文本描述和丰富的用户上下文。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明Sync-R1达到最先进性能，展现出优越的跨任务推理和鲁棒个性化能力，无需复杂冷启动。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量奖励设计，泛化性待验证。
动态分组缩放策略的阈值选择可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Sync-R1框架，通过协同强化学习统一多模态模型的个性化理解与生成。

papers.title: Filtering Memorization from Parameter-Space in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become a widely used mechanism for customizing diffusion models, enabling users to inject new visual concepts or styles through lightweight parameter updates. However, LoRAs can memorize training images, causing generated outputs to reproduce copyrighted or sensitive content. This risk is particularly concerning in LoRA-sharing ecosystems, where users distribute trained LoRAs without releasing the underlying training data. Existing approaches for mitigating memorization rely on access to the training pipeline, training data, or control over the inference process, making them difficult to apply when only the released LoRA weights are available. We propose \textbf{Base-Anchored Filtering (BAF)}, a training-free and data-free framework for post-hoc memorization mitigation in diffusion LoRAs. BAF decomposes LoRA updates into spectral channels and measures their alignment with the principal subspace of the pretrained backbone. Channels strongly aligned with this subspace are retained as generalizable adaptations, while weakly aligned channels are suppressed as potential carriers of memorized content. Experiments on multiple datasets and diffusion backbones demonstrate that BAF consistently reduces memorization while preserving or even improving generation quality. Our code is available in the supplementary material.

analysis.tldr: 提出Base-Anchored Filtering (BAF)，一种无需训练和数据的后处理方法，通过谱分解和子空间对齐过滤扩散模型LoRA中的记忆化参数。
analysis.research_motivation: LoRA在扩散模型定制中广泛使用，但可能记忆训练图像，导致生成版权或敏感内容，尤其在LoRA共享生态中风险更大。现有方法依赖训练流程、数据或推理控制，难以应用于仅有权重的情况。
analysis.problem: 如何在不访问训练数据、训练流程或推理过程的情况下，后验地缓解扩散模型LoRA中的记忆化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LoRA更新中的某些谱通道与预训练骨干的主子空间强对齐，这些通道携带可泛化特征；而弱对齐的通道则可能记忆训练图像。
analysis.method: BAF将LoRA更新分解为谱通道，测量每个通道与预训练骨干主子空间的对齐程度，保留强对齐通道，抑制弱对齐通道。
contributions: 提出BAF，一种无需训练和数据的后处理方法，用于缓解扩散模型LoRA中的记忆化。
通过谱分解和子空间对齐，在减少记忆化的同时保持甚至提升生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和扩散骨干上实验，BAF一致减少记忆化并保持或提升生成质量。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于LoRA的微调，对其他参数高效微调方法效果未知。
依赖预训练骨干的主子空间，若骨干本身存在偏差可能影响效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Base-Anchored Filtering (BAF)，一种无需训练和数据的后处理方法，通过谱分解和子空间对齐过滤扩散模型LoRA中的记忆化参数。

papers.title: WorldReasonBench: Human-Aligned Stress Testing of Video Generators as Future World-State Predictors
papers.abstract: Commercial video generation systems such as Seedance2.0 and Veo3.1 have rapidly improved, strengthening the view that video generators may be evolving into "world simulators." Yet the community still lacks a benchmark that directly tests whether a model can reason about how an observed world should evolve over time. We introduce WorldReasonBench, which reframes video generation evaluation as world-state prediction: given an initial state and an action, can a model generate a future video whose state evolution remains physically, socially, logically, and informationally consistent? WorldReasonBench contains 436 curated test cases with structured ground-truth QA annotations spanning four reasoning dimensions and 22 subcategories. We evaluate generated videos with a human-aligned two-part methodology: Process-aware Reasoning Verification uses structured QA and reasoning-phase diagnostics to detect temporal and causal failures, while Multi-dimensional Quality Assessment scores reasoning quality, temporal consistency, and visual aesthetics for ranking and reward modeling. We further introduce WorldRewardBench, a preference benchmark with approximately 6K expert-annotated pairs over 1.4K videos, supporting pair-wise and point-wise reward-model evaluation. Across modern video generators, our results expose a persistent gap between visual plausibility and world reasoning: videos can look convincing while failing dynamics, causality, or information preservation. We will release our benchmarks and evaluation toolkit to support community research on genuinely world-aware video generation at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出WorldReasonBench基准，系统测试视频生成器作为世界状态预测器的推理能力，发现视觉逼真度与世界推理之间存在显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成评测主要关注视觉质量，缺乏对模型是否具备物理、社会、逻辑和信息一致性推理能力的直接测试，而视频生成器正被视为潜在的世界模拟器。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够直接评估视频生成模型在给定初始状态和动作后，预测未来世界状态演化一致性的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现代视频生成器生成的视频视觉上令人信服，但在动力学、因果关系或信息保持方面存在失败，表明视觉逼真度与世界推理之间存在系统性差距。
analysis.method: 构建包含436个测试用例的WorldReasonBench，覆盖四个推理维度（物理、社会、逻辑、信息）和22个子类别；提出两阶段评估方法：过程感知推理验证（结构化QA和推理阶段诊断）和多维质量评估（推理质量、时间一致性、视觉美学）。同时引入WorldRewardBench偏好基准（约6K专家标注对，1.4K视频）。
contributions: 提出WorldReasonBench基准，将视频生成评估重新定义为世界状态预测，包含结构化QA标注。
设计人类对齐的两部分评估方法，可检测时间性和因果性失败。
引入WorldRewardBench偏好基准，支持成对和逐点奖励模型评估。
实验揭示视觉逼真度与世界推理之间的差距，并开源基准和评估工具。
analysis.experiments: 在现代视频生成器上评估，结果显示视觉逼真度与世界推理之间存在持续差距，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准规模有限（436个测试用例），可能无法覆盖所有世界推理场景。
评估依赖结构化QA，可能无法完全捕捉开放域推理。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WorldReasonBench基准，系统测试视频生成器作为世界状态预测器的推理能力，发现视觉逼真度与世界推理之间存在显著差距。

papers.title: CoWorld-VLA: Thinking in a Multi-Expert World Model for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing reasoning mechanisms still struggle to provide planning-oriented intermediate representations: textual Chain-of-Thought (CoT) fails to preserve continuous spatiotemporal structure, while latent world reasoning remains difficult to use as a direct condition for action generation. In this paper, we propose CoWorld-VLA, a multi-expert world reasoning framework for autonomous driving, where world representations serve as explicit conditions to guide action planning. CoWorld-VLA extracts complementary world information through multi-source supervision and encodes it into expert tokens within the VLA, thereby providing planner-accessible conditioning signals. Specifically, we construct four types of tokens: semantic interaction, geometric structure, dynamic evolution, and ego trajectory tokens, which respectively model interaction intent, spatial structure, future temporal dynamics, and behavioral goals. During action generation, CoWorld-VLA employs a diffusion-based hierarchical multi-expert fusion planner, which is coupled with scene context throughout the joint denoising process to generate continuous ego trajectories. Experiments show that CoWorld-VLA achieves competitive results in both future scene generation and planning on the NAVSIM v1 benchmark, demonstrating strong performance in collision avoidance and trajectory accuracy. Ablation studies further validate the complementarity of expert tokens and their effectiveness as planning conditions for action generation. Code will be available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出多专家世界推理框架CoWorld-VLA，用世界表征作为显式条件引导自动驾驶动作规划。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型在端到端自动驾驶中缺乏面向规划的中间表征：文本CoT无法保留连续时空结构，隐式世界推理难以直接作为动作生成条件。
analysis.problem: 如何为自动驾驶VLA模型提供可访问的、规划导向的中间表征，以显式引导动作生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建四类专家token（语义交互、几何结构、动态演化、自车轨迹），通过多源监督提取互补世界信息，并采用扩散分层多专家融合规划器在联合去噪过程中生成连续自车轨迹。
contributions: 提出多专家世界推理框架CoWorld-VLA，将世界表征作为显式条件引导动作规划。
设计四类互补专家token，分别建模交互意图、空间结构、未来动态和行为目标。
在NAVSIM v1基准上实现有竞争力的未来场景生成和规划性能，验证了专家token的互补性和有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在NAVSIM v1基准上评估，结果显示在碰撞避免和轨迹精度方面表现强劲，消融研究验证了专家token的互补性。
limitations: 可能依赖多源监督数据的质量与可用性。
扩散规划器的实时性可能需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多专家世界推理框架CoWorld-VLA，用世界表征作为显式条件引导自动驾驶动作规划。

papers.title: Progressive Photorealistic Simplification
papers.abstract: Existing image simplification techniques often rely on Non-Photorealistic Rendering (NPR), transforming photographs into stylized sketches, cartoons, or paintings. While effective at reducing visual complexity, such approaches typically sacrifice photographic realism. In this work, we explore a complementary direction: simplifying images while preserving their photorealistic appearance. We introduce progressive semantic image simplification, a framework that iteratively reduces scene complexity by removing and inpainting elements in a controlled manner. At each step, the resulting image remains a plausible natural photograph. Our method combines semantic understanding with generative editing, leveraging Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to identify and prioritize elements for removal, and a learned verifier to ensure photorealism and coherence throughout the process. This is implemented via an iterative Select-Remove-Verify pipeline that produces high-quality simplification trajectories. To improve efficiency, we further distill this process into an image-to-video generation model that directly predicts coherent simplification sequences from a single input image. Beyond generating cleaner and more focused compositions, our approach enables applications such as content-aware decluttering, semantic layer decomposition, and interactive editing. More broadly, our work suggests that simplification through structured content removal can serve as a practical mechanism for guiding visual interpretation within the photorealistic domain, complementing traditional abstraction methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进式语义图像简化框架，在保持照片真实感的同时逐步移除场景元素。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像简化方法多采用非真实感渲染，牺牲了照片真实感；需要一种在简化视觉复杂度的同时保持真实感的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持照片真实感的前提下，逐步简化图像中的语义内容。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 迭代的Select-Remove-Verify流水线，结合VLM识别移除优先级、生成编辑和真实感验证器；并蒸馏为图像到视频生成模型以直接预测简化序列。
contributions: 提出渐进式语义图像简化框架，在保持照片真实感的同时逐步移除元素。
将迭代过程蒸馏为图像到视频生成模型，提升效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM的识别准确性。
蒸馏后的视频生成模型可能丢失部分细节控制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出渐进式语义图像简化框架，在保持照片真实感的同时逐步移除场景元素。

papers.title: Position: Life-Logging Video Streams Make the Privacy-Utility Trade-off Inevitable
papers.abstract: With the growing prevalence of always-on hardware such as smart glasses, body cameras, and home security systems, life-logging visual sensing is becoming inevitable, forming the backbone of persistent, always-on AI systems. Meanwhile, recent advances in proactive agents and world models signal a fundamental shift from episodic, prompt-driven tools to next-generation AI systems that continuously perceive and react to the physical world. Although life-logging video streams can substantially improve utility of these promising systems, they also introduce significant privacy risks by revealing sensitive information, such as behavioral patterns, emotional states, and social interactions, beyond what isolated images expose. If unresolved, these risks may undermine public trust and hinder the sustainable development of always-on AI technologies. Existing privacy protections are either attack-specific or incur substantial utility loss, and fail to consider the entire data exploitation pipeline. We therefore posit that the privacy-utility trade-off in life-logging video streams is a foundational challenge for next-generation AI systems that demands further investigation. We call for novel pipeline-aware privacy-preserving designs that jointly optimize utility and privacy for long-horizon life-logging visual data. In parallel, formal privacy leakage metrics and standardized benchmarks remain important open directions for future research.

analysis.tldr: 生活记录视频流使隐私-效用权衡不可避免，呼吁设计管道感知的隐私保护方案。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着智能眼镜、随身摄像头等始终在线硬件的普及，生活记录视频流成为持续AI系统的基础，但其在提升效用的同时带来严重隐私风险，现有保护方法要么针对特定攻击，要么效用损失大，且未考虑整个数据利用管道。
analysis.problem: 生活记录视频流中隐私与效用的权衡问题，缺乏管道感知的隐私保护设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出生活记录视频流比孤立图像泄露更多敏感信息（行为模式、情绪状态、社交互动），现有隐私保护方法无法在保持效用的同时有效应对。
analysis.method: 提出管道感知的隐私保护设计理念，联合优化长期生活记录视觉数据的效用与隐私，并呼吁建立正式隐私泄露度量和标准化基准。
contributions: 指出生活记录视频流中隐私-效用权衡是下一代AI系统的基础挑战
呼吁开发管道感知的隐私保护设计，并强调正式隐私度量与基准的重要性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 未提出具体算法或实验验证
仅停留在问题分析和呼吁层面
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 生活记录视频流使隐私-效用权衡不可避免，呼吁设计管道感知的隐私保护方案。

papers.title: AnomalyClaw: A Universal Visual Anomaly Detection Agent via Tool-Grounded Refutation
papers.abstract: Visual anomaly detection (VAD) is crucial in many real-world fields, such as industrial inspection, medical imaging, infrastructure monitoring, and remote sensing. However, the specific anomaly definitions, data modalities, and annotation standards across different domains make it difficult to transfer single-domain trained VAD models. Vision-language models (VLMs), pre-trained on large-scale cross-domain data, can perform visual perception under task instructions, offering a promising solution for cross-domain VAD. However, single-inference VLM judgments are unreliable, since they rely more on prior knowledge than on normal-sample references or fine-grained feature evidence. We therefore present AnomalyClaw, a training-free VAD agent that turns anomaly judgment into a multi-round refutation process. In each round, the agent proposes candidate anomalies and refutes each against normal-sample references, drawing on a 13-tool library for visual verification, reference parsing, and frozen expert probing. On the CrossDomainVAD-12 benchmark (12 datasets), AnomalyClaw achieves consistent macro-AUROC improvements over single-step direct inference with +6.23 pp on GPT-5.5, +7.93 pp on Seed2.0-lite, and +3.52 pp on Qwen3.5-VL-27B. We further introduce an optional verbalized self-evolution extension. It builds an online rulebook from internal-branch disagreement without oracle labels. On Qwen3.5-VL-27B, it delivers a +2.09 pp mean gain, comparable to a K = 10 oracle-label supervised baseline (+1.99 pp). These results show that agentic refutation improve anomaly understanding and reasoning of VLMs, rather than merely aggregating tool outputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出AnomalyClaw，一种无需训练的多轮反驳式VAD智能体，通过工具库和正常样本参考提升跨域异常检测的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨域视觉异常检测面临异常定义、数据模态和标注标准不一致的挑战，单域模型难以迁移；VLM虽能跨域感知，但单次推理依赖先验知识，缺乏正常样本参考和细粒度特征证据，结果不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何利用VLM进行跨域异常检测时，克服单次推理的不可靠性，使其能基于正常样本参考和细粒度证据进行多轮验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单次推理的VLM判断不可靠，因为其更依赖先验知识而非正常样本参考或细粒度特征证据。
analysis.method: 提出AnomalyClaw，一个无需训练的VAD智能体，将异常判断转化为多轮反驳过程：每轮提出候选异常，并利用13种工具（视觉验证、参考解析、冻结专家探测）结合正常样本参考进行反驳。
contributions: 提出AnomalyClaw，首个将异常检测转化为多轮反驳过程的训练免费VAD智能体，利用工具库和正常样本参考提升VLM推理可靠性。
在CrossDomainVAD-12基准上，基于GPT-5.5、Seed2.0-lite和Qwen3.5-VL-27B实现宏AUROC分别提升+6.23、+7.93和+3.52个百分点。
引入可选的言语化自进化扩展，通过内部分支分歧构建在线规则库，无需真值标签即可提升性能（Qwen3.5-VL-27B上平均+2.09 pp，接近K=10的监督基线+1.99 pp）。
analysis.experiments: 在CrossDomainVAD-12基准（12个数据集）上评估，AnomalyClaw在三个VLM上均取得宏AUROC提升，并验证了自进化扩展的有效性。
limitations: 依赖13种工具库，可能增加推理开销。
自进化扩展仅在Qwen3.5-VL-27B上验证，泛化性待进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AnomalyClaw，一种无需训练的多轮反驳式VAD智能体，通过工具库和正常样本参考提升跨域异常检测的可靠性。

papers.title: Sens-VisualNews: A Benchmark Dataset for Sensational Image Detection
papers.abstract: The detection of sensational content in media items can be a critical filtering mechanism for identifying check-worthy content and flagging potential disinformation, since such content triggers physiological arousal that often bypasses critical evaluation and accelerates viral sharing. In this paper we introduce the task of sensational image detection, which aims to determine whether an image contains shocking, provocative, or emotionally charged features to grab attention and trigger strong emotional responses. To support research on this task, we create a new benchmark dataset (called Sens-VisualNews) that contains 9,576 images from news items, annotated based on the (in-)existence of various sensational concepts and events in their visual content. Finally, using Sens-VisualNews, we study the prompt sensitivity, performance and robustness of a wide range of open SotA Multimodal LLMs, across both zero-shot and fine-tuned settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出轰动性图像检测任务并构建包含9576张新闻图像的基准数据集Sens-VisualNews。
analysis.research_motivation: 轰动性内容会引发生理唤醒，绕过批判性评估并加速病毒式传播，因此检测此类内容对于识别值得核查的信息和标记潜在虚假信息至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何自动检测新闻图像中是否包含令人震惊、挑衅或情绪化的特征以吸引注意并引发强烈情绪反应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含9576张新闻图像的基准数据集Sens-VisualNews，基于视觉内容中各种轰动性概念和事件的存在性进行标注，并利用该数据集评估多种多模态大语言模型在零样本和微调设置下的提示敏感性、性能和鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出了轰动性图像检测这一新任务。
创建了包含9576张标注新闻图像的基准数据集Sens-VisualNews。
系统评估了多种多模态大语言模型在该任务上的表现。
analysis.experiments: 使用Sens-VisualNews数据集，在零样本和微调设置下评估了多种开源SotA多模态大语言模型的提示敏感性、性能和鲁棒性。
limitations: 数据集仅包含新闻图像，可能无法泛化到其他领域。
标注基于视觉内容中的概念和事件，可能忽略文本或上下文中的轰动性线索。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轰动性图像检测任务并构建包含9576张新闻图像的基准数据集Sens-VisualNews。

papers.title: Temporal Sampling Frequency Matters: A Capacity-Aware Study of End-to-End Driving Trajectory Prediction
papers.abstract: End to end (E2E) autonomous driving trajectory prediction is often trained with camera frames sampled at the highest available temporal frequency, assuming that denser sampling improves performance. We question this assumption by treating temporal sampling frequency as an explicit training set design variable. Starting from high frequency E2E driving datasets, we construct frequency sweep training sets by temporally subsampling camera frames along each trajectory. For each model dataset pair, we train and evaluate the same model under a fixed protocol, so the frequency response reflects how prediction performance changes with sampling frequency. We analyze this response from a capacity aware perspective. Sparse sampling may miss driving relevant cues, while dense sampling may add redundant visual content and off manifold noise. For finite capacity models, this can create a driving irrelevant capacity burden. We evaluate three smaller E2E models and a larger VLA style AutoVLA model on Waymo, nuScenes, and PAVE. Results show model and dataset dependent frequency responses. Smaller E2E models often show non monotonic or near plateau trends and achieve their best 3 second ADE at lower or intermediate frequencies. In contrast, AutoVLA achieves its best 3 second ADE and FDE at the highest evaluated frequency on all three datasets. Iteration matched controls suggest that the advantage of lower or intermediate frequencies for smaller models is not explained only by unequal training update counts. These findings show that temporal sampling frequency should be reported and tuned, rather than fixed to the highest available value.

analysis.tldr: 端到端驾驶轨迹预测中，时间采样频率并非越高越好，模型容量与频率存在权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶轨迹预测通常默认使用最高时间采样频率，但这一假设缺乏验证，且可能引入冗余信息，增加模型负担。
analysis.problem: 探究时间采样频率对端到端驾驶轨迹预测性能的影响，并分析其与模型容量的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 小模型在较低或中间频率下表现更好，而大模型（AutoVLA）在最高频率下最优；频率响应呈现非单调或平台趋势，且不能仅由训练更新次数解释。
analysis.method: 将时间采样频率作为显式训练集设计变量，通过时间下采样构建频率扫描训练集，在固定协议下训练和评估同一模型，从容量感知角度分析频率响应。
contributions: 质疑并验证了最高时间采样频率最优的默认假设，发现频率与模型容量存在依赖关系。
提出时间采样频率应作为超参数报告和调整，而非固定为最高值。
analysis.experiments: 在Waymo、nuScenes和PAVE三个数据集上评估了三个小模型和一个大模型（AutoVLA），报告了3秒ADE和FDE指标。
limitations: 仅针对轨迹预测任务，未涉及其他端到端驾驶模块。
未深入分析频率影响的具体机制（如冗余信息类型）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 端到端驾驶轨迹预测中，时间采样频率并非越高越好，模型容量与频率存在权衡。

papers.title: SleepWalk: A Three-Tier Benchmark for Stress-Testing Instruction-Guided Vision-Language Navigation
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have advanced rapidly in multimodal perception and language understanding, yet it remains unclear whether they can reliably ground language into spatially coherent, plausibly executable actions in 3D digital environments. We introduce SleepWalk, a benchmark for evaluating instruction-grounded trajectory prediction in single-scene 3D worlds generated from textual scene descriptions and filtered for navigability. Unlike prior navigation benchmarks centered on long-range exploration across rooms, SleepWalk targets localized, interaction-centric embodied reasoning: given rendered visual observations and a natural-language instruction, a model must predict a trajectory that respects scene geometry, avoids collisions, and terminates at an action-compatible location.
