The benchmark covers diverse indoor and outdoor environments and organizes tasks into three tiers of spatial and temporal difficulty, enabling fine-grained analysis of grounding under increasing compositional complexity. Using a standardized pointwise judge-based evaluation protocol, we evaluate three frontier VLMs on 2,472 curated 3D environments with nine instructions per scene. Results reveal systematic failures in grounded spatial reasoning, especially under occlusion, interaction constraints, and multi-step instructions: performance drops as the difficulty level of the tasks increase. In general, current VLMs can somewhat produce trajectories that are simultaneously spatially coherent, plausibly executable, and aligned with intended actions. By exposing failures in a controlled yet scalable setting, SleepWalk provides a critical benchmark for advancing grounded multimodal reasoning, embodied planning, vision-language navigation, and action-capable agents in 3D environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出 SleepWalk 基准，用于压力测试指令引导的视觉-语言导航中 VLMs 的接地轨迹预测能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLM 在 3D 环境中能否可靠地将语言指令转化为空间连贯、可执行的轨迹尚不明确，而现有导航基准多关注跨房间长程探索，缺乏对局部、交互中心推理的评估。
analysis.problem: 评估 VLM 在单场景 3D 世界中根据自然语言指令预测轨迹时，对场景几何、碰撞避免和动作兼容位置的接地能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在 2,472 个 3D 环境上测试三个前沿 VLM，发现系统性的接地空间推理失败，尤其在遮挡、交互约束和多步指令下，性能随任务难度增加而下降。
analysis.method: 构建 SleepWalk 基准，包含从文本场景描述生成的可导航 3D 世界，任务分为三个难度层级，采用标准化逐点评分协议评估轨迹。
contributions: 提出 SleepWalk，一个用于压力测试指令引导视觉-语言导航的三层基准。
通过 2,472 个环境和 9 条指令/场景的系统评估，揭示当前 VLM 在接地空间推理中的失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在 2,472 个 3D 环境上评估三个前沿 VLM，每个场景 9 条指令，共 22,248 个任务。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖单场景，未涉及多场景或动态环境。
评估协议依赖点状判断，可能忽略轨迹的全局合理性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 SleepWalk 基准，用于压力测试指令引导的视觉-语言导航中 VLMs 的接地轨迹预测能力。

papers.title: Halo Separation-guided Underwater Multi-scale Image Restoration
papers.abstract: Underwater images captured by Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) are inevitably affected by artificial light sources, which often produce halos in the foreground of the camera and seriously interfere with the quality of the image. The existing underwater image enhancement methods fail to fully consider this key problem, and the robustness of processing images under artificial light scenes is poor. In practical applications, since underwater image enhancement itself is a very challenging task, the influence of artificial light sources will lead to serious degradation of image performance and affect subsequent vision tasks. In order to effectively deal with this problem, this paper designs a single halo image correction method based on an iterative structure. The network is mainly divided into two sub-networks, one is the halo layer separation sub-network which aims to separate the halo by gradient minimization, and the other is the multi-scale recovery sub-network which aims to recover the image information masked by halo. The UIEB and EUVP synthetic datasets are used for training to ensure that the network can fully learn the characteristics and laws of underwater halo images. Then a large number of halo images taken in an underwater environment with real artificial light are collected for testing. In addition, the brightness distribution characteristics of underwater halo images are analyzed and the radial gradient is introduced to constraint eliminate halo to improve the effect of underwater image restoration.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于迭代结构的单幅水下图像去晕方法，通过梯度最小化分离晕层并多尺度恢复图像。
analysis.research_motivation: 水下自主航行器（AUV）拍摄的图像受人工光源影响产生晕（halo），严重干扰图像质量，现有水下图像增强方法未充分考虑此问题，处理人工光源场景鲁棒性差。
analysis.problem: 如何有效去除水下图像中由人工光源引起的前景晕，并恢复被晕遮挡的图像信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计一个迭代结构的单晕图像校正网络，包含两个子网络：晕层分离子网络（通过梯度最小化分离晕层）和多尺度恢复子网络（恢复被晕遮挡的图像信息）。引入径向梯度约束消除晕。
contributions: 提出一种针对水下人工光源晕的迭代校正网络，包含晕层分离和多尺度恢复子网络。
引入径向梯度约束以改善去晕效果。
使用合成数据集训练并在真实人工光源水下图像上测试。
analysis.experiments: 使用UIEB和EUVP合成数据集训练，收集大量真实人工光源水下晕图像进行测试。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据与真实场景的分布差异。
迭代结构可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于迭代结构的单幅水下图像去晕方法，通过梯度最小化分离晕层并多尺度恢复图像。

papers.title: CellDX AI Autopilot: Agent-Guided Training and Deployment of Pathology Classifiers
papers.abstract: Training AI models for computational pathology currently requires access to expensive whole-slide-image datasets, GPU infrastructure, deep expertise in machine learning, and substantial engineering effort. We present CellDX AI Autopilot, a platform that lets users -- from pathologists with no ML background to ML practitioners running many parallel experiments -- train, evaluate, and deploy whole-slide image classifiers through natural language interaction with an AI agent. The platform provides a structured set of agent skills that guide the user through dataset curation, automated hyperparameter tuning, multi-strategy model comparison, and human-in-the-loop deployment, all on a pre-built dataset of over 32,000 cases and 66,000 H&E-stained whole-slide images with pre-extracted features. We describe the agent skill architecture, the underlying Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) training framework supporting four classification strategies, and an iterative pairwise hyperparameter search (grid or seeded random) that reduces tuning cost by over 30x compared to exhaustive search. CellDX AI Autopilot is, to our knowledge, the first system to expose pathology-specialized agent skills and a pathology-specialized training platform to general-purpose AI agents (e.g. any LLM-based agent runtime), delivering end-to-end automated model training without requiring the agent itself to be domain-specific. The platform addresses both the ML-expertise bottleneck that limits adoption in diagnostic pathology and the engineering bottleneck that limits how many experiments a researcher can run cost-effectively.

analysis.tldr: CellDX AI Autopilot 是一个通过自然语言交互实现病理学分类器训练与部署的 AI Agent 平台，显著降低计算病理学 AI 模型开发的门槛与成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 训练计算病理学 AI 模型需要昂贵的全切片图像数据集、GPU 基础设施、机器学习专业知识和大量工程努力，这限制了病理学领域 AI 的广泛应用和实验效率。
analysis.problem: 如何让没有机器学习背景的病理学家以及需要并行运行大量实验的 ML 从业者，能够通过自然语言交互轻松地训练、评估和部署全切片图像分类器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建一个结构化 Agent 技能集，引导用户完成数据集整理、自动超参数调优、多策略模型比较和人在回路部署；底层采用多实例学习（MIL）框架支持四种分类策略，并实现迭代成对超参数搜索（网格或随机种子），相比穷举搜索降低 30 倍以上调优成本。
contributions: 首个将病理学专用 Agent 技能和训练平台暴露给通用 AI Agent（如任意基于 LLM 的 Agent 运行时）的系统，实现端到端自动模型训练而无需 Agent 本身是领域特化的。
提出迭代成对超参数搜索方法，将调优成本降低 30 倍以上。
analysis.experiments: 在包含超过 32,000 个病例和 66,000 张 H&E 染色全切片图像（预提取特征）的数据集上进行了实验。
limitations: 平台依赖预提取特征，可能不适用于需要端到端特征学习的场景。
Agent 技能集可能无法覆盖所有病理学分类任务，需要进一步扩展。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CellDX AI Autopilot 是一个通过自然语言交互实现病理学分类器训练与部署的 AI Agent 平台，显著降低计算病理学 AI 模型开发的门槛与成本。

papers.title: DySurface: Consistent 4D Surface Reconstruction via Bridging Explicit Gaussians and Implicit Functions
papers.abstract: While novel view synthesis (NVS) for dynamic scenes has seen significant progress, reconstructing temporally consistent geometric surfaces remains a challenge. Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) offer powerful dynamic scene rendering capabilities; however, relying solely on photometric optimization often leads to geometric ambiguities. This results in discontinuous surfaces, severe artifacts, and broken surfaces over time. To address these limitations, we present DySurface, a novel framework that bridges the effectiveness of explicit Gaussians with the geometric fidelity of implicit Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) in dynamic scenes. Our approach tackles the structural discrepancy between the forward deformation of 3DGS ($canonical \rightarrow dynamic$) and the backward deformation required for volumetric SDF rendering ($dynamic \rightarrow canonical$). Specifically, we propose the VoxGS-DSDF branch that leverages deformed Gaussians to construct a dynamic sparse voxel grid, providing explicit geometric guidance to the implicit SDF field. This explicit anchoring effectively regularizes the volumetric rendering process, significantly improving surface reconstruction quality, with watertight boundaries and detailed representations. Quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that DySurface significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in geometric accuracy metrics while maintaining competitive rendering performance.

analysis.tldr: DySurface通过桥接显式高斯与隐式SDF实现动态场景的时序一致4D表面重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态场景的新视角合成虽已取得进展，但重建时序一致的几何表面仍是挑战；现有方法依赖光度优化导致几何歧义，产生不连续表面和严重伪影。
analysis.problem: 解决动态场景中显式高斯与隐式SDF之间的结构差异，实现时序一致的4D表面重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅依赖光度优化会导致几何歧义，表现为不连续表面、严重伪影和随时间断裂的表面。
analysis.method: 提出VoxGS-DSDF分支，利用变形高斯构建动态稀疏体素网格，为隐式SDF场提供显式几何引导，从而正则化体渲染过程。
contributions: 提出DySurface框架，桥接显式高斯与隐式SDF实现动态场景的4D表面重建
提出VoxGS-DSDF分支，通过变形高斯构建动态稀疏体素网格提供几何引导
analysis.experiments: 定量和定性实验表明，DySurface在几何精度指标上显著优于最先进基线，同时保持有竞争力的渲染性能。
limitations: 可能依赖动态场景的变形场估计精度
稀疏体素网格的分辨率可能限制细节重建
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DySurface通过桥接显式高斯与隐式SDF实现动态场景的时序一致4D表面重建。

papers.title: Portable Active Learning for Object Detection
papers.abstract: Annotating bounding boxes is costly and limits the scalability of object detection. This challenge is compounded by the need to preserve high accuracy while minimizing manual effort in real-world applications. Prior active learning methods often depend on model features or modify detector internals and training schedules, increasing integration overhead. Moreover, they rarely jointly exploit the benefits of image-level signals, class-imbalance cues, and instance-level uncertainty for comprehensive selection. We present Portable Active Learning (PAL), a detector-agnostic, easily portable framework that operates solely on inference outputs. PAL combines class-wise instance uncertainty with image-level diversity to guide data selection. At each round, PAL trains lightweight class-specific logistic classifiers to distinguish true from false positives, producing entropy-based uncertainty scores for proposals. Candidate images are then refined using global image entropy, class diversity, and image similarity, yielding batches that are both informative and diverse. PAL requires no changes to model internals or training pipelines, ensuring broad compatibility across detectors. Extensive experiments on COCO, PASCAL VOC, and BDD100K demonstrate that PAL consistently improves label efficiency and detection accuracy compared to existing active learning baselines, making it a practical solution for scalable and cost-effective deployment of object detection in real-world settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种与检测器无关的便携式主动学习框架PAL，仅利用推理输出即可高效选择标注样本，提升目标检测的标签效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 标注边界框成本高昂，限制了目标检测的可扩展性；现有主动学习方法依赖模型特征或修改检测器内部结构，集成开销大，且很少联合利用图像级信号、类别不平衡线索和实例级不确定性。
analysis.problem: 如何在无需修改检测器内部结构或训练流程的前提下，高效选择信息量丰富且多样化的样本进行标注，以最小化人工标注成本并保持高检测精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PAL框架：在每轮主动学习中，训练轻量级类别特定逻辑回归分类器区分真/假阳性，得到基于熵的实例不确定性分数；然后结合全局图像熵、类别多样性和图像相似度对候选图像进行精炼，选择信息丰富且多样的批次。
contributions: 提出一种检测器无关的主动学习框架PAL，仅依赖推理输出，无需修改模型内部或训练流程。
联合利用实例不确定性、图像级多样性和类别不平衡线索进行样本选择。
在COCO、PASCAL VOC和BDD100K上验证了PAL在标签效率和检测精度上的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在COCO、PASCAL VOC和BDD100K数据集上进行实验，与现有主动学习基线相比，PAL持续提升了标签效率和检测精度。
limitations: 可能依赖逻辑回归分类器的质量，在极端类别不平衡下效果未知。
未讨论在实时或资源受限场景下的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种与检测器无关的便携式主动学习框架PAL，仅利用推理输出即可高效选择标注样本，提升目标检测的标签效率。

papers.title: BGG: Bridging the Geometric Gap between Cross-View images by Vision Foundation Model Adaptation for Geo-Localization
papers.abstract: Geometric differences between cross-view images, such as drone and satellite views, significantly increase the challenge of Cross-View Geo-Localization (CVGL), which aims to acquire the geolocation of images by image retrieval. To further enhance the CVGL performance, this paper proposes a parameter-efficient adaptation framework for bridging the geometric gap across images based on the vision foundation model (VFM) (e.g., DINOv3), termed BGG. BGG not only effectively leverages the general visual representations of VFM and captures the robust and consistent features from cross-view images, but also utilizes the generalization capabilities of the VFM, significantly improving the CVGL performance. It mainly contains a Multi-granularity Feature Enhancement Adapter (MFEA) and a Frequency-Aware Structural Aggregation (FASA) module. Specifically, MFEA enhances the scale adaptability and viewpoint robustness of features by multi-level dilated convolutions, effectively bridging the cross-view geometric gap with small training costs. Additionally, considering the [CLS] token lacks spatial details for precise image retrieval and localization, the FASA module modulates patch tokens in the frequency domain and performs adaptive aggregation for local structural feature enhancement. Finally, BGG fuses the enhanced local features with the [CLS] token for more accurate CVGL. Extensive experiments on University-1652 and SUES-200 datasets demonstrate that BGG has significant advantages over other methods and achieves state-of-the-art localization performance with low training costs.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于视觉基础模型适配的跨视图地理定位方法，通过多粒度特征增强和频域结构聚合缩小几何差异，实现低训练成本的SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨视图图像（如无人机与卫星视角）间的几何差异严重阻碍了地理定位的准确性，现有方法难以同时兼顾特征鲁棒性和训练效率。
analysis.problem: 如何高效利用视觉基础模型（VFM）的通用表征能力，缩小跨视图图像的几何差异，提升地理定位性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BGG框架，包含多粒度特征增强适配器（MFEA）和频域感知结构聚合（FASA）模块。MFEA通过多级膨胀卷积增强尺度适应性和视角鲁棒性；FASA在频域调制patch token并自适应聚合以增强局部结构特征，最终融合[CLS] token与增强局部特征进行定位。
contributions: 提出参数高效的VFM适配框架BGG，有效利用VFM的通用视觉表征和泛化能力提升跨视图地理定位性能。
设计MFEA和FASA模块，分别解决几何差异和空间细节缺失问题，实现低训练成本的SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在University-1652和SUES-200数据集上实验，BGG显著优于其他方法，达到SOTA定位性能且训练成本低。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VFM（如DINOv3），泛化性需进一步验证。
仅针对无人机-卫星视图，其他跨视图场景（如地面-卫星）未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于视觉基础模型适配的跨视图地理定位方法，通过多粒度特征增强和频域结构聚合缩小几何差异，实现低训练成本的SOTA性能。

papers.title: EvoStreaming: Your Offline Video Model Is a Natively Streaming Assistant
papers.abstract: Streaming video understanding demands more than watching longer videos: assistants must decide when to speak in real time, balancing responsiveness against verbosity. Yet most video-language models (VideoLLMs) are trained for offline inference, and existing streaming benchmarks externalize this timing decision to the evaluator. We address this gap with RealStreamEval, a frame-level multi-turn evaluation protocol that exposes models to sequential observations and penalizes unnecessary responses. Under this protocol, we observed that strong offline VideoLLMs retain useful visual understanding but lack an interaction policy for deciding when to respond. Motivated by this observation, we propose EvoStreaming, a self-evolved streaming adaptation framework in which the base model itself acts as data generator, relevance annotator, and roll-out policy to synthesize streaming trajectories without external supervision. With only $1{,}000$ self-generated samples ($139\times$ less than the leading streaming instruction-tuning approach) and no architectural changes, EvoStreaming consistently improves the overall RealStreamEval score by up to $10.8$ points across five open VideoLLM backbones (Qwen2/2.5/3-VL, InternVL-3.5, MiniCPM-V4.5) while largely preserving offline video performance. These results suggest that data-efficient interaction tuning is a practical path for adapting existing VideoLLMs to streaming assistants.

analysis.tldr: EvoStreaming 通过自进化框架，仅用 1000 条自生成样本即可将离线视频模型高效转化为流式对话助手。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式视频理解需要模型实时决定何时响应，但现有 VideoLLM 主要针对离线推理训练，缺乏交互策略，且已有流式基准将决策责任外推给评估者。
analysis.problem: 如何让离线 VideoLLM 获得实时响应决策能力，同时保持原有离线性能，并降低对大规模监督数据的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强离线 VideoLLM 保留有用视觉理解能力，但缺乏决定何时响应的交互策略。
analysis.method: 提出 EvoStreaming 自进化流式适应框架，基模型同时作为数据生成器、相关性标注器和 rollout 策略，自合成流式轨迹，无需外部监督。
contributions: 提出 RealStreamEval，一个帧级多轮评估协议，暴露模型于序列观测并惩罚不必要响应。
提出 EvoStreaming，一种数据高效的流式适应框架，仅用 1000 条自生成样本即可将离线 VideoLLM 转化为流式助手。
analysis.experiments: 在 Qwen2/2.5/3-VL、InternVL-3.5、MiniCPM-V4.5 五个开源 VideoLLM 上，RealStreamEval 分数提升最高 10.8 分，同时基本保持离线视频性能。
limitations: 仅验证了 1000 样本规模，更大规模自生成数据的效果未知。
框架依赖基模型自身的生成能力，弱基模型可能效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EvoStreaming 通过自进化框架，仅用 1000 条自生成样本即可将离线视频模型高效转化为流式对话助手。

papers.title: The Alpha Blending Hypothesis: Compositing Shortcut in Deepfake Detection
papers.abstract: Recent deepfake detection methods demonstrate improved cross-dataset generalization, yet the underlying mechanisms remain underexplored. We introduce the Alpha Blending Hypothesis, positing that state-of-the-art frame-based detectors primarily function as alpha blending searchers; rather than learning semantic anomalies or specific generative neural fingerprints, they localize low-level compositing artifacts introduced during the integration of manipulated faces into target frames. We experimentally validate the hypothesis, demonstrating that deepfake detectors exhibit high sensitivity to the so-called self-blended images (SBI) and non-generative manipulations. We propose the method BlenD that leverages a large-scale, diverse dataset of real-only facial images augmented with SBI. This approach achieves the best average cross-dataset generalization on 15 compositional deepfake datasets released between 2019 and 2025 without utilizing explicitly generated deepfakes during training. Furthermore, we show that predictions from explicit blending searchers and models resilient to blending shortcuts are highly complementary, yielding a state-of-the-art AUROC of 94.0% in an ensemble configuration. The code with experiments and the trained model will be publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 提出Alpha混合假设，揭示深度伪造检测器主要依赖合成伪影而非语义异常，并基于此设计BlenD方法实现跨数据集泛化SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法跨数据集泛化能力提升，但背后的工作机制尚不明确，阻碍了更鲁棒检测器的设计。
analysis.problem: 深度伪造检测器实际依赖何种线索进行判断，以及如何利用这一发现提升跨数据集泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 检测器对自混合图像（SBI）和非生成式操作高度敏感，表明其本质是搜索alpha混合伪影，而非学习语义异常或生成指纹。
analysis.method: 提出BlenD方法，使用仅包含真实人脸图像的大规模多样化数据集，并通过SBI增强，训练时不使用任何显式生成的深度伪造样本。
contributions: 提出Alpha混合假设，解释深度伪造检测器跨数据集泛化的机制。
设计BlenD方法，仅用真实图像和SBI增强即达到15个数据集上的最佳平均跨数据集泛化性能。
发现显式混合搜索器与对混合伪影鲁棒的模型预测互补，集成后AUROC达94.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在2019至2025年间发布的15个组合深度伪造数据集上评估跨数据集泛化，BlenD取得最佳平均性能，集成模型AUROC达94.0%。
limitations: 假设主要针对帧级检测器，对视频级或时序方法可能不适用。
未探讨真实深度伪造中更复杂的混合模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Alpha混合假设，揭示深度伪造检测器主要依赖合成伪影而非语义异常，并基于此设计BlenD方法实现跨数据集泛化SOTA。

papers.title: LimeCross: Context-Conditioned Layered Image Editing with Structural Consistency
papers.abstract: Layered image assets are widely used in real-world creative workflows, enabling non-destructive iteration and flexible re-composition. Recent advances in layered image generation and decomposition synthesize or recover layered representations, yet controllable editing of layered images remains challenging. Manual editing requires careful coordination across layers to maintain consistent illumination and contact, while AI-based pipelines collapse layers into a flattened image for editing, then decompose them again, introducing background-to-foreground leakage and unstable transparency. To address these limitations, we propose LimeCross, a training-free context-conditioned layered image editing framework that edits user-selected RGBA layers according to text while keeping the remaining layers unchanged. It leverages contextual cues from other layers using a bi-stream attention mechanism to preserve cross-layer consistency, while explicitly maintaining layer integrity to prevent the contamination of edited layers. To evaluate our approach, we introduce LayerEditBench, a benchmark of 1500 layered scenes with paired source/target prompts, along with evaluation protocols that assess both edit fidelity and alpha channel stability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LimeCross improves layer purity and composite realism over strong editing baselines, establishing context-conditioned layered editing as a principled framework for controllable generative creation.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的上下文条件化分层图像编辑框架LimeCross，通过双流注意力保持跨层一致性，并构建LayerEditBench基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 分层图像资产在创意工作流中广泛使用，但现有编辑方法要么需要手动协调各层以保持光照和接触一致性，要么将层合并为扁平图像编辑后再分解，导致背景-前景泄漏和不稳定透明度。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏层结构的前提下，根据文本指令编辑用户选定的RGBA层，同时保持未编辑层不变并维持跨层一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有AI编辑方法将层合并后编辑再分解会导致背景-前景泄漏和透明度不稳定；手动编辑需要精细协调各层。
analysis.method: 提出LimeCross，一种无需训练的框架，利用双流注意力机制从其他层获取上下文线索以保持跨层一致性，并显式维护层完整性防止污染。
contributions: 提出LimeCross，首个无需训练的上下文条件化分层图像编辑框架，支持文本驱动的RGBA层编辑并保持结构一致性。
构建LayerEditBench基准，包含1500个分层场景及配对提示，并设计评估编辑保真度和alpha通道稳定性的协议。
analysis.experiments: 在LayerEditBench上对比强基线，LimeCross在层纯度和合成真实性上表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型的上下文理解能力，对复杂场景的编辑效果有限。
未提及对多轮编辑或层数较多时的性能表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的上下文条件化分层图像编辑框架LimeCross，通过双流注意力保持跨层一致性，并构建LayerEditBench基准。

papers.title: PaMoSplat: Part-Aware Motion-Guided Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Dynamic scene reconstruction represents a fundamental yet demanding challenge in computer vision and robotics. While recent progress in 3DGS-based methods has advanced dynamic scene modeling, obtaining high-fidelity rendering and accurate tracking in scenarios with substantial, intricate motions remains significantly challenging. To address these challenges, we propose PaMoSplat, a novel dynamic Gaussian splatting framework incorporating part awareness and motion priors. Our approach is grounded in two key observations: 1) Parts serve as primitives for scene deformation, and 2) Motion cues from optical flow can effectively guide part motion. Specifically, PaMoSplat initializes by lifting multi-view segmentation masks into 3D space via graph clustering, establishing coherent Gaussian parts. For subsequent timestamps, we leverage a differential evolutionary algorithm to estimate the rigid motion of these parts using multi-view optical flow cues, providing a robust warm-start for further optimization. Additionally, PaMoSplat introduces an adaptive iteration count mechanism, internal learnable rigidity, and flow-supervised rendering loss to accelerate and optimize the training process. Comprehensive evaluations across diverse scenes, including real-world environments, demonstrate that PaMoSplat delivers superior rendering quality, improved tracking precision, and faster convergence compared to existing methods. Furthermore, it enables multiple part-level downstream applications, such as 4D scene editing.

analysis.tldr: PaMoSplat利用部件感知和运动先验，通过高斯点云实现高质量动态场景重建与跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态场景重建是计算机视觉和机器人领域的基础挑战，现有基于3DGS的方法在复杂大运动场景中难以同时实现高保真渲染和精确跟踪。
analysis.problem: 解决动态场景中大幅复杂运动下的高保真渲染和精确跟踪问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到部件可作为场景形变的基本单元，且光流运动线索能有效引导部件运动。
analysis.method: 提出PaMoSplat框架：通过图聚类将多视图分割掩码提升到3D空间形成高斯部件；利用差分进化算法结合多视图光流估计部件刚体运动；引入自适应迭代次数、内部可学习刚性和流监督渲染损失加速优化。
contributions: 提出部件感知的动态高斯点云框架，利用部件作为形变基元提升复杂运动场景的重建质量。
引入差分进化算法和光流引导的部件运动估计，提供鲁棒的优化初始化和加速收敛。
在多个真实场景上实现优于现有方法的渲染质量、跟踪精度和收敛速度，并支持4D场景编辑等下游应用。
analysis.experiments: 在多个不同场景（包括真实环境）上进行综合评估，结果表明PaMoSplat在渲染质量、跟踪精度和收敛速度上优于现有方法。
limitations: 依赖多视图分割掩码的准确性，可能影响部件初始化质量。
差分进化算法计算开销可能较大，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PaMoSplat利用部件感知和运动先验，通过高斯点云实现高质量动态场景重建与跟踪。

papers.title: PolarVSR: A Unified Framework and Benchmark for Continuous Space-Time Polarization Video Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Polarimetric imaging captures surface polarization characteristics, such as the Degree of Linear Polarization (DoLP) and the Angle of Polarization (AoP). In mainstream Division of-Focal-Plane (DoFP) color polarization imaging, recovering polarization parameters from captured mosaic arrays remains a challenging inverse problem. Existing DoFP cameras also face hardware bottlenecks and often cannot support high-frame-rate acquisition, limiting polarimetric imaging in dynamic video tasks. These limitations motivate joint spatial and temporal enhancement. To this end, we propose the first space-time polarization video reconstruction architecture. The method jointly models polarization directions in space and time and uses a polarization-aware implicit neural representation for continuous, high-fidelity upsampling. By analyzing temporal variations in polarization parameters, we further introduce a flow-guided polarization variation loss to supervise polarization dynamics. We also establish the first large-scale color DoFP polarization video benchmark to support this research direction. Extensive experiments on this benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of the method.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个时空偏振视频重建框架与基准，利用偏振感知隐式神经表示实现连续高保真上采样。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有DoFP偏振相机存在硬件瓶颈，难以支持高帧率动态视频采集，且从马赛克阵列恢复偏振参数是逆问题，限制了偏振成像在动态任务中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何联合时空增强，从低帧率DoFP偏振马赛克视频中连续、高保真地重建偏振参数（DoLP和AoP）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PolarVSR，首个时空偏振视频重建架构，联合建模偏振方向在时空中的变化，使用偏振感知隐式神经表示实现连续上采样，并引入流引导偏振变化损失以监督偏振动态。
contributions: 提出首个连续时空偏振视频重建框架PolarVSR。
建立首个大规模彩色DoFP偏振视频基准。
analysis.experiments: 在自建基准上进行了大量实验，验证了方法的有效性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定偏振相机模型，泛化性需验证。
隐式神经表示的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个时空偏振视频重建框架与基准，利用偏振感知隐式神经表示实现连续高保真上采样。

papers.title: Increasing the Efficiency of DETR for Maritime High-Resolution Images
papers.abstract: Maritime object detection is critical for the safe navigation of unmanned surface vessels (USVs), requiring accurate recognition of obstacles from small buoys to large vessels. Real-time detection is challenging due to long distances, small object sizes, large-scale variations, edge computing limitations, and the high memory demands of high-resolution imagery. Existing solutions, such as downsampling or image splitting, often reduce accuracy or require additional processing, while memory-efficient models typically handle only limited resolutions. To overcome these limitations, we leverage Vision Mamba (ViM) backbones, which build on State Space Models (SSMs) to capture long-range dependencies while scaling linearly with sequence length. Images are tokenized into sequences for efficient high-resolution processing. For further computational efficiency, we design a tailored Feature Pyramid Network with successive downsampling and SSM layers, as well as token pruning to reduce unnecessary computation on background regions. Compared to state-of-the-art methods like RT-DETR with ResNet50 backbone, our approach achieves a better balance between performance and computational efficiency in maritime object detection.

analysis.tldr: 利用Vision Mamba骨干网络和定制化特征金字塔提升DETR在海上高分辨率图像中的检测效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 海上目标检测对无人水面艇安全航行至关重要，但高分辨率图像带来的长距离、小目标、大尺度变化、边缘计算限制和高内存需求使得实时检测极具挑战。现有方法如降采样或图像分割会降低精度或增加额外处理，而内存高效模型通常只能处理有限分辨率。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高分辨率图像检测精度的同时，提高DETR在海上目标检测中的计算效率，以适应边缘设备实时处理需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用Vision Mamba（ViM）骨干网络（基于状态空间模型SSM）进行高效高分辨率处理；设计定制化特征金字塔网络（FPN），包含连续下采样和SSM层；引入令牌剪枝以减少背景区域的不必要计算。
contributions: 首次将Vision Mamba骨干应用于海上高分辨率图像的目标检测，利用SSM的线性复杂度处理长序列。
设计了针对性的特征金字塔网络和令牌剪枝策略，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及与RT-DETR（ResNet50骨干）相比，在性能和计算效率之间取得了更好的平衡。
limitations: 可能仅在特定海上数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
令牌剪枝可能丢失关键背景信息，影响小目标检测。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用Vision Mamba骨干网络和定制化特征金字塔提升DETR在海上高分辨率图像中的检测效率。

papers.title: Efficient Hybrid CNN-GNN Architecture for Monocular Depth Estimation
papers.abstract: We present GraphDepth, a monocular depth estimation architecture that synergistically integrates Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) within a convolutional encoder-decoder framework. Our approach embeds efficient GraphSAGE layers at multiple scales of a ResNet-101 U-Net backbone, enabling explicit modeling of long-range spatial relationships that lie beyond the receptive field of local convolutions. Key technical contributions include: (1) batch-parallelized graph construction with configurable k-NN and grid-based adjacency for scalable training; (2) multi-scale GraphSAGE integration at bottleneck and decoder stages (1/32, 1/16, 1/8 resolution) to propagate global context throughout the feature hierarchy; (3) channel-attention gated skip connections that adaptively weight encoder features before fusion; and (4) heteroscedastic uncertainty estimation via a dedicated aleatoric uncertainty head, enabling confidence-aware loss weighting during optimization. Unlike transformer-based hybrids, which suffer from quadratic complexity in sequence length, GraphDepth scales linearly with spatial resolution while achieving comparable global receptive fields through iterative message passing. Experiments on NYU Depth V2, WHU Aerial, ETH3D, and Mid-Air benchmarks demonstrate competitive accuracy within 4.6\% of state-of-the-art transformers on indoor scenes with substantially lower computational cost (25 FPS vs 9 FPS, 3.8 GB vs 8.8 GB VRAM). GraphDepth achieves the best reported result on WHU Aerial (RMSE 8.24 m) and exhibits superior zero-shot cross-domain transfer to the Mid-Air synthetic aerial dataset, validating the generalization power of explicit relational reasoning for depth estimation.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合CNN-GNN架构GraphDepth，通过多尺度GraphSAGE层实现高效单目深度估计，在多个基准上接近SOTA且计算成本更低。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于Transformer的深度估计方法虽能建模长程依赖，但二次复杂度导致高计算成本；纯CNN方法受限于局部感受野，难以捕获全局空间关系。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持线性计算复杂度的同时，显式建模单目深度估计中的长程空间关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在ResNet-101 U-Net骨干中嵌入多尺度GraphSAGE层（1/32, 1/16, 1/8分辨率），通过批量并行k-NN图构建、通道注意力门控跳跃连接和异方差不确定性估计实现高效全局上下文传播。
contributions: 提出批量并行图构建方法，支持可配置k-NN和网格邻接，实现可扩展训练
设计多尺度GraphSAGE集成策略，在瓶颈和解码阶段传播全局上下文
引入通道注意力门控跳跃连接和异方差不确定性估计头，提升特征融合与优化鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 在NYU Depth V2、WHU Aerial、ETH3D和Mid-Air基准上评估，室内场景精度达SOTA Transformer的4.6%以内，计算成本更低（25 FPS vs 9 FPS, 3.8 GB vs 8.8 GB VRAM），在WHU Aerial上取得最佳结果（RMSE 8.24 m），并展示出优越的零样本跨域迁移能力。
limitations: 可能对图构建的超参数（如k值）敏感
在极端复杂场景下精度可能仍不及大型Transformer模型
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合CNN-GNN架构GraphDepth，通过多尺度GraphSAGE层实现高效单目深度估计，在多个基准上接近SOTA且计算成本更低。

papers.title: AdaptSplat: Adapting Vision Foundation Models for Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: This work explores a simple yet powerful lightweight adapter design for feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Existing methods typically apply complex, architecture-specific designs on top of the generic pipeline of image feature extraction $\rightarrow$ multi-view interaction $\rightarrow$ feature decoding. However, constrained by the scale bottleneck of 3D training data and the low-pass filtering effect of deep networks, these methods still fall short in cross-domain generalization and high-frequency geometric fidelity. To address these problems, we propose AdaptSplat, which demonstrates that without complex component engineering, introducing a single adapter of only 1.5M parameters into the generic architecture is sufficient to achieve superior performance. Specifically, we design a lightweight Frequency-Preserving Adapter (FPA) that extracts direction-aware high-frequency structural priors from the shallow features of a powerful vision foundation model backbone, and seamlessly integrates them into the generic pipeline via high-frequency positional encodings and adaptive residual modulation. This effectively compensates for the high-frequency attenuation caused by over-smoothing in deep features, improving the fitting accuracy of Gaussian primitives on complex surfaces and sharp boundaries. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AdaptSplat achieves state-of-the-art feed-forward reconstruction performance on multiple standard benchmarks, with stable generalization across domains. Code available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: AdaptSplat 通过轻量级频率保持适配器提升前馈 3DGS 的跨域泛化与高频几何保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有前馈 3DGS 方法受限于 3D 训练数据规模瓶颈和深度网络的低通滤波效应，导致跨域泛化能力不足和高频几何细节丢失。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加复杂组件工程的前提下，提升前馈 3DGS 的跨域泛化能力和高频几何保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出深度网络存在低通滤波效应，导致高频特征衰减，影响高斯原语对复杂表面和尖锐边界的拟合精度。
analysis.method: 提出 AdaptSplat，在通用架构中引入仅 1.5M 参数的频率保持适配器（FPA），从视觉基础模型浅层提取方向感知的高频结构先验，通过高频位置编码和自适应残差调制将其无缝集成到通用流水线中。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级频率保持适配器（FPA），有效补偿深度特征中的高频衰减。
在多个标准基准上实现前馈 3DGS 重建的 SOTA 性能，并具有稳定的跨域泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个标准基准上进行实验，结果表明方法达到 SOTA 前馈重建性能，且跨域泛化稳定。
limitations: 适配器设计依赖视觉基础模型，可能受限于基础模型本身的能力。
仅在前馈 3DGS 上验证，未探索在其他 3D 表示上的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AdaptSplat 通过轻量级频率保持适配器提升前馈 3DGS 的跨域泛化与高频几何保真度。

papers.title: VPD-100K: Towards Generalizable and Fine-grained Visual Privacy Protection
papers.abstract: Privacy protection has become a critical requirement in the era of ubiquitous visual data sharing, imposing higher demands on efficient and robust privacy detection algorithms. However, current robust detection models are severely hindered by the lack of comprehensive datasets. Existing privacy-oriented datasets often suffer from limited scale, coarse-grained annotations, and narrow domain coverage, failing to capture the intricate details of sensitive information in realworld environments. To bridge this gap, we present a large-scale, fine-grained Visual Privacy Dataset (VPD-100K), designed to facilitate generalized privacy detection. We establish a holistic taxonomy comprising four primary domains: Human Presence, On-Screen Personally Identifiable Information (PII), Physical Identifiers, and Location Indicators, containing 100,000 images annotated with 33 fine-grained classes and over 190,000 object instances. Statistical analysis reveals that our dataset features long-tailed distributions, small object scales, and high visual complexity. These characteristics make the dataset particularly valuable for demanding, unconstrained applications such as live streaming, where actors frequently face unintentional, realtime information leakage. Furthermore, we design an effective frequency-enhanced lightweight module consisting of frequency-domain attention fusion and adaptive spectral gating mechanism that breaks the limitations of spatial pixel intensity to better capture the subtle details of sensitive information. Extensive experiments conducted on both diverse image and streaming videos benchmarks consistently demonstrate the effectiveness of our VPD-100K dataset and the wellcurated frequency mechanism. The code and dataset are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模细粒度视觉隐私数据集VPD-100K及频率增强轻量模块，提升隐私检测泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有隐私检测数据集规模小、标注粗、领域窄，难以应对真实场景中敏感信息的复杂细节，亟需大规模细粒度数据集支撑。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、细粒度、覆盖多领域的视觉隐私数据集，导致隐私检测模型泛化性差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数据集统计显示长尾分布、小目标尺度、高视觉复杂度，这些特性使模型在无约束场景（如直播）中面临挑战。
analysis.method: 构建VPD-100K数据集（10万图像，33细粒度类，19万实例），并设计频率增强轻量模块（频域注意力融合+自适应谱门控机制）以捕捉敏感信息细节。
contributions: 提出大规模细粒度视觉隐私数据集VPD-100K，覆盖4大领域33类，含19万实例。
设计频率增强轻量模块，突破空间像素强度限制，提升细粒度隐私检测能力。
在图像和流媒体视频基准上验证了数据集和方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种图像和流媒体视频基准上进行实验，结果一致证明了VPD-100K数据集和频率机制的有效性。
limitations: 数据集可能仍存在领域偏差，未覆盖所有隐私场景。
频率模块在极端低分辨率或高噪声条件下性能可能下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模细粒度视觉隐私数据集VPD-100K及频率增强轻量模块，提升隐私检测泛化能力。

papers.title: 3DReflecNet: A Large-Scale Dataset for 3D Reconstruction of Reflective, Transparent, and Low-Texture Objects
papers.abstract: Accurate 3D reconstruction of objects with reflective, transparent, or low-texture surfaces still remains notoriously challenging. Such materials often violate key assumptions in multi-view reconstruction pipelines, such as photometric consistency and the availability on distinct geometric texture cues. Existing datasets primarily focus on diffuse, textured objects, and therefore provide limited insight into performance under real-world material complexities. We introduce 3DReflecNet, a large-scale hybrid dataset exceeding 22 TB that is specifically designed to benchmark and advance 3D vision methods for these challenging materials. 3DReflecNet combines two types of data: over 120,000 synthetic instances generated via physically-based rendering of more than 12,000 shapes, and over 1,000 real-world objects captured using consumer devices. Together, these data consist of more than 7 million multi-view frames. The dataset spans diverse materials, complex lighting conditions, and a wide range of geometric forms, including shapes generated from both real and LLM-synthesized 2D images using diffusion-based pipelines. To support robust evaluation, we design benchmarks for five core tasks: image matching, structure-from-motion, novel view synthesis, reflection removal, and relighting. Extensive experiments demonstrate that state-of-the-art methods struggle to maintain accuracy across these settings, highlighting the need for more resilient 3D vision models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个超22TB的大规模混合数据集3DReflecNet，专门用于反射、透明和低纹理物体的3D重建基准测试。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据集主要聚焦漫反射纹理物体，无法反映真实世界中复杂材质（如反射、透明、低纹理）的挑战，导致多视图重建方法在这些场景下性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门针对反射、透明和低纹理物体3D重建的大规模基准数据集，难以评估和推动相关方法的发展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含超过12万合成实例（基于物理渲染）和1000+真实物体（消费级设备采集）的混合数据集，总计700万+多视图帧，并设计五项核心任务基准。
contributions: 提出3DReflecNet，首个大规模混合数据集，覆盖反射、透明和低纹理物体，包含合成和真实数据。
设计五项基准任务（图像匹配、SfM、新视图合成、反射去除、重光照），系统评估现有方法，揭示其局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在五项基准任务上评估了多种现有方法，结果表明它们在这些复杂材质场景下难以保持精度。
limitations: 数据集规模庞大（22TB），可能对存储和计算资源要求较高。
合成数据与真实数据之间的域差异可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个超22TB的大规模混合数据集3DReflecNet，专门用于反射、透明和低纹理物体的3D重建基准测试。

papers.title: DetRefiner: Model-Agnostic Detection Refinement with Feature Fusion Transformer
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVOD) aims to detect both seen and unseen categories, yet existing methods often struggle to generalize to novel objects due to limited integration of global and local contextual cues. We propose DetRefiner, a simple yet effective plug-and-play framework that learns to fuse global and local features to refine open-vocabulary detection. DetRefiner processes global image features and patch-level image features from foundational models (e.g., DINOv3) through a lightweight Transformer encoder. The encoder produces a class vector capturing image-level attributes and patch vectors representing local region attributes, from which attribute reliability is inferred to recalibrate the base model's confidence. Notably, DetRefiner is trained independently of the base OVOD model, requiring neither access to its internal features nor retraining. At inference, it operates solely on the base detector's predictions, producing auxiliary calibration scores that are merged with the base detector's scores to yield the final refined confidence. Despite this simplicity, DetRefiner consistently enhances multiple OVOD models across COCO, LVIS, ODinW13, and Pascal VOC, achieving gains of up to +10.1 AP on novel categories. These results highlight that learning to fuse global and local representations offers a powerful and general mechanism for advancing open-world object detection. Our codes and models are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: DetRefiner 通过轻量 Transformer 融合全局与局部特征，无需访问基模型内部即可提升开放词汇目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放词汇目标检测（OVOD）需检测已知和未知类别，但现有方法因全局与局部上下文线索整合不足，难以泛化到新物体。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖基模型内部特征或重训练的前提下，通过融合全局与局部特征来提升 OVOD 检测精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 DetRefiner，一种即插即用框架，利用轻量 Transformer 编码器融合基础模型（如 DINOv3）的全局图像特征和 patch 级局部特征，生成类向量和 patch 向量，推断属性可靠性以重新校准基模型置信度。
contributions: 提出一种与基模型无关的检测精炼框架 DetRefiner，无需访问基模型内部特征或重训练。
在 COCO、LVIS、ODinW13 和 Pascal VOC 上一致提升多个 OVOD 模型性能，新类别 AP 提升高达 +10.1。
analysis.experiments: 在 COCO、LVIS、ODinW13 和 Pascal VOC 上评估，多个 OVOD 模型均获得提升，新类别 AP 最高提升 +10.1。
limitations: 可能依赖基础模型（如 DINOv3）的特征质量。
仅针对检测精炼，未探索对其他视觉任务的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DetRefiner 通过轻量 Transformer 融合全局与局部特征，无需访问基模型内部即可提升开放词汇目标检测性能。

papers.title: SciVQR: A Multidisciplinary Multimodal Benchmark for Advanced Scientific Reasoning Evaluation
authors: Jing Liu (1 and 2) ((1) Institute of Automation
University of Chinese Academy of Sciences (UCAS)
papers.abstract: Scientific reasoning is a key aspect of human intelligence, requiring the integration of multimodal inputs, domain expertise, and multi-step inference across various subjects. Existing benchmarks for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often fail to capture the complexity and traceability of reasoning processes necessary for rigorous evaluation. To fill this gap, we introduce SciVQR, a multimodal benchmark covering 54 subfields in mathematics, physics, chemistry, geography, astronomy, and biology. SciVQR includes domain-specific visuals, such as equations, charts, and diagrams, and challenges models to combine visual comprehension with reasoning. The tasks range from basic factual recall to complex, multi-step inferences, with 46% including expert-authored solutions. SciVQR not only evaluates final answers but also examines the reasoning process, providing insights into how models reach their conclusions. Our evaluation of leading MLLMs, including both proprietary and open-source models, reveals significant limitations in handling complex multimodal reasoning tasks, underscoring the need for improved multi-step reasoning and better integration of interdisciplinary knowledge in advancing MLLMs toward true scientific intelligence. The dataset and evaluation code are publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: SciVQR 是一个覆盖 6 个学科 54 个子领域的多模态科学推理基准，揭示了现有 MLLM 在复杂多步推理上的显著局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 MLLM 基准难以捕捉科学推理所需的复杂性和可追溯性，缺乏对推理过程的严格评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个覆盖多学科、包含领域特定视觉元素、并评估推理过程的多模态科学推理基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估发现领先的 MLLM（包括闭源和开源模型）在处理复杂多模态推理任务时存在显著局限，表明需要改进多步推理和跨学科知识整合。
analysis.method: 构建 SciVQR 基准，包含 54 个子领域、领域特定视觉（方程、图表、示意图），任务从事实回忆到多步推理，46% 含专家编写的解答，不仅评估最终答案还评估推理过程。
contributions: 提出了一个覆盖数学、物理、化学、地理、天文、生物 54 个子领域的多模态科学推理基准 SciVQR。
通过评估领先 MLLM 揭示了其在复杂多模态推理任务上的显著局限，并公开了数据集和评估代码。
analysis.experiments: 评估了多个领先的 MLLM（包括闭源和开源模型），结果显示在复杂多模态推理任务上存在显著局限。
limitations: 基准覆盖的学科和子领域可能仍有遗漏。
推理过程评估的具体指标和方法未在摘要中详述。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SciVQR 是一个覆盖 6 个学科 54 个子领域的多模态科学推理基准，揭示了现有 MLLM 在复杂多步推理上的显著局限。

papers.title: DynGhost: Temporally-Modelled Transformer for Dynamic Ghost Imaging with Quantum Detectors
papers.abstract: Ghost imaging reconstructs spatial information from a single-pixel bucket detector by correlating structured illumination patterns with scalar intensity measurements. While deep learning approaches have achieved promising results on static scenes, two critical limitations remain unaddressed: existing architectures fail to exploit temporal coherence across frames, leaving dynamic ghost imaging largely unsolved, and they assume additive Gaussian noise models that do not reflect the true Poissonian statistics of real single-photon hardware. We present DynGhost (Dynamic Ghost Imaging Transformer), a transformer architecture that addresses both limitations through alternating spatial and temporal attention blocks. Our quantum-aware training framework, based on physically accurate detector simulations (SNSPDs, SPADs, SiPMs) and Anscombe variance-stabilizing normalization, resolves the distribution shift that causes classical models to fail under realistic hardware constraints. Experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that DynGhost outperforms both traditional reconstruction methods and existing deep learning architectures, with particular gains in dynamic and photon-starved settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种时空交替注意力Transformer，用于动态鬼成像，并引入量子感知训练框架处理真实光子统计噪声。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有鬼成像方法主要针对静态场景，无法利用帧间时间相干性，且假设加性高斯噪声，与真实单光子硬件的泊松统计不符，限制了动态场景和低光子条件下的性能。
analysis.problem: 解决动态鬼成像中时间相干性缺失和真实光子统计噪声建模问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出经典模型在真实硬件约束下因分布偏移而失败，且现有架构无法利用时间相干性。
analysis.method: 提出DynGhost，一种交替空间和时间注意力块的Transformer架构，并采用基于物理精确探测器模拟（SNSPDs、SPADs、SiPMs）和Anscombe方差稳定归一化的量子感知训练框架。
contributions: 首次将时间建模引入鬼成像Transformer，实现动态场景重建
提出量子感知训练框架，解决真实光子统计噪声导致的分布偏移
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，DynGhost在动态和光子匮乏场景下优于传统重建方法和现有深度学习架构。
limitations: 可能依赖特定探测器模拟，泛化性需验证
计算复杂度可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种时空交替注意力Transformer，用于动态鬼成像，并引入量子感知训练框架处理真实光子统计噪声。

papers.title: Developing a foundation model for high-resolution remote sensing data of the Netherlands
papers.abstract: We develop a foundation model using 1.2m high resolution satellite images of the Netherlands. By combining a Convolutional Neural Network and a Vision Transformer, the model captures both low- and high-frequency landscape features, such as fine textures, edges, and small objects as well as large terrain structures, elevation patterns, and land-cover distributions. Leveraging temporal data as input, the model learns from broader contextual information across time, allowing the model to exploit the temporal dependencies, such as topographic features, land-cover changes, and seasonal dynamics. These additional constraints reduce feature ambiguity, improve representation learning, and enable better generalization with fewer labeled samples. The foundation model is evaluated on multiple downstream tasks, ranging from use cases within the Netherlands to global benchmarking datasets. On the vegetation monitoring dataset of the Netherlands, the model shows clear performance improvements by incorporating temporal information instead of relying on a single time point. Despite using a smaller model and less pretraining data limited to the Netherlands, it achieves competitive results on global benchmarks when compared to state-of-the-art models. These results demonstrate that the model can learn rich, generalizable representations from limited data, achieving competitive performance on global benchmarks while using a fraction of the parameters of larger state-of-the-art remote sensing models. To maximize reproducibility and reuse, we made the scripts and the model accessible on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 基于荷兰1.2m高分辨率卫星图像，结合CNN与ViT构建遥感基础模型，利用时间序列数据提升表征学习与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率遥感数据在环境监测、城市规划等领域具有重要应用价值，但现有基础模型通常依赖大规模全球数据，训练成本高且对特定区域（如荷兰）的细粒度特征捕捉不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有限区域的高分辨率遥感数据（荷兰1.2m卫星图像）构建一个能够同时捕捉低频与高频景观特征、并利用时间序列信息提升泛化能力的基础模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和视觉Transformer（ViT）的混合架构，以时间序列数据作为输入，学习时空依赖关系（如地形、土地覆盖变化、季节动态），从而减少特征模糊性并提升表征学习。
contributions: 提出一个针对荷兰高分辨率遥感数据的基础模型，融合CNN与ViT以捕捉多尺度特征。
利用时间序列输入增强模型对时空依赖的建模能力，在植被监测等下游任务中显著优于单时相方法。
在仅使用较小模型和有限区域预训练数据的情况下，在全球基准上取得与更大模型竞争的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在荷兰植被监测数据集和全球基准数据集上评估，结果显示时间信息带来性能提升，且模型在参数更少的情况下达到竞争性结果。
limitations: 预训练数据仅覆盖荷兰，可能限制模型对其他地理区域的直接迁移能力。
摘要未提及模型在极端天气或罕见事件下的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于荷兰1.2m高分辨率卫星图像，结合CNN与ViT构建遥感基础模型，利用时间序列数据提升表征学习与泛化能力。

papers.title: A Comparative Study of Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Out-of-Distribution Detection
papers.abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is essential for building reliable AI systems, as models that produce outputs for invalid inputs cannot be trusted. Although deep learning (DL) is often assumed to outperform traditional machine learning (ML), medical imaging data are typically acquired under standardized protocols, leading to relatively constrained image variability in OOD detection tasks. This motivates a direct comparison between ML and DL approaches in this setting. The two approaches are evaluated on open datasets comprising over 60,000 fundus and non-fundus images across multiple resolutions. Both approaches achieved an AUROC of 1.000 and accuracies between 0.999 and 1.000 on internal and external validation sets, showing comparable detection performance. The ML approach, however, exhibited substantially lower end-to-end latency while maintaining equivalent accuracy, indicating greater computational efficiency. These results suggest that for OOD detection tasks of limited visual complexity, lightweight ML approaches can achieve DL-level performance with significantly reduced computational cost, supporting practical real-world deployment.

analysis.tldr: 在医学图像OOD检测中，传统机器学习方法在精度与深度学习相当的情况下，计算效率显著更高。
analysis.research_motivation: OOD检测对AI系统可靠性至关重要，但深度学习通常被认为优于传统机器学习；然而医学图像采集标准化，图像变异性有限，因此有必要在此场景下直接比较两者。
analysis.problem: 在医学图像OOD检测任务中，比较传统机器学习与深度学习的性能与效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在眼底图像等标准化医学图像上，图像变异性有限，使得传统机器学习方法能达到与深度学习相当的检测精度。
analysis.method: 使用传统机器学习（如SVM、随机森林等）与深度学习（如CNN）方法，在包含6万多张眼底和非眼底图像的数据集上进行OOD检测对比。
contributions: 系统比较了ML和DL在医学图像OOD检测中的性能，发现两者精度相当。
揭示了ML方法在保持同等精度下具有显著更低的端到端延迟和更高的计算效率。
analysis.experiments: 在包含超过60,000张眼底和非眼底图像、多种分辨率的数据集上评估，内部和外部验证集AUROC均为1.000，准确率在0.999-1.000之间。
limitations: 仅针对医学图像中视觉复杂度有限的任务，结论可能不适用于更复杂场景。
未详细说明ML和DL的具体模型架构及超参数设置。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在医学图像OOD检测中，传统机器学习方法在精度与深度学习相当的情况下，计算效率显著更高。

papers.title: What Concepts Lie Within? Detecting and Suppressing Risky Content in Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: The rise of text-to-image (T2I) models has increasingly raised concerns regarding the generation of risky content, such as sexual, violent, and copyright-protected images, highlighting the need for effective safeguards within the models themselves. Although existing methods have been proposed to eliminate risky concepts from T2I models, they are primarily developed for earlier U-Net architectures, leaving the state-of-the-art Diffusion-Transformer-based T2I models inadequately protected. This gap stems from a fundamental architectural shift: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) entangle semantic injection and visual synthesis via joint attention, which makes it difficult to isolate and erase risky content within the generation. To bridge this gap, we investigate how semantic concepts are represented in DiTs and discover that attention heads exhibit concept-specific sensitivity. This property enables both the detection and suppression of risky content. Building on this discovery, we propose AHV-D\&S, a training-free inference-time safeguard for image generation in DiTs. Specifically, AHV-D\&S quantifies each textual token's sensitivity across all attention heads as an Attention Head Vector (AHV), which serves as a discriminative signature for detecting risky generation tendencies. In the inference stage, we propose a momentum-based strategy to dynamically track token-wise AHVs across denoising steps, and a sensitivity-guided adaptive suppression strategy that suppresses the attention weights of identified risky tokens based on head-specific risk scores. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AHV-D\&S effectively suppresses sexual, copyrighted-style, and various harmful content while preserving visual quality, and further exhibits strong robustness against adversarial prompts and transferability across different DiT-based T2I models.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于注意力头向量的训练时安全机制，在扩散Transformer中检测并抑制风险内容生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有T2I模型风险内容消除方法主要针对U-Net架构，无法直接应用于扩散Transformer（DiT），因为DiT通过联合注意力机制将语义注入与视觉合成纠缠在一起，难以隔离和擦除风险内容。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，在扩散Transformer架构的T2I模型中检测并抑制风险内容（如色情、暴力、版权保护内容）的生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现DiT中的注意力头对特定语义概念具有敏感性，这一特性可用于检测和抑制风险内容。
analysis.method: 提出AHV-D&S，一种无需训练、推理时生效的安全机制。通过计算每个文本token在所有注意力头上的敏感性作为注意力头向量（AHV），作为检测风险生成倾向的判别签名；在推理阶段，采用动量策略动态跟踪token级AHV，并基于头特定风险分数自适应抑制风险token的注意力权重。
contributions: 发现扩散Transformer中注意力头对语义概念具有特异性敏感性，可用于风险内容检测与抑制。
提出AHV-D&S，一种无需训练、推理时生效的安全机制，有效抑制色情、版权风格等多种有害内容，同时保持视觉质量。
在多个DiT模型上验证了方法的鲁棒性和可迁移性，包括对抗性提示场景。
analysis.experiments: 在多个DiT模型上进行了实验，结果表明AHV-D&S有效抑制了色情、版权风格等有害内容，同时保持视觉质量，并展现出对对抗性提示的鲁棒性和跨模型可迁移性。
limitations: 方法依赖于注意力头对概念的敏感性，可能对某些微妙或复合概念检测不足。
仅针对推理阶段，未涉及模型训练阶段的安全对齐。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于注意力头向量的训练时安全机制，在扩散Transformer中检测并抑制风险内容生成。

papers.title: MTA-RL: Robust Urban Driving via Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Robust urban autonomous driving requires reliable 3D scene understanding and stable decision-making under dense interactions. However, existing end-to-end models lack interpretability, while modular pipelines suffer from error propagation across brittle interfaces. This paper proposes MTA-RL, the first framework that bridges perception and control through Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning (RL). Unlike previous fusion models that directly regress actions, RGB images and LiDAR point clouds are fused using a transformer architecture to predict explicit, geometry-aware affordance representations. These structured representations serve as a compact observation space, enabling the RL policy to operate purely on predicted driving semantics, which significantly improves sample efficiency and stability. Extensive evaluations in CARLA Town01-03 across varying densities (20-60 background vehicles) show that MTA-RL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Trained solely on Town03, our method demonstrates superior zero-shot generalization in unseen towns, achieving up to a 9.0% increase in Route Completion, an 11.0% increase in Total Distance, and an 83.7% improvement in Distance Per Violation. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm that our multi-modal fusion and reward shaping are critical, significantly outperforming image-only and unshaped variants, demonstrating the effectiveness of MTA-RL for robust urban autonomous driving.

analysis.tldr: 提出MTA-RL框架，通过多模态Transformer预测3D可行驶区域，结合强化学习实现鲁棒的城市自动驾驶。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端模型缺乏可解释性，模块化流水线则因脆弱的接口导致误差传播，亟需一种可解释且鲁棒的感知-控制桥接方法。
analysis.problem: 如何融合RGB图像和LiDAR点云，预测显式的几何感知可行驶区域表示，并基于此设计高效的强化学习策略，实现稳定且泛化性强的城市自动驾驶。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用Transformer架构融合RGB图像和LiDAR点云，预测显式的3D可行驶区域表示，作为紧凑的观测空间输入给强化学习策略，策略仅基于预测的驾驶语义进行决策。
contributions: 首次提出通过多模态Transformer预测3D可行驶区域并桥接强化学习的框架MTA-RL。
在CARLA多个城镇和不同交通密度下，MTA-RL在路线完成率、总行驶距离和每次违规距离上显著优于基线，并展现出强大的零样本泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在CARLA Town01-03中，背景车辆密度20-60辆，仅在Town03训练，测试零样本泛化。MTA-RL在路线完成率上提升9.0%，总距离提升11.0%，每次违规距离提升83.7%。消融实验证实多模态融合和奖励塑造的关键作用。
limitations: 仅在仿真环境CARLA中验证，真实世界泛化性未知。
依赖3D可行驶区域预测的准确性，预测误差可能影响RL策略性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MTA-RL框架，通过多模态Transformer预测3D可行驶区域，结合强化学习实现鲁棒的城市自动驾驶。

papers.title: BathyFacto: Refraction-Aware Two-Media Neural Radiance Fields for Bathymetry
papers.abstract: Through-water photogrammetry based on UAV imagery enables shallow-water bathymetry, but refraction at the air-water interface violates the straight-ray assumption of Structure-from-Motion and causes systematic depth bias. We present BathyFacto, a refraction-aware two-media extension of Nerfacto integrated into Nerfstudio that targets metrically precise underwater point clouds. BathyFacto uses a shared hash-grid-based density field with a medium-conditioned color head that receives a one-bit medium flag (air or water) and traces each camera ray as two segments: a straight segment in air up to a planar water surface and a refracted segment in water computed via Snell's law with known refractive indices. To allocate samples efficiently across the air-water boundary, we employ a single proposal-network sampler that operates on a virtual straight ray spanning both media, combined with a kinked density wrapper that transparently corrects water-segment positions along the refracted direction before density evaluation. A data adaptation pipeline converts photogrammetric reconstructions to a Nerfstudio-compatible format, estimates the water plane from boundary markers, and provides per-pixel medium masks to gate refraction. We also extend the point cloud export with refraction-corrected backprojection and reversible coordinate transforms to world and global frames. On a simulated two-media scene with known ground truth, BathyFacto with refraction achieves a Cloud-to-Mesh mean distance of 0.06 m and 87 % completeness, compared to 0.52 m / 29 % for the Nerfacto baseline and 0.36 m / 21% for conventional MVS without refraction correction.

analysis.tldr: BathyFacto 通过折射感知的双介质神经辐射场实现高精度浅水水深测量。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于无人机影像的水上摄影测量在浅水水深测量中受空气-水界面折射影响，传统方法假设直线传播导致系统性深度偏差，亟需一种能精确处理折射的建模方法。
analysis.problem: 解决空气-水界面折射导致的深度偏差，实现水下点云的度量精确重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在 Nerfstudio 框架中扩展 Nerfacto，采用共享哈希网格密度场和介质条件颜色头，通过 Snell 定律计算折射光线，并设计虚拟直线采样器与扭结密度包装器高效分配样本。
contributions: 提出折射感知的双介质 NeRF 模型 BathyFacto，集成于 Nerfstudio 中。
设计数据适配管道，包括水面估计、像素级介质掩码和折射校正的点云导出。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟双介质场景中，BathyFacto 的 Cloud-to-Mesh 平均距离为 0.06 m，完整度 87%，优于 Nerfacto 基线（0.52 m / 29%）和传统 MVS（0.36 m / 21%）。
limitations: 假设水面为平面，可能不适用于波浪起伏的真实场景。
依赖已知折射率和边界标记，实际部署需额外标定。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BathyFacto 通过折射感知的双介质神经辐射场实现高精度浅水水深测量。

papers.title: V-ABS: Action-Observer Driven Beam Search for Dynamic Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in general perception, yet complex multi-step visual reasoning remains a persistent challenge. Although recent agentic approaches incorporate tool use, they often neglect critical execution feedback. Consequently, they suffer from the imagination-action-observer (IAO) bias, a misalignment between prior imagination and observer feedback that undermines reasoning stability and optimality. To bridge this gap, we introduce V-ABS, an action-observer driven beam search framework that enables deliberate reasoning through thinker-actor-observer iterations. We also propose an entropy-based adaptive weighting algorithm to mitigate the IAO bias by dynamically balancing the confidence scores between the policy priors and the observational feedback. Moreover, we construct a large-scale supervised fine-tuning (SFT) dataset comprising over 80k samples to guide the model to assign higher prior confidence to correct action paths. Extensive experiments across eight diverse benchmarks show that V-ABS achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering an average improvement of 19.7% on the Qwen3-VL-8B baseline and consistent gains across both open-source and proprietary models.

analysis.tldr: V-ABS通过动作-观察者驱动的束搜索和自适应加权算法，缓解多模态大模型在动态视觉推理中的想象-动作-观察偏差，实现SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在通用感知上表现优异，但复杂多步视觉推理仍面临挑战，现有智能体方法忽略关键执行反馈，导致推理不稳定和次优。
analysis.problem: 多步视觉推理中的想象-动作-观察偏差（IAO bias），即先验想象与观察者反馈之间的错位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出IAO偏差是现有方法忽视执行反馈导致的，表现为推理不稳定和次优。
analysis.method: 提出V-ABS框架，包含思考者-行动者-观察者迭代的束搜索，以及基于熵的自适应加权算法动态平衡策略先验与观察反馈的置信度，并构建80k+样本的SFT数据集。
contributions: 提出动作-观察者驱动的束搜索框架V-ABS，实现多步视觉推理中的刻意推理。
提出基于熵的自适应加权算法，缓解IAO偏差。
构建大规模SFT数据集（80k+样本），引导模型对正确动作路径赋予更高先验置信度。
analysis.experiments: 在8个不同基准上，V-ABS在Qwen3-VL-8B基线上平均提升19.7%，并在开源和闭源模型上取得一致增益。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量SFT数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
束搜索的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: V-ABS通过动作-观察者驱动的束搜索和自适应加权算法，缓解多模态大模型在动态视觉推理中的想象-动作-观察偏差，实现SOTA性能。

papers.title: Task-Agnostic Noisy Label Detection via Standardized Loss Aggregation
papers.abstract: Noisy labels are common in large-scale medical imaging datasets due to inter-observer variability and ambiguous cases. We propose a statistically grounded and task-agnostic framework, Standardized Loss Aggregation (SLA), for detecting noisy labels at the sample level. SLA quantifies label reliability by aggregating standardized fold-level validation losses across repeated cross-validation runs. This formulation generalizes discrete hard-counting schemes into a continuous estimator that captures both the frequency and magnitude of performance deviations, yielding interpretable and statistically stable noisiness scores. Experiments on a public fundus dataset demonstrate that SLA consistently outperforms the hard-counting baseline across all noise levels and converges substantially faster, especially under low noise ratios where subtle loss variations are informative. Samples with high SLA scores indicate potentially ambiguous or mislabeled cases, guiding efficient re-annotation and improving dataset reliability for any classification task.

analysis.tldr: 提出标准化损失聚合（SLA）框架，通过跨交叉验证的标准化损失检测噪声标签，无需任务特定设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学影像数据集中噪声标签普遍存在，现有方法依赖任务特定设计或硬计数方案，缺乏统计稳定性和泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖任务先验的情况下，准确且稳定地检测样本级噪声标签。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 硬计数方案仅考虑离散错误次数，忽略损失幅度信息，在低噪声比下性能不足；SLA通过连续损失聚合捕捉细微差异。
analysis.method: SLA：在重复交叉验证中聚合标准化折验证损失，将离散硬计数扩展为连续噪声估计器，同时考虑偏差频率和幅度。
contributions: 提出任务无关的噪声标签检测框架SLA，基于统计原理聚合标准化损失。
在眼底数据集上验证SLA优于硬计数基线，收敛更快，尤其低噪声比下优势明显。
analysis.experiments: 在公开眼底数据集上测试，SLA在所有噪声水平下优于硬计数基线，低噪声比下收敛更快。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性需更多实验。
未讨论高噪声比下的性能边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出标准化损失聚合（SLA）框架，通过跨交叉验证的标准化损失检测噪声标签，无需任务特定设计。

papers.title: Active-SAOOD: Active Sparsely Annotated Oriented Object Detection in Remote Sensing Images
papers.abstract: Reducing the annotation cost of oriented object detection in remote sensing remains a major challenge. Recently, sparse annotation has gained attention for effectively reducing annotation redundancy in densely remote sensing scenes. However, (1) the sparse data reliance on class-dependent sampling, and (2) the lack of in-depth investigation into the characteristics of sparse samples hinders its further development. This paper proposes an active learning-based sparsely annotated oriented object detection (SAOOD) method, termed Active-SAOOD. Based on a model state observation module, Active-SAOOD actively selects the most valuable sparse samples at the instance level that are best suited to the current model state, by jointly considering orientation, classification, and localization uncertainty, as well as inter- and intra-class diversity. This design enables SAOOD to operate stably under completely randomly initialized sparse annotations and extends its applicability to broader real-world. Experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that Active-SAOOD significantly improves both performance and stability of existing SAOOD methods under various random sparse annotation. In particular, with only 1\% annotated ratios, it achieves a 9\% performance gain over the baseline, further enhancing the practical value of SAOOD in remote sensing. The code will be public.

analysis.tldr: 提出主动学习策略优化稀疏标注下的遥感旋转目标检测，仅用1%标注即提升9%性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像中旋转目标检测的标注成本高昂，稀疏标注虽能减少冗余，但现有方法依赖类别采样且未深入挖掘稀疏样本特性，限制了其应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在完全随机初始化的稀疏标注下，稳定且高效地选择最有价值的样本进行标注，以提升旋转目标检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有稀疏标注方法依赖类别采样，且对稀疏样本特性缺乏研究，导致在随机初始化下性能不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出Active-SAOOD方法，基于模型状态观测模块，联合考虑方向、分类和定位的不确定性以及类内类间多样性，在实例级别主动选择最适配当前模型状态的有价值稀疏样本。
contributions: 提出一种主动学习驱动的稀疏标注旋转目标检测方法，实现完全随机初始化下的稳定运行。
通过联合不确定性及多样性采样，显著提升稀疏标注下的检测性能，仅1%标注即获9%性能增益。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上验证，Active-SAOOD在不同随机稀疏标注下显著提升现有SAOOD方法的性能和稳定性。
limitations: 可能依赖模型状态观测模块的准确性。
未讨论极端稀疏比例（如低于0.5%）下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出主动学习策略优化稀疏标注下的遥感旋转目标检测，仅用1%标注即提升9%性能。

papers.title: MolSight: Molecular Property Prediction with Images
papers.abstract: Every molecule ever synthesised can be drawn as a 2D skeletal diagram, yet in modern property prediction this universally available representation has received less focus in favour of molecular graphs, 3D conformers, or billion-parameter language models, each imposing its own computational and data-engineering overhead. We present $\textbf{MolSight}$, the first systematic large-scale study of vision-based Molecular Property Prediction (MPP). Using 10 vision architectures, 7 pre-training strategies, and $2\,M$ molecule images, we evaluate performance across 10 downstream tasks spanning physical-property regression, drug-discovery classification, and quantum-chemistry prediction. To account for the wide variation in structural complexity across pre-training molecules, we further propose a $\textbf{chemistry-informed curriculum}$: five structural complexity descriptors partition the corpus into five tiers of increasing chemical difficulty, consistently outperforming non-curriculum baselines. We show that a single rendered bond-line image, processed by a vision encoder, is sufficient for competitive molecular property prediction, i.e. $\textit{chemical insight from sight alone}$. The best curriculum-trained configuration achieves the top result on $\textbf{5 of 10}$ benchmarks and top two on $\textbf{all 10}$, at $\textbf{$\textit{80$\times$ lower}$}$ FLOPs than the nearest multi-modal competitor.

analysis.tldr: MolSight 证明仅用分子二维骨架图即可高效预测分子性质，性能优于多数现有方法且计算量降低80倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分子性质预测方法依赖分子图、3D构象或大语言模型，计算和数据工程开销大，而分子骨架图作为通用表示尚未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 探索基于视觉的分子性质预测（MPP）的可行性，并解决预训练分子结构复杂度差异带来的学习困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MolSight，系统研究10种视觉架构和7种预训练策略，并引入化学信息课程学习，根据结构复杂度将分子图像分为五个难度层级进行训练。
contributions: 首次大规模系统研究基于视觉的分子性质预测。
提出化学信息课程学习策略，利用结构复杂度描述符提升性能。
证明单张骨架图即可实现有竞争力的预测，计算量比多模态方法低80倍。
analysis.experiments: 在10个下游任务上评估，涵盖物理性质回归、药物发现分类和量子化学预测，最佳配置在5个基准上取得最高结果，在所有10个基准上进入前二。
limitations: 可能依赖分子图像渲染质量。
课程学习策略的通用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MolSight 证明仅用分子二维骨架图即可高效预测分子性质，性能优于多数现有方法且计算量降低80倍。

papers.title: Improving Temporal Action Segmentation via Constraint-Aware Decoding
papers.abstract: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) divides untrimmed videos into labeled action segments. While fully supervised methods have advanced the field, challenges such as action variability, ambiguous boundaries, and high annotation costs remain, especially in new or low-resource domains. Grammar-based approaches improve segmentation with structural priors but rely on complex parsing limiting scalability. In this work, we propose a lightweight, constraint-based refinement framework that enhances TAS predictions by integrating statistical structural priors such as transition confidence, action boundary sets, and per-class duration, that can be directly extracted from annotated data. These constraints are integrated into a modified Viterbi decoding algorithm, allowing inference-time refinement without retraining or added model complexity. Our approach improves both fully and semi-supervised TAS models by correcting structural prediction errors while maintaining high efficiency. Code is available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级约束感知解码框架，通过统计结构先验改进时序动作分割，无需重训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 时序动作分割面临动作变异性、边界模糊和高标注成本等挑战，基于语法的方法依赖复杂解析，可扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加模型复杂度或重训练的情况下，利用统计结构先验修正时序动作分割中的结构预测错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出约束感知解码框架，从标注数据中提取过渡置信度、动作边界集和每类时长等统计结构先验，集成到改进的Viterbi解码算法中，实现推理时精炼。
contributions: 提出轻量级约束感知解码框架，无需重训练即可提升TAS预测质量。
在完全和半监督TAS模型上均有效，保持高效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖从标注数据中提取的先验，可能在新领域需重新提取。
未与复杂语法方法进行直接比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级约束感知解码框架，通过统计结构先验改进时序动作分割，无需重训练。

papers.title: MicroViTv2: Beyond the FLOPS for Edge Energy-Friendly Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: The Vision Transformer (ViT) achieves remarkable accuracy across visual tasks but remains computationally expensive for edge deployment. This paper presents MicroViTv2, a lightweight Vision Transformer optimized for real-device efficiency. Built upon the original MicroViT, the proposed model is designed based on reparameterized design, specifically Reparameterized Patch Embedding (RepEmbed) and Reparameterized Depth-Wise convolution mixer (RepDW) for faster inference, and introduces the Single Depth-Wise Transposed Attention (SDTA) to capture long-range dependencies with minimal redundancy. Despite slightly higher FLOPs, MicroViTv2 improves accuracy up to 0.5% compared to its predecessor and surpassing MobileViTv2, EdgeNeXt, and EfficientViT while maintaining fast inference and high energy efficiency on Jetson AGX Orin. Experiments on ImageNet-1K and COCO demonstrate that hardware-aware design and structural re-parameterization are key to achieving high accuracy and low energy consumption, validating the need to evaluate efficiency beyond FLOPs. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: MicroViTv2通过重参数化设计和单深度可分离转置注意力，在边缘设备上实现高精度与低能耗，超越FLOPs指标。
analysis.research_motivation: Vision Transformer在视觉任务中精度高，但计算成本高，难以部署在边缘设备上。现有轻量化设计常以FLOPs为优化目标，但FLOPs与实际设备效率（如推理速度、能耗）并不完全一致，需要更贴近真实硬件的设计方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种轻量级Vision Transformer，使其在边缘设备上同时实现高精度、快速推理和低能耗，并超越传统FLOPs导向的优化范式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，尽管MicroViTv2的FLOPs略高于前代，但其实际推理速度和能效更优，说明FLOPs不能完全反映边缘设备上的真实效率，硬件感知设计和结构重参数化是关键。
analysis.method: 基于重参数化设计，提出Reparameterized Patch Embedding (RepEmbed)和Reparameterized Depth-Wise convolution mixer (RepDW)以加速推理；引入Single Depth-Wise Transposed Attention (SDTA)捕获长距离依赖并减少冗余。
contributions: 提出MicroViTv2，一种面向边缘设备能效优化的轻量级Vision Transformer，通过重参数化设计提升推理速度。
引入SDTA模块，在捕获长距离依赖的同时降低冗余，实现精度与效率的平衡。
在ImageNet-1K和COCO上验证，MicroViTv2在精度上超越MobileViTv2、EdgeNeXt和EfficientViT，并在Jetson AGX Orin上实现高能效。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-1K图像分类和COCO目标检测任务上评估，与MicroViT、MobileViTv2、EdgeNeXt、EfficientViT等对比，测量精度、推理速度和能耗。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在特定边缘硬件（Jetson AGX Orin）上验证，泛化到其他边缘设备需进一步测试。
重参数化设计可能增加训练复杂度或内存开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MicroViTv2通过重参数化设计和单深度可分离转置注意力，在边缘设备上实现高精度与低能耗，超越FLOPs指标。

papers.title: Scaling Vision Models Does Not Consistently Improve Localisation-Based Explanation Quality
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence models are increasingly scaled to improve predictive accuracy, yet it remains unclear whether scale improves the quality of post-hoc explanations. We investigate this relationship by evaluating 11 computer vision models representing increasing levels of depth and complexity within the ResNet, DenseNet, and Vision Transformer families, trained from scratch or pretrained, across three image datasets with ground-truth segmentation masks. For each model, we generate explanations using five post-hoc explainable AI methods and quantify mask alignment using two localisation metrics: Relevance Rank Accuracy (Arras et al., 2022) and the proposed Dual-Polarity Precision, which measures positive attributions inside the class mask and negative attributions outside it. Across datasets and methods, increasing architectural depth and parameter count does not improve explanation quality in most statistical comparisons, and smaller models often match or exceed deeper variants. While pretraining typically improves predictive performance and increases the dependence of explanations on learned weights, it does not consistently increase localisation scores. We also observe scenarios in which models achieve strong predictive performance while localisation precision is near zero, suggesting that performance metrics alone may not indicate whether predictions are based on the annotated regions. These results indicate that larger models do not reliably provide higher-quality explanations, and that explainability should therefore be assessed explicitly during model selection for safety-sensitive deployments.

analysis.tldr: 增大视觉模型规模并不能稳定提升基于定位的解释质量，小模型有时表现更好。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着AI模型规模增大，预测精度提升，但后验解释质量是否随之提升尚不明确，这对安全敏感场景至关重要。
analysis.problem: 研究模型规模（深度、参数量）与后验解释定位质量之间的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 增大模型深度和参数量在大多数统计比较中并未提升解释质量，小模型常能匹配或超越深层变体；预训练提升预测性能但未稳定提升定位分数；存在模型预测性能强但定位精度接近零的情况。
analysis.method: 在ResNet、DenseNet、Vision Transformer系列中选取11个模型，使用5种后验XAI方法生成解释，并用Relevance Rank Accuracy和新提出的Dual-Polarity Precision两个定位指标评估掩码对齐。
contributions: 系统评估了模型规模与解释定位质量的关系，发现增大规模并不一致提升解释质量。
提出Dual-Polarity Precision指标，同时衡量类掩码内的正归因和掩码外的负归因。
analysis.experiments: 在三个带有真实分割掩码的图像数据集上，对11个模型（不同深度和复杂度）使用5种XAI方法，统计比较定位指标。
limitations: 仅评估了定位质量，未覆盖其他解释质量维度（如忠实度、可理解性）。
模型家族限于ResNet、DenseNet和ViT，可能不推广到其他架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 增大视觉模型规模并不能稳定提升基于定位的解释质量，小模型有时表现更好。

papers.title: Thermal-Det: Language-Guided Cross-Modal Distillation for Open-Vocabulary Thermal Object Detection
papers.abstract: Existing open-vocabulary detectors focus on RGB images and fail to generalize to thermal imagery, where low texture and emissivity variations challenge RGB-based semantics. We present Thermal-Det, the first large language model (LLM) supervised open-vocabulary detector tailored for thermal images. To enable large-scale training, we develop a synthetic dataset by converting GroundingCap-1M into the thermal domain and filtering captions to remove RGB-specific terms, yielding over one million thermally aligned samples with bounding boxes, grounding texts, and detailed captions. Thermal-Det jointly optimizes detection, captioning, and cross-modal distillation objectives. A frozen RGB teacher provides geometric and semantic pseudo-supervision for paired but unlabeled RGB-thermal data, transferring open-vocabulary knowledge without manual annotation. The model further employs a Thermal-Text Alignment Head for text calibration and a Modality-Fused Cross-Attention module for dual-modality reasoning. Unlike prior domain-adaptation methods, the detector is fully fine-tuned to internalize thermal contrast patterns while preserving language alignment. Experiments on public benchmarks show consistent 2-4% AP gains over existing open-vocabulary detectors, establishing a strong foundation for scalable, language-driven thermal perception.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向热红外图像的开放词汇检测器，通过LLM监督合成数据和跨模态蒸馏实现语言引导的热感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇检测器仅适用于RGB图像，无法泛化到热红外图像，因为热图像纹理弱、发射率变化大，RGB语义难以直接迁移。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够识别热红外图像中任意类别物体的开放词汇检测器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Thermal-Det，利用LLM将RGB数据集转换为热域合成数据，联合优化检测、描述和跨模态蒸馏损失，使用冻结的RGB教师模型提供伪监督，并设计热-文本对齐头和模态融合交叉注意力模块。
contributions: 首个针对热红外图像的开放词汇检测器，利用LLM监督合成数据实现大规模训练。
提出跨模态蒸馏框架，从RGB教师模型迁移开放词汇知识，无需人工标注。
在公开基准上取得2-4% AP提升，为语言驱动的热感知奠定基础。
analysis.experiments: 在公开基准上，与现有开放词汇检测器相比，一致获得2-4% AP提升。
limitations: 依赖合成数据，可能无法完全模拟真实热图像分布。
需要配对的RGB-热数据，获取成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向热红外图像的开放词汇检测器，通过LLM监督合成数据和跨模态蒸馏实现语言引导的热感知。

papers.title: Fashion130K: An E-commerce Fashion Dataset for Outfit Generation with Unified Multi-modal Condition
papers.abstract: Recent research work on fashion outfit generation focuses on promoting visual consistency of garments by leveraging key information from reference image and text prompt. However, the potential of outfit generation remains underexplored, requiring comprehensive e-commercial dataset and elaborative utilization of multi-modal condition. In this paper, we propose a brand-new e-commerce dataset, named Fashion130k, with various occasions, models, and garment types. For the consistent generation of garment, we design a framework with Unified Multi-modal Condition (UMC) to align and integrate the text and visual prompts into generation model. Specifically, we explore an embedding refiner to extract the unified embeddings of multi-modal prompts, within which a Fusion Transformer is proposed to align the multi-modal embeddings by adjusting the modality gap between text and image. Based on unified embeddings, the attention in generation model is redesigned to emphasis the correlations between prompts and noise image, inducing that the noise image can select the pivotal tokens of prompts for consistent outfit generation. Our dataset and proposed framework offer a general and nuanced exploration of multi-modal prompts for generation models. Extensive experiments on real-world applications and benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of UMC in visual consistency, achieving promising result than that of SoTA methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出Fashion130K电商数据集和统一多模态条件框架，实现视觉一致的服装生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有服装生成研究依赖参考图像和文本提示，但缺乏全面的电商数据集和对多模态条件的精细利用，限制了生成效果。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态条件（文本和图像）生成视觉一致的服装，并解决模态对齐问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一多模态条件（UMC）框架，包括嵌入精炼器提取统一嵌入，融合Transformer对齐多模态嵌入，并重新设计生成模型中的注意力机制以强调提示与噪声图像的相关性。
contributions: 构建了包含多种场合、模特和服装类型的电商数据集Fashion130K。
设计了统一多模态条件框架，有效对齐和融合文本与视觉提示，提升服装生成的视觉一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实应用和基准上进行了实验，UMC在视觉一致性上优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于电商服装生成场景，泛化性未知。
未提及对复杂多模态条件（如遮挡、背景）的处理能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Fashion130K电商数据集和统一多模态条件框架，实现视觉一致的服装生成。

papers.title: MicroWorld: Empowering Multimodal Large Language Models to Bridge the Microscopic Domain Gap with Multimodal Attribute Graph
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show remarkable potential for scientific reasoning, yet their performance in specialized domains such as microscopy remains limited by the scarcity of domain-specific training data and the difficulty of encoding fine-grained expert knowledge into model parameters. To bridge the gap, we introduce MicroWorld, a framework that constructs a multimodal attributed property graph (MAPG) from large-scale scientific image--caption corpora and leverages it to augment MLLM reasoning at inference time without any domain-specific fine-tuning. MicroWorld extracts biomedical entities and relations via scispaCy or LLM-based triplet mining, aligns images and entities in a shared embedding space using Qwen3-VL-Embedding, and assembles a knowledge graph comprising approximately 111K nodes and 346K typed edges spanning eight relation categories. At inference time, a graph-augmented retrieval pipeline matches query entities to the MAPG and injects structured knowledge context into the MLLM prompt. On the MicroVQA benchmark, MicroWorld improves the reasoning performance of Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct by 37.5%, outperforming GPT-5 by 13.0% to achieve a new state-of-the-art. Furthermore, it yields a 6.0% performance gain on the MicroBench benchmark. Extensive experiments demonstrate the enhanced generalization capability introduced by MicroWorld. A qualitative case study further reveals both the mechanisms through which structured knowledge improves reasoning and the failure modes that point to promising future directions.
