Code and data are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过构建多模态属性图增强MLLM在显微镜领域的推理能力，无需微调即实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 显微镜等专业领域缺乏领域特定训练数据，且细粒度专家知识难以编码到模型参数中，导致MLLM在微观领域表现受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行领域微调的情况下，利用结构化知识提升MLLM在显微镜领域的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建多模态属性图（MAPG），从科学图像-文本语料中提取实体和关系，对齐图像与实体嵌入，并在推理时通过图增强检索向MLLM注入结构化知识。
contributions: 提出MicroWorld框架，通过构建多模态属性图增强MLLM的微观领域推理能力。
在MicroVQA基准上提升37.5%，超越GPT-5达13.0%，取得新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在MicroVQA和MicroBench基准上评估，MicroWorld分别提升37.5%和6.0%，并进行了定性案例研究。
limitations: 依赖外部工具（scispaCy/LLM）进行三元组挖掘，可能引入噪声。
知识图谱规模有限（111K节点），可能无法覆盖所有微观领域知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过构建多模态属性图增强MLLM在显微镜领域的推理能力，无需微调即实现SOTA。

papers.title: Think as Needed: Geometry-Driven Adaptive Perception for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Autonomous driving scenes range from empty highways to dense intersections with dozens of interacting road users, yet current 3D detection models apply a fixed computation budget to every frame, wasting resources on simple scenes while lacking capacity for complex ones. Existing approaches compound this problem: Transformer-based interaction models scale quadratically with the number of detected objects, and frame-by-frame processing causes the system to immediately forget objects the moment they become occluded. We propose Enhanced HOPE, an adaptive perception architecture that measures the geometric complexity of each incoming LiDAR frame using an unsupervised statistical estimator and routes it through a shallow or deep processing path accordingly, requiring no manual scene labels. To keep interaction modeling efficient, we replace quadratic pairwise attention with a linear-time subspace-based network that groups nearby objects into clusters and processes them jointly. The computational savings from these two mechanisms free up resources for a persistent temporal memory module that retains previously detected objects and traffic rules across frames, enabling the system to recall occluded objects seconds after they disappear from view. On the nuScenes and CARLA benchmarks, Enhanced HOPE reduces latency by 38% on simple scenes with no accuracy loss, improves mean Average Precision by 2.7 points on rare long-tail scenarios, and tracks objects through occlusions lasting over 5 seconds, where all tested baselines fail.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应感知架构Enhanced HOPE，根据LiDAR帧的几何复杂度动态分配计算资源，并引入线性时间交互建模和持久时序记忆模块，在简单场景降低延迟、复杂场景提升精度并实现长时遮挡跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶场景复杂度差异大，现有3D检测模型对所有帧使用固定计算预算，简单场景浪费资源、复杂场景能力不足；Transformer交互模型随目标数量二次增长，且逐帧处理导致遮挡后立即遗忘目标。
analysis.problem: 如何根据场景几何复杂度自适应分配计算资源，同时保持交互建模效率并实现长时遮挡目标记忆。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Enhanced HOPE架构：1）无监督统计估计器测量每帧LiDAR的几何复杂度，路由至浅层或深层处理路径；2）线性时间子空间网络替代二次注意力，将邻近目标聚类联合处理；3）持久时序记忆模块跨帧保留检测目标和交通规则，实现遮挡目标回忆。
contributions: 提出基于几何复杂度的自适应感知架构，无需人工场景标签即可动态分配计算资源。
设计线性时间子空间交互网络，避免二次复杂度。
引入持久时序记忆模块，实现长时遮挡目标跟踪。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes和CARLA基准上，简单场景延迟降低38%且无精度损失，罕见长尾场景mAP提升2.7点，遮挡超过5秒的目标跟踪成功而所有基线失败。
limitations: 可能依赖LiDAR模态，未验证其他传感器（如相机）的适用性。
持久记忆模块的存储和更新开销在极长序列中可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应感知架构Enhanced HOPE，根据LiDAR帧的几何复杂度动态分配计算资源，并引入线性时间交互建模和持久时序记忆模块，在简单场景降低延迟、复杂场景提升精度并实现长时遮挡跟踪。

papers.title: ViSRA: A Video-based Spatial Reasoning Agent for Multi-modal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) target 3D spatial intelligence, yet the progress has been largely driven by post-training on curated benchmarks, leaving the inference-time approach relatively underexplored. In this paper, we take a training-free perspective and introduce ViSRA, a human-aligned Video-based Spatial Reasoning Agent, as a framework to probe the spatial reasoning mechanism of MLLMs. ViSRA elicits spatial reasoning in a modular and extensible manner by leveraging explicit spatial information from expert models, enabling a plug-and-play flexible paradigm. ViSRA offers two key advantages: (1) human-aligned and transferable 3D understanding rather than task-specific overfitting; and (2) no post-training computational cost along with heavy manual curation of spatial reasoning datasets. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvement across a set of MLLMs on both existing benchmarks and unseen 3D spatial reasoning tasks, with ViSRA outperforming baselines by up to a 15.6% and 28.9% absolute margin respectively.

analysis.tldr: ViSRA 是一种无需训练的视频空间推理智能体，通过模块化利用专家模型的空间信息提升 MLLM 的 3D 空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前 MLLM 的 3D 空间智能主要依赖后训练，推理时方法探索不足，且后训练需要大量人工标注数据，成本高且易过拟合。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行后训练的情况下，提升 MLLM 在 3D 空间推理任务上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ViSRA，一种基于视频的空间推理智能体，通过模块化方式利用专家模型提取显式空间信息，以即插即用的方式增强 MLLM 的空间推理能力。
contributions: 提出训练免费的 ViSRA 框架，通过模块化设计实现人类对齐且可迁移的 3D 理解。
在多个 MLLM 和基准上验证了 ViSRA 的有效性，在已知和未知任务上分别提升高达 15.6% 和 28.9% 的绝对准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 MLLM 上对现有基准和未见过的 3D 空间推理任务进行实验，ViSRA 相比基线分别提升高达 15.6% 和 28.9% 的绝对准确率。
limitations: 依赖外部专家模型，可能引入额外推理延迟。
模块化设计可能无法处理所有类型的空间推理任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViSRA 是一种无需训练的视频空间推理智能体，通过模块化利用专家模型的空间信息提升 MLLM 的 3D 空间推理能力。

papers.title: HYPERPOSE: Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention for 3D Human Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: We introduce HYPERPOSE, a novel 3D human pose estimation framework that performs spatio-temporal reasoning entirely within the Lorentz model of hyperbolic space $\mathbb{H}^d$ to natively preserve the hierarchical tree topology of the human skeleton. Current state-of-the-art pose estimators aim to capture complex joint dynamics by relying on transformers and graph convolutional networks. Since these architectures operate exclusively in Euclidean space which fundamentally mismatches the inherent tree structure of the human body, these methods inevitably suffer from exponential volume distortion and struggle to maintain structural coherence. To this end, we depart from flat spaces and aim to improve geometric fidelity with Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention (HKPSA), natively embedding complex joint relationships without distortion, alongside a multi-scale windowed hyperbolic attention mechanism that efficiently models temporal dynamics in $O(TW)$ complexity. Furthermore, to overcome the well-known instability of training non-Euclidean manifolds, HYPERPOSE introduces a novel Riemannian loss suite and an uncertainty-weighted curriculum, enforcing physical geodesic constraints like bone length and velocity consistency. Extensive evaluations on the Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets demonstrate that HYPERPOSE achieves state-of-the-art structural and temporal coherence, significantly reducing both volume distortion and velocity error, while establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks in overall positional accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出在双曲空间中进行时空推理的3D人体姿态估计框架，通过双曲运动学相空间注意力机制保留人体骨架的层次树结构，在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D姿态估计方法在欧氏空间中操作，与人体骨架的树状层次结构不匹配，导致指数级体积失真和结构连贯性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在非欧几何空间中高效建模人体关节的层次树结构并保持时空一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 欧氏空间无法自然嵌入人体骨架的树状拓扑，导致体积失真和结构不连贯。
analysis.method: 提出双曲运动学相空间注意力（HKPSA），在双曲空间的Lorentz模型中进行时空推理，结合多尺度窗口化双曲注意力机制（复杂度O(TW)），并引入黎曼损失套件和不确定性加权课程学习。
contributions: 首次在双曲空间中进行3D人体姿态估计的完整时空推理，保留骨架层次结构。
提出HKPSA和多尺度窗口化双曲注意力，高效建模时空动态。
设计黎曼损失套件和不确定性加权课程，稳定非欧流形训练。
analysis.experiments: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上评估，达到结构和时间连贯性SOTA，显著降低体积失真和速度误差，在整体位置精度上建立新基准。
limitations: 双曲空间训练稳定性仍需额外损失和课程学习辅助。
可能对超参数敏感，需要进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在双曲空间中进行时空推理的3D人体姿态估计框架，通过双曲运动学相空间注意力机制保留人体骨架的层次树结构，在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Initiation of Interaction Detection Framework using a Nonverbal Cue for Human-Robot Interaction
papers.abstract: This paper describes an initiation of interaction(IoI) detection framework without keywords for human-robot interaction(HRI) based on audio and vision sensor fusion in a domestic environment. In the proposed framework, the robot has its own audio and vision sensors, and can employ external vision sensor for stable human detection and tracking. When the user starts to speak while looking at the robot, the robot can localize his or her position by its sound source localization together with human tracking information. Then the robot can detect the IoI if it perceives the face of the speaker faces the robot. In case that the user does not speak directly, the robot can also detect the IoI if he or she looks at the robot for more than predefined periods of time. A state transition model for the proposed IoI detection framework is designed and verified by experiments with a mobile robot. In order to implement and associate our model in a robot architecture, all the components are implemented and integrated in the Robot Operating System(ROS) environment.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于音视频传感器融合的非关键词交互启动检测框架，用于家庭环境中的人机交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 在人机交互中，机器人需要自然检测用户何时希望开始交互，而无需依赖特定关键词或指令，以提升交互的自然性和用户体验。
analysis.problem: 如何在家庭环境中，通过非语言线索（如注视和语音）可靠地检测用户启动交互的意图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个交互启动检测框架，融合机器人自身音频和视觉传感器以及外部视觉传感器，通过声源定位和人体跟踪确定用户位置，结合用户是否面向机器人说话或长时间注视机器人来检测交互启动，并设计状态转移模型。
contributions: 提出一种无需关键词的交互启动检测框架，利用非语言线索（注视和语音）实现自然交互启动。
在机器人操作系统环境中实现并集成所有组件，并通过移动机器人实验验证框架有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到通过移动机器人实验验证了所提出的状态转移模型，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在家庭环境等受限场景中验证，泛化性未知。
未提及对多用户或嘈杂环境的处理能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于音视频传感器融合的非关键词交互启动检测框架，用于家庭环境中的人机交互。

papers.title: SocialDirector: Training-Free Social Interaction Control for Multi-Person Video Generation
papers.abstract: Video generation has advanced rapidly, producing photorealistic videos from text or image prompts. Meanwhile, film production and social robotics increasingly demand multi-person videos with rich social interactions, including conversations, gestures, and coordinated actions. However, existing models offer no explicit control over interactions, such as who performs which action, when it occurs, and toward whom it is directed. This often results in wrong person performing unintended actions (actor-action mismatch), disordered social dynamics, and wrong action targets. To address these challenges, we present SocialDirector, a training-free interaction controller that enhances the generation model by modulating cross-attention maps. SocialDirector contains two modules: Social Actor Masking and Directional Reweighting. Social Actor Masking constrains each person's visual tokens to attend only to their own textual descriptions via a spatiotemporal mask, avoiding actor-action mismatch and disordered social dynamics. Directional Reweighting amplifies attention to directional words (e.g., "leftward", "right"), leading each action towards its intended target. To evaluate generated social interactions, we annotate existing datasets with interaction descriptions and build a fully automated evaluation pipeline powered by open-source VLMs. Experiments on different video generation models show that SocialDirector significantly improves interaction fidelity and approaches the upper bound set by real videos.

analysis.tldr: 无需训练的社交交互控制方法，通过调节交叉注意力图提升多人视频生成中交互的准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成模型无法显式控制多人交互（如谁执行什么动作、何时发生、朝向谁），导致角色-动作错配、社交动态混乱和动作目标错误，限制了在影视制作和社交机器人等领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的前提下，对多人视频生成中的社交交互（动作主体、时间、方向）进行精确控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SocialDirector，包含两个模块：Social Actor Masking（通过时空掩码约束每个角色的视觉token只关注其自身文本描述）和Directional Reweighting（放大方向性词语的注意力，引导动作朝向正确目标）。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的社交交互控制方法，通过调节交叉注意力图解决多人视频生成中的交互问题。
构建了带交互描述的数据集和全自动评估流程，利用开源VLM评估生成视频的交互保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在不同视频生成模型上实验，SocialDirector显著提升交互保真度，接近真实视频的上限。
limitations: 依赖预训练模型的交叉注意力图质量，可能对复杂场景或长视频效果有限。
仅通过注意力调节，无法处理需要物理约束的交互（如接触、力反馈）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 无需训练的社交交互控制方法，通过调节交叉注意力图提升多人视频生成中交互的准确性。

papers.title: MFVLR: Multi-domain Fine-grained Vision-Language Reconstruction for Generalizable Diffusion Face Forgery Detection and Localization
papers.abstract: The swift advancement in photo-realistic face generation technology has sparked considerable concerns across society and academia, emphasizing the requirement of generalizable face forgery detection and localization methods. Prior works tend to capture face forgery patterns across multiple domains using image modality, other modalities like fine-grained texts are not comprehensively investigated, which restricts the generalization capability of models. Besides, they usually analyze facial images created by GAN, but struggle to identify and localize those synthesized by diffusion. To solve the problems, in this paper, we devise a novel multi-domain fine-grained vision-language reconstruction (MFVLR) model, which explores comprehensive and diverse visual forgery traces via language-guided face forgery representation learning, to achieve generalizable diffusion-synthesized face forgery detection and localization (DFFDL). Specifically, we devise a fine-grained language transformer that studies general fine-grained language embeddings using language reconstruction. We propose a multi-domain vision encoder to capture general and complementary visual forgery patterns across the image and residual domains. A vision decoder is designed to reconstruct image appearance and achieve forgery localization. Besides, we propose an innovative plug-and-play vision injection module to enhance the interaction between the vision and language embeddings. Extensive experiments and visualizations demonstrate that our network outperforms the state of the art on different settings like cross-generator, cross-forgery, and cross-dataset evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出多域细粒度视觉-语言重建模型，利用语言引导的伪造表征学习实现可泛化的扩散人脸伪造检测与定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法主要依赖图像模态捕获跨域伪造模式，未充分利用细粒度文本等模态，且难以检测和定位扩散模型合成的人脸伪造，限制了泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 实现可泛化的扩散人脸伪造检测与定位，解决跨生成器、跨伪造类型和跨数据集的泛化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MFVLR模型，包含细粒度语言Transformer学习通用语言嵌入、多域视觉编码器捕获图像和残差域的互补伪造模式、视觉解码器重建图像外观并定位伪造，以及即插即用的视觉注入模块增强视觉与语言嵌入的交互。
contributions: 提出多域细粒度视觉-语言重建框架，首次将语言引导的伪造表征学习用于扩散人脸伪造检测与定位。
设计细粒度语言Transformer和多域视觉编码器，捕获通用且互补的伪造痕迹。
提出即插即用的视觉注入模块，增强视觉与语言嵌入的交互。
analysis.experiments: 在跨生成器、跨伪造类型和跨数据集设置下进行实验，结果表明所提网络优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定语言重建任务，对语言质量敏感。
多域编码器可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多域细粒度视觉-语言重建模型，利用语言引导的伪造表征学习实现可泛化的扩散人脸伪造检测与定位。

papers.title: Explanation-Aware Learning for Enhanced Interpretability in Biomedical Imaging
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks for medical image diagnosis often achieve high predictive accuracy while relying on spurious or clinically irrelevant visual cues, limiting their trustworthiness in practice. Post-hoc explanation methods are widely used to visualize model decisions in the form of saliency maps; however, these explanations do not influence how models learn during training, allowing non-causal or confounding features to persist. This motivates the incorporation of explanation supervision directly into the training objective to guide model attention toward clinically meaningful regions and promote clinically grounded decision-making. This paper presents a systematic approach to integrate explanation loss into model training and analyzes how different explanation loss designs and supervision strengths influence both predictive performance and spatial faithfulness of explanations. To quantitatively assess interpretability, two complementary explanation performance metrics-annotation coverage and saliency precision-are introduced, enabling rigorous evaluation beyond qualitative visualization. Our experimental results reveal a clear trade-off between explanation quality and explanation loss coefficients. Furthermore, quantitative statistical analysis yields consistently improved explanation alignment while maintaining comparable accuracy. Experiments were conducted on annotated chest X-ray datasets; however, the proposed framework is applicable to a broad range of annotated biomedical imaging modalities. Overall, these findings demonstrate that explanation supervision is not a monolithic design choice and provide practical guidance for incorporating explanation loss into training objectives under noisy clinical annotations.

analysis.tldr: 通过将解释损失融入训练目标，引导模型关注临床相关区域，在保持精度的同时提升可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络在医学图像诊断中常依赖虚假或临床无关的视觉线索，降低可信度；事后解释方法无法影响模型训练过程，导致非因果特征持续存在。
analysis.problem: 如何将解释监督直接整合到训练目标中，引导模型注意力聚焦于临床有意义区域，并系统分析不同解释损失设计对预测性能和解释空间忠实度的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 解释质量与解释损失系数之间存在明确权衡；定量统计分析表明解释对齐持续改善，同时保持可比精度。
analysis.method: 提出一种系统方法，将解释损失（如基于注意力图的损失）集成到模型训练中，并引入注释覆盖率和显著性精度两个互补指标来量化可解释性。
contributions: 系统分析了不同解释损失设计和监督强度对预测性能与解释空间忠实度的影响
提出了两个互补的解释性能指标——注释覆盖率和显著性精度，实现超越定性可视化的严格评估
analysis.experiments: 在带注释的胸部X光数据集上进行实验，框架可推广到多种带注释的生物医学成像模态。
limitations: 依赖高质量临床注释，噪声注释可能影响效果
仅评估了特定解释损失形式，未涵盖所有可能设计
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过将解释损失融入训练目标，引导模型关注临床相关区域，在保持精度的同时提升可解释性。

papers.title: EchoPrune: Interpreting Redundancy as Temporal Echoes for Efficient VideoLLMs
papers.abstract: Long-form video understanding remains challenging for Video Large Language Models (VideoLLMs), as the dense frame sampling introduces massive visual tokens while sparse sampling risks missing critical temporal evidence and leading to LLM hallucination. Existing training-free token reduction methods either treat videos equally as static images or rely on segment-level merging heuristics, which weaken fine-grained spatiotemporal modeling and introduce additional overhead. In this paper, we propose EchoPrune, a lightweight and training-free token pruning method that improves temporal resolution under a fixed LLM-side visual token budget. Our core idea is to interpret redundant video tokens as temporal echoes: if a token is well reconstructed from the previous frame, it is merely a temporally redundant echo; otherwise, it may capture new events, motion, or query-relevant visual evidence. Based on this insight, EchoPrune scores visual tokens by (i) query-guided crossmodal relevance and (ii) temporal reconstruction error, measured by correspondence matching and echo matching across consecutive frames. The selected tokens preserve task-relevant cues and temporal novelty while suppressing predictable redundancy, allowing VideoLLMs to observe more frames without increasing the decoding budget. Extensive experiments on LLaVA-OV, Qwen2.5VL, and Qwen3VL across six video understanding benchmarks show that EchoPrune enables VideoLLMs to process up to 20x frames under the same token budget, yielding improved performance (+8.6%) and inference speedup (5.6x for prefilling) on Qwen2.5VL-7B.

analysis.tldr: EchoPrune通过将冗余视频令牌解释为“时间回声”，实现训练自由的令牌剪枝，使VideoLLM在固定令牌预算下处理多达20倍帧数，性能提升8.6%。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频理解中，密集帧采样产生大量视觉令牌，而稀疏采样可能遗漏关键时间证据导致幻觉；现有训练自由令牌缩减方法要么将视频视为静态图像，要么依赖分段合并启发式，削弱了细粒度时空建模并引入额外开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定LLM侧视觉令牌预算下提高视频令牌的时间分辨率，同时保持任务相关性和时间新颖性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：若一个令牌能从前一帧良好重建，则它是时间冗余的“回声”；否则可能捕获新事件、运动或查询相关证据。
analysis.method: EchoPrune：一种轻量级、训练自由的令牌剪枝方法，通过查询引导的跨模态相关性和时间重建误差（基于连续帧间的对应匹配和回声匹配）对视觉令牌评分，选择保留任务相关且时间新颖的令牌，抑制可预测冗余。
contributions: 提出EchoPrune，一种训练自由的令牌剪枝方法，通过时间回声解释冗余，提升VideoLLM的时间分辨率。
在多个VideoLLM和六个视频理解基准上验证，EchoPrune在固定令牌预算下处理多达20倍帧数，性能提升8.6%，推理加速5.6倍（预填充阶段）。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaVA-OV、Qwen2.5VL和Qwen3VL上，跨越六个视频理解基准进行实验，结果显示Qwen2.5VL-7B上性能提升8.6%，推理加速5.6倍（预填充阶段）。
limitations: 可能对快速场景切换或高动态视频中回声匹配的准确性敏感。
方法依赖帧间对应匹配，可能引入额外计算开销，尽管整体是轻量级。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EchoPrune通过将冗余视频令牌解释为“时间回声”，实现训练自由的令牌剪枝，使VideoLLM在固定令牌预算下处理多达20倍帧数，性能提升8.6%。

papers.title: PixelFlowCast: Latent-Free Precipitation Nowcasting via Pixel Mean Flows
papers.abstract: Precipitation nowcasting aims to forecast short-term radar echo sequences for extreme weather warning, where both prediction fidelity and inference efficiency are critical for real-world deployment. However, diffusion-based models, despite their strong generative capability, suffer from slow inference due to multi-step sampling trajectories, limiting their practical usability. Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) improves efficiency via straightened trajectories, but relies on latent space compression, which inevitably discards high-frequency physical details and degrades fine-grained prediction quality. To address these limitations, we propose PixelFlowCast, a two-stage probabilistic forecasting framework that achieves both high-efficiency and high-fidelity prediction without latent compression. Specifically, in the first stage, a deterministic model first produces coarse forecasts to capture global evolution trends. In the subsequent stage, the proposed KANCondNet extracts deep spatiotemporal evolution features to provide accurate conditional guidance. Based on this, a latent-free, few-step Pixel Mean Flows (PMF) predictor employs an $x$-prediction mechanism to generate high-quality predictions, effectively preserving fine-grained structures while maintaining fast inference. Experiments on the publicly available SEVIR dataset demonstrate that PixelFlowCast outperforms existing mainstream methods in both prediction accuracy and inference efficiency, particularly for long sequence forecasting, highlighting its strong potential for real-world operational deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出无潜在压缩的像素均值流预测器，实现高效高保真降水临近预报。
analysis.research_motivation: 降水临近预报需要高保真度和高推理效率，但扩散模型推理慢，条件流匹配依赖潜在压缩丢失高频细节。
analysis.problem: 现有方法在预测保真度和推理效率之间难以兼顾，尤其是长序列预报。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型多步采样导致推理慢；条件流匹配虽效率高但潜在压缩丢弃高频物理细节，降低细粒度预测质量。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段确定性模型生成粗预测捕捉全局趋势；第二阶段KANCondNet提取时空特征，基于无潜在压缩的像素均值流（PMF）预测器通过x-预测机制生成高质量预测。
contributions: 提出PixelFlowCast，实现无潜在压缩的高效高保真降水临近预报。
设计KANCondNet提取深度时空演化特征，以及像素均值流（PMF）预测器，在保持推理速度的同时保留细粒度结构。
analysis.experiments: 在公开SEVIR数据集上，PixelFlowCast在预测精度和推理效率上优于现有主流方法，尤其长序列预报。
limitations: 可能依赖SEVIR数据集特性，泛化性需进一步验证。
两阶段框架可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无潜在压缩的像素均值流预测器，实现高效高保真降水临近预报。

papers.title: ExtraVAR: Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping for Resolution Extrapolation in Visual Autoregressive Models
papers.abstract: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models have emerged as a strong alternative to diffusion for image synthesis, yet their fixed training resolution prevents direct generation at higher resolutions. Naively transferring training-free extrapolation methods from LLMs or diffusion models to VAR yields three characteristic failure modes: global repetition, local repetition, and detail degradation. We trace them to a unified band-stage mismatch: VAR generates images in a coarse-to-fine, scale-wise process where each stage is driven by a distinct dominant RoPE frequency band, and each failure mode emerges when the dominant band of a particular stage is disrupted. Building on this insight, we propose Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping, a training-free strategy that assigns each frequency band a stage-specific remapping rule, jointly suppressing all three failure modes. We further observe that attention becomes systematically dispersed as the image resolution increases. Existing methods typically depend on predefined attention scaling factors, which are neither adaptive to the target resolution nor capable of faithfully capturing the actual extent of attention dispersion. We therefore propose Entropy-Driven Adaptive Attention Calibration, which quantifies dispersion via a resolution-invariant normalized entropy and yields a closed-form per-head scaling factor that realigns the extrapolated-resolution attention entropy with its training-resolution counterpart. Extensive experiments show that our method consistently outperforms prior resolution-extrapolation methods in both structural coherence and fine-detail fidelity. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出阶段感知RoPE重映射和熵驱动注意力校准，实现视觉自回归模型的无训练分辨率外推。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉自回归模型在固定分辨率下训练，无法直接生成更高分辨率图像，而直接迁移LLM或扩散模型的免训练外推方法会导致全局重复、局部重复和细节退化三种失败模式。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，让视觉自回归模型生成高分辨率图像，同时避免结构重复和细节退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出VAR模型在分辨率外推时出现三种失败模式：全局重复、局部重复和细节退化，并归因于统一的频带-阶段不匹配：每个生成阶段由不同的主导RoPE频带驱动，当特定阶段的主导频带被破坏时，对应失败模式出现。此外，注意力随分辨率增加而系统性分散，现有方法依赖预定义缩放因子，无法自适应目标分辨率。
analysis.method: 提出Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping（阶段感知RoPE重映射），为每个频带分配阶段特定的重映射规则，联合抑制三种失败模式；以及Entropy-Driven Adaptive Attention Calibration（熵驱动自适应注意力校准），通过分辨率不变归一化熵量化注意力分散程度，导出闭式每头缩放因子，使外推分辨率下的注意力熵与训练分辨率对齐。
contributions: 揭示了VAR模型分辨率外推中三种失败模式的统一原因——频带-阶段不匹配，并提出了阶段感知RoPE重映射策略。
提出了熵驱动自适应注意力校准方法，无需预定义缩放因子即可自适应调整注意力分散。
实验表明该方法在结构一致性和细节保真度上优于先前分辨率外推方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明方法在结构一致性和细节保真度上持续优于先前方法。
limitations: 方法仅在VAR模型上验证，可能不适用于其他自回归生成架构。
未讨论对极高分辦率（如4K以上）的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出阶段感知RoPE重映射和熵驱动注意力校准，实现视觉自回归模型的无训练分辨率外推。

papers.title: Only Train Once: Uncertainty-Aware One-Class Learning for Face Authenticity Detection
papers.abstract: The rapid evolution of generative paradigms has enabled the creation of highly realistic imagery, which escalating the risks of identity fraud and the dissemination of disinformation. Most existing approaches frame face forgery detection as a fully supervised binary classification problem. Consequently, these models typically exhibit significant performance decay when tasked with detecting forgeries from previously unseen generative paradigms. Furthermore, these methods focus exclusively on either DeepFakes or fully synthesized faces, thereby failing to provide a generalized framework for universal face forgery detection. In this paper, we address this challenge by introducing FADNet (Face Authenticity Detector Net), % a self-supervised framework that which reformulates face forgery detection as a one-class classification (OCC) task. By training exclusively on authentic facial data to capture their intrinsic representations, FADNet flags any image whose feature embedding deviates significantly from the learned distribution of real faces as a forgery. The framework incorporates Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) to quantify predictive uncertainty and utilizes a plug-and-play pseudo-forgery image generator (PFIG) to tighten decision boundaries around authentic data. Extensive experimental evaluations on the DF40 and ASFD benchmarks demonstrate that FADNet achieves superior performance and generalization capabilities. Specifically, FADNet substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, yielding a remarkable average accuracy of 96.63\% and an average precision of 98.83\%.

analysis.tldr: 提出FADNet，将人脸伪造检测转化为单类分类任务，仅用真实人脸训练，结合证据深度学习与伪伪造生成器，实现高泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法依赖全监督二分类，对未见过的生成范式泛化性差，且无法统一检测DeepFake和全合成人脸。
analysis.problem: 如何仅用真实人脸数据训练，实现跨生成范式的通用人脸伪造检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FADNet，采用单类分类框架，仅用真实人脸训练；引入证据深度学习量化预测不确定性；设计即插即用的伪伪造图像生成器收紧决策边界。
contributions: 将人脸伪造检测重新定义为单类分类任务，仅需真实数据训练。
结合证据深度学习和伪伪造生成器，提升检测鲁棒性和泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在DF40和ASFD基准上评估，平均准确率96.63%，平均精度98.83%，优于现有SOTA方法。
limitations: 可能对高度逼真的伪造仍存在漏检。
伪伪造生成器的设计可能引入特定偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FADNet，将人脸伪造检测转化为单类分类任务，仅用真实人脸训练，结合证据深度学习与伪伪造生成器，实现高泛化性。

papers.title: Slum Detection and Density Mapping with AlphaEarth Foundations: A Representation Learning Evaluation Across 12 Global Cities
papers.abstract: Pixel-level slum mapping has long been constrained by limited cross-city generalisation, the absence of continuous density estimation, and weak global comparability. AlphaEarth Foundations (AEF), a globally consistent 64-dimensional annual surface embedding at 10 m, offers a new analysis-ready basis for lightweight slum monitoring, but its applicability to slum detection - an indirectly coupled task shaped by both built form and socio-economic processes - remains untested. We evaluate AEF on slum classification and sub-pixel density estimation across 12 cities and 69 city-year pairs (2017-2024), using GRAM pseudo-masks as supervisory labels. The evaluation spans four training strategies, two protocols (random split and 3x3 spatial block cross-validation), six auxiliary feature configurations, and five baseline models, complemented by representation-level analyses (PCA, SHAP) and full-AOI mapping. Five findings emerge. (1) Same-city cross-year training is optimal under both protocols (median spatial F1 = 0.616, R^2 = 0.466); temporal expansion outperforms cross-city transfer, indicating city-scale representational drift. (2) Regression R^2 is driven primarily by zero/non-zero boundary discrimination: positive-pixel R^2 is consistently negative across all cities, revealing limited capacity to model intra-pixel density gradients at 10 m. (3) PC36 is consistently top-ranked across tasks; classification saturates at k = 32 while regression remains unsaturated at k = 64. (4) POI features yield the largest density gain (Delta R^2 = +0.064). (5) For six cities meeting dual-task usability thresholds, full-AOI inference across 2017-2024 preserves slum cluster structure (mean SSIM = 0.926). The study delineates the capabilities and complementarity needs of foundation-model embeddings for slum monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 评估AlphaEarth Foundations嵌入在12个全球城市贫民窟检测与密度估计中的表现，发现同城跨年训练最优，但密度梯度建模能力有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 像素级贫民窟制图长期受限于跨城市泛化能力弱、缺乏连续密度估计以及全球可比性差，亟需一种轻量级、可泛化的监测方法。
analysis.problem: 评估全球一致的表面嵌入AlphaEarth Foundations在贫民窟分类和亚像素密度估计任务中的适用性，并揭示其能力边界与互补需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同城跨年训练优于跨城市迁移，表明存在城市尺度的表征漂移；回归R²主要由零/非零边界区分驱动，正像素R²在所有城市均为负，说明10米分辨率下建模像素内密度梯度的能力有限；分类在k=32时饱和，回归在k=64时仍未饱和；POI特征带来最大密度增益。
analysis.method: 使用AlphaEarth Foundations的64维年度表面嵌入，结合GRAM伪掩码作为监督标签，在12个城市69个城市-年对（2017-2024）上评估，涵盖四种训练策略、两种协议、六种辅助特征配置和五种基线模型，并进行PCA和SHAP表征分析。
contributions: 首次系统评估AlphaEarth Foundations在贫民窟检测与密度估计中的跨城市泛化能力。
揭示了同城跨年训练优于跨城市迁移，以及10米分辨率下密度梯度建模的局限性。
提供了全AOI推理的时空一致性验证（平均SSIM=0.926）。
analysis.experiments: 在12个城市69个城市-年对上进行了分类和回归实验，包括随机分割和3x3空间块交叉验证，报告了中位空间F1=0.616和R²=0.466，以及正像素R²为负等结果。
limitations: 仅使用GRAM伪掩码作为标签，可能引入噪声。
密度估计在正像素区域表现差，限制了精细监测能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估AlphaEarth Foundations嵌入在12个全球城市贫民窟检测与密度估计中的表现，发现同城跨年训练最优，但密度梯度建模能力有限。

papers.title: MUSDA: Multi-source Multi-modality Unsupervised Domain Adaptive 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: With the advancement of autonomous driving, numerous annotated multi-modality datasets have become available. This presents an opportunity to develop domain-adaptive 3D object detectors for new environments without relying on labor-intensive manual annotations. However, traditional domain adaptation methods typically focus on a single source domain or a single modality, limiting their effectiveness in multi-source, multi-modality scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for multi-source, multi-modality unsupervised domain adaptation in 3D object detection for autonomous driving. Given multiple labeled source domains and one unlabeled target domain, our framework first introduces hierarchical spatially-conditioned (HSC) domain classifiers, which jointly align features from both camera and LiDAR modalities at two distinct levels for each source-target domain pair. To effectively leverage information from multiple source domains, we construct a prototype graph between each pair of domains. Based on this, we develop a prototype graph weighted (PGW) multi-source fusion strategy to aggregate predictions from multiple source detection heads. Experimental results on three widely used 3D object detection datasets - Waymo, nuScenes, and Lyft - demonstrate that our proposed framework effectively integrates information across both modalities and source domains, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出多源多模态无监督域自适应框架，通过层次空间条件域分类器和原型图加权融合策略提升自动驾驶3D目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶领域有大量带标注的多模态数据集，但传统域自适应方法通常只针对单一源域或单一模态，难以有效利用多源多模态信息来适应新环境，且人工标注成本高。
analysis.problem: 解决多源多模态无监督域自适应下的3D目标检测问题，即如何利用多个带标注的源域（含相机和LiDAR数据）和一个无标注的目标域，实现跨域检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MUSDA框架，包含层次空间条件域分类器（HSC）用于对齐每个源-目标域对的跨模态特征，以及原型图加权融合策略（PGW）聚合多个源检测头的预测。
contributions: 提出首个针对多源多模态无监督域自适应的3D目标检测框架。
设计层次空间条件域分类器实现跨模态特征对齐。
提出原型图加权融合策略有效整合多源信息。
analysis.experiments: 在Waymo、nuScenes和Lyft三个数据集上实验，所提方法一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖多个源域数据的可用性。
层次空间条件域分类器的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多源多模态无监督域自适应框架，通过层次空间条件域分类器和原型图加权融合策略提升自动驾驶3D目标检测性能。

papers.title: Hystar: Hypernetwork-driven Style-adaptive Retrieval via Dynamic SVD Modulation
papers.abstract: Query-based image retrieval (QBIR) requires retrieving relevant images given diverse and often stylistically heterogeneous queries, such as sketches, artworks, or low-resolution previews. While large-scale vision--language representation models (VLRMs) like CLIP offer strong zero-shot retrieval performance, they struggle with distribution shifts caused by unseen query styles. In this paper, we propose the Hypernetwork-driven Style-adaptive Retrieval (Hystar), a lightweight framework that dynamically adapts model weights to each query's style. Hystar employs a hypernetwork to generate singular-value perturbations ($\Delta S$) for attention layers, enabling flexible per-input adaptation, while static singular-value offsets on MLP layers ensure cross-style stability. To better handle semantic confusions across styles, we design StyleNCE as part of Hystar, an optimal-transport-weighted contrastive loss that emphasizes hard cross-style negatives. Extensive experiments on multi-style retrieval and cross-style classification benchmarks demonstrate that Hystar consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance while being parameter-efficient and stable across styles.

analysis.tldr: Hystar 通过超网络动态调制注意力层的奇异值，实现轻量级、风格自适应的图像检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（如 CLIP）在零样本检索中表现优异，但面对草图、艺术作品等未见过的查询风格时，分布偏移导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加大量参数的前提下，使检索模型能够动态适应不同查询风格，同时保持跨风格稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Hystar 框架：1) 超网络为注意力层生成奇异值扰动 ΔS，实现逐输入自适应；2) MLP 层使用静态奇异值偏移保证跨风格稳定性；3) 设计 StyleNCE 对比损失，通过最优传输加权强调困难跨风格负样本。
contributions: 提出超网络驱动的动态 SVD 调制机制，实现轻量级风格自适应。
设计 StyleNCE 损失函数，利用最优传输加权处理跨风格语义混淆。
analysis.experiments: 在多风格检索和跨风格分类基准上，Hystar 持续优于强基线，达到最先进性能，且参数高效、跨风格稳定。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练 VLRM 的表示能力，对极端风格泛化有限。
超网络引入额外计算开销，实时性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Hystar 通过超网络动态调制注意力层的奇异值，实现轻量级、风格自适应的图像检索。

papers.title: Med-StepBench: A Hierarchical Reasoning Framework for Evaluating Hallucinations in Medical Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models (VLMs) demonstrate strong performance in medical image understanding, but frequently generate clinically plausible yet incorrect statements, raising significant safety concerns. Existing medical hallucination benchmarks primarily focus on 2D imaging with one-shot diagnostic questions, offering limited insight into whether predictions are grounded in correct localization and abnormality identification, allowing critical reasoning errors to remain hidden behind seemingly correct diagnoses. We introduce Med-StepBench, the first large-scale benchmark for step-wise hallucination detection in 3D oncological PET/CT, comprising over 12,000 images and more than 1,000,000 image-statement pairs across volumetric and multi-view 2D data, which decomposes clinical reasoning into four expert-designed diagnostic stages. Using clinician-verified annotations, we perform the first step-level evaluation of general-purpose and medical VLMs, revealing systematic failure modes obscured by aggregate accuracy metrics. Furthermore, we show that current VLMs are highly susceptible to adversarial yet clinically plausible intermediate explanations, which significantly amplify hallucinations despite contradictory visual evidence. Together, our findings highlight fundamental limitations in grounding multi-step clinical reasoning and establish Med-StepBench as a rigorous benchmark for developing safer and more reliable medical VLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个3D PET/CT分步幻觉检测基准Med-StepBench，揭示多步临床推理中隐藏的推理错误。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医疗VLM在图像理解中常生成看似合理但错误的陈述，而现有幻觉基准仅关注2D单次诊断，无法检测分步推理中的错误，存在安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对3D医学影像（如PET/CT）的分步推理幻觉评估基准，无法揭示隐藏在正确诊断背后的关键推理错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前VLM在分步推理中易受对抗性但临床合理的中间解释影响，显著放大幻觉，即使视觉证据矛盾。
analysis.method: 构建包含12,000+图像和1,000,000+图像-陈述对的3D PET/CT基准，将临床推理分解为四个专家设计的诊断阶段，进行分步幻觉检测。
contributions: 首个大规模3D PET/CT分步幻觉检测基准Med-StepBench
首次对通用和医疗VLM进行分步评估，揭示聚合准确率掩盖的系统性失败模式
analysis.experiments: 对通用和医疗VLM进行分步评估，发现系统性失败模式，并验证VLM易受对抗性中间解释影响。
limitations: 仅针对PET/CT模态，未覆盖其他3D医学影像
基准依赖专家标注，扩展性可能受限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个3D PET/CT分步幻觉检测基准Med-StepBench，揭示多步临床推理中隐藏的推理错误。

papers.title: Omni-Persona: Systematic Benchmarking and Improving Omnimodal Personalization
papers.abstract: While multimodal large language models have advanced across text, image, and audio, personalization research has remained primarily vision-language, with unified omnimodal benchmarking that jointly covers text, image, and audio still limited, and lacking the methodological rigor to account for absent-persona scenarios or systematic grounding studies. We introduce Omni-Persona, the first comprehensive benchmark for omnimodal personalization. We formalize the task as cross-modal routing over the \emph{Persona Modality Graph}, encompassing 4 task groups and 18 fine-grained tasks across ${\sim}750$ items. To rigorously diagnose grounding behavior, we propose \emph{Calibrated Accuracy ($\mathrm{Cal}$)}, which jointly rewards correct grounding and appropriate abstention, incorporating absent-persona queries within a unified evaluation framework. On our dedicated experiments, three diagnostic findings emerge: (i) open-source models show a consistent audio-vs-visual grounding gap that RLVR partially narrows via dense rule-based supervision; (ii) answerable recall and parameter scale are incomplete diagnostics, since strong recall can coexist with absent-persona hallucination and larger models do not always achieve higher $\mathrm{Cal}$, exposing calibration as a separate evaluation axis; and (iii) SFT is bounded by the difficulty of constructing annotated ground-truth supervision at scale, while RLVR generalizes more consistently through outcome-level verifiable feedback yet drifts toward conservative behavior and lower generation quality under our reward design. Omni-Persona thus serves as a diagnostic framework that surfaces the pitfalls of omnimodal personalization, guiding future post-training and reward design.

analysis.tldr: 首个全模态个性化基准Omni-Persona，揭示开源模型在音频-视觉接地差距、校准缺失及SFT与RLVR的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有个性化研究主要局限于视觉-语言领域，缺乏统一覆盖文本、图像和音频的全模态基准，且缺少对缺失人物场景的系统性接地研究和方法论严谨性。
analysis.problem: 构建首个全模态个性化基准，并设计校准指标以诊断模型在跨模态路由中的接地行为，特别是处理缺失人物查询时的校准能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现三个诊断结果：(i) 开源模型存在音频-视觉接地差距，RLVR通过密集规则监督部分缩小；(ii) 可回答召回率和参数规模不能完全诊断模型性能，强召回可能伴随缺失人物幻觉，大模型不一定有更高校准精度；(iii) SFT受限于大规模标注数据构建难度，RLVR通过结果级可验证反馈更一致地泛化，但奖励设计导致保守行为和生成质量下降。
analysis.method: 提出Omni-Persona基准，形式化为基于人物模态图的跨模态路由任务，包含4个任务组和18个细粒度任务；提出校准精度（Cal）指标，统一奖励正确接地和适当弃权。
contributions: 首个全模态个性化基准Omni-Persona，覆盖文本、图像和音频，包含约750个样本。
提出校准精度（Cal）指标，将缺失人物查询纳入统一评估框架。
通过实验揭示开源模型的音频-视觉接地差距、校准作为独立评估轴的必要性，以及SFT与RLVR的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在专用实验上进行了诊断性评估，比较了开源模型、SFT和RLVR方法，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准规模有限（约750项），可能无法覆盖所有个性化场景。
RLVR奖励设计导致保守行为和生成质量下降，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个全模态个性化基准Omni-Persona，揭示开源模型在音频-视觉接地差距、校准缺失及SFT与RLVR的权衡。

papers.title: Geometric 4D Stitching for Grounded 4D Generation
papers.abstract: Recent 4D generation methods complete scene-level missing information using generative models and reconstruct the scene into radiance-based representations. However, these pipelines often present geometric inconsistencies in the generated content, and the radiance-based reconstruction requires expensive optimization. Furthermore, radiance-based representations often absorb these geometric inconsistencies into their view-dependent nature, failing to enforce the grounded geometric consistency. To address these issues, we propose Geometric 4D Stitching, an efficient framework that explicitly identifies missing geometric regions and complements them with geometrically grounded 4D stitches. As a result, our method constructs 4D scene representations in under 10 minutes on a single NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU per one-step scene expansion, while improving geometric consistency. Moreover, we demonstrate that our explicit 4D stitching supports interative expansion of 4D mesh as well as 4D scene editing.

analysis.tldr: 提出几何4D拼接框架，通过显式识别缺失几何区域并补充几何一致的4D补丁，实现高效且几何一致的4D场景生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有4D生成方法在场景级缺失信息补全时存在几何不一致问题，且基于辐射场的重建需要昂贵的优化，同时辐射场表示会将几何不一致吸收到视角依赖特性中，无法保证几何一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地生成几何一致的4D场景表示，避免辐射场重建的昂贵优化和几何不一致问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出辐射场表示会吸收几何不一致到视角依赖特性中，无法强制执行几何一致性。
analysis.method: 提出Geometric 4D Stitching框架，显式识别缺失几何区域，并用几何一致的4D补丁进行补充，构建显式4D场景表示。
contributions: 提出Geometric 4D Stitching框架，实现高效且几何一致的4D场景生成。
支持4D网格的迭代扩展和4D场景编辑，且单步场景扩展在单张RTX 5090 GPU上仅需不到10分钟。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖于预定义的几何补丁库，泛化性受限。
仅支持单步场景扩展，大规模场景可能需要多步迭代。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出几何4D拼接框架，通过显式识别缺失几何区域并补充几何一致的4D补丁，实现高效且几何一致的4D场景生成。

papers.title: ERASE: Eliminating Redundant Visual Tokens via Adaptive Two-Stage Token Pruning
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) enable large language models (LLMs) to process high-resolution images, significantly improving real-world multimodal understanding. However, this capability introduces a large number of vision tokens, resulting in substantial computational overhead. To mitigate this issue, various vision token pruning methods have been proposed. Nevertheless, existing approaches predominantly rely on learned semantic features within the model to capture visual redundancy. Moreover, they lack adaptive mechanisms to adjust pruning strategies according to the complexity of the input image. In this paper, we propose ERASE, a two-stage vision token pruning framework that identifies and retains salient tokens through pruning strategies adaptive to image complexity. Experiment results demonstrate that ERASE significantly reduces vision tokens while preserving accuracy. For Qwen2.5-VL-7B, at a token pruning ratio of 85\%, ERASE retains 89.46% of the original model accuracy, whereas the best prior method retains only 78.1%. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应两阶段视觉令牌剪枝框架ERASE，在85%剪枝率下保留89.46%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM处理高分辨率图像时产生大量视觉令牌，导致计算开销巨大；现有剪枝方法依赖模型内部语义特征且缺乏自适应调整策略。
analysis.problem: 如何根据图像复杂度自适应地剪枝冗余视觉令牌，在显著减少令牌数量的同时保持模型精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法缺乏自适应机制，无法根据输入图像复杂度调整剪枝策略，导致高剪枝率下精度损失严重。
analysis.method: 两阶段视觉令牌剪枝框架：第一阶段基于图像复杂度自适应确定剪枝比例，第二阶段利用模型语义特征识别并保留显著令牌。
contributions: 提出自适应两阶段剪枝框架ERASE，根据图像复杂度动态调整剪枝策略
在Qwen2.5-VL-7B上，85%剪枝率下保留89.46%准确率，远超此前最佳方法的78.1%
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型上评估，85%剪枝率下ERASE保留89.46%准确率，此前最佳方法仅保留78.1%。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定VLM架构验证，泛化性需进一步测试
两阶段剪枝可能引入额外计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应两阶段视觉令牌剪枝框架ERASE，在85%剪枝率下保留89.46%准确率。

papers.title: INFANiTE: Implicit Neural representation for high-resolution Fetal brain spatio-temporal Atlas learNing from clinical Thick-slicE MRI
papers.abstract: Spatio-temporal fetal brain atlases are important for characterizing normative neurodevelopment and identifying congenital anomalies. However, existing atlas construction pipelines necessitate days for slice-to-volume reconstruction (SVR) to generate high-resolution 3D brain volumes and several additional days for iterative volume registration, thereby rendering atlas construction from large-scale cohorts prohibitively impractical. We address these limitations with INFANiTE, an Implicit Neural Representation (INR) framework for high-resolution Fetal brain spatio-temporal Atlas learNing from clinical Thick-slicE MRI scans, bypassing both the costly SVR and the iterative non-rigid registration steps entirely, thereby substantially accelerating atlas construction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that INFANiTE outperforms existing baselines in subject consistency, reference fidelity, intrinsic quality and biological plausibility, even under challenging sparse-data settings. Additionally, INFANiTE reduces the end-to-end processing time (i.e., from raw scans to the final atlas) from days to hours compared to the traditional 3D volume-based pipeline (e.g., SyGN), facilitating large-scale population-level fetal brain analysis. Our code is publicly available at: this https URL

analysis.tldr: INFANiTE 用隐式神经表示直接从厚层 MRI 学习胎儿脑时空图谱，省去昂贵的 SVR 和配准步骤，将处理时间从天级缩短到小时级。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有胎儿脑图谱构建需要数天进行切片到体积重建和迭代配准，难以应用于大规模队列研究，亟需高效方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从临床厚层 MRI 快速构建高分辨率胎儿脑时空图谱，避免传统 SVR 和迭代非刚性配准的高计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 INFANiTE 框架，利用隐式神经表示直接从厚层 MRI 学习时空图谱，跳过 SVR 和迭代配准步骤。
contributions: 首次将 INR 用于胎儿脑时空图谱学习，绕过传统 SVR 和配准瓶颈
在 subject consistency、reference fidelity、intrinsic quality 和 biological plausibility 上优于现有基线，且处理时间从天级降至小时级
analysis.experiments: 在多个指标上对比现有基线，包括 subject consistency、reference fidelity、intrinsic quality 和 biological plausibility，并在稀疏数据设置下验证鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定 MRI 采集协议，泛化性需进一步验证
未提及对严重运动伪影或极端厚层数据的处理能力
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: INFANiTE 用隐式神经表示直接从厚层 MRI 学习胎儿脑时空图谱，省去昂贵的 SVR 和配准步骤，将处理时间从天级缩短到小时级。

papers.title: OZ-TAL: Online Zero-Shot Temporal Action Localization
papers.abstract: Online Temporal Action Localization (On-TAL) aims to detect the occurrence time and category of actions in untrimmed streaming videos immediately upon their completion. Recent advancements in this field focus on developing more sophisticated frameworks, shifting from Online Action Detection (OAD)-based aggregation paradigm to instance-level understanding. However, existing approaches are typically trained on specific domains and often exhibit limited generalization capabilities when applied to arbitrary videos, particularly in the presence of previously unseen actions. In this paper, we introduce a new task called Online Zero-shot Temporal Action Localization (OZ-TAL), which aims to detect previously unseen actions in an online fashion. Furthermore, we propose a training-free framework that leverages off-the-shelf Vision-Language Models (VLMs) while introducing additional mechanisms to enhance visual representations and mitigate their inherent biases. We establish new benchmarks and representative baselines for OZ-TAL on THUMOS14 and ActivityNet-1.3, and extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches under both offline and online zero-shot settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出在线零样本时序动作定位任务及免训练框架，利用现成VLM提升泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有在线时序动作定位方法在特定域训练，泛化到任意视频（尤其是未见动作）时能力有限。
analysis.problem: 在线检测流式视频中未见类别的动作，且需在动作完成后立即识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 免训练框架，利用现成视觉-语言模型（VLM），并引入额外机制增强视觉表征、缓解固有偏见。
contributions: 提出在线零样本时序动作定位（OZ-TAL）新任务
提出免训练框架，利用VLM并增强视觉表征、缓解偏见
analysis.experiments: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet-1.3上建立基准，实验表明方法在离线和在线零样本设置下均显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 依赖现成VLM，可能受限于VLM本身能力
免训练框架可能无法充分利用特定域数据
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在线零样本时序动作定位任务及免训练框架，利用现成VLM提升泛化能力。

papers.title: Towards Generalist Game Players: An Investigation of Foundation Models in the Game Multiverse
papers.abstract: The real world unfolds along a single set of physics laws, yet human intelligence demonstrates a remarkable capacity to generalize experiences from this singular physical existence into a multiverse of games, each governed by entirely different rules, aesthetics, physics, and objectives. This omni-reality adaptability is a hallmark of general intelligence. As Artificial Intelligence progresses towards Artificial General Intelligence, the multiverse of games has evolved from mere entertainment into the ultimate ground for training and evaluating AGI. The pursuit of this generality has unfolded across four eras: from environment-specific symbolic and reinforcement learning agents, to current large foundation models acting as generalist players, and toward a future creator stage where agent both creates new game worlds and continually evolves within them. We trace the full lifecycle of a generalist game player along four interdependent pillars: Dataset, Model, Harness, and Benchmark. Every advance across these pillars can be read as an attempt to break one of five fundamental trade-offs that currently bound the whole system. Building on this end-to-end view, we chart a five-level roadmap, progressing from single-game mastery to the ultimate creator stage in which the agent simultaneously creates and evolves within theoretical game multiverse. Taken together, our work offers a unified lens onto a rapidly shifting field,and a principled path toward the omnipotent generalist agent capable of seamlessly mastering any challenge within the multiverse of games, thereby paving the way for AGI.

analysis.tldr: 综述游戏多宇宙中通用游戏智能体的发展历程、核心支柱与五级路线图。
analysis.research_motivation: 游戏多宇宙是训练和评估通用人工智能的终极场域，但现有方法局限于特定环境，缺乏统一视角来理解通用游戏智能体的全生命周期。
analysis.problem: 如何系统梳理通用游戏智能体的发展脉络、核心组件（数据集、模型、框架、基准）及其面临的基本权衡，并规划从单游戏精通到多宇宙创造的演进路线。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式，但指出系统受限于五个基本权衡。
analysis.method: 提出一个四支柱（数据集、模型、框架、基准）分析框架，并基于此构建五级路线图（从单游戏精通到创造者阶段）。
contributions: 提出通用游戏智能体的四支柱全生命周期视角。
识别出制约系统的五个基本权衡。
规划从单游戏精通到多宇宙创造的五级路线图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出具体算法或实验验证。
五级路线图的可行性需未来工作验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述游戏多宇宙中通用游戏智能体的发展历程、核心支柱与五级路线图。

papers.title: Learning to Perceive "Where": Spatial Pretext Tasks for Robust Self-Supervised Learning
papers.abstract: Existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methods primarily learn object-invariant representations but often neglect the spatial structure and relationships among object parts. To address this limitation, we introduce Spatial Prediction (SP), a spatially aware pretext regression task that predicts the relative position and scale between a pair of disentangled local views from the same image. By modeling part-to-part relationships in a continuous geometric space, SP encourages representations to capture fine-grained spatial dependencies beyond invariant categorical semantics, thereby learning the compositional structure of visual scenes. SP is implemented as a decoupled plug-in and can be seamlessly integrated into diverse SSL frameworks. Extensive experiments show consistent improvements across image recognition, fine-grained classification, semantic segmentation, and depth estimation, as well as substantial gains in out-of-distribution robustness for object recognition. To evaluate spatial reasoning, we introduce (1) a position and scale prediction task on image patch pairs and (2) a jigsaw understanding task requiring patch reordering and recognition after reconstruction. Strong performance on these tasks indicates improved spatial structure and geometric awareness. Overall, explicitly modeling spatial information provides an effective inductive bias for SSL, leading to more structured representations and better generalization. Code and models will be released.

analysis.tldr: 提出空间预测（SP）自监督预文本任务，通过建模局部视图间的相对位置和尺度关系，提升视觉表征的空间结构感知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自监督学习方法主要学习物体不变表征，但忽略了物体部件间的空间结构和关系，限制了表征对场景组成结构的理解。
analysis.problem: 如何让自监督学习捕获视觉场景中部件间的空间依赖关系，从而学习更具结构性的表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出空间预测（SP）预文本回归任务，预测同一图像中两个解耦局部视图的相对位置和尺度，作为可插拔模块集成到现有SSL框架中。
contributions: 提出空间预测（SP）预文本任务，显式建模部件间空间关系，提升SSL表征的结构性。
在图像识别、细粒度分类、语义分割、深度估计等任务上取得一致改进，并显著提升分布外鲁棒性。
引入两个空间推理评测任务：位置尺度预测和拼图理解任务。
analysis.experiments: 在图像识别、细粒度分类、语义分割、深度估计等任务上进行实验，并评估分布外鲁棒性；同时在新引入的空间推理任务上验证。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对视图解耦质量敏感，需要合适的局部视图采样策略。
连续空间回归任务可能在某些场景下不如离散任务稳定。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出空间预测（SP）自监督预文本任务，通过建模局部视图间的相对位置和尺度关系，提升视觉表征的空间结构感知能力。

papers.title: SDTalk: Structured Facial Priors and Dual-Branch Motion Fields for Generalizable Gaussian Talking Head Synthesis
papers.abstract: High-quality, real-time talking head synthesis remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Existing reconstruction- and rendering-based methods typically rely on identity-specific models, limiting cross-identity generalization. To address this issue, we propose SDTalk, a one-shot 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)-based framework that generalizes to unseen identities without personalized training or fine-tuning. Our framework comprises two modules with a two-stage training strategy. In the first stage, we incorporate structured facial priors into the reconstruction module and separately predict 3DGS parameters for visible and occluded regions, enabling complete head reconstruction from a single image. In the second stage, we introduce a dual-branch motion field to model coarse and fine facial dynamics, improving detail fidelity and lip synchronization. Experiments demonstrate that SDTalk surpasses existing methods in both visual quality and inference efficiency.

analysis.tldr: SDTalk提出一种基于3D高斯泼溅的通用说话头合成框架，利用结构化面部先验和双分支运动场实现单图跨身份高保真合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有说话头合成方法依赖身份特定模型，无法泛化到未见身份，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现无需个性化训练或微调、能泛化到任意身份的实时高质量说话头合成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段训练：第一阶段用结构化面部先验分别预测可见和遮挡区域的3DGS参数实现完整头部重建；第二阶段用双分支运动场建模粗粒度和细粒度面部动态。
contributions: 提出首个无需个性化训练的通用3DGS说话头合成框架SDTalk
设计结构化面部先验和双分支运动场提升重建完整性和动态细节
analysis.experiments: 在视觉质量和推理效率上超越现有方法，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对极端姿态或遮挡的鲁棒性有限
双分支运动场可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SDTalk提出一种基于3D高斯泼溅的通用说话头合成框架，利用结构化面部先验和双分支运动场实现单图跨身份高保真合成。

papers.title: Urban-ImageNet: A Large-Scale Multi-Modal Dataset and Evaluation Framework for Urban Space Perception
papers.abstract: We present Urban-ImageNet, a large-scale multi-modal dataset and evaluation benchmark for urban space perception from user-generated social media imagery. The corpus contains over 2 Million public social media images and paired textual posts collected from Weibo across 61 urban sites in 24 Chinese cities across 2019-2025, with controlled benchmark subsets at 1K, 10K, and 100K scale and a full 2M corpus for large-scale training and evaluation. Urban-ImageNet is organized by HUSIC, a Hierarchical Urban Space Image Classification framework that defines a 10-class taxonomy grounded in urban theory. The taxonomy is designed to distinguish activated and non-activated public spaces, exterior and interior urban environments, accommodation spaces, consumption content, portraits, and non-spatial social-media content. Rather than treating urban imagery as generic scene data, Urban-ImageNet evaluates whether machine perception models can capture spatial, social, and functional distinctions that are central to urban studies. The benchmark supports three tasks within one standardized library: (T1) urban scene semantic classification, (T2) cross-modal image-text retrieval, and (T3) instance segmentation. Our experiments evaluate representative vision, vision-language, and segmentation models, revealing strong performance on supervised scene classification but more challenging behavior in cross-modal retrieval and instance-level urban object segmentation. A multi-scale study further examines how model performance changes as balanced training data increases from 1K, 10K to 100K images. Urban-ImageNet provides a unified, theory-grounded, multi-city benchmark for evaluating how AI systems perceive and interpret contemporary urban spaces across modalities, scales, and task formulations. Dataset and benchmark are available at: this http URL and this http URL .

analysis.tldr: Urban-ImageNet是一个大规模多模态城市空间感知数据集与评测基准，包含200万社交媒体图像-文本对，支持场景分类、跨模态检索和实例分割三项任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有城市空间感知研究缺乏大规模、多模态、理论驱动的基准数据集，难以评估AI模型对城市空间的社会与功能语义的理解能力。
analysis.problem: 构建一个统一、理论驱动的多模态城市空间感知数据集和评测框架，以评估机器感知模型能否捕捉城市研究中的空间、社会和功能区分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验显示监督场景分类性能较强，但跨模态检索和实例分割更具挑战性；随着训练数据从1K增加到100K，模型性能变化呈现多尺度规律。
analysis.method: 基于社交媒体图像-文本对构建数据集，提出HUSIC分层分类体系（10类），并设计三项标准化任务：场景分类、跨模态检索、实例分割。
contributions: 构建了包含200万图像-文本对的大规模多模态城市空间感知数据集Urban-ImageNet
提出了理论驱动的HUSIC分层分类框架，区分激活与非激活公共空间等10类城市空间
建立了统一评测基准，支持三项任务，并提供了多尺度训练数据下的性能分析
analysis.experiments: 评估了代表性视觉、视觉-语言和分割模型，揭示了不同任务上的性能差异，并进行了多尺度（1K/10K/100K）训练数据影响研究。
limitations: 数据来源仅限于中国城市和微博平台，可能引入地域和平台偏差
分类体系基于特定城市理论，可能不适用于其他文化背景的城市空间
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Urban-ImageNet是一个大规模多模态城市空间感知数据集与评测基准，包含200万社交媒体图像-文本对，支持场景分类、跨模态检索和实例分割三项任务。

papers.title: Evidence-based Decision Modeling for Synthetic Face Detection with Uncertainty-driven Active Learning
papers.abstract: With the rapid development of deep generative models, forged facial images are massively exploited for illegal activities. Although existing synthetic face detection methods have achieved significant progress, they suffer from the inherent limitation of overconfidence due to their reliance on the Softmax activation function. Thus, these methods often lead to unreliable predictions when encountering unknown Out-of-Distribution (OOD) images, and cannot ascertain the model's uncertainty in its prediction. Meanwhile, most existing methods require massive high-quality annotated data, which greatly limits their practicability across diverse scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose EMSFD (Evidence-based decision Modeling for Synthetic Face Detection with uncertainty-driven active learning), an approach designed to enhance detection reliability and generalizability. Specifically, EMSFD models class evidence using the Dirichlet distribution and explicitly incorporates model uncertainty into the prediction process. Furthermore, during training, the estimated uncertainty is exploited to prioritize more informative samples from the unlabeled pool for annotation, thereby reducing labeling cost and improving model generalization. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate that our method enhances the interpretability of synthetic face detection. Meanwhile, our method yields a 15\% increase in accuracy compared to existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines, which demonstrates the superior detection performance and generalizability of our approach. Our code is available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出基于证据决策建模和不确定性驱动主动学习的合成人脸检测方法，提升可靠性和泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合成人脸检测方法因依赖Softmax激活函数而存在过度自信问题，导致对未知分布图像预测不可靠，且需要大量高质量标注数据，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 解决合成人脸检测中的模型不确定性量化和标注成本高的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在遇到未知分布图像时预测不可靠，且无法表达模型不确定性。
analysis.method: 使用狄利克雷分布建模类证据，显式将模型不确定性融入预测过程；训练时利用估计的不确定性优先选择信息量大的未标注样本进行标注。
contributions: 提出EMSFD方法，结合证据建模和不确定性驱动主动学习，提升合成人脸检测的可靠性和泛化性。
实验表明方法在准确率上比现有SOTA提升15%，并增强了可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行实验，与SOTA基线对比，准确率提升15%。
limitations: 可能对复杂伪造类型（如局部篡改）的检测效果未提及。
主动学习策略的样本选择效率可能受不确定性估计质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于证据决策建模和不确定性驱动主动学习的合成人脸检测方法，提升可靠性和泛化性。

papers.title: Frequency Adapter with SAM for Generalized Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Medical image segmentation is a critical task in computer-aided diagnosis and treatment planning. However, deep learning models often struggle to generalize across datasets due to domain shifts arising from variations in imaging protocols, scanner types, and patient populations. Traditional domain generalization (DG) methods utilize causal feature learning, adversarial consistency, and style augmentation to improve segmentation robustness. While effective, these approaches rely on explicit feature alignment, adversarial objectives, or handcrafted augmentations, which may not fully exploit the capabilities of foundation models. Recently, the Segment Anything Model (SAM) has demonstrated strong generalization capabilities in segmentation tasks. SAM-based DG methods attempt to improve medical image segmentation. However, these approaches primarily operate in the spatial domain and overlook frequency-based discrepancies that significantly affect model robustness. In this work, we propose Frequency-based Domain Generalization with SAM (FSAM), a novel framework that integrates Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for efficient fine-tuning and a frequency adapter to incorporate frequency-domain representations for single-source domain generalization. FSAM enhances SAM's segmentation robustness by extracting domain-invariant high-frequency features, mitigating frequency-related domain shifts. Experimental results on fundus and prostate datasets demonstrate that FSAM outperforms existing traditional DG and SAM-based DG approaches in domain generalization. Codes and pre-trained models will be made available on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 提出频率适配器FSAM，结合SAM和LoRA实现医学图像分割的域泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割中，模型常因成像协议、扫描仪类型等域偏移而泛化能力差；现有域泛化方法依赖显式特征对齐或手工增强，未充分利用基础模型潜力，且忽略频域差异。
analysis.problem: 解决单源域泛化下医学图像分割的频域域偏移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有SAM域泛化方法主要在空间域操作，忽略了影响模型鲁棒性的频域差异。
analysis.method: 提出FSAM框架，集成LoRA高效微调和频率适配器，提取域不变高频特征以缓解频域域偏移。
contributions: 提出频率适配器与SAM结合的域泛化框架FSAM，首次在SAM中引入频域表示用于医学图像分割域泛化。
在眼底和前列腺数据集上验证FSAM优于传统DG和SAM-based DG方法。
analysis.experiments: 在眼底和前列腺数据集上进行实验，FSAM在域泛化性能上优于现有方法。
limitations: 仅针对单源域泛化，多源场景未验证。
频域适配器的通用性可能受限于特定医学图像模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频率适配器FSAM，结合SAM和LoRA实现医学图像分割的域泛化。

papers.title: TOC-Bench: A Temporal Object Consistency Benchmark for Video Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Video large language models (Video-LLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in general video understanding, yet their ability to maintain temporal object consistency remains insufficiently explored. Existing benchmarks primarily focus on event recognition, action understanding, or coarse temporal reasoning, but rarely evaluate whether a model can consistently preserve the identity, state, and temporal continuity of the same object across occlusion, disappearance, reappearance, state transitions, and cross-object interactions. As a result, current evaluations may overestimate temporal reasoning ability while overlooking failures in object-centric temporal coherence. To address this issue, we introduce TOC-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark specifically designed to evaluate temporal object consistency in Video-LLMs. TOC-Bench is explicitly object-track grounded, where each queried subject is associated with a per frame object trajectory and structured temporal event timeline. To ensure that benchmark items depend on temporally ordered visual evidence rather than language priors, single-frame shortcuts, or unordered frame cues, we propose a three-layer temporal-necessity filtering protocol that removes 60.7% of candidate QA pairs and retains 17,900 temporally dependent items spanning 10 diagnostic dimensions. From this filtered pool, we further construct a human-verified benchmark containing 2,323 high-quality QA pairs over 1,951 videos. Experiments on representative Video-LLMs show that temporal object consistency remains a major unsolved challenge. Current models exhibit substantial weaknesses in event counting, event ordering, identity-sensitive reasoning, and hallucination-aware verification, despite strong performance on general video understanding benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出TOC-Bench基准，系统评估视频大语言模型在遮挡、消失、状态变化等场景下保持物体身份、状态和时间连续性的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频理解基准主要关注事件识别、动作理解或粗粒度时间推理，缺乏对物体级时间一致性的评估，导致模型在物体身份保持、状态追踪等方面的失败被忽视。
analysis.problem: 视频大语言模型在物体遮挡、消失重现、状态转换及跨物体交互等场景下，无法稳定保持同一物体的身份、状态和时间连续性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出当前基准可能高估时间推理能力而忽略物体中心的时间连贯性失败。
analysis.method: 构建TOC-Bench基准：基于物体轨迹和结构化时间事件线，设计三层时间必要性过滤协议（移除60.7%候选QA对），保留17,900个时间依赖项，并从中构建2,323个人工验证的高质量QA对，覆盖10个诊断维度。
contributions: 提出首个专门评估视频大语言模型时间物体一致性的诊断基准TOC-Bench
设计三层时间必要性过滤协议，确保基准项依赖时序视觉证据而非语言先验或单帧捷径
通过实验揭示当前模型在事件计数、事件排序、身份敏感推理和幻觉感知验证方面的显著缺陷
analysis.experiments: 在代表性视频大语言模型上实验，显示时间物体一致性仍是主要未解决挑战，模型在通用视频理解基准上表现强但在TOC-Bench上表现弱。
limitations: 基准规模有限（2,323个QA对），可能无法覆盖所有时间一致性挑战
仅评估物体级一致性，未涉及更细粒度的属性变化或复杂因果关系
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TOC-Bench基准，系统评估视频大语言模型在遮挡、消失、状态变化等场景下保持物体身份、状态和时间连续性的能力。

papers.title: Adversarial Attacks Against MLLMs via Progressive Resolution Processing and Adaptive Feature Alignment
papers.abstract: Adversarial perturbations can mislead Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) recognize a benign image as a specific target object, posing serious risks in safety-critical scenarios such as autonomous driving and medical diagnosis. This makes transfer-based targeted attacks crucial for understanding and improving black-box MLLM robustness. Existing transfer-based targeted attack methods typically rely on the final global features of the surrogate encoder and anchor optimization to original-resolution target crops, leading to their limited transferability and robustness. To address these challenges, we propose Progressive Resolution Processing and Adaptive Feature Alignment (PRAF-Attack), a targeted transfer-based attack framework that integrates multi-scale global semantic guidance with robust intermediate-layer local alignment. Unlike prior methods that align only the surrogate encoder's final layer, we design an adaptive feature alignment strategy that leverages intermediate representations to enhance transferability. Specifically, we introduce an adaptive intermediate layer selection mechanism to identify transferable hierarchical features across surrogate ensembles via gradient consistency, along with an adaptive patch-level optimization strategy that preserves highly correlated local regions through efficient patch filtering. To overcome the reliance on fixed original-resolution target crops, we propose a progressive resolution processing strategy that gradually refines optimization from coarse to fine, enabling the attack to better exploit target information at multiple scales and achieve stronger transferability. We evaluate PRAF-Attack on a diverse suite of black-box MLLMs, including six open-source models and six closed-source commercial APIs. Compared with seven state-of-the-art targeted attack baselines, the proposed PRAF-Attack consistently achieves superior transferability.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进分辨率处理和自适应特征对齐的对抗攻击方法，提升黑盒多模态大模型的迁移攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 对抗扰动可误导多模态大模型（MLLMs）将良性图像识别为特定目标对象，在自动驾驶、医疗诊断等安全关键场景中构成严重风险，因此迁移性定向攻击对于理解和提升黑盒MLLM鲁棒性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 现有基于迁移的定向攻击方法依赖代理编码器的最终全局特征和固定原始分辨率目标裁剪的锚点优化，导致迁移性和鲁棒性有限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PRAF-Attack框架，包含自适应特征对齐策略（利用中间层表征增强迁移性，通过梯度一致性选择可迁移层次特征，以及自适应补丁级优化保留高相关局部区域）和渐进分辨率处理策略（从粗到细逐步优化，利用多尺度目标信息）。
contributions: 提出自适应中间层选择机制和自适应补丁级优化策略，利用中间层表征提升迁移性。
提出渐进分辨率处理策略，克服对固定原始分辨率目标裁剪的依赖，增强多尺度目标信息利用。
analysis.experiments: 在六个开源模型和六个闭源商业API上评估，与七种基线方法相比，PRAF-Attack持续取得更优的迁移性。
limitations: 可能依赖代理模型的选择和集成数量。
渐进分辨率处理可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出渐进分辨率处理和自适应特征对齐的对抗攻击方法，提升黑盒多模态大模型的迁移攻击成功率。

papers.title: Hyperbolic Distillation: Geometry-Guided Cross-Modal Transfer for Robust 3D Object Detection
papers.abstract: Cross-modal knowledge distillation has emerged as an effective strategy for integrating point cloud and image features in 3D perception tasks. However, the modality heterogeneity, spatial misalignment, and the representation crisis of multiple modalities often limit the efficient of these cross-modal distillation methods. To address these limitations in existing approaches, we propose a hyperbolic constrained cross-modal distillation method for multimodal 3D object detection (HGC-Det). The proposed HGC-Det framework includes an image branch and a point cloud branch to extract semantic features from two different modalities. The point cloud branch comprises three core components: a 2D semantic-guided voxel optimization component (SGVO), a hyperbolic geometry constrained cross-modal feature transfer component (HFT), and a feature aggregation-based geometry optimization component (FAGO). Specifically, the SGVO component adaptively refines the spatial representation of the 3D branch by leveraging semantic cues from the image branch, thereby mitigating the issue of inadequate representation fusion. The HFT component exploits the intrinsic geometric properties of hyperbolic space to alleviate semantic loss during the fusion of high-dimensional image features and low-dimensional point cloud features. Finally, the FAGO compensates for potential spatial feature degradation introduced by the 2D semantic-guided voxel optimization component. Extensive experiments on indoor datasets (SUN RGB-D, ARKitScenes) and outdoor datasets (KITTI, nuScenes) demonstrate that our method achieves a better trade-off between detection accuracy and computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出双曲约束跨模态蒸馏方法HGC-Det，通过几何引导的特征转移提升3D目标检测鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨模态知识蒸馏在3D感知中整合点云与图像特征时，面临模态异质性、空间错位及多模态表示危机，现有方法效率受限。
analysis.problem: 解决跨模态蒸馏中因模态差异和空间不对齐导致的特征融合不充分与语义损失问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HGC-Det框架，包含图像分支和点云分支；点云分支由2D语义引导体素优化(SGVO)、双曲几何约束跨模态特征转移(HFT)和特征聚合几何优化(FAGO)三个组件构成。
contributions: 提出双曲约束跨模态蒸馏方法，利用双曲空间几何性质缓解高维图像与低维点云特征融合中的语义损失。
设计SGVO组件自适应优化3D分支空间表示，FAGO补偿空间特征退化。
在室内外多个数据集上验证方法在检测精度与计算成本间取得更优平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在室内数据集SUN RGB-D、ARKitScenes和室外数据集KITTI、nuScenes上进行实验，表明方法在检测精度与计算成本间取得更优平衡。
limitations: 可能依赖双曲空间的几何假设，对非欧几何不敏感的数据集效果有限。
多组件设计可能增加调参复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双曲约束跨模态蒸馏方法HGC-Det，通过几何引导的特征转移提升3D目标检测鲁棒性。

papers.title: The Cartesian Shortcut: Re-evaluate Vision Reasoning in Polar Coordinate Space
papers.abstract: As current Multimodal Large Language Models rapidly saturate canonical visual reasoning benchmarks, a key question emerges: do these strong scores genuinely reflect robust visual understanding? We identify a pervasive vulnerability, the \textbf{Cartesian Shortcut}: visual reasoning benchmarks prevalently build on orthogonal grid-based layouts that can be readily discretized into explicit textual coordinates. Models systematically exploit this property, heavily leveraging text-based deductive reasoning to assist visual problem-solving. To systematically dismantle this shortcut, we introduce \textbf{Polaris-Bench}, which re-formulates 53 visual reasoning tasks in Polar coordinate space with paired Cartesian counterparts as reference, while preserving consistent logical constraints and task semantics -- thus fundamentally breaking the orthogonal prior that models exploit. Comprehensive evaluation across $14$ state-of-the-art MLLMs reveals that frontier models achieving $70$--$83\%$ on Cartesian layouts collapse to $31$--$39\%$ on Polar equivalents, with degradation persisting even under complete logical equivalence. Moreover, reasoning gains observed on Cartesian layouts are severely diminished on Polar equivalents. These findings expose a critical deficiency in current MLLMs: the lack of topology-invariant visual reasoning.

analysis.tldr: MLLMs在视觉推理中依赖笛卡尔坐标捷径，在极坐标下性能大幅下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多模态大模型在视觉推理基准上快速饱和，但高分是否反映真实视觉理解能力存疑，需要揭示潜在捷径。
analysis.problem: MLLMs在视觉推理中过度依赖基于正交网格的笛卡尔坐标捷径，缺乏拓扑不变的视觉推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿模型在笛卡尔布局上达到70-83%准确率，但在极坐标等价任务上骤降至31-39%，且逻辑等价时退化仍持续。
analysis.method: 构建Polaris-Bench基准，将53个视觉推理任务重新表述为极坐标空间，并保留一致逻辑约束和任务语义，打破正交先验。
contributions: 识别并命名了笛卡尔捷径这一普遍漏洞
引入Polaris-Bench基准系统评估MLLMs的拓扑不变推理能力
analysis.experiments: 在14个最先进MLLM上评估，显示性能大幅下降。
limitations: 未提供具体模型架构细节
未讨论极坐标任务是否引入额外难度
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MLLMs在视觉推理中依赖笛卡尔坐标捷径，在极坐标下性能大幅下降。

papers.title: EgoMemReason: A Memory-Driven Reasoning Benchmark for Long-Horizon Egocentric Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Next-generation visual assistants, such as smart glasses, embodied agents, and always-on life-logging systems, must reason over an entire day or more of continuous visual experience. In ultra-long video settings, relevant information is sparsely distributed across hours or days, making memory a fundamental challenge: models must accumulate information over time, recall prior states, track temporal order, and abstract recurring patterns. However, existing week-long video benchmarks are primarily designed for perception and recognition, such as moment localization or global summarization, rather than reasoning that requires integrating evidence across multiple days. To address this gap, we introduce EgoMemReason, a comprehensive benchmark that systematically evaluates week-long egocentric video understanding through memory-driven reasoning. EgoMemReason evaluates three complementary memory types: entity memory, tracking how object states evolve and change across days; event memory, recalling and ordering activities separated by hours or days; and behavior memory, abstracting recurring patterns from sparse, repeated observations over the whole week period. EgoMemReason comprises 500 questions across three memory types and six core challenges, with an average of 5.1 video segments of evidence per question and 25.9 hours of memory backtracking. We evaluate EgoMemReason on 17 methods across MLLMs and agentic frameworks, revealing that even the best model achieves only 39.6% overall accuracy. Further analysis shows that the three memory types fail for distinct reasons and that performance degrades as evidence spans longer temporal horizons, revealing that long-horizon memory remains far from solved. We believe EgoMemReason establishes a strong foundation for evaluating and advancing long-context, memory-aware multimodal systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出EgoMemReason基准，系统评估周级第一人称视频理解中的记忆驱动推理，揭示现有模型在长时记忆上的严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有周级视频基准主要关注感知和识别任务（如时刻定位、全局摘要），缺乏对需要跨多天整合证据的推理能力的评估，而下一代视觉助手（如智能眼镜、具身智能体）必须能在超长视频中利用记忆进行推理。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估模型在周级第一人称视频中基于记忆的推理能力，包括实体记忆、事件记忆和行为记忆。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最佳模型仅达到39.6%的总体准确率；三种记忆类型失败原因不同；性能随证据时间跨度增加而下降，表明长时记忆问题远未解决。
analysis.method: 构建包含500个问题的基准，覆盖三种记忆类型（实体、事件、行为）和六个核心挑战，每个问题平均需要5.1个视频片段证据和25.9小时的记忆回溯。
contributions: 提出EgoMemReason基准，系统评估周级第一人称视频中的记忆驱动推理。
揭示现有MLLM和智能体框架在长时记忆推理上的显著不足。
analysis.experiments: 在17种方法（包括MLLM和智能体框架）上评估，最佳模型准确率仅39.6%。
limitations: 基准仅包含500个问题，规模可能有限。
未提供具体模型失败原因的分析细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EgoMemReason基准，系统评估周级第一人称视频理解中的记忆驱动推理，揭示现有模型在长时记忆上的严重不足。

papers.title: DA-SegFormer: Damage-Aware Semantic Segmentation for Fine-Grained Disaster Assessment
papers.abstract: Rapid and accurate damage assessment following natural disasters is critical for effective emergency response. However, identifying fine-grained damage levels (e.g., distinguishing minor from major roof damage) in UAV imagery remains challenging due to the degradation of texture cues during resizing and extreme class imbalance. We propose DA-SegFormer, a damage-aware adaptation of the SegFormer architecture optimized for high-resolution disaster imagery. Our method introduces a Class-Aware Sampling strategy to guarantee exposure to rare damage features, and it integrates Online Hard Example Mining (OHEM) with Dice Loss to dynamically focus on underrepresented classes. In addition, we employ a resolution-preserving inference protocol that maintains native texture details. Evaluated on the RescueNet dataset, DA-SegFormer achieves 74.61\% mIoU, outperforming the baseline by 2.55\%. Notably, our improvements yield double-digit gains in critical damage classes: Minor Damage (+11.7%) and Major Damage (+21.3%).

analysis.tldr: 提出损伤感知语义分割模型DA-SegFormer，通过类感知采样、难例挖掘和分辨率保持推理，显著提升无人机灾害图像中细粒度损伤评估的准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然灾害后快速准确的损伤评估对应急响应至关重要，但无人机图像中细粒度损伤等级（如区分轻微与严重屋顶损伤）因纹理退化、类别极度不平衡而难以识别。
analysis.problem: 解决高分辨率无人机灾害图像中细粒度损伤分割的纹理退化与类别不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出图像缩放导致纹理线索退化，以及损伤类别（尤其是轻微和严重损伤）的极端不平衡是主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 基于SegFormer架构，引入类感知采样策略保证稀有损伤特征暴露，集成在线难例挖掘与Dice Loss动态关注欠表示类别，并采用分辨率保持推理协议保留原生纹理细节。
contributions: 提出DA-SegFormer，一种损伤感知的语义分割方法，针对灾害评估中的细粒度损伤识别。
设计类感知采样、OHEM+Dice Loss和分辨率保持推理等策略，有效缓解纹理退化与类别不平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在RescueNet数据集上评估，DA-SegFormer达到74.61% mIoU，比基线高2.55%；轻微损伤类提升11.7%，严重损伤类提升21.3%。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集RescueNet上验证，泛化性未知。
方法依赖高分辨率输入，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出损伤感知语义分割模型DA-SegFormer，通过类感知采样、难例挖掘和分辨率保持推理，显著提升无人机灾害图像中细粒度损伤评估的准确性。

papers.title: Learning to Align Generative Appearance Priors for Fine-grained Image Retrieval
papers.abstract: Fine-grained image retrieval (FGIR) typically relies on supervision from seen categories to learn discriminative embeddings for retrieving unseen categories. However, such supervision often biases retrieval models toward the semantics of seen categories rather than the underlying appearance characteristics that generalize across categories, thereby limiting retrieval performance on unseen categories. To tackle this, we propose GAPan, a Generative Appearance Prior alignment network that reformulates the learning objective from category prediction toward appearance modeling. Technically, GAPan treats retrieval features with an invertible density model based on normalizing flows. In the forward direction, the flow maps all instance features into a latent density space, where each seen category is modeled by a class-conditional Gaussian prior and optimized via exact likelihood estimation. This formulation preserves richer appearance details by leveraging the invertible property of the flows. In the reverse direction, samples from the high-density regions of these learned priors are mapped back to the feature space to produce appearance-aware anchors that reflect intra-category variation.
