analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有DUNs存在两个瓶颈：1) 单一测量流限制了不同测量子集间的有效信息交互；2) 对所有图像区域统一处理，忽略了不同纹理带来的重建难度差异。
analysis.method: 提出双路径超先验引导深度展开网络（DPH-DUN），将测量值分为两个子集，通过双路径架构实现超先验引导重建：超先验学习分支生成多域超先验知识，超先验引导重建分支在梯度下降步中动态生成空间变化步长图，在近端映射步中引入基于梯度的硬/软注意力机制聚焦困难区域。
contributions: 提出双路径超先验引导深度展开网络，通过分割测量值和双路径架构增强信息交互。
设计超先验引导的步长生成网络和两种注意力机制，实现自适应细粒度梯度更新和困难区域聚焦。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明大量实验表明所提方法优于现有CS方法。
limitations: 双路径架构可能增加计算复杂度。
超先验学习分支的轻量模块设计可能对复杂场景泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双路径超先验引导深度展开网络，通过分割测量值和自适应步长/注意力机制提升图像压缩感知重建质量。

papers.title: PhysHanDI: Physics-Based Reconstruction of Hand-Deformable Object Interactions
papers.abstract: While existing methods for reconstructing hand-object interactions have made impressive progress, they either focus on rigid or part-wise rigid objects-limiting their ability to model real-world objects (e.g., cloth, stuffed animals) that exhibit highly non-rigid deformations-or model deformable objects without full 3D hand reconstruction. To bridge this gap, we present PhysHanDI (Physics-based Reconstruction of Hand and Deformable Object Interactions), a framework that enables full 3D reconstruction of both interacting hands and non-rigid objects. Our key idea is to physically simulate object deformations driven by forces induced from densely reconstructed 3D hand motions, ensuring that the reconstructed object dynamics are both physically plausible and coherent with the interacting hand movements. Furthermore, we demonstrate that such simulation of object deformations can, in turn, refine and improve hand reconstruction via inverse physics. In experiments, PhysHanDI outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline across reconstruction and future prediction.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理模拟框架PhysHanDI，实现手与非刚性物体交互的完整3D重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有手-物交互重建方法多假设物体为刚性或部分刚性，无法处理布料、毛绒玩具等高度非刚性变形物体，且部分方法未重建完整3D手部。
analysis.problem: 如何同时重建交互中的手部和非刚性物体的完整3D形态与运动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过物理模拟物体变形，变形由密集重建的3D手部运动产生的力驱动，确保物体动力学物理合理且与手部运动一致；同时利用物体变形的逆物理过程优化手部重建。
contributions: 提出首个同时重建手部与非刚性物体完整3D交互的框架
利用物理模拟和逆物理优化实现手与物体重建的相互增强
analysis.experiments: 在重建和未来预测任务上，PhysHanDI优于现有最优基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量手部运动重建作为输入
物理模拟的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理模拟框架PhysHanDI，实现手与非刚性物体交互的完整3D重建。

papers.title: QueST: Persistent Queries as Semantic Monitors for Drift Suppression in Long-Horizon Tracking
papers.abstract: Tracking points in videos is typically formulated as frame-to-frame correspondence, where each point is matched locally to the next frame. While this works over short horizons, errors accumulate under articulation, occlusion, and viewpoint change, leading to silent semantic drift that existing trackers cannot detect or correct. In this work, we revisit long-horizon tracking from a monitoring perspective and introduce QueST, a monitoring-by-design framework that treats interaction-relevant entities as persistent semantic queries rather than transient point tracks. Instead of local propagation, each query attends globally over spatio-temporal video features at every time-step, providing a stable semantic anchor across time. We further constrain query trajectories with lightweight 3D physical grounding, using geometric plausibility to suppress unbounded drift under occlusion. We evaluate QueST on long-horizon articulated sequences from PartNet-Mobility in SAPIEN and compare against RAFT-3D, CoTracker, and TAP-Net. QueST substantially reduces terminal drift achieving a 67.7% Absolute Point Error (APE) improvement over TAP-Net while better preserving identity over extended horizons. Our results show that embedding semantic monitoring directly into perception enables more reliable long-horizon tracking under distribution shift.

analysis.tldr: 提出QueST，用持久语义查询替代逐帧匹配，抑制长时跟踪中的语义漂移。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频点跟踪方法基于帧间局部匹配，在长时跟踪中因遮挡、视角变化等导致误差累积和语义漂移，且无法检测或纠正。
analysis.problem: 长时视频点跟踪中的语义漂移问题，即跟踪点逐渐偏离目标实体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 局部匹配在长时跟踪中误差累积，导致无声的语义漂移，现有跟踪器无法检测或纠正。
analysis.method: 将交互相关实体视为持久语义查询，全局关注时空视频特征，并用轻量级3D物理约束抑制漂移。
contributions: 提出监控式设计框架QueST，用持久语义查询替代局部传播，提供稳定语义锚点。
引入3D物理约束抑制遮挡下的无界漂移，显著降低终端漂移。
analysis.experiments: 在SAPIEN中PartNet-Mobility的长时关节序列上评估，与RAFT-3D、CoTracker、TAP-Net对比，QueST在绝对点误差上比TAP-Net提升67.7%。
limitations: 可能依赖3D物理先验的准确性。
全局注意力计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出QueST，用持久语义查询替代逐帧匹配，抑制长时跟踪中的语义漂移。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Aware and Decoder-Aligned Learning for Video Summarization
papers.abstract: Video summarization aims to produce a compact representation of a long video by selecting a subset of temporally important segments that best reflect human preferences. This task is inherently difficult due to strong annotation subjectivity and the reliance on discrete decoding procedures, such as temporal segmentation and knapsack-based selection, during evaluation. Most existing approaches either learn deterministic importance scores that overlook these characteristics or adopt complex generative models that increase training and inference cost. In this paper, we propose VASTSum, an uncertainty-aware and decoder-aligned learning framework for video summarization that addresses both challenges within a single-pass model. The proposed method predicts probabilistic frame-level importance scores using a variational formulation, enabling explicit modeling of uncertainty arising from multi-annotator supervision. To account for subjectivity, particularly under binary annotations, we employ a supervision strategy that encourages alignment with plausible human annotation modes rather than enforcing a single consensus target. Furthermore, we introduce a decoder-aligned regularization that promotes stability of knapsack-based summary selection, reducing sensitivity to small perturbations in predicted scores. We evaluate the proposed framework on the SumMe and TVSum benchmarks using standard rank-based metrics. Experimental results show consistent and competitive Kendall and Spearman correlations across multiple data splits, demonstrating improved robustness under annotation disagreement while maintaining efficient single-forward inference. These results indicate that explicitly modeling uncertainty and aligning learning objectives with the decoding stage provide a principled alternative to both deterministic and diffusion-based video summarization methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出VASTSum框架，通过变分建模不确定性并引入解码对齐正则化，提升视频摘要的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频摘要因标注主观性强和评估依赖离散解码过程（如时间分割和背包选择）而困难，现有方法要么忽略不确定性，要么使用复杂生成模型增加成本。
analysis.problem: 如何在单次前向模型中同时建模标注不确定性和对齐解码阶段的目标，以提升视频摘要的鲁棒性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多标注者监督导致重要性分数存在不确定性，且背包选择对预测分数的小扰动敏感。
analysis.method: 提出VASTSum，包含变分公式预测概率级帧重要性分数以建模不确定性，采用对齐合理标注模式的监督策略，以及解码对齐正则化提升背包选择的稳定性。
contributions: 提出不确定性感知的变分框架，显式建模多标注者监督下的不确定性。
引入解码对齐正则化，减少背包选择对预测分数扰动的敏感性。
analysis.experiments: 在SumMe和TVSum基准上使用标准排名指标评估，实验显示在多个数据划分上Kendall和Spearman相关性一致且具有竞争力，表明在标注分歧下鲁棒性提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于背包选择的视频摘要任务。
变分公式可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VASTSum框架，通过变分建模不确定性并引入解码对齐正则化，提升视频摘要的鲁棒性。

papers.title: PermuQuant: Lowering Per-Group Quantization Error by Reordering Channels for Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Large-scale visual generative models have achieved remarkable performance. However, their high computational and memory costs make deployment challenging in resource-constrained scenarios, such as interactive applications and personal single-GPU usage. Post-training quantization (PTQ) offers a practical solution by compressing pretrained models without expensive retraining. However, existing PTQ methods still suffer from severe quality degradation under extremely low-bit settings. In this paper, we identify channel ordering as an important but underexplored factor in per-group quantization. In this setting, each contiguous group shares one quantization scale. When channels with very different statistics are placed in the same group, the scale can be dominated by outliers and cause large quantization errors. Based on this observation, we propose PermuQuant, a simple and effective PTQ framework for low-bit diffusion models. PermuQuant sorts channels by a joint second-moment criterion before per-group quantization, placing channels with similar activation and weight statistics into the same group. It further uses a calibration-based acceptance rule to apply reordering only when the selected permutation reduces quantization error on calibration data. The selected permutations are absorbed into adjacent modules or applied to weights offline, avoiding explicit runtime permutation operations. Extensive experiments on multiple large diffusion models show that PermuQuant consistently reduces quantization error and outperforms existing PTQ baselines. On FLUX.1-dev with an RTX 5090, PermuQuant achieves up to a 1.8$\times$ single step speedup and reduces the DiT memory footprint by 3.5$\times$ under W4A4 NVFP4 quantization. Code will be available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过重排通道顺序降低分组量化误差，实现低比特扩散模型的高效部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模视觉生成模型计算和内存成本高，难以部署在资源受限场景（如交互应用、单GPU），后训练量化（PTQ）虽能压缩模型但极低比特下质量严重下降。
analysis.problem: 现有PTQ方法在极低比特设置下质量退化严重，分组量化中通道顺序未被充分探索，导致统计差异大的通道共享量化尺度时产生大误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分组量化中，当统计特性差异大的通道被分在同一组时，量化尺度会被异常值主导，造成较大量化误差。
analysis.method: 提出PermuQuant框架：先按联合二阶矩准则排序通道，使相似统计的通道分到同组；再用基于校准数据的接受规则决定是否应用重排；将选定的排列吸收到相邻模块或离线应用于权重，避免运行时显式重排。
contributions: 识别通道顺序是分组量化中影响误差的关键但未充分探索的因素
提出PermuQuant，一种简单有效的低比特扩散模型PTQ框架，通过通道重排降低量化误差
在多个大规模扩散模型上验证，显著降低量化误差并超越现有PTQ基线，实现1.8倍单步加速和3.5倍内存缩减
analysis.experiments: 在FLUX.1-dev等大规模扩散模型上实验，使用RTX 5090，W4A4 NVFP4量化下实现最高1.8倍单步加速和3.5倍DiT内存缩减，并优于现有PTQ基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于分组量化场景，对其他量化方案效果未知
校准数据依赖可能引入额外开销，且重排策略对模型结构有要求
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过重排通道顺序降低分组量化误差，实现低比特扩散模型的高效部署。

papers.title: Outlier-Robust Diffusion Solvers for Inverse Problems
papers.abstract: Methods based on diffusion models (DMs) for solving inverse problems (IPs) have recently achieved remarkable performance. However, DM-based methods typically struggle against outliers, which are common in real-world measurements. In this work, to tackle IPs with outliers, we first refine the measurement via explicit noise estimation to mitigate the effect of noise. Subsequently, we formulate an iteratively reweighted least squares objective based on the Huber loss to address the outliers. We propose a method utilizing gradient descent to approximately solve the corresponding optimization problem for the robust objective. To avoid delicate tuning of the learning rate required by the gradient descent method, we further employ the conjugate gradient method with an efficient strategy for updating. Extensive experiments on multiple image datasets for linear and nonlinear tasks under various conditions demonstrate that our proposed methods exhibit robustness to outliers and outperform recent DM-based methods in most cases.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于扩散模型的鲁棒逆问题求解器，通过Huber损失和共轭梯度法处理异常值。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的逆问题求解方法在真实测量中常受异常值影响，性能下降，需要鲁棒性更强的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何使扩散模型求解逆问题时对异常值具有鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型方法在异常值存在时性能显著下降，而显式噪声估计和Huber损失可缓解该问题。
analysis.method: 先通过显式噪声估计精炼测量值，再基于Huber损失构建迭代重加权最小二乘目标，使用梯度下降近似求解，并进一步采用共轭梯度法避免学习率调参。
contributions: 提出一种鲁棒的扩散模型逆问题求解框架，结合噪声估计和Huber损失处理异常值。
引入共轭梯度法优化求解过程，避免梯度下降的学习率调参。
analysis.experiments: 在多个图像数据集上针对线性和非线性任务进行实验，表明方法对异常值鲁棒且优于近期扩散模型方法。
limitations: 可能依赖噪声估计的准确性。
共轭梯度法更新策略的通用性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于扩散模型的鲁棒逆问题求解器，通过Huber损失和共轭梯度法处理异常值。

papers.title: When Few Steps Are Enough: Training-Free Acceleration of Identity-Preserved Generation
papers.abstract: Identity-preserved image generation is typically built on many-step diffusion backbones, making personalized generation expensive at deployment time. We show that this cost is often unnecessary for identity-conditioned FLUX generation. A frozen InfuseNet identity adapter trained with dev transfers directly to the distilled schnell backbone without retraining. This two-line replacement -- changing the backbone path and disabling classifier-free guidance -- reduces latency by 5.9x while improving ArcFace identity similarity by +0.028 and lpips by -0.016 over the standard 28-step dev baseline. To explain why this works, we analyze the denoising trajectory and find that identity fidelity enters an early effective regime, often within 4-8 steps, while later steps primarily refine visual detail, sharpness, and contrast. Adapter ablations confirm that identity formation depends on the identity adapter, while attention-stream norm probes suggest that the relative conditioning contribution decreases as sampling proceeds. Preliminary style-adapter and object-adapter sweeps on SDXL and SD1.5 show similar diminishing returns after intermediate steps. These results position distilled backbone replacement as a simple, training-free strategy for improving the efficiency-fidelity tradeoff of identity-preserved generation.

analysis.tldr: 将身份保持生成模型中的多步扩散骨干替换为蒸馏版，无需重新训练即可大幅加速并提升身份相似度。
analysis.research_motivation: 身份保持图像生成依赖多步扩散模型，部署成本高，现有加速方法通常需要重新训练或复杂修改。
analysis.problem: 如何在无需重新训练的条件下，显著加速身份保持的图像生成过程，同时保持或提升身份保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 身份保真度在早期4-8步即进入有效区域，后续步骤主要优化视觉细节；身份适配器主导身份形成，且条件贡献随采样过程递减。
analysis.method: 将训练好的InfuseNet身份适配器直接迁移到蒸馏版FLUX骨干（schnell），仅需修改骨干路径并禁用无分类器引导。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的蒸馏骨干替换策略，实现5.9倍加速并提升身份相似度。
通过去噪轨迹分析揭示身份保真度的早期有效区域，解释加速方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在FLUX模型上，使用ArcFace身份相似度和LPIPS指标评估，与标准28步dev基线对比，延迟降低5.9倍，身份相似度提升+0.028，LPIPS降低-0.016。在SDXL和SD1.5上的初步实验也观察到类似趋势。
limitations: 仅验证了FLUX、SDXL和SD1.5上的特定适配器，泛化性需进一步验证。
蒸馏骨干可能牺牲部分视觉细节，需在效率与质量间权衡。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将身份保持生成模型中的多步扩散骨干替换为蒸馏版，无需重新训练即可大幅加速并提升身份相似度。

papers.title: Adaptive 3D Convolution for Remote Sensing Image Fusion
papers.abstract: Remote sensing image fusion aims to create a high-resolution multi/hyper-spectral image from a high-resolution image with limited spectral information and a low-resolution image with abundant spectral data. Recently, deep learning (DL) techniques have shown significant effectiveness in this area. Most DL-based methods approach image fusion as a 2D problem by encoding spectral information into feature map channels. However, our research suggests that this strategy introduces notable spectral distortions. In contrast, some methods consider spectral data as an additional dimension, utilizing standard 3D convolutions to preserve spectral information. Nevertheless, in a standard 3D convolutional layer, the same set of kernels is applied across all input regions, which we have found to be sub-optimal for image fusion. Furthermore, standard 3D convolutions necessitate substantial computational resources. To address these challenges, we propose a novel convolutional paradigm called Adaptive 3D Convolution (Ada3D) for remote sensing image fusion. Ada3D applies a unique set of 3D kernels to each input voxel, enabling the capture of fine-grained details. These adaptive kernels are generated through a two-step process: (i) spatial and spectral kernels are derived from their respective image sources; (ii) these two types of kernels are then combined to form content-aware 3D kernels that effectively integrate spatial and spectral information. Additionally, adaptive biases are introduced to enhance the convolutional outcome at the voxel level. Furthermore, we incorporate the group convolution technique to reduce computational complexity. As a result, Ada3D offers full adaptivity in an efficient manner. Evaluation results across five datasets demonstrate that our method achieves SOTA performance, underscoring the superiority of Ada3D. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应3D卷积（Ada3D）用于遥感图像融合，通过为每个体素生成独特3D核来减少光谱失真并提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像融合旨在生成高分辨率多光谱图像，现有深度学习方法将光谱信息编码为特征图通道（2D处理）会导致光谱失真，而标准3D卷积虽能保留光谱信息但计算量大且核共享不适用于融合任务。
analysis.problem: 解决现有2D方法的光谱失真和标准3D卷积的核共享次优及高计算成本问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：将光谱信息编码为特征图通道（2D处理）引入显著光谱失真；标准3D卷积对所有输入区域应用相同核集，对图像融合次优。
analysis.method: 提出自适应3D卷积（Ada3D），为每个输入体素生成独特3D核，通过两步生成：从空间和光谱源分别导出空间核与光谱核，再组合成内容感知3D核；引入自适应偏置增强体素级卷积输出；采用组卷积降低计算复杂度。
contributions: 提出自适应3D卷积范式Ada3D，实现全自适应且高效的遥感图像融合。
通过空间和光谱核的组合生成内容感知3D核，有效整合空间与光谱信息。
在五个数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了方法的优越性。
analysis.experiments: 在五个遥感图像融合数据集上进行评估，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能对高光谱数据维度扩展性有限。
自适应核生成的计算开销在极端分辨率下可能仍较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应3D卷积（Ada3D）用于遥感图像融合，通过为每个体素生成独特3D核来减少光谱失真并提升性能。

papers.title: SpaceMind++: Toward Allocentric Cognitive Maps for Spatially Grounded Video MLLMs
papers.abstract: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have made remarkable progress in visual understanding and language-based reasoning, yet they lack a persistent world-centered representation for spatially consistent reasoning in 3D environments. Inspired by the mammalian dual-stream system, where semantic and spatial cues are processed separately and integrated into an allocentric cognitive map, we propose SpaceMind++, a video MLLM architecture that explicitly builds a voxelized cognitive map from RGB videos. This map reorganizes fragmented egocentric observations into a shared 3D metric representation, enabling the model to preserve object permanence and spatial topology across changing viewpoints. To make this allocentric representation usable by a pretrained video MLLM without disrupting its native visual-token interface, we introduce Coordinate-Guided Deep Iterative Fusion, a new mechanism that relays map-level spatial knowledge back into the original 2D visual features. This fusion is explicitly guided by coordinate embeddings and 3D Rotary Positional Encoding, which ground semantic interactions in metric 3D space, resembling the entorhinal binding of sensory features to metric space. Extensive experiments show that SpaceMind++ achieves new state-of-the-art performance on VSI-Bench. Furthermore, it demonstrates superior out-of-distribution generalization on SPBench, SITE-Bench, and SPAR-Bench, underscoring its robustness in unseen 3D environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出SpaceMind++，通过构建体素化认知地图实现视频MLLM的3D空间一致推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频MLLM缺乏持久的世界中心表征，难以在3D环境中进行空间一致的推理，受哺乳动物双流系统启发，需要构建类似异中心认知地图的架构。
analysis.problem: 如何让视频MLLM从RGB视频中构建并利用3D度量空间表征，实现跨视角的对象持久性和空间拓扑保持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SpaceMind++架构，显式构建体素化认知地图，并引入坐标引导深度迭代融合机制，将地图级空间知识回传到原始2D视觉特征中，使用坐标嵌入和3D旋转位置编码在度量3D空间中接地语义交互。
contributions: 提出SpaceMind++，一种构建体素化认知地图的视频MLLM架构，实现异中心空间表征。
引入坐标引导深度迭代融合机制，在不破坏原生视觉-令牌接口的前提下将地图空间知识融入预训练视频MLLM。
在VSI-Bench上达到新SOTA，并在多个OOD基准上展现优越泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在VSI-Bench上取得新SOTA，并在SPBench、SITE-Bench、SPAR-Bench上展现优越的分布外泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量RGB视频输入，对噪声或遮挡敏感。
体素化地图的计算开销可能较大，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SpaceMind++，通过构建体素化认知地图实现视频MLLM的3D空间一致推理。

papers.title: Through the Lens of Character: Resolving Modality-Role Interference in Multimodal Role-Playing Agent
papers.abstract: The advancement of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has expanded Role-Playing Agents (RPAs) into visually grounded environments. However, human vision is inherently subjective and identity-driven, whereas existing MLLMs extract objective, character-agnostic features for general tasks. In RPAs, this generic visual noise overpowers fragile character traits, causing Modality-Role Interference (MRI), where agents struggle to integrate visual grounding and character consistency. To address this, we introduce the training-free Character-Aware Visual Intervention (CAVI) framework, enabling agents to perceive the world through the lens of character. CAVI systematically targets MRI: macroscopically, Character-Guided Token Pruning (CTP) restricts the visual receptive field to role-relevant entities; microscopically, Orthogonal Feature Modulation (OFM) projects tokens onto a character-context subspace to extract aligned facts; and during decoding, Modality-Adaptive Role Steering (MARS) dynamically optimizes steering intensity based on visual reliance. Extensive experiments show CAVI effectively alleviates MRI, significantly enhancing character-consistent multimodal interactions.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAVI框架，通过角色感知视觉干预解决多模态角色扮演中的模态-角色干扰问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在角色扮演中提取客观、与角色无关的特征，导致视觉噪声压制角色特质，造成模态-角色干扰，影响角色一致性。
analysis.problem: 多模态角色扮演代理中视觉信息与角色一致性之间的干扰问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有MLLMs提取的通用视觉特征会压制脆弱的角色特质，导致代理难以同时保持视觉理解和角色一致性。
analysis.method: 提出无需训练的CAVI框架，包含宏观的角色引导令牌剪枝（CTP）、微观的正交特征调制（OFM）和解码时的模态自适应角色引导（MARS）。
contributions: 首次定义并分析多模态角色扮演中的模态-角色干扰问题。
提出CAVI框架，通过三种机制系统性地缓解干扰。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法为训练无关，可能无法完全适应复杂场景。
未提及在多种MLLM上的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAVI框架，通过角色感知视觉干预解决多模态角色扮演中的模态-角色干扰问题。

papers.title: SWIFT: Prompt-Adaptive Memory for Efficient Interactive Long Video Generation
papers.abstract: Streaming long-video generation faces a central challenge in continuous semantic switching, requiring adaptive memory to preserve coherent visual evolution. Current approaches rely on cache rebuilding at prompt boundaries or fixed memory budgets, but they introduce redundant computation and limit flexible semantic adaptation. This limitation arises from a mismatch between cached video history and prompt updates, as memory preserves visual continuity while prompt switches demand rapid semantic adaptation. Motivated by this observation, we present SWIFT, Semantic Windowing and Injection for Flexible Transitions, a training-free framework for multi-prompt long-video generation that enables efficient semantic switching while preserving temporal coherence in causal video diffusion models. SWIFT introduces a lightweight Semantic Injection Cache that augments cached video memory rather than reconstructing it from scratch at every prompt boundary. To avoid uniformly perturbing all attention channels, we further perform head-wise semantic injection, so that each attention head receives a prompt update proportional to its alignment with the current video state. In addition, we introduce an Adaptive Dynamic Window that allocates temporal memory according to prompt phase, using larger local context near switching boundaries and smaller windows during stable segments to reduce average inference cost. To preserve long-range semantic consistency under compressed local attention, we further maintain segment-level semantic anchors that summarize prompt-conditioned video history and reintroduce it as compact memory tokens. Compared with current state-of-the-art methods, SWIFT preserves generation quality while achieving 22.6 FPS on a single H100 GPU, establishing a substantially more efficient solution for multi-prompt long-video generation. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: SWIFT 提出了一种无需训练的提示自适应记忆框架，通过语义注入缓存和动态窗口实现高效的多提示长视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式长视频生成面临连续语义切换的挑战，现有方法在提示边界处重建缓存或使用固定内存预算，导致冗余计算和有限的语义适应能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲生成质量的前提下，实现多提示长视频生成中高效的语义切换和时序连贯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出缓存视频历史与提示更新之间存在不匹配：内存保持视觉连续性，而提示切换需要快速语义适应。
analysis.method: SWIFT 包含三个组件：语义注入缓存（轻量级增强缓存而非重建）、逐头语义注入（按注意力头与当前视频状态的对齐程度进行提示更新）、自适应动态窗口（根据提示阶段分配时间内存，并在压缩局部注意力下维护段级语义锚点）。
contributions: 提出训练免费的 SWIFT 框架，实现高效的多提示长视频生成。
引入语义注入缓存和逐头语义注入，避免缓存重建和均匀扰动。
设计自适应动态窗口和段级语义锚点，平衡效率与长程一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到相比 SOTA 方法，SWIFT 在单个 H100 GPU 上达到 22.6 FPS，生成质量保持不变。
limitations: 可能依赖因果视频扩散模型的特定架构。
自适应窗口和语义锚点的超参数可能需针对不同场景调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SWIFT 提出了一种无需训练的提示自适应记忆框架，通过语义注入缓存和动态窗口实现高效的多提示长视频生成。

papers.title: Offline Preference Optimization for Rectified Flow with Noise-Tracked Pairs
papers.abstract: Existing preference datasets for text-to-image models typically store only the final winner/loser images. This representation is insufficient for rectified flow (RF) models, whose generation is naturally indexed by a specific prior noise sample and follows a nearly straight denoising trajectory. In contrast, prior DPO-style alignment for diffusion models commonly estimates trajectories using an independent forward noising process, which can be mismatched to the true reverse dynamics and introduces unnecessary variance. We propose Prior Noise-Aware Preference Optimization (PNAPO), an off-policy alignment framework specialized for rectified flow. PNAPO augments preference data by retaining the paired prior noises used to generate each winner/loser image, turning the standard (prompt, winner, loser) triplet into a sextuple. Leveraging the straight-line property of RF, we estimate intermediate states via noise-image interpolation, which constrains the trajectory estimation space and yields a tighter surrogate objective for preference optimization. In addition, we introduce a dynamic regularization strategy that adapts the DPO regularization based on (i) the reward gap between winner and loser and (ii) training progress, improving stability and sample efficiency. Experiments on state-of-the-art RF T2I backbones show that PNAPO consistently improves preference metrics while substantially reducing training compute.

analysis.tldr: 提出PNAPO，通过保留噪声对和利用直线轨迹特性，实现更高效的rectified flow模型偏好对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像模型的偏好数据集仅存储最终胜/负图像，无法有效支持rectified flow模型的生成特性；而扩散模型的DPO对齐方法使用独立前向加噪估计轨迹，与真实反向动态不匹配，引入不必要的方差。
analysis.problem: 如何为rectified flow模型设计更精确、高效的离线偏好优化方法，避免轨迹估计偏差并降低训练计算量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PNAPO框架：1) 保留生成胜/负图像时的配对先验噪声，将三元组扩展为六元组；2) 利用RF的直线特性，通过噪声-图像插值估计中间状态，约束轨迹估计空间，得到更紧的替代目标；3) 动态正则化策略，根据奖励差距和训练进度调整DPO正则化强度。
contributions: 提出PNAPO，首个针对rectified flow的离线偏好对齐框架，利用噪声跟踪对和直线轨迹特性。
引入动态正则化策略，根据奖励差距和训练进度自适应调整，提升稳定性和样本效率。
在多个SOTA RF T2I骨干上验证，一致提升偏好指标并显著降低训练计算量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个SOTA RF T2I骨干上实验，PNAPO一致提升偏好指标并显著降低训练计算量。
limitations: 仅适用于rectified flow模型，不直接适用于其他生成模型。
依赖噪声-图像插值估计中间状态，可能对噪声质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PNAPO，通过保留噪声对和利用直线轨迹特性，实现更高效的rectified flow模型偏好对齐。

papers.title: FlashAR: Efficient Post-Training Acceleration for Autoregressive Image Generation
papers.abstract: Large-scale autoregressive models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in image generation. However, their sequential raster-scan decoding relies on strictly next-token prediction, making inference prohibitively expensive. Existing acceleration methods typically either introduce entirely new generation paradigms that necessitate costly pre-training from scratch, or enable parallel generation at the expense of a training-inference gap or altered prediction objectives. In this paper, we introduce FlashAR, a lightweight post-training adaptation framework that efficiently adapts a pre-trained raster-scan autoregressive model into a highly parallel generator based on two-way next-token prediction. Our key insight is that effective adaptation should minimize modifications to the pre-trained model's original training objective to preserve its learned prior. Accordingly, we retain the original AR head as a horizontal head for row-wise prediction and introduce a complementary, lightweight vertical head for column-wise prediction. To facilitate efficient adaptation, we branch the vertical head from an intermediate layer rather than the final layer, bypassing the inherent horizontal head bias. Moreover, since horizontal and vertical predictions capture complementary dependencies whose relative importance varies across target positions, we employ a learnable fusion gate to dynamically combine the two predictions at each position. To further reduce adaptation cost, we propose a two-stage adaptation pipeline: the vertical head is first initialized through adaptation from the pre-trained autoregressive model before jointly fine-tuned with backbone to adapt to the new decoding paradigm. Extensive experiments on LlamaGen and Emu3.5 show that FlashAR achieves up to a 22.9x speedup for 512x512 image generation through a lightweight post-training with merely 0.05% of the original training data.

analysis.tldr: FlashAR通过轻量级后训练适配，将自回归图像生成模型加速22.9倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归图像生成模型推理成本高，现有加速方法要么需要昂贵预训练，要么存在训练-推理差距或改变预测目标。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变预训练模型原始训练目标的前提下，高效地将光栅扫描自回归模型适配为并行生成模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 保留原始AR头作为水平头，引入轻量级垂直头进行列预测；垂直头从中间层分支以避免水平头偏置；使用可学习融合门动态组合水平和垂直预测；两阶段适配流水线：先初始化垂直头，再联合微调。
contributions: 提出FlashAR，一种轻量级后训练适配框架，将预训练自回归模型转化为并行生成器。
通过两阶段适配和可学习融合门，仅用0.05%原始训练数据实现22.9倍加速。
analysis.experiments: 在LlamaGen和Emu3.5上实验，512x512图像生成加速22.9倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定自回归架构（如LlamaGen、Emu3.5）。
加速效果可能依赖于图像分辨率。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlashAR通过轻量级后训练适配，将自回归图像生成模型加速22.9倍。

papers.title: Evading Visual Aphasia: Contrastive Adaptive Semantic Token Pruning for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Are low-attention visual tokens truly redundant in vision-language reasoning? Existing pruning methods often assume so, ranking visual tokens by shallow text-to-image attention and discarding low-scoring patches to accelerate LVLM inference. We show that this scalar criterion is unreliable for compositional reasoning: tokens ignored in early layers can later become essential for resolving secondary objects, spatial relations, and contextual cues. Premature pruning can therefore induce Visual Aphasia, a failure mode in which the model loses visual grounding and falls back on language priors. We introduce COAST (COntrastive Adaptive Semantic Token Pruning), a training-free pruning framework that casts compression as adaptive semantic routing. COAST uses native cross-modal attention to identify query-specific anchors and estimate contextual dispersion via attention entropy, then adapts the retention trade-off between semantic evidence and spatial context. It further uses a contrastive routing score to preserve both anchor-aligned evidence and complementary spatial context. Across seven benchmarks, COAST reduces visual tokens by 77.8% and achieves a 2.15x latency speedup while retaining 98.64% of the original average performance. Beyond a single backbone or compression setting, COAST consistently outperforms strong pruning baselines across token budgets and generalizes across multiple LVLM families, showing that adaptive semantic routing is a robust alternative to one-shot scalar pruning

analysis.tldr: 提出COAST，一种无需训练的视觉token剪枝框架，通过对比自适应语义路由避免视觉失语症，在保持98.64%性能的同时减少77.8%的token并实现2.15倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉token剪枝方法基于浅层文本-图像注意力分数丢弃低分token，但该标量标准在组合推理中不可靠，早期丢弃的token可能在后续层变得关键，导致模型失去视觉基础并依赖语言先验（视觉失语症）。
analysis.problem: 解决LVLM推理中视觉token剪枝导致的视觉失语症问题，即如何在不牺牲视觉推理能力的前提下有效压缩视觉token。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到低注意力视觉token并非真正冗余：在组合推理任务中，早期层被忽略的token可能对解析次要对象、空间关系和上下文线索至关重要，过早剪枝会引发视觉失语症。
analysis.method: 提出COAST，一种无需训练的剪枝框架，利用原生跨模态注意力识别查询特定锚点，通过注意力熵估计上下文分散度，自适应调整语义证据与空间上下文的保留权衡，并使用对比路由分数同时保留锚点对齐证据和互补空间上下文。
contributions: 揭示并定义了视觉失语症现象，即过早剪枝导致LVLM失去视觉基础并依赖语言先验。
提出COAST，一种无需训练的自适应语义路由剪枝框架，通过对比路由分数和注意力熵动态保留关键token。
在7个基准上验证COAST减少77.8%视觉token、实现2.15倍加速，同时保持98.64%原始平均性能，且跨模型族和token预算泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在7个基准上评估，COAST减少77.8%视觉token，实现2.15倍延迟加速，保留98.64%原始平均性能，且在不同token预算和多个LVLM家族上一致优于强剪枝基线。
limitations: 可能对极端低token预算下的性能下降敏感。
方法依赖原生跨模态注意力，可能不适用于无注意力机制的模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出COAST，一种无需训练的视觉token剪枝框架，通过对比自适应语义路由避免视觉失语症，在保持98.64%性能的同时减少77.8%的token并实现2.15倍加速。

papers.title: AtteConDA: Attention-Based Conflict Suppression in Multi-Condition Diffusion Models and Synthetic Data Augmentation
papers.abstract: Recent conditional image generation methods can improve controllability by generating images that are faithful to conditions such as sketches, human poses, segmentation maps, and depth. By applying these techniques to image augmentation while preserving annotations, generated images can be used as additional training data and can improve recognition performance. However, for high-level driving tasks such as traffic-rule extraction and driving-behavior understanding, simply using annotations as conditions is insufficient. Instead, images must be augmented while preserving the detailed high-level structure of the original scene. One possible solution is to use multiple conditions so that generated images retain diverse structural cues after generation. However, when multiple conditions are used, conflicts among conditions can prevent reliable structure preservation. In this work, we input semantic segmentation, depth, and edges extracted from the original image into a multi-condition image generation model, thereby providing rich structural information as conditions. We further propose a modeling approach for handling conflicts among multiple conditions and show that it enables image generation with stronger structural preservation. We also build a generation framework and evaluation protocol for driving tasks, establishing a basis for comparison with prior and future models. As a result, this work contributes to image generation research by addressing condition conflicts in multi-condition generation and provides an important step toward mitigating data scarcity in high-level autonomous-driving tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出注意力冲突抑制方法，在多条件扩散模型中实现更强结构保持的图像生成，用于自动驾驶数据增强。
analysis.research_motivation: 高级驾驶任务（如交通规则提取、驾驶行为理解）需要保留原始场景的详细高层结构，但现有条件生成方法仅使用单一条件（如分割图）不足以保留这些结构；多条件生成虽能提供丰富结构线索，但条件间冲突会破坏结构保持。
analysis.problem: 多条件图像生成中条件冲突导致结构保持不可靠的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多条件生成时，不同条件（如分割、深度、边缘）之间可能存在冲突，导致生成图像无法可靠保留原始场景的结构信息。
analysis.method: 提出AtteConDA方法，通过注意力机制抑制多条件间的冲突，同时输入语义分割、深度和边缘图作为条件，实现更强结构保持的图像生成。
contributions: 提出一种处理多条件生成中条件冲突的建模方法，实现更强结构保持的图像生成。
构建了面向驾驶任务的生成框架和评估协议，为与先前及未来模型的比较建立基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定驾驶场景下验证，泛化性未知。
多条件输入可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出注意力冲突抑制方法，在多条件扩散模型中实现更强结构保持的图像生成，用于自动驾驶数据增强。

papers.title: Relational Retrieval: Leveraging Known-Novel Interactions for Generalized Category Discovery
papers.abstract: In this study, we tackle Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) via a Relational Retrieval perspective, explicitly coupling labeled and unlabeled data through bidirectional knowledge transfer. While existing methods treat these sources separately, missing valuable interaction opportunities, we propose Relational Pattern Consistency (RPC) that enables mutual enhancement. RPC employs One-vs-All classifiers for soft ID/OOD decomposition, then introduces two mechanisms: (i) for known-class preservation, we transfer semantic behavioral alignment; (ii) for category discovery, we leverage the insight that samples from the same category maintain invariant relationships with known-class prototypes, transforming unreliable pseudo-labeling into well-defined relational pattern matching. This bidirectional design allows labeled data to guide unlabeled learning while discovering novel categories through their collective relational signatures. Extensive experiments demonstrate RPC achieves state-of-the-art performance on both generic and fine-grained benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 通过关系模式一致性实现已知与未知类别的双向知识迁移，提升广义类别发现性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有广义类别发现方法将标注和未标注数据分开处理，忽略了它们之间的交互机会，导致信息利用不充分。
analysis.problem: 如何通过双向知识迁移，同时利用标注数据保留已知类别和发现未标注数据中的新类别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一类别的样本与已知类原型保持不变的关系，这为将不可靠的伪标签转化为关系模式匹配提供了可能。
analysis.method: 提出关系模式一致性（RPC），使用One-vs-All分类器进行软ID/OOD分解，然后通过已知类保留的语义行为对齐和基于关系模式匹配的新类别发现两个机制实现双向知识迁移。
contributions: 提出从关系检索视角解决广义类别发现，显式耦合标注和未标注数据。
设计关系模式一致性方法，实现已知类保留和新类别发现的双向增强。
analysis.experiments: 在通用和细粒度基准上达到最先进性能，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖已知类原型的质量，在原型不准确时性能下降。
关系模式匹配的计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过关系模式一致性实现已知与未知类别的双向知识迁移，提升广义类别发现性能。

papers.title: MAG-VLAQ: Multi-modal Aerial-Ground Query Aggregation for Cross-View Place Recognition
papers.abstract: Multi-modal cross-view place recognition remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision and robotics due to the severe viewpoint, modality, and spatial-structure discrepancies between ground observations and aerial references. To address this challenge, we present MAG-VLAQ, a foundation-model-enhanced query aggregation framework for multi-modal aerial-ground cross-view place recognition. Specifically, our approach leverages pre-trained foundation models to extract dense visual tokens from both ground and aerial images, as well as expressive geometric tokens from ground LiDAR observations. These heterogeneous tokens are then projected into a shared embedding space for cross-modal alignment and fusion. As our main contribution, we propose ODE-conditioned VLAQ, which tightly couples neural ordinary differential equations (ODE)-based RGB-LiDAR fusion with vectors of locally aggregated queries (VLAQ). In this design, the VLAQ query centers are dynamically adapted according to the fused multi-modal state. This mechanism allows the final global descriptor to preserve globally learned retrieval prototypes while remaining responsive to scene-specific visual and geometric evidence, significantly improving aerial-ground matching. Extensive experiments on KITTI360-AG and nuScenes-AG validate the effectiveness of our proposed MAG-VLAQ. Notably, on KITTI360-AG, our MAG-VLAQ nearly doubles the state-of-the-art performance, achieving 61.1 Recall@1 in the satellite setting, compared with 34.5 from the closest competing approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出MAG-VLAQ框架，通过ODE条件化VLAQ融合多模态特征，在跨视角地点识别任务上近乎双倍提升SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 地面与航拍图像之间存在严重的视角、模态和空间结构差异，导致跨视角地点识别极具挑战，现有方法性能有限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合地面RGB、LiDAR与航拍图像等多模态异构数据，实现鲁棒的跨视角地点识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用预训练基础模型提取地面RGB和航拍图像的密集视觉token以及地面LiDAR的几何token，投影到共享嵌入空间进行跨模态对齐与融合；核心创新是ODE条件化VLAQ，通过神经ODE动态调整VLAQ查询中心以适应融合的多模态状态，生成全局描述符。
contributions: 提出MAG-VLAQ框架，结合预训练基础模型与ODE条件化VLAQ实现多模态空中-地面查询聚合。
在KITTI360-AG和nuScenes-AG数据集上验证有效性，在KITTI360-AG卫星设置下Recall@1从34.5提升至61.1，近乎翻倍。
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI360-AG和nuScenes-AG数据集上进行实验，KITTI360-AG卫星设置下Recall@1达61.1，对比方法为34.5。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练基础模型的质量和泛化能力。
ODE模块可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MAG-VLAQ框架，通过ODE条件化VLAQ融合多模态特征，在跨视角地点识别任务上近乎双倍提升SOTA性能。

papers.title: SAMOFT: Robust Multi-Object Tracking via Region and Flow
papers.abstract: Multi-object tracking (MOT) is a fundamental task in computer vision that requires continuously tracking multiple targets while maintaining consistent identities across frames. However, most existing approaches primarily rely on instance-level object features for trajectory association, which often leads to degraded performance under challenging conditions such as object deformation, nonlinear motion, and occlusion. In this work, we propose SAMOFT, a robust tracker that leverages pixel-level cues to improve robustness under complex motion scenarios. Specifically, we introduce a Pixel Motion Matching (PMM) module that integrates the Segment Anything Model (SAM) with dense optical flow to refine Kalman filter-based motion prediction using instantaneous foreground pixel motion. To further enhance robustness under unreliable detections, we design a Centroid Distance Matching (CDM) module that performs flexible mask-based centroid matching for low-confidence or partially occluded observations. Moreover, a Distribution-Based Correction (DBC) module models long-tailed motion patterns in a training-free manner using historical optical flow statistics and dynamically corrects trajectory states online. We also incorporate a Cluster-Aware ReID (CA-ReID) strategy to improve the stability and discriminative power of trajectory appearance features. Extensive experiments on the DanceTrack and MOTChallenge benchmarks demonstrate that SAMOFT consistently improves baseline trackers and achieves competitive performance compared with recent state-of-the-art methods, validating the effectiveness of leveraging pixel-level cues for robust multi-object tracking.

analysis.tldr: SAMOFT 利用像素级线索（SAM+光流）提升多目标跟踪在遮挡、变形等复杂场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 MOT 方法主要依赖实例级特征进行轨迹关联，在物体变形、非线性运动和遮挡等挑战条件下性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何利用像素级线索提升多目标跟踪在复杂运动场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SAMOFT，包含四个模块：Pixel Motion Matching (PMM) 结合 SAM 和稠密光流优化卡尔曼滤波预测；Centroid Distance Matching (CDM) 对低置信度或部分遮挡观测进行灵活质心匹配；Distribution-Based Correction (DBC) 利用历史光流统计无训练地建模长尾运动模式并在线修正轨迹；Cluster-Aware ReID (CA-ReID) 提升轨迹外观特征的稳定性和判别力。
contributions: 提出利用像素级线索（SAM+光流）增强 MOT 鲁棒性的框架 SAMOFT。
设计 PMM、CDM、DBC 和 CA-ReID 四个模块，分别解决运动预测、遮挡处理、长尾运动修正和外观特征判别问题。
analysis.experiments: 在 DanceTrack 和 MOTChallenge 基准上，SAMOFT 一致提升基线跟踪器性能，并与近期 SOTA 方法取得竞争性结果。
limitations: 依赖 SAM 和光流计算，可能增加推理开销。
在极端遮挡或快速运动场景下，像素级线索可能仍存在噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SAMOFT 利用像素级线索（SAM+光流）提升多目标跟踪在遮挡、变形等复杂场景下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: AnyDepth-DETR/-YOLO: Any-depth object detection with a single network
papers.abstract: Modern object detectors are static, fixed-depth networks optimized for a single operating point, requiring separate models for different deployment scenarios. We present an any-depth detection framework that enables a single network to span a continuous range of accuracy--efficiency trade-offs by controlling depth at inference time without retraining. Each backbone and neck stage is divided into an essential path, which always executes, and a skippable refinement path; this decomposition preserves the full multi-scale feature hierarchy at every depth configuration, unlike conventional early exiting that discards entire stages. To train such a network, jointly optimizing many sub-networks of varying depth introduces conflicting gradient signals. We address this via self-distillation between only the two extremes, with prediction-level and feature-level alignment losses that enforce stage-wise modularity, ensuring the outputs of each stage remain compatible regardless of the paths taken. Instantiated on RT-DETR and YOLOv12, our full-depth configurations match or surpass their respective SOTA baselines with negligible parameter overhead, while the most efficient configurations achieve up to $1.82\times$ speedup at a cost of only 2.0 AP, all from a single set of weights.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种任意深度检测框架，使单个网络在推理时通过控制深度实现精度-效率连续权衡，无需重新训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代目标检测器是静态的固定深度网络，针对单一操作点优化，不同部署场景需要独立模型，导致资源浪费和部署成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个单一网络，使其在推理时能够灵活调整深度，覆盖连续的精度-效率权衡，同时保持多尺度特征层次结构并避免训练冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统早退方法丢弃整个阶段，破坏多尺度特征层次；联合优化多个不同深度的子网络会产生冲突的梯度信号。
analysis.method: 将骨干和颈部每个阶段分解为必选路径和可跳过精化路径；通过仅两个极值之间的自蒸馏（预测级和特征级对齐损失）实现阶段模块化训练。
contributions: 提出任意深度检测框架，支持单个网络在推理时连续控制深度，无需重新训练。
设计阶段分解策略和自蒸馏训练方法，解决多深度子网络联合优化的梯度冲突问题。
analysis.experiments: 在RT-DETR和YOLOv12上实例化，全深度配置匹配或超越SOTA基线，高效配置实现最高1.82倍加速，仅损失2.0 AP。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定检测架构（如RT-DETR和YOLO），泛化性未验证。
自蒸馏仅使用两个极值，中间深度配置的性能可能未充分优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种任意深度检测框架，使单个网络在推理时通过控制深度实现精度-效率连续权衡，无需重新训练。

papers.title: HyNeuralMap: Hyperbolic Mapping of Visual Semantics to Neural Hierarchies
papers.abstract: Understanding the intricate mappings between visual stimuli and neural responses is a fundamental challenge in cognitive neuroscience. While current approaches predominantly align images and functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) responses in Euclidean space, this geometry often struggles to preserve fine-grained semantic relationships and latent hierarchical structures across visual and neural modalities. To overcome this, we propose HyNeuralMap, a framework that employ hyperbolic Lorentz model to map visual semantics into a shared, cross-subject neural hierarchy. By leveraging the negative curvature of hyperbolic space as an inductive bias, the proposed framework better captures hierarchical semantic organization and cross-subject neural similarities. Specifically, visual and neural embeddings are jointly optimized through hyperbolic geometric alignment, where geodesic distances preserve semantic proximity and hierarchical relationships more effectively than Euclidean embeddings. Experiments demonstrate that HyNeuralMap consistently outperforms state-of-the-art Euclidean baselines in both multi-label semantic prediction and cross-modal retrieval tasks. This confirms hyperbolic geometry's superiority for cross-modal semantic alignment and hierarchical modeling, providing a new avenue for vision-neural representation learning.

analysis.tldr: HyNeuralMap利用双曲几何对齐视觉语义与fMRI神经响应，优于欧氏空间方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解视觉刺激与神经响应之间的映射是认知神经科学的核心挑战，现有欧氏空间方法难以保留细粒度语义关系和层次结构。
analysis.problem: 如何更好地对齐视觉语义与fMRI神经响应，同时保留层次结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 欧氏空间在跨模态语义对齐中难以保持层次结构，双曲几何的负曲率作为归纳偏置能更有效捕捉层次组织。
analysis.method: 提出HyNeuralMap框架，使用双曲Lorentz模型将视觉语义映射到共享的跨被试神经层次，通过双曲几何对齐联合优化视觉和神经嵌入。
contributions: 首次将双曲几何应用于视觉-神经跨模态对齐，利用负曲率捕捉层次结构。
在多项任务上超越欧氏空间基线，验证双曲几何的优越性。
analysis.experiments: 在多标签语义预测和跨模态检索任务上，HyNeuralMap一致优于最先进的欧氏基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量fMRI数据，数据获取成本高。
双曲空间训练可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HyNeuralMap利用双曲几何对齐视觉语义与fMRI神经响应，优于欧氏空间方法。

papers.title: LiteMedCoT-VL: Parameter-Efficient Adaptation for Medical Visual Question Answering
papers.abstract: The reasoning gap between large and compact vision-language models (VLMs) limits the deployment of medical AI on portable clinical devices. Compact VLMs of 2--4B parameters can run on resource-constrained hardware but lack the multi-step reasoning capacity needed for interpretable clinical decision support. Existing knowledge distillation methods transfer answers without the reasoning process behind them. Medical visual question answering (VQA) serves as a testbed for this problem, as it requires models to integrate visual evidence with clinical knowledge through structured reasoning chains. We introduce LiteMedCoT-VL, a pipeline that transfers chain-of-thought reasoning from a 235B teacher model to 2B student models through LoRA-based fine-tuning on explanation-enriched training data. All inference is conducted without image captions by default, simulating the clinical scenario in which a physician interprets a medical image directly without an accompanying radiology report. On the PMC-VQA benchmark, LiteMedCoT-VL achieves 64.9% accuracy, exceeding the zero-shot Qwen3-VL-4B baseline of 53.9% by 11.0 percentage points and outperforming all published baselines. This result indicates that a 2B model with reasoning distillation can match or exceed models with twice the parameters. Visual grounding analysis shows that the model relies on image content rather than exploiting textual priors. Our code is publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过LoRA微调将235B教师模型的思维链推理蒸馏到2B学生模型，在医学VQA上超越所有已发表基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 紧凑型VLM（2-4B参数）可在资源受限设备上运行，但缺乏多步推理能力；现有知识蒸馏仅传递答案而不传递推理过程，限制了可解释临床决策支持。
analysis.problem: 如何将大型教师模型的链式推理能力高效迁移到紧凑型学生模型，以提升医学视觉问答的准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LiteMedCoT-VL流水线，使用LoRA对2B学生模型在增强解释的训练数据上进行微调，从235B教师模型蒸馏思维链推理，推理时不依赖图像描述。
contributions: 提出一种参数高效的思维链蒸馏方法，将大型教师模型的推理能力迁移到紧凑型学生模型。
在PMC-VQA基准上达到64.9%准确率，超越所有已发表基线，且2B模型性能可媲美4B模型。
analysis.experiments: 在PMC-VQA基准上评估，LiteMedCoT-VL（2B）准确率64.9%，超过零样本Qwen3-VL-4B基线（53.9%）11.0个百分点，并超越所有已发表基线。视觉基础分析表明模型依赖图像内容而非文本先验。
limitations: 仅在一个医学VQA基准上验证，泛化性待考。
蒸馏过程依赖教师模型生成的推理链质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过LoRA微调将235B教师模型的思维链推理蒸馏到2B学生模型，在医学VQA上超越所有已发表基线。

papers.title: EduStory: A Unified Framework for Pedagogically-Consistent Multi-Shot STEM Instructional Video Generation
papers.abstract: Long-horizon video generation has advanced in visual quality, yet existing methods still struggle to maintain knowledge consistency and coherent pedagogical narratives across multi-shot instructional videos, especially in STEM domains. To address these challenges, we propose EduStory, a unified framework for reliable instructional video generation. EduStory integrates pedagogical state modeling to track persistent knowledge states, script-guided structured control to organize multi-shot narratives, and learning-oriented evaluation metrics to assess knowledge fidelity and constraint satisfaction. To support rigorous evaluation, we further introduce EduVideoBench, a diagnostic benchmark with multi-granularity annotations, including pedagogical storyboards, shot-level semantics, and knowledge state transitions, together with baseline tasks for controllable instructional video generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that domain-aware state modeling and structured control substantially reduce narrative breakdown and improve alignment with instructional intent. These results highlight the significance of domain-specific structural constraints and tailored benchmarks for advancing reliable, controllable, and also trustworthy long-horizon video generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出EduStory框架，通过教学状态建模和脚本控制生成多镜头STEM教学视频，并构建EduVideoBench基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长视频生成方法在STEM教学视频中难以保持知识一致性和连贯的教学叙事，缺乏领域特定的结构约束和评估基准。
analysis.problem: 如何生成知识一致、叙事连贯且符合教学意图的多镜头STEM教学视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法在多镜头教学视频中容易出现叙事断裂（narrative breakdown），且与教学意图的对齐不足。
analysis.method: EduStory框架：集成教学状态建模（跟踪持久知识状态）、脚本引导的结构化控制（组织多镜头叙事）以及面向学习的评估指标（评估知识保真度和约束满足）。
contributions: 提出EduStory框架，通过教学状态建模和脚本控制实现可靠的多镜头教学视频生成。
构建EduVideoBench诊断基准，包含多粒度标注（教学故事板、镜头级语义、知识状态转换）和基线任务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到大量实验表明领域感知的状态建模和结构化控制显著减少叙事断裂并改善与教学意图的对齐，但未提供具体数值或基准结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对STEM领域，泛化性未知。
评估指标可能依赖人工标注，自动化程度有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EduStory框架，通过教学状态建模和脚本控制生成多镜头STEM教学视频，并构建EduVideoBench基准。

papers.title: Perceptual Asymmetry Between Hue Categories: Evidence from Human Color Categorization
papers.abstract: Human color categories are not uniformly distributed in perceptual space, yet most computational color models still assume fixed and evenly structured representations. In this paper, we present a focused analytical extension of the COLIBRI fuzzy color model by investigating perceptual asymmetry between hue categories. Using previously collected large-scale human color categorization data, we introduce quantitative measures of category extent and boundary uncertainty, namely Wideness and Boundary Width, derived from fuzzy membership functions at the {\alpha} = 0.5 level. The analysis reveals a strong imbalance between the two categories: yellow occupies a compact and sharply constrained region of the hue space, whereas green spans a substantially broader interval and exhibits a more extended transition structure. The results show that perceptual color categories are not only fuzzy, but also highly non-uniform in their geometric organization. This asymmetry suggests that some categories behave as narrow, highly specific perceptual labels, while others function as broad, tolerant regions of human color naming. These findings provide a new perspective on linguistic color categorization and extend the interpretability of the COLIBRI framework for perceptually grounded color modeling.

analysis.tldr: 人类颜色类别在感知空间中存在不对称性，黄色区域紧凑而绿色区域宽泛。
analysis.research_motivation: 大多数计算颜色模型假设固定且均匀的表示，但人类颜色类别在感知空间中并非均匀分布，理解这种不对称性对于构建更符合人类感知的颜色模型至关重要。
analysis.problem: 量化并分析色调类别之间的感知不对称性，特别是黄色和绿色类别的几何组织差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了黄色类别在色调空间中占据紧凑且边界清晰的区域，而绿色类别覆盖更宽的区间并具有更长的过渡结构，表明颜色类别在几何组织上高度非均匀。
analysis.method: 基于COLIBRI模糊颜色模型，从模糊隶属函数（α=0.5水平）推导出类别广度（Wideness）和边界不确定性（Boundary Width）两个定量指标，用于分析人类颜色分类数据。
contributions: 提出了Wideness和Boundary Width两个定量指标来度量颜色类别的感知不对称性。
通过大规模人类颜色分类数据，实证揭示了黄色和绿色类别在感知空间中的显著不对称性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅分析了黄色和绿色两个类别，其他色调类别的不对称性未知。
依赖特定模糊颜色模型（COLIBRI），可能不适用于其他颜色表示框架。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人类颜色类别在感知空间中存在不对称性，黄色区域紧凑而绿色区域宽泛。

papers.title: Noise-Started One-Step Real-World Super-Resolution via LR-Conditioned SplitMeanFlow and GAN Refinement
papers.abstract: Pre-trained text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models have shown strong potential for real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR), owing to their noise-started generation process that enables realistic texture synthesis and captures the one-to-many nature of super-resolution. However, diffusion-based Real-ISR methods still face a fundamental efficiency-quality trade-off. Multi-step methods generate high-quality results by iteratively denoising random Gaussian noise under LR conditioning, but suffer from slow sampling. Recent one-step methods greatly improve efficiency, yet they typically replace noise-started generation with direct LR-to-HR restoration, which weakens stochasticity and limits realistic detail synthesis. To address this issue, we propose SMFSR, a noise-started one-step Real-ISR framework via LR-conditioned SplitMeanFlow and GAN refinement. SMFSR preserves the random-noise starting point of diffusion models and learns a direct noise-to-HR mapping conditioned on the LR image. To this end, Interval Splitting Consistency distills the multi-step generative trajectory into a single average-velocity prediction, enabling efficient one-step generation. To compensate for the reduced opportunity for progressive refinement, we further introduce a GAN refinement stage, where a DINOv3-based discriminator enhances realistic texture synthesis and variational score distillation aligns the generated outputs with the natural image distribution under a frozen diffusion teacher. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SMFSR achieves state-of-the-art perceptual quality among one-step diffusion-based Real-ISR methods while retaining fast single-step inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出SMFSR，一种噪声启动的单步真实图像超分辨率框架，结合LR条件SplitMeanFlow和GAN精炼，在保持单步推理速度的同时实现SOTA感知质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在真实图像超分辨率中潜力巨大，但现有方法面临效率与质量之间的权衡：多步方法质量高但采样慢，单步方法效率高但随机性弱、细节合成有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在单步推理中保留噪声启动的随机性，同时实现高质量的真实图像超分辨率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多步扩散方法通过迭代去噪生成高质量结果但速度慢；单步方法通常用直接LR到HR恢复替代噪声启动，削弱了随机性和细节合成能力。
analysis.method: 提出SMFSR框架，包含两个阶段：1) 通过Interval Splitting Consistency将多步生成轨迹蒸馏为单步平均速度预测，实现噪声到HR的直接映射；2) GAN精炼阶段，使用基于DINOv3的判别器增强纹理合成，并通过变分分数蒸馏对齐输出与自然图像分布。
contributions: 提出噪声启动的单步Real-ISR框架SMFSR，保留扩散模型的随机性并实现高效推理。
引入Interval Splitting Consistency蒸馏策略和GAN精炼阶段，在单步设置下达到SOTA感知质量。
analysis.experiments: 大量实验表明，SMFSR在基于扩散的单步Real-ISR方法中实现了最先进的感知质量，同时保持快速单步推理。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练T2I扩散模型，泛化性受限于教师模型能力。
GAN精炼阶段可能引入额外训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SMFSR，一种噪声启动的单步真实图像超分辨率框架，结合LR条件SplitMeanFlow和GAN精炼，在保持单步推理速度的同时实现SOTA感知质量。

papers.title: PGID: Progressive Guided Inversion and Denoising for Robust Watermark Detection
papers.abstract: With the proliferation of AI-generated images, digital watermarking has become an essential safeguard for protecting intellectual property and mitigating malicious exploitation. Recent works on semantic watermarking have enabled efficient copyright protection for diffusion models. However, the dependence of semantic watermarking on diffusion inversion for watermark detection creates a critical vulnerability. Imprint removal and forgery attacks exploit this weakness to produce deceptive results. Our analysis reveals that these attacks succeed by displacing watermarked latents into the unwatermarked region, while guiding unwatermarked latents into the watermarked region. Based on that, we propose Progressive Guided Inversion and Denoising (PGID), the first plug-and-play, training-free noise extraction framework designed to defend against both attack strategies. PGID effectively defends by projecting perturbed latents back to the region where they originally belong. The projection is achieved by eliminating intermediate latent deflections and mitigating adversarial perturbations through progressive inversion-denoising cycles. Comprehensive evaluations across multiple schemes demonstrate that PGID successfully restores detection reliability by recovering removed watermarks and identifying forged instances.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进式引导反转与去噪框架，通过投影扰动潜变量恢复水印检测可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成图像激增，数字水印是保护知识产权和防止恶意利用的关键手段，但现有语义水印依赖扩散反转检测，易受印记移除和伪造攻击。
analysis.problem: 解决语义水印检测中因攻击导致的水印潜变量偏移问题，恢复检测可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 攻击通过将带水印潜变量移入非水印区域、将非水印潜变量移入水印区域来欺骗检测。
analysis.method: 提出渐进式引导反转与去噪（PGID），一种即插即用、无需训练的噪声提取框架，通过渐进反转-去噪循环消除中间潜变量偏转和对抗扰动，将扰动潜变量投影回原始区域。
contributions: 首次提出即插即用、无需训练的防御框架PGID，同时抵御印记移除和伪造攻击。
通过分析攻击机制，提出基于潜变量投影的防御策略，恢复水印检测可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对强对抗攻击的鲁棒性有限。
渐进循环可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出渐进式引导反转与去噪框架，通过投影扰动潜变量恢复水印检测可靠性。

papers.title: Attention Sinks in Diffusion Transformers: A Causal Analysis
papers.abstract: Attention sinks -- tokens that receive disproportionate attention mass -- are assumed to be functionally important in autoregressive language models, but their role in diffusion transformers remains unclear. We present a causal analysis in text-to-image diffusion, dynamically identifying dominant attention recipients per timestep and suppressing them via paired, training-free interventions on the score and value paths. Across 553 GenEval prompts on Stable Diffusion~3 (with SDXL corroboration), removing these sinks does not degrade text-image alignment (CLIP-T) or preference proxies (ImageReward, HPS-v2) at $k{=}1$; only under stronger interventions ($k\!\geq\!10$) does HPS-v2 exhibit a metric-dependent boundary, while CLIP-T remains robust throughout. The perceptual shifts induced by suppression are nonetheless \emph{sink-specific} -- $\sim\!6\times$ larger than equal-budget random masking -- revealing an empirical dissociation between trajectory-level perturbation and \emph{semantic alignment} in diffusion transformers. \footnote{Code available at this https URL .}

analysis.tldr: 扩散Transformer中的注意力沉没并非语义对齐所必需，抑制它们对文本-图像对齐影响甚微。
analysis.research_motivation: 注意力沉没在自回归语言模型中被认为功能重要，但在扩散Transformer中的作用尚不明确，理解其角色有助于优化模型。
analysis.problem: 探究扩散Transformer中注意力沉没是否对文本-图像对齐和生成质量至关重要。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 抑制注意力沉没在弱干预下不损害CLIP-T和偏好代理指标，仅强干预时HPS-v2出现边界，而CLIP-T始终稳健；抑制引起的感知变化是沉没特异的，比随机掩码大6倍。
analysis.method: 通过动态识别每步的注意力沉没，并在分数和值路径上进行成对、免训练的干预来抑制它们。
contributions: 首次对扩散Transformer中的注意力沉没进行因果分析
发现注意力沉没对语义对齐并非必要，揭示了轨迹扰动与语义对齐之间的经验分离
analysis.experiments: 在Stable Diffusion 3上使用553个GenEval提示进行实验，并用SDXL验证，评估了CLIP-T、ImageReward和HPS-v2指标。
limitations: 仅针对文本到图像扩散模型，可能不适用于其他模态
未探索注意力沉没在其他任务（如视频生成）中的作用
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 扩散Transformer中的注意力沉没并非语义对齐所必需，抑制它们对文本-图像对齐影响甚微。

papers.title: Low-Cost Neural Radiance Fields
papers.abstract: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) achieve high-quality novel-view synthesis, but their long training times and reliance on dense input views limit accessibility. We present a comparative study of three accelerated NeRF variants - DS-NeRF, TensoRF, and HashNeRF and explore extensions targeted at the low-compute, low-data regime. First, we add a depth-supervision loss derived from COLMAP keypoints to TensoRF (TensoRF-DS) and evaluate it on the LLFF dataset under reduced view counts. Second, we ablate the feature-decoding MLP of TensoRF and study the effect of input downsampling on PSNR and runtime on the synthetic Lego scene. Third, we propose four architectural variants of the HashNeRF color and density networks, including residual and convolutional designs, and report PSNR/training-time tradeoffs under matched iteration budgets. Under iso-time evaluation, none of our extensions conclusively outperform the published baselines, but the experiments characterize which extensions transfer to constrained settings and surface design questions for future work.

analysis.tldr: 对三种加速NeRF变体进行低计算、低数据场景下的比较研究，发现扩展方法在等时评估下未显著超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: NeRF训练时间长且依赖密集输入视图，限制了其可访问性，需要探索低计算、低数据场景下的加速方案。
analysis.problem: 在低计算资源和稀疏输入视图条件下，如何有效加速NeRF并保持合成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在等时评估下，所提出的扩展方法（如TensoRF-DS、HashNeRF架构变体）均未在PSNR或训练时间上显著优于已发表基线。
analysis.method: 对DS-NeRF、TensoRF和HashNeRF三种加速NeRF变体进行对比研究，并针对低计算、低数据场景提出扩展：在TensoRF中加入深度监督损失（TensoRF-DS），消融TensoRF的特征解码MLP，以及提出四种HashNeRF颜色和密度网络的架构变体（包括残差和卷积设计）。
contributions: 在TensoRF中引入基于COLMAP关键点的深度监督损失，并在LLFF数据集上评估稀疏视图性能。
提出四种HashNeRF网络架构变体，并报告在等迭代预算下的PSNR/训练时间权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在LLFF数据集上评估TensoRF-DS在减少视图数量下的性能；在合成Lego场景上消融TensoRF的MLP并研究输入下采样对PSNR和运行时间的影响；在等迭代预算下比较HashNeRF变体的PSNR和训练时间。
limitations: 扩展方法在等时评估下未显著优于基线，可能仅适用于特定场景。
实验仅在有限数据集（LLFF、Lego）上进行，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对三种加速NeRF变体进行低计算、低数据场景下的比较研究，发现扩展方法在等时评估下未显著超越基线。

papers.title: Micro-Defects Expose Macro-Fakes: Detecting AI-Generated Images via Local Distributional Shifts
papers.abstract: Recent generative models can produce images that appear highly realistic, raising challenges in distinguishing real and AI-generated images. Yet existing detectors based on pre-trained feature extractors tend to over-rely on global semantics, limiting sensitivity to the critical micro-defects. In this work, we propose Micro-Defects expose Macro-Fakes (MDMF), a local distribution-aware detection framework that amplifies micro-scale statistical irregularities into macro-level distributional discrepancies. To avoid localized forensic cues being diluted by plain aggregation, we introduce a learnable Patch Forensic Signature that projects semantic patch embeddings into a compact forensic latent space. We then use Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) to quantify distributional discrepancies between generated and real images. Our theory-grounded analysis shows that patch-wise modeling yields provably larger discrepancies when localized forensic signals are present in generated images, enabling more reliable separation from real images. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MDMF consistently outperforms baseline detectors across multiple benchmarks, validating its general effectiveness. Project page: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出MDMF框架，通过局部分布偏移检测AI生成图像，优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI图像检测器过度依赖全局语义，对局部微缺陷不敏感，导致检测性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用局部统计异常来有效区分AI生成图像与真实图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MDMF框架，包含可学习的Patch Forensic Signature将语义块嵌入紧凑取证空间，并用最大均值差异（MMD）量化生成图像与真实图像之间的分布差异。
contributions: 提出局部分布感知的检测框架MDMF，通过放大微尺度统计不规则性为宏观分布差异。
引入可学习的Patch Forensic Signature，避免局部取证线索被简单聚合稀释。
理论分析表明，当生成图像中存在局部取证信号时，逐块建模可产生更大的分布差异。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，MDMF一致优于基线检测器，验证了其通用有效性。
limitations: 可能对高度逼真的生成图像仍存在挑战。
计算开销可能较大，因为需要逐块处理。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MDMF框架，通过局部分布偏移检测AI生成图像，优于现有方法。

papers.title: Reinforcing Multimodal Reasoning Against Visual Degradation
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), yet the resulting policies remain brittle against real-world visual degradations such as blur, compression artifacts, and low-resolution scans. Prior robustness techniques from vision and deep RL rely on static data augmentation or value-based regularization, neither of which transfers cleanly to critic-free RL fine-tuning of autoregressive MLLMs. Reinforcing reasoning against such corruptions is non-trivial: naively injecting degraded views during rollout induces reward poisoning, where perceptual occlusions trigger hallucinated trajectories and destabilize optimization. We propose ROMA, an RL fine-tuning framework that modifies the optimization dynamics to reinforce reasoning against visual degradation while preserving clean-input performance. A dual-forward-pass strategy uses teacher forcing to evaluate corrupted views against clean-image trajectories, avoiding new rollouts on degraded inputs. For distributional consistency, we apply a token-level surrogate KL penalty against the worst-case augmentation; to prevent policy collapse under regularization, an auxiliary policy gradient loss anchored to clean-image advantages preserves a reliable reward signal; and to avoid systematically incorrect invariance, correctness-conditioned regularization restricts enforcement to successful trajectories. On Qwen3-VL 4B/8B across seven multimodal reasoning benchmarks, our method improves robustness by +2.4% on seen and +2.3% on unseen corruptions over GRPO while matching clean accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出ROMA框架，通过修改优化动态增强多模态大模型对视觉退化的推理鲁棒性，同时保持干净输入性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习提升了多模态大模型的推理能力，但策略在真实世界的视觉退化（如模糊、压缩、低分辨率）下脆弱；现有鲁棒性技术（静态数据增强、基于值的正则化）无法直接迁移到无评论家的自回归MLLM微调中。
analysis.problem: 在无评论家强化学习微调中，如何增强多模态推理对视觉退化的鲁棒性，同时避免奖励中毒和策略崩溃。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在rollout中直接注入退化视图会导致奖励中毒，即感知遮挡引发幻觉轨迹并破坏优化稳定性。
analysis.method: 提出ROMA框架，包含：1) 双前向传播策略，使用教师强制在退化视图上评估干净图像轨迹，避免新rollout；2) 基于最坏情况增强的token级代理KL惩罚；3) 辅助策略梯度损失锚定干净图像优势；4) 正确性条件正则化，仅对成功轨迹施加约束。
contributions: 提出ROMA，一种针对视觉退化鲁棒性的RL微调框架，通过修改优化动态增强推理鲁棒性。
在Qwen3-VL 4B/8B上，ROMA在七个多模态推理基准上，对已知和未知退化分别提升+2.4%和+2.3%的鲁棒性，同时匹配干净准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-VL 4B/8B上，使用七个多模态推理基准，评估对已知和未知视觉退化的鲁棒性，并与GRPO对比。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的视觉退化，未涵盖所有真实世界退化。
双前向传播策略可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ROMA框架，通过修改优化动态增强多模态大模型对视觉退化的推理鲁棒性，同时保持干净输入性能。

papers.title: Monocular Biomechanical Tracking of Fingers with Inverse Kinematics to Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Accurate hand and finger tracking from video has significant clinical applications for monitoring activities of daily living and measuring range of motion, yet monocular video approaches for obtaining hand biomechanics remain under-developed. We present a method that combines the SAM 3D Body foundation model with inverse kinematics optimization in a full-body biomechanical model to extract anatomically-constrained finger joint angles from single-view video. We port SAM 3D Body from PyTorch to JAX for integration with MuJoCo-MJX, enabling GPU-accelerated optimization, and develop a novel mapping between the Momentum Human Rig (MHR) outputs and biomechanical model markers. Validation against 8-camera multiview reconstruction on 4,590 frames from 7 participants performing a variety of hand poses and object manipulation tasks shows finger joint angle errors of approximately 10 degrees and hand position errors of approximately 6 mm, after Procrustes alignment. Results were consistent across camera viewpoints and robust to different methods for producing reference values from multiview video. This work extends monocular biomechanical analysis to detailed finger tracking, expanding access to quantitative characterization of hand movement from readily available video.

analysis.tldr: 结合基础模型与逆运动学优化，从单目视频中实现手指的生物力学跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 准确的手部和手指跟踪在临床监测日常活动和测量关节活动范围方面有重要应用，但单目视频方法在手部生物力学获取方面仍不成熟。
analysis.problem: 从单目视频中提取具有解剖学约束的手指关节角度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将SAM 3D Body基础模型与逆运动学优化结合到全身生物力学模型中，通过将模型从PyTorch移植到JAX以集成MuJoCo-MJX实现GPU加速优化，并开发了Momentum Human Rig输出与生物力学模型标记之间的新映射。
contributions: 提出一种结合基础模型与逆运动学优化的单目手指生物力学跟踪方法。
将SAM 3D Body移植到JAX并集成MuJoCo-MJX实现GPU加速。
开发了MHR输出与生物力学模型标记之间的映射。
analysis.experiments: 在7名参与者执行多种手部姿势和物体操作任务的4590帧上，与8摄像头多视角重建进行验证，手指关节角度误差约10度，手部位置误差约6毫米（Procrustes对齐后），结果在不同视角和参考值生成方法下保持一致。
limitations: 可能对遮挡或快速运动鲁棒性有限。
依赖基础模型和生物力学模型的精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合基础模型与逆运动学优化，从单目视频中实现手指的生物力学跟踪。

papers.title: CalibFree: Self-Supervised View Feature Separation for Calibration-Free Multi-Camera Multi-Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Multi-camera multi-object tracking (MCMOT) faces significant challenges in maintaining consistent object identities across varying camera perspectives, particularly when precise calibration and extensive annotations are required. In this paper, we present CalibFree, a self-supervised representation learning framework that does not need any calibration or manual labeling for the MCMOT task. By promoting feature separation between view-agnostic and view-specific representations through single-view distillation and cross-view reconstruction, our method adapts to complex, dynamic scenarios with minimal overhead. Experiments on the MMP-MvMHAT dataset show a 3% improvement in overall accuracy and a 7.5% increase in the average F1 score over state-of-the-art approaches, confirming the effectiveness of our calibration-free design. Moreover, on the more diverse MvMHAT dataset, our approach demonstrates superior over-time tracking and strong cross-view performance, highlighting its adaptability to a wide range of camera configurations. Code will be publicly available upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出自监督视图特征分离框架，无需标定和标注即可实现多相机多目标跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 多相机多目标跟踪需要精确标定和大量标注，成本高且难以适应动态场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在无标定和无标注条件下实现跨相机一致的多目标跟踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过单视图蒸馏和跨视图重建，分离视图无关和视图特定特征，实现自监督表示学习。
contributions: 提出无需标定和标注的自监督MCMOT框架CalibFree
设计视图特征分离机制，提升跨视角身份一致性
analysis.experiments: 在MMP-MvMHAT数据集上总体准确率提升3%，平均F1分数提升7.5%；在MvMHAT数据集上展示优越的跨时间跟踪和跨视角性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定场景的视图差异假设
未在极端视角变化下验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自监督视图特征分离框架，无需标定和标注即可实现多相机多目标跟踪。

papers.title: Towards Robust Sequential Decomposition for Complex Image Editing
papers.abstract: Recent advances in visual generative models have enabled high-fidelity image editing guided by human instructions. However, these models often struggle with complex instructions involving combinatorial editing operations or inter-step dependencies. This difficulty stems from the limitations of two canonical paradigms: (1) single-turn editing, which attempts to apply all instructed edits in one pass, often fails to parse the complex instruction accurately and causes undesired edits; and (2) sequential editing can decompose the task into simpler steps but suffers from compounding errors introduced by the sequential execution, leading to low-fidelity results. To derive a robust solution for complex image editing, we examine editing behaviors of different paradigms under a unified in-context editing framework, and study how the benefits of sequential decomposition can be balanced against its error-accumulation drawbacks. We further develop a synthetic data pipeline that constructs editing tasks of varying instruction complexity, allowing us to curate a large-scale editing dataset with high-quality decomposed sequences. By finetuning on synthetic data, we discovered that with properly designed editing paradigms, sequential decomposition yields robust improvements even as task complexity increases. Furthermore, the decomposition skills learned from synthetic tasks can transfer to real images by co-training with real-world editing data, demonstrating the promise of sim-to-real generalization for tackling complex image editing across broader domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种鲁棒的序列分解方法，通过合成数据训练实现复杂图像编辑的模拟到真实泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像编辑模型难以处理包含组合操作或步骤间依赖的复杂指令，单次编辑和序列编辑各有缺陷。
analysis.problem: 如何平衡序列分解的步骤简化优势与误差累积问题，实现鲁棒的复杂图像编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单次编辑无法准确解析复杂指令，序列编辑虽能分解任务但误差累积导致保真度低。
analysis.method: 在统一上下文编辑框架下研究不同范式的编辑行为，开发合成数据流水线构建复杂编辑任务及高质量分解序列，通过微调使模型学习分解技能，并联合真实数据训练实现模拟到真实泛化。
contributions: 提出一种鲁棒的序列分解方法，有效平衡分解优势与误差累积。
开发合成数据流水线，构建大规模复杂编辑数据集。
验证合成任务中学到的分解技能可迁移到真实图像编辑。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖合成数据质量，可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
序列分解的误差累积可能仍存在于极端复杂任务中。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种鲁棒的序列分解方法，通过合成数据训练实现复杂图像编辑的模拟到真实泛化。

papers.title: An Elastic Shape Variational Autoencoder for Skeleton Pose Trajectories
papers.abstract: Deep generative models provide flexible frameworks for modeling complex, structured data such as images, videos, 3D objects, and texts. However, when applied to sequences of human skeletons, standard variational autoencoders (VAEs) often allocate substantial capacity to nuisance factors-such as camera orientation, subject scale, viewpoint, and execution speed-rather than the intrinsic geometry of shapes and their motion. We propose the Elastic Shape - Variational Autoencoder (ES-VAE), a geometry-aware generative model for skeletal trajectories that leverages the transported square-root velocity field (TSRVF) representation on Kendall's shape manifold. This representation inherently removes rigid translations, rotations, and global scaling of shapes, and temporal rate variability of sequences, isolating the underlying shape dynamics. The ES-VAE encoder maps skeletal sequences to a low-dimensional latent space incorporating the Riemannian logarithm map, while the decoder reconstructs sequences using the corresponding exponential map. We demonstrate the effectiveness of ES-VAE on two datasets. First, we analyze skeletal gait cycles to predict clinical mobility scores and classify subjects into healthy and post-stroke groups. Second, we evaluate action recognition on the NTU RGB+D dataset. Across both settings, ES-VAE consistently outperforms standard VAEs and a range of sequence modeling baselines, including temporal convolutional networks, transformers, and graph convolutional networks. More broadly, ES-VAE provides a principled framework for learning generative models of longitudinal data on pose shape manifolds, offering improved latent representation and downstream performance compared to existing deep learning approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出弹性形状变分自编码器（ES-VAE），利用形状流形上的TSRVF表示消除骨架序列中的刚性变换和速率变化，提升下游任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准VAE在处理人体骨架序列时，容易将模型容量浪费在相机视角、尺度、执行速度等干扰因素上，而非关注形状和运动的本质几何结构。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个几何感知的生成模型，能够从骨架姿态轨迹中分离出内在形状动态，并提升下游任务（如临床评分预测、动作识别）的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准VAE在骨架序列建模中易受刚性变换（平移、旋转、缩放）和时序速率变化干扰，导致潜在表示不能聚焦于形状几何。
analysis.method: 提出ES-VAE，使用Kendall形状流形上的TSRVF表示编码骨架序列，通过黎曼对数图映射到低维潜在空间，并用指数图重建序列。
contributions: 提出一种几何感知的生成模型ES-VAE，利用TSRVF表示消除骨架序列中的刚性变换和速率变化。
在步态分析和动作识别任务上，ES-VAE优于标准VAE及多种序列建模基线（如TCN、Transformer、GCN）。
analysis.experiments: 在两个数据集上评估：1) 步态周期分析，预测临床活动能力评分并分类健康/中风后群体；2) NTU RGB+D数据集上的动作识别。ES-VAE一致优于标准VAE和多种基线。
limitations: 可能依赖精确的骨架关键点检测，对噪声敏感。
TSRVF表示的计算复杂度可能较高，影响大规模数据训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弹性形状变分自编码器（ES-VAE），利用形状流形上的TSRVF表示消除骨架序列中的刚性变换和速率变化，提升下游任务性能。

papers.title: CATS: Curvature Aware Temporal Selection for efficient long video understanding
papers.abstract: Understanding long videos with multimodal large language models (MLLMs) requires selecting a small subset of informative frames under strict computational budgets, where exhaustive processing is infeasible and optimal selection is combinatorial. We propose CATS, a curvature-aware frame selection method that explicitly models the temporal geometry of query-frame relevance to identify salient events and their surrounding context. By leveraging temporal curvature to adapt selection density, CATS captures both abrupt transitions and gradually evolving content while suppressing redundant frames. Under a fixed backbone and frame budget, CATS consistently outperforms prior lightweight approaches such as AKS on LongVideoBench and VideoMME. While multi-stage methods such as MIRA achieve higher absolute accuracy, they incur substantial computational overhead; in contrast, CATS retains approximately 93-95% of MIRA's performance while requiring only 3-4% of its preprocessing cost, yielding a favorable efficiency-accuracy trade-off. Beyond answer accuracy, we evaluate description generation using an LLM-as-a-judge protocol, and the obtained results show that CATS produces more coherent and informative outputs, indicating improved grounding in visual evidence. These results position CATS as a computationally efficient and principled approach to long-video understanding.

analysis.tldr: CATS 利用时间曲率自适应选择关键帧，在极低预处理成本下实现长视频高效理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频理解中，多模态大模型需在严格计算预算下从大量帧中选取少量信息帧，穷举处理不可行且最优选择是组合优化问题，现有方法效率或精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定帧预算下高效选择长视频中信息量最大的帧，以平衡计算开销与理解精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出曲率感知的帧选择方法 CATS，通过显式建模查询-帧相关性的时间几何，利用时间曲率自适应调整选择密度，同时捕获突变和渐变内容并抑制冗余帧。
contributions: 提出基于时间曲率的帧选择方法，实现高效长视频理解。
在 LongVideoBench 和 VideoMME 上优于 AKS 等轻量方法，且以 3-4% 的预处理成本达到 MIRA 的 93-95% 性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 LongVideoBench 和 VideoMME 上评估问答精度，并使用 LLM-as-a-judge 评估描述生成质量，CATS 产生更连贯和信息丰富的输出。
limitations: 可能依赖查询相关性计算的质量。
未在更多样化的长视频任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CATS 利用时间曲率自适应选择关键帧，在极低预处理成本下实现长视频高效理解。

papers.title: Flame3D: Zero-shot Compositional Reasoning of 3D Scenes with Agentic Language Models
papers.abstract: 3D scene understanding spans reasoning about free space, object grounding, hypothetical object insertions, complex geometric relationships, and integrating all of these with external tools and data sources. Existing 3D understanding methods typically rely on large-scale 3D-language training or focus on object grounding and simple spatial relationships. We argue that the broad generalization that motivates 3D-language training can be achieved at inference time, without 3D-specific training. We propose Flame3D, a training-free framework that represents scenes as editable visual-textual 3D memories and exposes them to an off-the-shelf MLLM through composable spatial tools. Flame3D also lets the agent synthesize custom spatial programs at inference time, enabling open-ended reasoning over layouts, empty space, and objects not yet present in the scene. External data and corrections can be added to the memory without retraining. In addition to showing competitive performance to finetuned 3D-LMM methods on ScanQA, we study multi-hop 3D reasoning capabilities of Flame3D by evaluating it on a curated compositional spatial-reasoning benchmark, Compose3D. We find that fixed tools fall short and that the agent's ability to synthesize spatial operations at inference time is essential. These results invite the question: should future progress in 3D scene understanding focus on richer scene memories and expressive compositional abstractions?

analysis.tldr: Flame3D 通过可编辑的视觉-文本 3D 记忆和可组合空间工具，实现无需训练的零样本 3D 场景组合推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 3D 场景理解方法依赖大规模 3D-语言训练或仅关注物体定位与简单空间关系，缺乏对复杂几何关系、假设物体插入及外部工具集成的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行 3D 特定训练的情况下，实现 3D 场景的零样本组合推理，包括自由空间、物体定位、假设插入及复杂空间关系。
