It is designed to enable the research of novel architectures which incorporate joint modeling and target-aware representations, paving the way for the development of novel Multimodal Tabular Foundation Models.

analysis.tldr: 提出 MulTaBench 基准，证明在表格学习中针对任务微调非结构化模态嵌入能提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表格基础模型不支持文本和图像等非结构化模态，依赖冻结的预训练嵌入，而现有多模态表格基准仅关注模态共现，导致高方差并掩盖任务特定微调的收益。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能评估任务特定嵌入微调收益的多模态表格学习基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含40个数据集（图像-表格和文本-表格各20个）的基准MulTaBench，聚焦模态提供互补预测信号的任务，并采用目标感知表示（Target-Aware Representations）进行微调。
contributions: 提出MulTaBench，目前最大的图像-表格基准，涵盖医疗和电商等关键领域。
实验证明目标感知表示微调在文本和图像模态、多种表格学习器、编码器规模和嵌入维度上均能提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在40个数据集上评估，显示目标感知表示微调带来性能提升，且泛化到多种设置。
limitations: 基准仅包含图像和文本两种非结构化模态，未涉及音频、视频等。
未提供具体性能提升数值或与现有方法的详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 MulTaBench 基准，证明在表格学习中针对任务微调非结构化模态嵌入能提升性能。

papers.title: Set-Based Groupwise Registration for Variable-Length, Variable-Contrast Cardiac MRI
papers.abstract: Quantitative cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) enables non-invasive myocardial tissue characterization but relies on robust motion correction within these variable-length, variable-contrast image sequences. Groupwise registration, which simultaneously aligns all images, has shown greater robustness than pairwise registration for motion correction. However, current deep-learning-based groupwise registration methods cannot generalize across MRI sequences: the architecture typically encodes input data as a fixed-length channel stack, which rigidly couples network design to protocol-specific sequence length, input ordering, and contrast dynamics. At inference time, any change in imaging protocols will render the network unusable. In this work, we introduce \emph{\AnyTwoReg}, a new set-based groupwise registration framework that takes a quantitative MRI sequence as an unordered set. This set formulation fundamentally decouples network design from sequence length and input ordering. By utilizing a shared encoder and correlation-guided feature aggregation, \emph{\AnyTwoReg} constructs a permutation-invariant canonical reference for registration, and learns a permutation-equivariant mapping from images to deformation fields. Additionally, we extract contrast-insensitive image features from an existing foundation model to handle extreme contrast variations. Trained exclusively on a single public $T_1$ mapping dataset (STONE, sequence length $L=11$), \AnyTwoReg generalizes to two unseen quantitative MRI datasets (MOLLI, ASL) with variable lengths ($L \in [11, 60]$) and different contrast dynamics. It achieves strong cross-protocol generalization in a zero-shot manner, and consistently improves downstream quantitative mapping quality. Notably, while designed for quantitative MRI sequences, our framework is directly applicable to Cine MRI sequences for inter-cardiac-phase registration.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于集合的群组配准框架AnyTwoReg，实现变长、变对比心脏MRI的零样本跨协议泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 定量心脏MRI需要鲁棒的运动校正，但现有深度学习方法因固定长度通道堆叠而无法泛化到不同成像协议，限制了临床应用。
analysis.problem: 解决深度学习群组配准方法无法处理变长、变对比MRI序列的跨协议泛化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将MRI序列视为无序集合，利用共享编码器和相关性引导特征聚合构建置换不变参考，并学习置换等变映射；结合基础模型提取对比不敏感特征。
contributions: 提出基于集合的群组配准框架，解耦网络设计与序列长度和输入顺序。
实现零样本跨协议泛化，在变长、变对比数据集上提升定量映射质量。
analysis.experiments: 在STONE数据集训练，零样本泛化到MOLLI和ASL数据集，序列长度11-60，对比动态不同，并适用于Cine MRI。
limitations: 可能依赖基础模型的特征质量。
未在更多协议或病理数据上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于集合的群组配准框架AnyTwoReg，实现变长、变对比心脏MRI的零样本跨协议泛化。

papers.title: Beyond Spatial Compression: Interface-Centric Generative States for Open-World 3D Structure
papers.abstract: Current 3D tokenizers largely treat representation as spatial compression: compact codes reconstruct surface geometry, but leave component ownership and attachment validity implicit. In open-world assets with intersecting components, noisy topology, and weak canonical structure, this creates a representation mismatch: local shape, component identity, and assembly relations become entangled in a latent stream and are not natively addressable during decoding. We formulate an alternative view, interface-centric generative states, in which tokenization constructs an operational state rather than a passive compressed code. The state exposes local geometry, component ownership, and attachment validity as variables that can be queried, constrained, and repaired during decoding. We instantiate this formulation with Component-Conditioned Canonical Local Tokens (C2LT-3D), factorizing representation into canonical local geometry, partition-conditioned context, and relational seam variables. Each factor targets a distinct failure mode of compression-centric tokens: pose leakage, cross-component interference, or invalid local attachment. This exposed state supports attachment validation, latent structural repair, targeted intervention, and constrained serialization without a separate post-hoc structure recovery module. Trained on single-object CAD models and evaluated zero-shot on open-world multi-component assets, C2LT-3D improves structural robustness and shows that its latent variables remain actionable under adversarial attachment settings. These results suggest that open-world 3D generative representations should be evaluated not only by reconstruction fidelity, but by whether their discrete states remain operational for assembly-level structural reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出接口中心生成状态范式，通过分解几何、部件归属与连接变量提升开放世界3D结构鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D分词器将表示视为空间压缩，隐式编码部件归属与连接关系，导致开放世界多部件资产中局部形状、部件身份与装配关系纠缠，解码时无法原生寻址。
analysis.problem: 解决压缩中心分词器在开放世界3D结构中因表示不匹配导致的姿态泄露、跨部件干扰和无效局部连接等失效模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出压缩中心分词器存在三种典型失效模式：姿态泄露、跨部件干扰和无效局部连接，且这些变量在潜在流中纠缠不可直接操作。
analysis.method: 提出C2LT-3D，将表示分解为规范局部几何、分区条件上下文和关系接缝变量，每个因子针对特定失效模式，支持连接验证、结构修复、定向干预和约束序列化。
contributions: 提出接口中心生成状态范式，将分词器构建为可查询、约束和修复的操作状态而非被动压缩码。
实例化C2LT-3D，通过分解表示因子化解决压缩中心分词器的三种失效模式。
在单对象CAD模型训练，零样本评估开放世界多部件资产，验证结构鲁棒性和潜在变量的可操作性。
analysis.experiments: 在单对象CAD模型上训练，零样本评估开放世界多部件资产，并在对抗性连接设置下测试潜在变量的可操作性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅基于CAD模型训练，对真实扫描或非流形几何的泛化能力未知。
未讨论计算效率或与现有生成框架的集成成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出接口中心生成状态范式，通过分解几何、部件归属与连接变量提升开放世界3D结构鲁棒性。

papers.title: Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium Technical Report
papers.abstract: We introduce Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium, a 123B-parameter natively multimodal and multilingual foundation model, adapted to regional languages and the Singapore context. Developed as a sovereign AI asset, it demonstrates that deep domain adaptation can be achieved with minimal degradation to broad-spectrum intelligence and alignment. Continued pretraining was performed on Mistral Medium 3.1 using a localized 1-trillion tokens multimodal corpus, followed by a 250-billion tokens long-context extension phase. Subsequent post-training incorporated a novel human-annotated Singapore multimodal dataset and curated textual corpus on Singapore culture, knowledge, and legislation, totaling 22-billion tokens. An additional 5 billion tokens of model alignment was performed through Online Direct Preference Optimization. Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium achieves state-of-the-art performance for its size on Singapore multimodal, legal, and government policy benchmarks while remaining globally competitive on general multimodal intelligence, multilingual, and STEM benchmarks. We also introduce a novel evaluation suite encompassing localized knowledge benchmarks and an institutionally aligned model behavior and safety framework. We report the data curation principles, training methodology, and highlight benchmark and inference performance.

analysis.tldr: Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium 是一个123B参数的多模态多语言基础模型，通过领域自适应在保持通用智能的同时，在新加坡本地化基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大型多模态模型通常缺乏对特定区域语言和文化的深度适配，导致在本地化任务中表现不佳。开发主权AI资产需要在不显著牺牲通用能力的前提下实现领域自适应。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著退化通用多模态智能和对齐能力的前提下，对大型基础模型进行深度区域语言和文化领域自适应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在Mistral Medium 3.1基础上进行持续预训练（1万亿token本地化多模态语料），接着进行2500亿token的长上下文扩展，然后使用22亿token的新加坡多模态数据集和文本语料进行后训练，最后通过在线直接偏好优化（ODPO）进行5亿token的对齐。
contributions: 提出Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium，一个123B参数的多模态多语言基础模型，在新加坡本地化基准上达到SOTA。
引入包含本地化知识基准和机构对齐行为安全框架的新型评估套件。
analysis.experiments: 在新加坡多模态、法律和政府政策基准上达到SOTA，同时在通用多模态智能、多语言和STEM基准上保持全球竞争力。
limitations: 模型规模较大（123B参数），推理成本高。
领域自适应主要针对新加坡语境，可能不直接适用于其他区域。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium 是一个123B参数的多模态多语言基础模型，通过领域自适应在保持通用智能的同时，在新加坡本地化基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Nano-U: Efficient Terrain Segmentation for Tiny Robot Navigation
papers.abstract: Terrain segmentation is a fundamental capability for autonomous mobile robots operating in unstructured outdoor environments. However, state-of-the-art models are incompatible with the memory and compute constraints typical of microcontrollers, limiting scalable deployment in small robotics platforms. To address this gap, we develop a complete framework for robust binary terrain segmentation on a low-cost microcontroller. At the core of our approach we design Nano-U, a highly compact binary segmentation network with a few thousand parameters. To compensate for the network's minimal capacity, we train Nano-U via Quantization-Aware Distillation (QAD), combining knowledge distillation and quantization-aware training. This allows the final quantized model to achieve excellent results on the Botanic Garden dataset and to perform very well on TinyAgri, a custom agricultural field dataset with more challenging scenes. We deploy the quantized Nano-U on a commodity microcontroller by extending MicroFlow, a compiler-based inference engine for TinyML implemented in Rust. By eliminating interpreter overhead and dynamic memory allocation, the quantized model executes on an ESP32-S3 with a minimal memory footprint and low latency. This compiler-based execution demonstrates a viable and energy-efficient solution for perception on low-cost robotic platforms.

analysis.tldr: 提出Nano-U超紧凑分割网络，结合量化感知蒸馏和编译器推理，在低成本微控制器上实现高效地形分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有最先进的地形分割模型无法在微控制器的内存和计算约束下运行，限制了小型机器人平台的规模化部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源受限的微控制器上实现鲁棒的二进制地形分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计仅有数千参数的超紧凑分割网络Nano-U，通过量化感知蒸馏（QAD）结合知识蒸馏和量化感知训练来补偿网络容量不足，并扩展MicroFlow编译器引擎实现量化模型的低延迟部署。
contributions: 提出Nano-U，一种高度紧凑的二进制分割网络，参数仅数千。
提出量化感知蒸馏（QAD）训练方法，提升小模型性能。
扩展MicroFlow编译器引擎，实现量化模型在ESP32-S3上的高效执行。
analysis.experiments: 在Botanic Garden数据集和自定义农业数据集TinyAgri上评估，量化模型表现优异。
limitations: 仅针对二进制地形分割，未扩展到多类分割。
依赖特定微控制器平台，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Nano-U超紧凑分割网络，结合量化感知蒸馏和编译器推理，在低成本微控制器上实现高效地形分割。

papers.title: CFSPMNet: Cross-subject Fourier-guided Spatial-Patch Mamba Network for EEG Motor Imagery Decoding in Stroke Patients
papers.abstract: Motor imagery electroencephalography (MI-EEG) decoding offers a non-invasive route for post-stroke rehabilitation, but cross-patient use remains difficult because pathological neural reorganization changes task-related EEG dynamics, aperiodic activity, local excitability, cross-regional coordination, and trial-level brain-state context. This makes source-learned MI representations unreliable for unseen patients. To address this problem, we propose CFSPMNet, a cross-patient adaptation framework that models post-stroke MI-EEG as latent neural-state organization. CFSPMNet combines a Fourier-Reorganized State Mamba Network (FRSM) with Shared-Private Prototype Matching (SPPM). FRSM represents each trial as a latent physiological token sequence, reorganizes token states in the Fourier domain, and uses Fourier-derived trial context to guide Mamba state-space propagation. SPPM improves target pseudo-label updating by combining semantic confidence with shared-private physiological consistency, filtering confident but physiologically inconsistent target predictions. Leave-one-subject-out experiments on two stroke MI-EEG datasets show that CFSPMNet outperforms representative CNN-, Transformer-, Mamba-, and adaptation-based baselines, achieving average accuracies of 68.23% on XW-Stroke and 73.33% on 2019-Stroke, with gains of 5.63 and 8.25 percentage points over the strongest competitors. Ablation, sensitivity, feature-alignment, pseudo-label selection, and neurophysiological visualization analyses further support the roles of Fourier-domain token-state reorganization and calibrated pseudo-label updating. These results suggest that latent neural-state modeling can improve rehabilitation-oriented cross-patient BCI decoding. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出CFSPMNet，通过傅里叶域状态重组和共享-私有原型匹配，提升脑卒中患者运动想象脑电解码的跨患者泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑卒中患者的运动想象脑电解码在跨患者应用中因病理神经重组导致任务相关动态、非周期活动等变化，使源域学习到的表示不可靠，亟需适应框架。
analysis.problem: 解决跨患者运动想象脑电解码中因病理神经重组导致的源域表示不可靠问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 病理神经重组改变了任务相关EEG动态、非周期活动、局部兴奋性、跨区域协调和试次级脑状态上下文，导致源域学习到的MI表示对未见患者不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出CFSPMNet，包含傅里叶重组状态Mamba网络（FRSM）和共享-私有原型匹配（SPPM）；FRSM将试次表示为潜在生理令牌序列，在傅里叶域重组令牌状态并用傅里叶导出的试次上下文引导Mamba状态传播；SPPM结合语义置信度和共享-私有生理一致性改进目标伪标签更新。
contributions: 提出跨患者适应框架CFSPMNet，结合傅里叶域状态重组和共享-私有原型匹配。
在两个卒中MI-EEG数据集上超越多种基线，平均准确率分别达68.23%和73.33%。
analysis.experiments: 在XW-Stroke和2019-Stroke两个数据集上进行留一被试实验，与CNN、Transformer、Mamba及基于适应的基线对比，并进行了消融、敏感性、特征对齐、伪标签选择和神经生理可视化分析。
limitations: 仅在两个卒中数据集上验证，泛化性需更多数据支持。
方法依赖伪标签质量，可能受噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CFSPMNet，通过傅里叶域状态重组和共享-私有原型匹配，提升脑卒中患者运动想象脑电解码的跨患者泛化能力。

papers.title: Measurement-Adapted Eigentask Representations for Photon-Limited Optical Readout
papers.abstract: Optical readout in low-light imaging is fundamentally limited by measurement noise, including photon shot noise, detector noise, and quantization error. In this regime, downstream inference depends not only on the optical front end, but also on how noisy high-dimensional sensor measurements are represented before classification or decision-making. Here we show that eigentasks provide a measurement-adapted representation for optical sensor outputs by ordering readout features according to their resolvability under noise. Using experimental data from a lens-based optical imaging system and a reanalysis of published data from a single-photon-detection neural network, we find that eigentask representations frequently outperform standard baselines including principal component analysis and filtering-based compression. The advantage is most pronounced in photon-limited, few-shot, and higher-difficulty classification regimes. In few-shot MPEG-7 classification, for example, the advantage over other methods reaches about 10 percentage points as the number of classes increases. In these settings, eigentasks yield more informative low-dimensional features and improve sample-efficient downstream learning. These results identify measurement-adapted representation as a promising strategy for optical inference when photon budget, acquisition time, and task complexity are constrained.

analysis.tldr: 提出测量自适应本征任务表示，在光子受限光学读出中优于PCA等基线方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光成像中测量噪声（光子散粒噪声、探测器噪声、量化误差）严重限制下游推理性能，传统表示方法（如PCA）未考虑噪声对特征可分辨性的影响。
analysis.problem: 如何在光子受限条件下，从噪声高维传感器测量中提取信息丰富的低维表示以提升下游分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 本征任务表示根据噪声下的可分辨性排序读出特征，在光子受限、少样本和高难度分类场景中优势显著，例如在少样本MPEG-7分类中，随类别数增加，准确率提升约10个百分点。
analysis.method: 基于本征任务（eigentasks）的测量自适应表示方法，通过噪声协方差矩阵和任务相关矩阵的特征分解，按特征的可分辨性排序并选择前k个特征。
contributions: 提出测量自适应本征任务表示，用于光子受限光学读出中的特征提取。
在实验数据和公开数据集上验证该方法在少样本、高难度分类中优于PCA和滤波压缩等基线。
analysis.experiments: 使用透镜光学成像系统的实验数据和单光子探测神经网络的公开数据，在MPEG-7等数据集上进行分类任务，比较了本征任务表示与PCA、滤波压缩等方法的性能。
limitations: 方法依赖于噪声协方差和任务相关矩阵的估计，可能受限于数据量。
仅针对分类任务验证，其他下游任务（如回归）未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出测量自适应本征任务表示，在光子受限光学读出中优于PCA等基线方法。

papers.title: StereoPolicy: Improving Robotic Manipulation Policies via Stereo Perception
papers.abstract: Recent advances in robot imitation learning have yielded powerful visuomotor policies capable of manipulating a wide variety of objects directly from monocular visual inputs. However, monocular observations inherently lack reliable depth cues and spatial awareness, which are critical for precise manipulation in cluttered or geometrically complex scenes. To address this limitation, we introduce StereoPolicy, a new visuomotor policy learning framework that directly leverages synchronized stereo image pairs to strengthen geometric reasoning, without requiring explicit 3D reconstruction or camera calibration. StereoPolicy employs pretrained 2D vision encoders to process each image independently and fuses the resulting representations through a Stereo Transformer. This design implicitly captures spatial correspondence and disparity cues. The framework integrates seamlessly with diffusion-based and pretrained vision-language-action (VLA) policies, delivering consistent improvements over RGB, RGB-D, point cloud, and multi-view baselines across three simulation benchmarks: RoboMimic, RoboCasa, and OmniGibson. We further validate StereoPolicy on real-robot experiments spanning both tabletop and bimanual mobile manipulation settings. Our results underscore stereo vision as a scalable and robust modality that bridges 2D pretrained representations with 3D geometric understanding for robotic manipulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出 StereoPolicy 框架，利用立体图像对提升机器人操作策略的几何推理能力，无需显式 3D 重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 单目视觉缺乏可靠深度和空间感知，难以在杂乱或几何复杂场景中实现精确操作，而现有方法依赖显式 3D 重建或校准，限制了实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖显式 3D 重建或相机标定的情况下，利用立体视觉增强机器人操作策略的几何推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单目观测缺乏可靠深度线索和空间感知，导致在杂乱或几何复杂场景中操作精度不足。
analysis.method: 使用预训练 2D 视觉编码器独立处理立体图像对，通过 Stereo Transformer 融合表征，隐式捕获空间对应和视差线索，并集成到扩散策略和 VLA 策略中。
contributions: 提出 StereoPolicy 框架，利用立体图像对提升操作策略的几何推理，无需显式 3D 重建或相机标定。
在三个仿真基准和真实机器人实验中验证了立体视觉相比 RGB、RGB-D、点云和多视图基线的显著改进。
analysis.experiments: 在 RoboMimic、RoboCasa、OmniGibson 三个仿真基准以及桌面和双臂移动操作的真实机器人实验中进行验证。
limitations: 依赖同步立体图像对，可能增加硬件成本。
Stereo Transformer 的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据中的场景多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 StereoPolicy 框架，利用立体图像对提升机器人操作策略的几何推理能力，无需显式 3D 重建。

papers.title: HiDrive: A Closed-Loop Benchmark for High-Level Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving has witnessed rapid progress, yet existing benchmarks are increasingly saturated, with state-of-the-art models achieving near-perfect scores on widely used open-loop and closed-loop benchmarks. This saturation does not mean that the problem has been solved; instead, it reveals that current benchmarks remain limited in scenario diversity, object variety, and the breadth of driving capabilities they evaluate. In particular, they lack sufficient long-tail scenarios involving rare but safety-critical objects and fail to assess advanced decision-making such as legal compliance, ethical reasoning, and emergency response. To address these gaps, we propose HiDrive, a new closed-loop benchmark for end-to-end autonomous driving that emphasizes long-tail scenarios and a richer evaluation of driving capabilities. HiDrive introduces a diverse set of rare objects and uncommon traffic situations, and expands evaluation from basic driving skills to more advanced capabilities, including rule compliance, moral reasoning, and context-dependent emergency maneuvers. Correspondingly, we extend previous collision-avoidance-centered metrics into a comprehensive evaluation system that encompasses collision and braking, traffic-rule compliance, and moral-reasoning indicators. Built on a more advanced physics engine, HiDrive provides physically realistic lighting and high-fidelity visual rendering, offering a more challenging and realistic testbed for assessing whether autonomous driving systems can handle the complexity of real-world deployment. The HiDrive software, source code, digital assets, and documentation are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: HiDrive 是一个面向高级自动驾驶的闭环基准测试，专注于长尾场景和更丰富的驾驶能力评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动驾驶基准测试趋于饱和，场景多样性、对象多样性和评估的驾驶能力广度有限，缺乏长尾场景和高级决策评估。
analysis.problem: 现有基准测试无法充分评估自动驾驶系统在长尾场景和高级驾驶能力（如规则遵守、道德推理、应急操作）上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基准测试饱和，但问题未解决，表明评估体系存在局限性。
analysis.method: 提出 HiDrive 闭环基准测试，包含多样化的罕见对象和交通场景，扩展评估指标涵盖碰撞、规则遵守和道德推理，基于先进物理引擎提供高保真渲染。
contributions: 引入包含长尾场景和罕见对象的闭环基准测试 HiDrive。
扩展评估体系，从基本驾驶技能到高级能力（规则遵守、道德推理、应急操作）。
提供开源软件、源代码、数字资产和文档。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有长尾场景。
评估指标可能仍无法完全反映真实世界复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HiDrive 是一个面向高级自动驾驶的闭环基准测试，专注于长尾场景和更丰富的驾驶能力评估。

papers.title: JODA: Composable Joint Dynamics for Articulated Objects
papers.abstract: Articulated objects used in simulation and embodied AI are typically specified by geometry and kinematic structure, but lack the fine-grained dynamical effects that govern realistic mechanical behavior, such as frictional holding, detents, soft closing, and snap latching. Existing approaches either ignore the detailed structure of dynamics entirely, or use simple models with limited expressiveness. We introduce JODA, a framework for generating joint-level dynamics as a structured three-channel field over the joint degree of freedom, capturing conservative forces, dry friction, and damping. Instantiated using shape-constrained piecewise cubic interpolation (PCHIP), this formulation defines a compact and expressive function space that is both interpretable and compatible with differentiable simulation. Building on this representation, we develop methods for inferring and refining joint dynamics from multimodal inputs. Given visual observations and joint context, a vision-language model proposes structured dynamical primitives, which are composed into a unified dynamics field. The resulting representation supports both direct manipulation and gradient-based refinement. We demonstrate that JODA enables plausible and controllable modeling of diverse joint behaviors, providing a unified interface for inference, editing, and optimization. Code and example assets with their generated profiles will be released upon publication.

analysis.tldr: JODA 通过结构化三通道场和 VLM 推理，为铰接物体生成可组合、可微分的关节动力学模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有仿真和具身 AI 中的铰接物体缺乏细粒度动力学效果（如摩擦、软关闭等），且现有方法要么忽略动力学细节，要么使用表达能力有限的简单模型。
analysis.problem: 如何为铰接物体生成可解释、可微分且支持多模态输入推断的关节级动力学模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: JODA 框架：将关节动力学表示为保守力、干摩擦和阻尼的三通道场，使用 PCHIP 插值实现紧凑表达；通过 VLM 从视觉和关节上下文提出结构化动力学基元，组合成统一动力学场，支持直接操作和梯度优化。
contributions: 提出 JODA 框架，用三通道场和 PCHIP 插值生成可解释、可微分的关节动力学模型。
开发从多模态输入（视觉+关节上下文）推断和优化动力学的方法，结合 VLM 基元提议和梯度细化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 VLM 的推理质量，对复杂场景泛化性待验证。
三通道场表示可能无法覆盖所有非线性动力学行为。
