Crucially, these approaches are often hindered by static training data which inevitably deviate from model's dynamic, on-policy reasoning traces, resulting in model hardly covering its vast generation space and learning to recover from its own failures. To bridge this gap, we propose Self-ReSET, a pure reinforcement learning framework designed to equip LRMs with the intrinsic capacity to recover from their own safety error trajectories, which are subsequently reused as an initial state for reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments across various LRMs and benchmarks demonstrate that Self-ReSET significantly enhances robustness against adversarial attacks especially out-of-distribution (OOD) jailbreak prompts while maintaining general utility, along with efficient data utilization. Further analysis reveals that our method effectively fosters self-recovery patterns, enabling models to better identify and recover from unsafe intermediate error states back to benign paths. Our codes and data are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: Self-ReSET 通过纯强化学习框架让大推理模型学会从自身不安全推理轨迹中自我恢复，显著提升对抗攻击鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大推理模型在通用领域有自我纠错能力，但在对抗攻击下难以从不安全推理轨迹中恢复；现有对齐方法依赖静态专家数据，无法覆盖模型动态生成空间，导致模型难以从自身失败中学习。
analysis.problem: 如何让大推理模型具备从自身不安全推理轨迹中自我恢复的内在能力，以提升对抗攻击鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态训练数据与模型动态推理轨迹不匹配，导致模型难以覆盖其庞大生成空间并学习从自身失败中恢复。
analysis.method: 提出 Self-ReSET，一个纯强化学习框架，将模型自身的不安全错误轨迹作为初始状态进行强化学习，使模型学会自我恢复。
contributions: 提出 Self-ReSET 框架，首次利用纯强化学习让大推理模型从自身不安全推理轨迹中自我恢复。
在多种大推理模型和基准上验证，显著提升对抗攻击鲁棒性尤其是 OOD jailbreak 提示，同时保持通用能力，数据利用高效。
analysis.experiments: 在多种大推理模型和基准上进行实验，结果显示 Self-ReSET 显著增强对抗攻击鲁棒性，尤其对 OOD jailbreak 提示，同时保持通用效用，数据利用高效。
limitations: 可能依赖初始不安全轨迹的质量和多样性。
未讨论在非对抗场景下的自我恢复能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Self-ReSET 通过纯强化学习框架让大推理模型学会从自身不安全推理轨迹中自我恢复，显著提升对抗攻击鲁棒性。

papers.title: PnP-Corrector: A Universal Correction Framework for Coupled Spatiotemporal Forecasting
papers.abstract: Coupled spatiotemporal forecasting is important for predicting the future evolution of multiple interacting dynamical systems, such as in climate models. However, existing methods are severely constrained by the persistent bottleneck of compounding errors. In coupled systems, errors from each subsystem simulator propagate and amplify one another, a phenomenon we term Reciprocal Error Amplification, leading to a rapid collapse of long-range predictions. To address this challenge, we propose a universal framework called PnP-Corrector (Plug-and-Play Corrector). The core idea of our framework is to decouple the physical simulation from the error correction process: it freezes pre-trained physics simulation engines and exclusively trains a correction agent to proactively counteract the systematic biases emerging from the coupled system. Furthermore, we design an efficient predictive model architecture, DSLCast, to serve as the backbone of this framework. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly enhances the long-term stability and accuracy of coupled forecasting systems. For instance, in the challenging task of a 300-day global ocean-atmosphere coupled forecast, our PnP-Corrector framework reduces the prediction error of the baseline model by 29% and surpasses state-of-the-art models on several key metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出PnP-Corrector框架，通过解耦物理模拟与误差校正，显著提升耦合时空预测的长期稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 耦合时空预测中，现有方法受限于复合误差瓶颈，子系统误差相互放大导致长期预测快速崩溃，亟需一种通用校正框架。
analysis.problem: 解决耦合动力系统中误差递归放大导致的长期预测不准确问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到耦合系统中各子系统模拟器的误差会相互传播和放大，称为互惠误差放大，导致长期预测迅速失效。
analysis.method: 提出PnP-Corrector框架，冻结预训练物理模拟引擎，仅训练校正代理主动抵消耦合系统产生的系统性偏差；并设计高效预测模型DSLCast作为骨干。
contributions: 提出PnP-Corrector通用框架，解耦物理模拟与误差校正，可即插即用于现有模型。
设计DSLCast高效预测架构，作为校正框架骨干。
在300天全球海洋-大气耦合预测任务中，将基线模型误差降低29%，超越多个SOTA模型。
analysis.experiments: 在300天全球海洋-大气耦合预测任务上评估，PnP-Corrector将基线模型预测误差降低29%，并在多个关键指标上超越现有最优模型。
limitations: 框架依赖预训练物理模拟引擎，可能不适用于无可用预训练模型的场景。
校正代理的训练需要耦合系统数据，数据获取成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PnP-Corrector框架，通过解耦物理模拟与误差校正，显著提升耦合时空预测的长期稳定性。

papers.title: Internalizing Safety Understanding in Large Reasoning Models via Verification
papers.abstract: While explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) empowers large reasoning models (LRMs), it enables the generation of riskier final answers. Current alignment paradigms primarily rely on externally enforced compliance, optimizing models to detect malicious prompts rather than evaluating the safety of their own outputs. We argue that this approach remains largely behavioral: our empirical analysis reveals that ostensibly aligned models lack intrinsic safety understanding, often failing to verify their own response safety and remaining vulnerable to adversarial jailbreaks. To address this fundamental limitation, we propose Safety Internal (SInternal), a framework that internalizes safety specifications by training LRMs exclusively on safety verification tasks to critique their own generated answers using expert reasoning trajectories. We demonstrate that learning to verify induces a strong generalization for response safety, significantly enhancing robustness against out-of-domain jailbreaks. Furthermore, when combined with reinforcement learning, SInternal serves as a superior initialization compared to standard supervised fine-tuning, suggesting that internalizing safety understanding creates a more robust foundation for alignment than merely mimicking safe behaviors. Our codes are available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 通过安全验证任务训练大型推理模型内化安全理解，显著提升对越狱攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对齐方法主要依赖外部强制合规，优化模型检测恶意提示而非评估自身输出安全性，导致模型缺乏内在安全理解，易受对抗性越狱攻击。
analysis.problem: 大型推理模型在显式思维链推理中可能生成风险答案，但缺乏对自身输出安全性的验证能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实证分析表明，表面对齐的模型缺乏内在安全理解，无法验证自身响应安全性，且对越狱攻击脆弱。
analysis.method: 提出SInternal框架，通过安全验证任务训练LRM，使用专家推理轨迹批评自身生成答案，内化安全规范。
contributions: 揭示现有对齐方法仅实现行为级安全，缺乏内在安全理解。
提出SInternal框架，通过安全验证训练内化安全理解，显著提升对域外越狱的鲁棒性。
证明SInternal作为强化学习初始化优于标准监督微调，为对齐提供更稳健基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量专家推理轨迹，获取成本高。
安全验证任务可能无法覆盖所有攻击类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过安全验证任务训练大型推理模型内化安全理解，显著提升对越狱攻击的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Forge: Quality-Aware Reinforcement Learning for NP-Hard Optimization in LLMs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success on reasoning benchmarks through Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), excelling at tasks such as math, coding, logic, and puzzles. However, existing benchmarks evaluate only correctness, while overlooking optimality, namely the ability to find the best solutions under constraints. We propose OPT-BENCH, the first comprehensive framework for training and evaluating LLMs on NP-hard optimization problems through quality-aware RLVR. OPT-BENCH provides three key components: a scalable training infrastructure with instance generators, quality verifiers, and optimal baselines across 10 tasks; a rigorous benchmark with 1,000 instances evaluating both feasibility, measured by Success Rate, and quality, measured by Quality Ratio; and quality-aware rewards that enable continuous improvement beyond binary correctness. Training on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M with 15K examples achieves 93.1% SR and 46.6% QR, significantly outperforming GPT-4o, which achieves 29.6% SR and 14.6% QR. Beyond optimization, training on OPT-BENCH transfers to diverse tasks, including mathematics (+2.2%), logic (+1.2%), knowledge (+4.1%), and instruction following (+6.1%). Our analysis reveals that quality-aware rewards improve solutions by 28.8% over binary rewards, and that task diversity drives generalization more than data quantity, offering insights into RLVR scaling for complex reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出OPT-BENCH框架，通过质量感知强化学习提升LLM在NP难优化问题上的最优性，显著超越GPT-4o。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM推理基准仅评估正确性，忽略最优性，而许多现实问题需要在约束下找到最佳解，现有方法无法满足这一需求。
analysis.problem: LLM在NP难优化问题中缺乏寻找最优解的能力，现有RLVR方法仅使用二元正确性奖励，无法引导模型持续改进解的质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OPT-BENCH框架，包含可扩展的训练基础设施（实例生成器、质量验证器、最优基线）、1000实例基准（评估成功率和质量比）以及质量感知奖励函数，支持超越二元正确性的连续改进。
contributions: 首个针对NP难优化问题的LLM训练与评估框架OPT-BENCH，包含10个任务的质量感知RLVR基础设施。
质量感知奖励函数相比二元奖励提升28.8%的解质量，且任务多样性比数据量更能驱动泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M上使用15K示例训练，达到93.1%成功率和46.6%质量比，显著优于GPT-4o（29.6%成功率、14.6%质量比）；训练后迁移到数学、逻辑、知识、指令遵循等任务均有提升。
limitations: 仅评估了7B规模模型，更大模型效果未知。
任务多样性驱动泛化的结论可能受限于所选任务范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OPT-BENCH框架，通过质量感知强化学习提升LLM在NP难优化问题上的最优性，显著超越GPT-4o。

papers.title: OPT-BENCH: Evaluating the Iterative Self-Optimization of LLM Agents in Large-Scale Search Spaces
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in reasoning and tool use. However, the fundamental cognitive faculties essential for problem solving, including perception, reasoning, and memory, remain the stable core of intelligence. Unlike memorizing specific patterns, humans succeed in novel environments by applying these intrinsic faculties to adapt and optimize. Yet, whether LLMs possess this essential capacity, namely the ability to continuously refine solutions in response to dynamic environmental feedback, remains underexplored. To address this challenge, we introduce OPT-BENCH, a benchmark for evaluating self-improvement capabilities in large-scale search spaces. By combining 20 machine learning tasks with 10 classic NP-hard problems, OPT-BENCH provides a rigorous setting to assess whether agents can adapt through intrinsic self-reflection rather than rote tool application. We further propose OPT-Agent, a framework that emulates human-like cognitive adaptation. It operates through a general perception, memory, and reasoning loop, iteratively refining solutions based on environmental feedback. Through extensive experiments on 19 LLMs from 7 model families, including reasoning models, general models, and open-source models ranging from 3B to 235B parameters, we demonstrate that stronger models are more effective at leveraging feedback signals for self-improvement. However, this upper-bound adaptability remains fundamentally constrained by the models' base capacity, and even the most advanced LLMs still fall short of human expert performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出OPT-BENCH基准和OPT-Agent框架，评估LLM Agent在大型搜索空间中通过自我反思迭代优化的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多关注LLM的推理和工具使用能力，但对其在动态环境中通过自我反思持续优化解决方案的能力缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM Agent在大型搜索空间中基于环境反馈进行自我优化的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 更强的模型更善于利用反馈信号进行自我改进，但这种适应性受限于模型的基础能力，且最先进的LLM仍不及人类专家。
analysis.method: 构建OPT-BENCH基准（20个ML任务+10个NP难问题），提出OPT-Agent框架（感知-记忆-推理循环，迭代优化）。
contributions: 提出OPT-BENCH基准，用于评估LLM Agent在大型搜索空间中的自我优化能力。
提出OPT-Agent框架，模拟人类认知适应过程。
在19个LLM上进行实验，揭示模型自我优化能力与基础能力的关系。
analysis.experiments: 在19个LLM（7个模型家族，3B-235B参数）上进行实验，包括推理模型、通用模型和开源模型。
limitations: 基准任务可能无法完全覆盖真实世界的动态环境。
OPT-Agent框架的通用性可能受限于特定任务类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OPT-BENCH基准和OPT-Agent框架，评估LLM Agent在大型搜索空间中通过自我反思迭代优化的能力。

papers.title: Ace-Skill: Bootstrapping Multimodal Agents with Prioritized and Clustered Evolution
papers.abstract: Self-evolving agents present a promising path toward continual adaptation by distilling task interactions into reusable knowledge artifacts. In practice, this paradigm remains hindered by two coupled bottlenecks: data inefficiency, where costly rollout effort is disproportionately spent on low-value samples rather than informative ones, and knowledge interference, where heterogeneous knowledge stored in shared repositories leads to noisy retrieval and task-misaligned guidance. Together, these issues form a self-reinforcing failure loop in which uninformative rollouts yield noisy knowledge, which in turn degrades subsequent rollouts. In this work, we introduce Ace-Skill, a co-evolutionary framework that jointly optimizes rollout allocation and knowledge organization for self-evolving multimodal agents. Specifically, Ace-Skill combines aprioritized sampler with lazy-decay proficiency tracking to focus rollouts on informative and insufficiently mastered samples, and a clustered organizer that semantically clusters knowledge for cleaner retrieval and more reliable adaptation. By improving sampling and organization together, Ace-Skill turns self-evolution into a virtuous cycle in which more informative rollouts produce higher-quality knowledge that supports stronger subsequent rollouts. Across four multimodal tool-use benchmarks, Ace-Skill delivers strong gains (e.g., +35.46% relative improvement in Avg@4 accuracy), enabling an opensource 35B MoE model to match or surpass proprietary models. The acquired knowledge also transfers effectively in a zero-shot manner to smaller 9B and 4B models, allowing resource-constrained agents to inherit advanced capabilities without additional training. The code has been publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: Ace-Skill通过优先采样和聚类组织打破自进化智能体的数据低效与知识干扰循环，显著提升多模态工具使用能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 自进化智能体通过将任务交互蒸馏为知识工件实现持续适应，但面临数据低效（高成本rollout浪费在低价值样本）和知识干扰（异构知识导致检索噪声和任务错配）两个耦合瓶颈，形成自我强化的失败循环。
analysis.problem: 如何同时优化自进化多模态智能体的rollout分配和知识组织，打破数据低效与知识干扰的耦合循环。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出自进化范式存在自强化失败循环：无信息的rollout产生噪声知识，进而降低后续rollout质量。
analysis.method: 提出Ace-Skill协同进化框架，包含优先采样器（结合懒惰衰减熟练度追踪聚焦信息性样本）和聚类组织器（语义聚类知识实现清洁检索和可靠适应）。
contributions: 提出Ace-Skill框架，联合优化rollout分配和知识组织，将自进化转化为良性循环。
在四个多模态工具使用基准上取得显著提升（如Avg@4相对提升35.46%），使开源35B MoE模型匹配或超越专有模型。
知识零样本迁移至9B和4B小模型，无需额外训练即可继承高级能力。
analysis.experiments: 在四个多模态工具使用基准上评估，Ace-Skill实现Avg@4准确率相对提升35.46%，开源35B MoE模型匹配或超越专有模型，知识零样本迁移至9B和4B模型。
limitations: 可能依赖特定多模态工具使用场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
懒惰衰减熟练度追踪的阈值设定可能影响采样效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Ace-Skill通过优先采样和聚类组织打破自进化智能体的数据低效与知识干扰循环，显著提升多模态工具使用能力。

papers.title: M$^3$: Reframing Training Measures for Discretized Physical Simulations
papers.abstract: Neural surrogate models for physical simulations are trained on discretized samples of continuous domains, where the induced empirical measure leads to uneven supervision, biasing optimization and causing spatial inconsistencies in physical fidelity. To mitigate this measure-induced bias, we propose M$^3$ (Multi-scale Morton Measure), a scalable framework that balances training measures by partitioning space according to physical variation and allocating supervision across multiple scales. Applied to three industrial-scale datasets with diverse discretizations, M$^3$ consistently improves predictions in the continuous physical domain, achieving up to 4.7$\times$ lower error in large-scale volumetric cases. These gains persist under aggressive subsampling (160M $\rightarrow$ 16M $\rightarrow$ 1.6M points), where M$^3$-trained models outperform those trained on higher-resolution data, reducing physics-weighted relative $L_2$ error by 3--4$\times$ and the corresponding MSE by up to 13$\times$. These results highlight data distribution as a key factor in operator learning and position M$^3$ as a scalable, data-efficient approach for physically consistent modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出多尺度Morton度量（M$^3$）框架，通过空间划分与多尺度监督分配，缓解离散化物理仿真中训练度量偏差，显著提升预测精度与数据效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经代理模型在离散化连续域样本上训练时，经验度量导致监督不均，优化偏置且物理保真度空间不一致，限制了物理仿真精度。
analysis.problem: 如何消除离散化物理仿真中训练度量引入的偏差，实现连续物理域上空间一致的预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出离散化样本的经验度量导致不均匀监督，优化偏置和空间不一致性；M$^3$通过物理变化驱动的空间划分和多尺度监督分配来缓解此偏差。
analysis.method: M$^3$（多尺度Morton度量）框架：根据物理变化划分空间，并在多个尺度上分配监督，以平衡训练度量。
contributions: 提出M$^3$框架，通过多尺度空间划分与监督分配缓解离散化物理仿真中的度量偏差。
在三个工业级数据集上验证，M$^3$在连续物理域中预测误差降低高达4.7倍，且在激进子采样下仍优于高分辨率训练模型。
analysis.experiments: 在三个具有不同离散化的工业级数据集上评估，M$^3$在连续物理域中实现高达4.7倍误差降低；在160M→16M→1.6M点子采样下，物理加权相对L2误差降低3-4倍，MSE降低高达13倍。
limitations: 可能依赖物理变化的空间划分策略，对复杂动态场景的适应性需进一步验证。
多尺度监督分配可能增加计算开销，大规模应用时需权衡效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多尺度Morton度量（M$^3$）框架，通过空间划分与多尺度监督分配，缓解离散化物理仿真中训练度量偏差，显著提升预测精度与数据效率。

papers.title: SynerDiff: Synergetic Continuous Batching for Fast and Parallel Diffusion Model Inference
papers.abstract: The expansion of Artificial Intelligence-generated content service requires diffusion model serving to simultaneously achieve high throughput and low task end-to-end (E2E) latency. However, existing continuous batching methods suffer from severe resource contention during UNet-VAE concurrency, leading to latency spikes. Furthermore, concurrent multi-task scheduling entails a trade-off between UNet throughput and VAE latency across varying scheduling strategies. To address these, we propose SynerDiff, an efficient continuous batching system built on intra-inter level synergy. At the intra-concurrency level, SynerDiff alleviates resource contention by pruning component-specific resource bottlenecks via VAE Chunking and Adaptive Skip-CFG. At the inter-concurrency level, leveraging components' differential sensitivity to scheduling granularities, a threshold-aware scheduler plans concurrent sequences and tunes intra-concurrency decisions to minimize VAE latency while maintaining UNet within high-throughput threshold. Additionally, a feedback controller dynamically adjusts this threshold based on queue loads to boost system capacity ceiling. Experimental results show that, SynerDiff improves throughput by 1.6$\times$ and decreases both average E2E and P99 tail latencies by up to 78.7\%, compared to benchmarks while guaranteeing high image fidelity.

analysis.tldr: SynerDiff通过协同连续批处理优化扩散模型推理，提升吞吐量并降低延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型服务需要同时实现高吞吐和低端到端延迟，但现有连续批处理方法在UNet-VAE并发时存在资源争用和延迟尖峰问题。
analysis.problem: 扩散模型推理中UNet和VAE组件并发时的资源争用以及多任务调度中吞吐与延迟的权衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有连续批处理方法在UNet-VAE并发时出现严重资源争用，导致延迟尖峰；不同调度策略下UNet吞吐与VAE延迟存在权衡。
analysis.method: 提出SynerDiff系统，通过组件内协同（VAE分块和自适应跳过CFG）缓解资源争用，以及组件间协同（阈值感知调度器）优化调度，并引入反馈控制器动态调整阈值。
contributions: 提出SynerDiff系统，实现扩散模型推理的高吞吐和低延迟。
设计VAE分块和自适应跳过CFG缓解资源争用。
提出阈值感知调度器和反馈控制器优化并发调度。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，SynerDiff相比基准方法吞吐量提升1.6倍，平均端到端延迟和P99尾延迟降低高达78.7%，同时保证高图像保真度。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件或模型架构。
反馈控制器的调优可能增加系统复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SynerDiff通过协同连续批处理优化扩散模型推理，提升吞吐量并降低延迟。

papers.title: FRACTAL: SSM with Fractional Recurrent Architecture for Computational Temporal Analysis of Long Sequences
papers.abstract: Effective sequence modeling fundamentally requires balancing the retention of unbounded history with the high-resolution detection of abrupt short-term variations common in real-world phenomena. However, existing state space models (SSMs) relying on high-order polynomial projection operators (HiPPO) face a critical trade-off where uniform measures dilute recent information to maintain timescale invariance, while exponential measures sacrifice global context to capture local dynamics. This paper proposes a Fractional Recurrent Architecture for Computational Temporal Analysis of Long sequences (FRACTAL), a novel architecture integrating fractional measure theory into recursive memory updates to address this limitation. By deriving projection operators with analytically characterized spectral properties and a tunable singularity index, the proposed method amplifies sensitivity to recent signal perturbations while preserving the spectral structure that encodes scale-invariant memory dynamics. This theoretical innovation is instantiated within a simplified diagonalized state space framework by modulating input projection initialization to enable simultaneous capture of multi-scale temporal features. FRACTAL achieves an average score of 87.11\% on the Long Range Arena benchmark, including 61.85\% on the ListOps task, outperforming the S5 model.

analysis.tldr: FRACTAL 通过分数阶递归架构改进状态空间模型，在长序列建模中平衡长期记忆与短期变化检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 SSM 在长序列建模中面临均匀度量稀释近期信息、指数度量牺牲全局上下文的权衡，难以同时捕捉长期记忆与短期突变。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种状态空间模型，既能保留无限历史信息，又能高分辨率检测短期突变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出 HiPPO 投影算子存在均匀度量和指数度量的固有权衡，导致无法同时兼顾长期记忆与局部动态。
analysis.method: 引入分数阶测度理论到递归记忆更新，推导具有可调奇异指数的投影算子，并在对角化状态空间框架中通过调制输入投影初始化实现多尺度时间特征捕捉。
contributions: 提出分数阶递归架构 FRACTAL，集成分数阶测度理论解决 SSM 的长期-短期权衡。
在 Long Range Arena 基准上取得平均 87.11% 的得分，在 ListOps 任务上达到 61.85%，超越 S5 模型。
analysis.experiments: 在 Long Range Arena 基准上评估，包括 ListOps 等任务，与 S5 模型对比。
limitations: 摘要未提供在更多样化任务或更大规模数据上的实验结果。
分数阶测度理论的计算开销和实际部署可行性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FRACTAL 通过分数阶递归架构改进状态空间模型，在长序列建模中平衡长期记忆与短期变化检测。

papers.title: When Agents Overtrust Environmental Evidence: An Extensible Agentic Framework for Benchmarking Evidence-Grounding Defects in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model agents increasingly operate through environment-facing scaffolds that expose files, web pages, APIs, and logs. These observations influence tool use, state tracking, and action sequencing, yet their reliability and authority are often uncertain. Environmental grounding is therefore a systems-level problem involving context admission, evidence provenance, freshness checking, verification policy, action gating, and model reasoning. Existing agent benchmarks mainly evaluate task capability or specific attacks such as prompt injection and memory poisoning, but they under-specify a fundamental reliability question: whether agents remain grounded in the true environment state when observations are stale, incorrect, or malicious. We introduce EnvTrustBench, an agentic framework for benchmarking this failure mode. We define an evidence-grounding defect (EGD) as a behavioral failure in which an agent treats an environment-facing claim as sufficient evidence for action without resolving it against available current evidence, leading to a task-incorrect false path under the true environment state. Given a task scenario, EnvTrustBench generates the workspace, environment, agent-facing objective, and validation oracle, executes the evaluated agent, records its action-observation trajectory and final state, and applies the oracle to produce a verdict. Using 6 LLM backbones and 5 widely used scaffolds, we evaluate 55 generated cases across 11 task scenarios, with each scenario expanded through five feedback-guided generation iterations. Results show that EGDs consistently emerge across operational workflows, highlighting environmental grounding as a core agent reliability problem with important security implications.

analysis.tldr: 提出EnvTrustBench框架，系统评估LLM Agent在环境证据不可靠时的接地缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent依赖环境观察（文件、网页、API等）进行决策，但这些观察可能过时、错误或恶意，现有基准主要评估任务能力或特定攻击，忽略了环境接地这一基础可靠性问题。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地评估LLM Agent在环境证据不可靠时是否仍能保持对真实环境状态的接地，即避免证据接地缺陷（EGD）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出EGD在多种操作流程中一致出现，表明环境接地是核心可靠性问题。
analysis.method: 提出EnvTrustBench框架，包含工作空间、环境、面向Agent的目标和验证预言机，通过反馈引导生成测试案例，执行Agent并记录轨迹，最终由预言机判定是否出现EGD。
contributions: 定义了证据接地缺陷（EGD）这一新的Agent失败模式。
提出了EnvTrustBench框架，可扩展地生成和评估Agent在环境证据不可靠时的行为。
通过6个LLM骨干和5个常用脚手架在55个案例上的实验，揭示了EGD的普遍性和安全性影响。
analysis.experiments: 使用6个LLM骨干和5个常用脚手架，在11个任务场景中生成55个案例，每个场景通过5次反馈引导迭代扩展。摘要未提供具体实验结果数值。
limitations: 框架生成的案例可能无法覆盖所有真实世界的环境接地缺陷。
评估依赖于预定义的验证预言机，可能无法捕捉所有细微的失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EnvTrustBench框架，系统评估LLM Agent在环境证据不可靠时的接地缺陷。

papers.title: Mental Health AI Safety Claims Must Preserve Temporal Evidence
papers.abstract: The safety of mental health AI is often judged at the wrong temporal scale. Current evaluations typically score isolated responses, endpoint outcomes, or aggregate dialogue quality, while clinically consequential failures may arise from the order and accumulation of interactions themselves, including delayed escalation, repeated reinforcement, dependency formation, failed repair, and gradual deterioration across turns. This paper argues that this mismatch is not merely a limitation of evaluation coverage but a source of invalid safety conclusions. We introduce Temporal Safety Non-Identifiability, a formal account of why safety properties that depend on sequence, timing, accumulation, or recovery cannot be certified by protocols that discard those features. From this formalization, we develop SCOPE (Safety Claims Over Preserved Evidence) as a general principle for aligning safety claims with the evidence an evaluation actually retains, and instantiate it as SCOPE-MH, a mental-health instantiation of this reporting standard. We operationalize SCOPE-MH through a proof-of-concept on the AnnoMI dataset of expert-annotated motivational interviewing conversations, which reveals mechanisms of failure that per-turn behavior scoring does not represent. We propose SCOPE-MH as a diagnostic complement to existing evaluation infrastructure and argue that evaluation preserving temporal evidence is necessary, not optional, for safety-critical mental health AI deployment.

analysis.tldr: 心理健康AI安全评估必须保留时序证据，否则会得出无效的安全结论。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前心理健康AI安全评估通常基于孤立响应或端点结果，忽略了交互顺序和累积效应，可能导致临床上有害的失败模式被遗漏，从而得出错误的安全结论。
analysis.problem: 现有评估协议丢弃了时序特征（如顺序、时机、累积和恢复），无法认证依赖于这些特征的安全属性，导致安全声明与保留证据不匹配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，临床上有意义的失败可能源于交互本身的顺序和累积，包括延迟升级、重复强化、依赖形成、修复失败和逐步恶化，而逐轮行为评分无法表征这些机制。
analysis.method: 提出Temporal Safety Non-Identifiability形式化概念，并开发SCOPE（Safety Claims Over Preserved Evidence）原则，要求安全声明必须与评估保留的证据对齐；具体实例化为SCOPE-MH，用于心理健康领域。
contributions: 形式化定义了时序安全不可识别性，解释了为何丢弃时序特征的评估无法认证时序依赖的安全属性。
提出SCOPE原则和SCOPE-MH实例，作为现有评估基础设施的诊断补充，强调保留时序证据对安全关键型心理健康AI部署的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 在AnnoMI数据集上进行了概念验证，揭示了逐轮行为评分无法表征的失败机制。
limitations: 概念验证仅在单一数据集上进行，泛化性有待验证。
SCOPE-MH作为诊断补充，尚未提供完整的评估框架或自动化工具。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 心理健康AI安全评估必须保留时序证据，否则会得出无效的安全结论。

papers.title: How You Begin is How You Reason: Driving Exploration in RLVR via Prefix-Tuned Priors
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) recently thrives in large language model (LLM) reasoning tasks. However, the reward sparsity and the long reasoning horizon make effective exploration challenging. In practice, this challenge manifests as the \emph{entropy collapse} phenomenon, where RLVR improves single-rollout accuracy but fails to expand coverage on successful reasoning trajectories. Passive exploration techniques like entropy regularization tend to dismiss generation quality, resulting in noisy rollouts. In response to this issue, we propose an Information-Maximizing Augmented eXploration (IMAX) framework to train a pool of soft prefixes that reshapes the base model's prior over reasoning trajectories. Rather than relying on RL to incentivize exploration on top of the base model, each prefix acts as a trainable control knob that induces a distinct rollout distribution from the same backbone model. To encourage discovery of diverse and task-relevant reasoning behaviors, we derive an Information Maximization (InfoMax) reward to complement the verifiable rewards for RL training. IMAX is in general algorithm-agnostic and can be seamlessly integrated into existing RLVR pipelines. Experiment results have shown that across three backbone scales, IMAX consistently improves reasoning performance over standard RLVR, with gains up to 11.60\% in Pass@4 and 10.57\% in Avg@4.

analysis.tldr: 通过可训练前缀池驱动RLVR中的多样化探索，缓解熵崩溃并提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR在LLM推理任务中面临奖励稀疏和长推理视野导致的探索困难，表现为熵崩溃现象，即单次rollout准确率提升但成功轨迹覆盖不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲生成质量的前提下，在RLVR中实现有效且多样化的探索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出RLVR中熵崩溃现象：单次rollout准确率提升但成功轨迹覆盖不足；被动探索技术如熵正则化会降低生成质量，导致噪声rollout。
analysis.method: 提出IMAX框架，训练一组可学习的soft前缀，每个前缀作为控制旋钮从同一骨干模型诱导不同的rollout分布，并引入信息最大化奖励与可验证奖励结合进行RL训练。
contributions: 提出IMAX框架，通过前缀池驱动RLVR中的多样化探索，算法无关且可集成到现有流程。
推导信息最大化奖励，促进发现多样且任务相关的推理行为。
实验证明IMAX在三种骨干规模上一致提升推理性能，Pass@4提升达11.60%，Avg@4提升达10.57%。
analysis.experiments: 在三种骨干规模上对比标准RLVR，IMAX在Pass@4和Avg@4上分别提升最高11.60%和10.57%。
limitations: 摘要未讨论前缀池规模对性能的影响。
可能对任务类型敏感，需进一步验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过可训练前缀池驱动RLVR中的多样化探索，缓解熵崩溃并提升推理性能。

papers.title: Mirror, Mirror on the Wall: Can VLM Agents Tell Who They Are at All?
papers.abstract: In the animal kingdom, mirror self-recognition is a canonical probe of higher-order cognition, emerging only in some species. We ask whether an analogous functional capability emerges in embodied vision-language model (VLM) agents: can they recognize themselves in a mirror? We introduce a controlled 3D benchmark where a first-person VLM agent must infer a hidden body attribute from its reflection and select the matching target, while avoiding self-other misattribution. To separate mirror-grounded self-identification from shortcuts, we test mirror removal, misleading cues, and occluded reflections. We also evaluate the decision process through mirror seeking, temporal ordering, self-attribution, and reasoning-action consistency. Our experiments show that mirror-based self-identification emerges mainly in stronger VLMs. These models can use reflected evidence for action, whereas weaker models often inspect the mirror but fail to extract self-relevant information or misattribute their reflection. Language-vision conflict further shows that self-referential language alone is not evidence of grounded self-identification. Overall, mirror-based evaluation provides a diagnostic for whether embodied self-grounding is causally rooted in perception and action rather than priors, prompt compliance, or confabulation.

analysis.tldr: 通过镜像自识任务评估具身VLM代理的自我认知能力，发现强模型能利用反射信息进行动作，弱模型则失败。
analysis.research_motivation: 镜像自识是动物高阶认知的标志，但具身VLM代理是否具备类似能力尚不清楚，现有评估缺乏对自我认知的因果检验。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个受控的3D基准来测试VLM代理能否从镜像中识别自身属性并避免自我-他人误判。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强VLM能利用反射证据进行动作，弱模型虽会观察镜像但无法提取自我相关信息或误判；语言-视觉冲突表明自我指涉语言不保证接地自我识别。
analysis.method: 构建3D基准，要求第一人称VLM代理从镜像推断隐藏身体属性并选择匹配目标，通过移除镜像、误导线索、遮挡反射等测试，并评估镜像寻求、时间顺序、自我归因和推理-动作一致性。
contributions: 提出镜像自识基准用于诊断具身VLM代理的自我接地能力
揭示强模型能利用反射进行动作，弱模型存在自我信息提取失败或误判
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准可能无法覆盖所有自我认知维度
仅测试特定3D环境，泛化性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过镜像自识任务评估具身VLM代理的自我认知能力，发现强模型能利用反射信息进行动作，弱模型则失败。

papers.title: Not All Turns Matter: Credit Assignment for Multi-Turn Jailbreaking
papers.abstract: Deploying LLMs in multi-turn dialogues facilitates jailbreak attacks that distribute harmful intent across seemingly benign turns. Recent training-based multi-turn jailbreak methods learn long-horizon attack strategies from interaction feedback, but often rely on coarse trajectory-level outcome signals that broadcast uniformly to every turn. However, we find that turn-level contributions in multi-turn jailbreaking are non-uniform, phase-dependent, and target-specific. Such coarse outcome supervision induces a credit assignment problem, leading to over-rewarding redundant turns in successful trajectories and under-crediting useful intermediate turns in failed ones. To address this, we propose TRACE, a turn-aware credit assignment framework for reinforcement learning (RL)-based multi-turn jailbreaking. For successful trajectories, TRACE estimates turn-level contributions via leave-one-turn-out semantic masking; for failed ones, TRACE assigns penalties based on prompt harmfulness and semantic relevance, with an additional local refusal-aware penalty. Furthermore, we reuse the attack-side credit signal for multi-turn defense alignment. Extensive experiments on open-source and closed-source targets show that TRACE achieves strong overall performance in effectiveness, transferability, and efficiency, yielding about a 25% relative improvement in attack success rate over the strongest RL baseline while also improving the safety-utility balance when reused for defense alignment.

analysis.tldr: 提出TRACE框架，通过逐轮信用分配解决多轮越狱攻击中粗粒度奖励导致的信用分配问题，提升攻击成功率约25%。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮对话中LLM易被越狱攻击，现有基于强化学习的训练方法使用粗粒度的轨迹级奖励，无法区分不同轮次的贡献，导致冗余轮次被过度奖励、有用中间轮次被低估，影响攻击效率。
analysis.problem: 多轮越狱攻击中粗粒度奖励信号导致的信用分配问题，即成功轨迹中冗余轮次被过度奖励、失败轨迹中有用中间轮次被低估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现多轮越狱中轮次贡献是非均匀的、阶段依赖且目标特定的，粗粒度奖励导致信用分配问题。
analysis.method: 提出TRACE框架：对成功轨迹，通过留一轮语义掩码估计轮次贡献；对失败轨迹，基于提示有害性和语义相关性分配惩罚，并加入局部拒绝感知惩罚；同时将攻击侧信用信号复用于多轮防御对齐。
contributions: 提出TRACE，一种面向多轮越狱的逐轮信用分配强化学习框架。
在开源和闭源目标上实验，攻击成功率相对提升约25%，并改善防御对齐的安全-效用平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在开源和闭源目标上进行了广泛实验，评估有效性、可迁移性和效率，攻击成功率相对提升约25%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定语义掩码方法，泛化性需进一步验证。
防御对齐部分仅初步探索，实际部署效果待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TRACE框架，通过逐轮信用分配解决多轮越狱攻击中粗粒度奖励导致的信用分配问题，提升攻击成功率约25%。

papers.title: Reasoning Compression with Mixed-Policy Distillation
papers.abstract: Reasoning-centric large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance by generating intermediate reasoning trajectories, but often incur excessive token usage and high inference-time decoding cost. We observe that, when solving the same problems, larger reasoning models can often produce more concise traces, whereas smaller reasoning models tend to generate longer and more redundant trajectories. This is especially problematic in real-world deployment, where memory, latency, and serving-cost constraints often favor smaller models. Our observations suggest that reasoning compression can be transferred from large models to small ones rather than enforced through explicit length constraints. Based on this insight, we propose Mixed-Policy Distillation (MPD), a reasoning compression framework that transfers concise reasoning behavior from a larger-sized teacher to a smaller student by distilling teacher-compressed student trajectories. Unlike on-policy distillation, which aligns the student with teacher distributions over verbose student trajectories, or off-policy distillation, which relies on teacher-generated trajectories and may suffer from distribution mismatch, MPD combines the strengths of both. Given a student-sampled trajectory, the teacher rewrites it into a more concise reasoning trace, and the student is trained via KL-based alignment on the compressed trajectory. This preserves student-policy exploration while injecting teacher-guided compression. Experiments on Qwen3-1.7B show that MPD reduces token usage by up to 27.1% while improving performance across multiple reasoning benchmarks, demonstrating an effective approach to efficient small-model reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合策略蒸馏（MPD），将大模型简洁推理能力迁移至小模型，在减少27.1% token的同时提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 推理型大模型通过生成中间推理轨迹提升性能，但导致token消耗和推理成本过高，而小模型推理轨迹冗长，实际部署中受内存、延迟和成本限制，亟需高效压缩方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲性能的前提下，将大模型的简洁推理行为迁移至小模型，实现推理压缩。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到相同问题下，大模型推理轨迹更简洁，小模型轨迹更长更冗余，且推理压缩可通过蒸馏从大模型转移到小模型，而非显式长度约束。
analysis.method: 混合策略蒸馏（MPD）：学生采样轨迹后，教师将其重写为更简洁版本，学生通过KL散度对齐压缩轨迹，结合on-policy的探索性和off-policy的教师引导。
contributions: 提出MPD框架，融合on-policy和off-policy蒸馏优势，实现推理压缩。
在Qwen3-1.7B上验证，token使用减少27.1%且性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-1.7B模型上，使用多个推理基准评估，MPD减少token使用最多27.1%并提升性能。
limitations: 仅在小模型上验证，未测试更大规模学生模型。
教师重写轨迹可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合策略蒸馏（MPD），将大模型简洁推理能力迁移至小模型，在减少27.1% token的同时提升推理性能。

papers.title: EvoMAS: Learning Execution-Time Workflows for Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems have shown strong potential on complex tasks through agent specialization, tool use, and collaborative reasoning. However, most automated multi-agent system design methods still follow a one-shot paradigm: a workflow is optimized or selected before execution and then reused unchanged throughout the task. This static coordination strategy is ill-suited for long-horizon tasks whose subgoals, intermediate evidence, and information needs evolve over multiple execution stages. We propose EvoMAS, a framework for execution-time multi-agent workflow construction. EvoMAS formulates workflow construction as a meta-level sequential decision problem along a single task trajectory. At each stage, it constructs an explicit task state through a Planner-Evaluator-Updater pipeline and uses a learned Workflow Adapter to instantiate a stage-specific layered workflow from a fixed pool of candidate agents. The adapter is trained with policy gradients using sparse, verifiable terminal task success as the main supervision signal, while evaluator-based process reward is analyzed separately under very-hard sparse-reward settings. Experiments on GAIA, HLE, and DeepResearcher show that EvoMAS outperforms single-agent baselines and recent automated multi-agent workflow design methods. Our analyses further show that explicit task-state construction and learned workflow adaptation provide complementary benefits. Additional results indicate that process reward is most useful when terminal success is extremely sparse, and qualitative case studies illustrate that EvoMAS adapts agent coordination as the task state evolves.

analysis.tldr: EvoMAS 提出在执行过程中动态构建多智能体工作流，通过元级决策和策略梯度训练，在长时任务中优于静态方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统设计多采用一次性范式，工作流在执行前固定，无法适应长时任务中不断演化的子目标、中间证据和信息需求。
analysis.problem: 如何让多智能体系统在执行过程中动态调整工作流，以应对长时任务中任务状态的变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出静态协调策略在长时任务中表现不佳，而显式任务状态构建和学习式工作流适配能提供互补优势；过程奖励仅在终端成功极其稀疏时最有用。
analysis.method: 将工作流构建建模为元级序列决策问题，通过规划器-评估器-更新器流水线构建显式任务状态，并使用策略梯度训练的工作流适配器从候选智能体池中实例化阶段特定的分层工作流。
contributions: 提出EvoMAS框架，实现执行时多智能体工作流动态构建
将工作流构建形式化为元级序列决策问题，并采用策略梯度训练工作流适配器
在GAIA、HLE和DeepResearcher上验证了优于单智能体基线和近期自动化多智能体工作流设计方法
analysis.experiments: 在GAIA、HLE和DeepResearcher基准上评估，EvoMAS优于单智能体基线和近期自动化多智能体工作流设计方法；分析了显式任务状态构建和学习式工作流适配的互补优势，以及过程奖励在稀疏奖励下的作用。
limitations: 可能依赖候选智能体池的质量和多样性
策略梯度训练在非常稀疏奖励下可能效率较低
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EvoMAS 提出在执行过程中动态构建多智能体工作流，通过元级决策和策略梯度训练，在长时任务中优于静态方法。

papers.title: From Holo Pockets to Electron Density: GPT-style Drug Design with Density
papers.abstract: Recent advances in generative modeling have enabled significant progress in structure-based drug design (SBDD). Existing methods typically condition molecule generation on empty binding pockets from holo complexes, overlooking informative components such as the filler (ligands and solvent). Here, we leverage low-resolution electron density (ED) derived from the filler as a physically grounded condition for \textit{de novo} drug design. We consider two types of ED, calculated and cryo-EM/X-ray, obtainable from computational or experimental sources, supporting unified pre-training and experimental integration. Compared with rigid pocket representations, experimental ED naturally captures conformational flexibility and provides a more faithful description of the binding environment. Based on this, we introduce EDMolGPT, a decoder-only autoregressive framework that generates molecules from low-resolution ED point clouds. By grounding generation in physically meaningful density signals, EDMolGPT mitigates structural bias and produces molecules with 3D conformations. Evaluations on 101 biological targets verify the effectiveness. Our project page: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 利用低分辨率电子密度作为物理条件，通过自回归GPT式框架进行从头药物设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有结构基药物设计方法通常仅依赖空腔口袋，忽略了配体、溶剂等填充物信息，导致生成分子存在结构偏差。
analysis.problem: 如何利用填充物（配体和溶剂）的电子密度作为物理条件，生成更合理的药物分子。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EDMolGPT，一种仅解码器的自回归框架，以低分辨率电子密度点云为条件生成分子。
contributions: 首次将低分辨率电子密度作为从头药物设计的物理条件，支持计算和实验来源的电子密度。
提出EDMolGPT框架，通过自回归生成方式缓解结构偏差，生成具有3D构象的分子。
analysis.experiments: 在101个生物靶标上验证了有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖电子密度数据的质量和分辨率。
未与现有SBDD方法进行详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用低分辨率电子密度作为物理条件，通过自回归GPT式框架进行从头药物设计。

papers.title: AHD Agent: Agentic Reinforcement Learning for Automatic Heuristic Design
papers.abstract: Automatic heuristic design (AHD) has emerged as a promising paradigm for solving NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems (COPs). Recent works show that large language models (LLMs), when integrated into well-designed frameworks (i.e., LLM-AHD), can autonomously discover high-performing heuristics. However, existing LLM-AHD frameworks typically treat LLMs as passive generators within fixed workflows, where the model generates heuristics from manually designed, limited context. Such context may fail to capture state-dependent information (e.g., specific failure modes), leading to inefficient trial-and-error exploration. To overcome these limitations, we propose AHD Agent, a novel tool-integrated, multi-turn framework that empowers LLMs to proactively decide whether to generate heuristics or invoke tools to retrieve targeted evidence from the solving environment. To effectively train such a dynamic decision-making agent, we introduce an agentic reinforcement learning (RL) system, which leverages a novel environment synthesis pipeline to optimize a compact model's generalizable AHD capabilities. Experiments across eight diverse domains, including four held-out tasks, demonstrate that our 4B-parameter agent matches or surpasses state-of-the-art baselines using much larger models, while requiring significantly fewer evaluations. Model and inference scaling analysis further reveals that AHD Agent offers an effective trajectory toward truly autonomous heuristic design.

analysis.tldr: 提出AHD Agent，用强化学习训练LLM作为智能体，自动设计NP-hard问题的启发式算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM-AHD方法将LLM视为被动生成器，在固定工作流中基于有限上下文生成启发式，无法捕获状态依赖信息（如失败模式），导致试错效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM主动决策是生成启发式还是调用工具获取环境证据，并训练其具备可泛化的自动启发式设计能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AHD Agent框架，集成工具和多轮交互，使LLM能主动决策；并设计智能体强化学习系统，通过环境合成流水线优化紧凑模型（4B参数）的泛化能力。
contributions: 提出AHD Agent，一种工具集成、多轮交互的框架，使LLM能主动决策启发式生成或工具调用。
引入智能体强化学习系统，结合环境合成流水线，训练紧凑模型实现可泛化的自动启发式设计。
analysis.experiments: 在8个不同领域（含4个保留任务）上，4B参数模型匹配或超越使用更大模型的SOTA基线，且评估次数显著减少。
limitations: 可能依赖环境合成流水线的质量。
4B模型在更复杂任务上可能仍有性能上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AHD Agent，用强化学习训练LLM作为智能体，自动设计NP-hard问题的启发式算法。

papers.title: Value-Decomposed Reinforcement Learning Framework for Taxiway Routing with Hierarchical Conflict-Aware Observations
papers.abstract: Taxiway routing and on-surface conflict avoidance are coupled safety-critical decision problems in airport surface operations. Existing planning and optimization methods are often limited by online computational cost, while reinforcement learning methods may struggle to represent downstream traffic conflicts and balance multiple objectives. This paper presents Conflict-aware Taxiway Routing (CaTR), a reinforcement learning framework for real-time multi-aircraft taxiway routing. CaTR constructs a grid-based airport surface environment with action masking, introduces a hierarchical foresight traffic representation to encode current and downstream conflict-related traffic conditions, and adopts a value-decomposed reinforcement learning strategy to prioritize sparse but safety-critical objectives. Experiments are conducted on a realistic environment based on Changsha Huanghua International Airport under multiple traffic density levels. Results show that CaTR achieves better safety--efficiency trade-offs than representative planning, optimization, and reinforcement learning baselines while maintaining practical runtime.

analysis.tldr: 提出CaTR框架，通过分层冲突感知观测和值分解强化学习实现机场滑行道实时路由。
analysis.research_motivation: 机场地面滑行路由与冲突避免是耦合的安全关键决策问题，现有规划优化方法受限于在线计算成本，强化学习方法难以表示下游交通冲突并平衡多目标。
analysis.problem: 实现实时、多飞机滑行道路由，同时避免冲突并平衡安全与效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建基于网格的机场地面环境并采用动作掩码；引入分层前瞻交通表示编码当前和下游冲突相关交通状况；采用值分解强化学习策略优先处理稀疏但安全关键的目标。
contributions: 提出CaTR框架，结合分层冲突感知观测和值分解强化学习解决滑行道路由问题。
在基于长沙黄花国际机场的逼真环境下，多交通密度实验表明CaTR在安全-效率权衡上优于代表性基线。
analysis.experiments: 在基于长沙黄花国际机场的逼真环境下，针对多种交通密度水平进行实验，CaTR在安全-效率权衡上优于代表性规划、优化和强化学习基线，并保持实用运行时间。
limitations: 可能依赖精确的机场网格地图和交通状态感知。
值分解策略在极端高密度场景下的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CaTR框架，通过分层冲突感知观测和值分解强化学习实现机场滑行道实时路由。

papers.title: Done, But Not Sure: Disentangling World Completion from Self-Termination in Embodied Agents
papers.abstract: Standard embodied evaluations do not independently score whether an agent correctly commits to task completion at episode closure, a capacity we call terminal commitment. Behaviorally distinct failures--never completing the task, completing it but failing to stop, and reporting success without sufficient evidence--collapse into the same benchmark failure. We introduce VIGIL, an evaluation framework that makes terminal commitment independently measurable. Under VIGIL's default protocol, agents observe only egocentric RGB, receive no action-success signals, and must end each episode with a semantic report checked deterministically against hidden world state. This yields two separate scores: world-state completion (W) and benchmark success (B), where B additionally requires a correct terminal report. This decoupling makes four outcome categories distinguishable: missed execution, post-attainment drift, unsupported commitment, and verified success. Across 20 models on 1,000 frozen episodes, systems with comparable W differ by up to 19.7 pp in B: one model converts achieved states into correct reports, while another with near-identical execution drifts past the goal without closing. An action-feedback intervention further tests the separation: execution-oriented signals improve W broadly, yet commitment failures persist in models that do not already ground terminal reports in the achieved state. VIGIL provides a protocol that makes terminal commitment independently visible and scorable.

analysis.tldr: 提出VIGIL框架，将智能体的任务完成与自我终止能力解耦评估，发现执行能力相近的模型在终止报告上差异显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准具身评估将任务完成与终止报告混为一谈，无法区分失败类型，阻碍了对智能体能力的精细诊断。
analysis.problem: 如何独立评估智能体在任务完成时正确终止（terminal commitment）的能力，并将其与世界状态完成解耦。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 执行能力相近的模型在终止报告上差异可达19.7个百分点，表明终止能力是独立于执行能力的维度。
analysis.method: 提出VIGIL评估框架，智能体仅观察自我中心RGB，无动作成功信号，需在每回合结束时提交语义报告，并与隐藏世界状态确定性比对，得到世界状态完成度W和基准成功度B两个分数。
contributions: 首次将具身智能体的任务完成与自我终止能力解耦评估
提出VIGIL框架及四个可区分的结果类别：未执行、完成后漂移、无依据承诺、验证成功
通过20个模型在1000个固定回合上的实验，揭示了执行与终止能力的独立性
analysis.experiments: 在1000个固定回合上评估20个模型，比较W和B分数，并引入动作反馈干预实验。
limitations: 仅适用于具身智能体评估，未涉及其他领域
依赖语义报告与隐藏状态的确定性比对，可能限制报告形式
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VIGIL框架，将智能体的任务完成与自我终止能力解耦评估，发现执行能力相近的模型在终止报告上差异显著。

papers.title: Bias by Necessity: Impossibility Theorems for Sequential Processing with Convergent AI and Human Validation
papers.abstract: Are certain cognitive biases mathematically inevitable consequences of sequential information processing? We prove that primacy effects, anchoring, and order-dependence are architecturally necessary in autoregressive language models due to causal masking constraints. Our three impossibility theorems establish: (1) primacy bias arises from asymmetric attention accumulation; (2) anchoring emerges from sequential conditioning with provable information bounds; and (3) exact debiasing by permutation marginalization requires factorial-time computation, with Monte Carlo approximation feasible at constant per-tolerance overhead. We validate these bounds across 12 frontier LLMs ($R^2 = 0.89$; $\Delta$BIC $= 16.6$ vs. next-best alternative). We then derive quantitative predictions from the framework and test them in two pre-registered human experiments ($N = 464$ analyzed). Study 1 confirms anchor position modulates anchoring magnitude ($d = 0.52$, BF$_{10} = 847$). Study 2 shows working memory load amplifies primacy bias ($d = 0.41$, BF$_{10} = 156$), with WM capacity predicting bias reduction ($r = -.38$). These convergent findings reframe cognitive biases as resource-rational responses to sequential processing.

analysis.tldr: 证明自回归语言模型中的认知偏差（首因效应、锚定效应）是因果掩码约束下必然产生的计算代价。
analysis.research_motivation: 认知偏差通常被视为人类非理性的表现，但该研究试图证明这些偏差在顺序信息处理系统中可能是数学上不可避免的，从而重新理解偏差的本质。
analysis.problem: 证明自回归语言模型中的顺序处理必然导致首因效应、锚定效应等认知偏差，并量化其计算复杂性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过三个不可能定理揭示了因果掩码约束下注意力累积不对称导致首因偏差、顺序条件作用导致锚定效应，以及精确去偏需要阶乘时间计算。
analysis.method: 提出三个不可能定理，结合理论推导和蒙特卡洛近似，并在12个前沿LLM和两个预注册人类实验中进行验证。
contributions: 证明了自回归语言模型中首因效应和锚定效应是因果掩码约束下必然产生的架构性偏差。
通过人类实验验证了理论预测，表明认知偏差是资源理性的顺序处理响应。
analysis.experiments: 在12个前沿LLM上验证理论界限（R²=0.89，ΔBIC=16.6），并在两个预注册人类实验（N=464）中确认锚定位置调节锚定效应（d=0.52，BF₁₀=847）和工作记忆负荷放大首因偏差（d=0.41，BF₁₀=156）。
limitations: 理论主要针对自回归架构，可能不适用于其他顺序处理模型。
人类实验的样本量和任务类型有限，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 证明自回归语言模型中的认知偏差（首因效应、锚定效应）是因果掩码约束下必然产生的计算代价。

papers.title: When Can Human-AI Teams Outperform Individuals? Tight Bounds with Impossibility Guarantees
papers.abstract: Human-AI teams fail to outperform their best member in 70% of studies, yet no theory specifies when complementarity is achievable. We derive tight bounds for the broad class of confidence-based aggregation rules by integrating signal detection theory with information-theoretic analysis, yielding four results: (1) a complementarity theorem (teams outperform individuals iff error correlation $\rho_{HM} < \rho^*$, with $\rho^* \approx a$ in the symmetric near-chance regime); (2) minimax bounds showing gains scale as $\Theta(\sqrt{\Delta d})$ with metacognitive sensitivity difference; (3) an impossibility result proving no confidence-based aggregation rule achieves complementarity when $\rho_{HM} \geq \rho^*$; and (4) multi-class generalization $\rho^*_K \approx \rho^*/\sqrt{K-1}$. Predictions match observed team accuracy ($R = 0.94$ on ImageNet-16H, $R = 0.91$ on CIFAR-10H) and the multi-class threshold scaling holds on human data ($R = 0.93$, $K = 16$), with robustness under non-Gaussian distributions. The framework explains why complementarity is rare and provides actionable design formulas; results apply to aggregation, not to interactive deliberation that generates novel answers.

analysis.tldr: 人-AI团队何时能超越个体？通过信号检测与信息论推导出互补性的紧界与不可能性保证。
analysis.research_motivation: 70%的研究显示人-AI团队未能超越其最佳成员，但缺乏理论解释何时能实现互补性，亟需理论指导。
analysis.problem: 确定在基于置信度的聚合规则下，人-AI团队超越个体的条件及其理论界限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出互补性罕见，并给出了误差相关性的阈值条件。
analysis.method: 整合信号检测理论与信息论分析，推导基于置信度的聚合规则的紧界，包括互补性定理、极小极大界、不可能性结果和多类推广。
contributions: 提出互补性定理，给出团队超越个体的充要条件（误差相关性低于阈值）。
证明当误差相关性超过阈值时，任何基于置信度的聚合规则都无法实现互补性。
推导出多类场景下阈值的缩放规律，并在ImageNet-16H和CIFAR-10H上验证预测准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-16H（R=0.94）和CIFAR-10H（R=0.91）上验证团队准确率预测，并在人类数据（K=16，R=0.93）上验证多类阈值缩放，且对非高斯分布具有鲁棒性。
limitations: 结果仅适用于基于置信度的聚合规则，不适用于交互式讨论等生成新答案的方式。
理论假设对称近随机区域，可能不适用于极端性能差异场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人-AI团队何时能超越个体？通过信号检测与信息论推导出互补性的紧界与不可能性保证。

papers.title: AgentPSO: Evolving Agent Reasoning Skill via Multi-agent Particle Swarm Optimization
papers.abstract: Multi-agent reasoning has shown promise for improving the problem-solving ability of large language models by allowing multiple agents to explore diverse reasoning paths. However, most existing multi-agent methods rely on inference-time debate or aggregation, which can be vulnerable to incorrect peer influence and biased consensus. Moreover, the agents themselves remain static, as their underlying reasoning skills do not evolve across tasks. In this paper, we introduce AgentPSO, a particle-swarm-inspired framework for evolving multi-agent reasoning skills. AgentPSO treats each agent as a particle-like reasoner whose state is a natural-language skill and whose velocity is a semantic update direction, iteratively moving agents toward stronger skill states to improve both individual and collective reasoning performance. Across training iterations, each agent updates its skill by combining its previous velocity, personal-best skill, global-best skill, and a self-reflective direction derived from peer reasoning trajectories. This enables agents to learn reusable reasoning behaviors from both their own experiences and the strongest skills discovered by the population, without updating the parameters of the backbone language model. Experiments on mathematical and general reasoning benchmarks show that AgentPSO improves over static single-agent skills and test-time-only multi-agent reasoning baselines. The evolved skills further transfer across benchmarks and to another backbone model, suggesting that AgentPSO captures reusable reasoning procedures rather than merely optimizing benchmark-specific prompts. Code is open-sourced at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: AgentPSO 将粒子群优化引入多智能体推理，让智能体通过语义速度更新迭代进化推理技能，无需更新模型参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于推理时辩论或聚合的多智能体方法易受错误同伴影响和偏见共识影响，且智能体推理技能静态不变，无法跨任务进化。
analysis.problem: 如何让多智能体系统中的智能体在推理过程中动态进化其推理技能，以提升个体和集体推理性能，同时避免更新骨干模型参数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 AgentPSO 框架，将每个智能体视为粒子，其状态为自然语言技能，速度为语义更新方向；通过结合前次速度、个体最佳技能、全局最佳技能和同伴推理轨迹的自反方向，迭代更新技能，实现技能进化。
contributions: 提出粒子群启发框架 AgentPSO，实现多智能体推理技能的进化学习。
在数学和通用推理基准上验证了 AgentPSO 优于静态单智能体技能和仅测试时多智能体推理基线。
展示进化技能可跨基准和跨骨干模型迁移，表明其捕获了可复用的推理过程。
analysis.experiments: 在数学和通用推理基准上进行实验，AgentPSO 优于静态单智能体技能和仅测试时多智能体推理基线，且进化技能可迁移。
limitations: 可能依赖初始技能质量，若初始技能较差可能影响进化效果。
进化过程可能收敛到局部最优，全局最优技能的选择策略有待进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AgentPSO 将粒子群优化引入多智能体推理，让智能体通过语义速度更新迭代进化推理技能，无需更新模型参数。

papers.title: MBP-KT: Learning Global Collaborative Information from Meta-Behavioral Pattern for Enhanced Knowledge Tracing
papers.abstract: The emerging collaborative information-based knowledge tracing (KT) has been a promising way to enhance modeling of learners' knowledge states. The core idea is to extract the collaborative information from interaction sequences of other learners to assist the prediction on the target one. Despite effectiveness, existing methods are built on the raw interaction sequences with tailored modules, which inevitably limits their capacity in deeply capturing learning behavioral patterns and generalization. To this end, we propose a general meta-behavioral pattern-aware framework (MBP-KT) for KT. Specifically, MBP-KT introduces a novel meta-behavioral sequence construction to transform the raw interaction sequences into the combinations of different meta-behavioral patterns. In this way, the learning behavioral patterns of learners can be effectively preserved. Then, MBP-KT develops a parameter-free module to extract the global collaborative representations from the constructed meta-behavioral sequences. Moreover, MBP-KT provides general injection strategies to introduce the extracted global collaborative information into various downstream KT models, ensuring the universality of the collaborative information. Extensive results on real-world datasets demonstrate that MBP-KT can consistently boosts the performance of a wide range of KT models.

analysis.tldr: 提出元行为模式框架MBP-KT，通过将原始交互序列转化为元行为模式组合并提取全局协作信息，提升多种知识追踪模型的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于协作信息的知识追踪方法依赖于原始交互序列和定制模块，难以深入捕获学习行为模式且泛化能力有限。
analysis.problem: 如何从学习者交互序列中提取通用且有效的全局协作信息，以增强多种知识追踪模型的预测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MBP-KT框架，包括元行为序列构建（将原始交互转化为元行为模式组合）、参数无关的全局协作表示提取模块，以及通用注入策略。
contributions: 提出元行为序列构建方法，有效保留学习行为模式。
设计参数无关的全局协作表示提取模块，并开发通用注入策略，使协作信息可应用于多种下游KT模型。
analysis.experiments: 在真实数据集上，MBP-KT能一致提升多种知识追踪模型的性能。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖元行为模式的定义质量。
全局协作信息的提取效率在超大规模场景下需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出元行为模式框架MBP-KT，通过将原始交互序列转化为元行为模式组合并提取全局协作信息，提升多种知识追踪模型的性能。

papers.title: SkillMaster: Toward Autonomous Skill Mastery in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Skills provide an effective mechanism for improving LLM agents on complex tasks, yet in existing agent frameworks, their creation, refinement, and selection are typically governed by external teachers, hand-designed rules, or auxiliary modules. As a result, skills remain external resources to be invoked, rather than capabilities that agents can develop, adapt, and internalize through experience. To endow LLM agents with autonomous skill mastery, we propose SkillMaster, a training framework that teaches agents to create new skills, refine existing skills, and select accumulated skills during task solving. This capability is achieved through three key designs. First, we train agents through trajectory-informed skill review, teaching agents to propose, update, or retain skills based on evidence from completed episodes. Second, each candidate skill edit is designed to be evaluated by its counterfactual utility on related probe tasks, providing a direct learning signal for training skill-editing decisions. Third, we introduce DualAdv-GRPO, which separately estimates advantages for task-solving actions and skill-editing decisions, stabilizing joint training across task solving and skill management. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop show that SkillMaster improves the overall success rate over state-of-the-art baselines by 8.8% and 9.3%, respectively, achieving the best performance among all compared methods. Further analysis reveals a marked shift in agent capability: agents trained with SkillMaster can identify skill failures, refine procedural knowledge from trajectory evidence, and transfer improvements to future tasks with limited skill-bank edits. Overall, SkillMaster moves LLM agents beyond mere skill use toward self-improving agents capable of developing, adapting, and applying their own skill repertoires.

analysis.tldr: SkillMaster通过轨迹驱动的技能回顾、反事实效用评估和双优势GRPO训练，使LLM智能体能够自主创建、精炼和选择技能，在ALFWorld和WebShop上分别提升8.8%和9.3%的成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM智能体框架中，技能的创建、精炼和选择通常依赖外部教师、手工规则或辅助模块，技能被视为外部资源而非智能体可自主发展的能力，限制了智能体的自主性和适应性。
analysis.problem: 如何使LLM智能体具备自主技能掌握能力，即能够通过经验自主创建、精炼和选择技能，而无需外部干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SkillMaster训练框架，包含三个关键设计：1）轨迹驱动的技能回顾，基于完成轨迹的证据提出、更新或保留技能；2）通过反事实效用评估候选技能编辑，提供直接学习信号；3）DualAdv-GRPO分别估计任务求解和技能编辑决策的优势，稳定联合训练。
contributions: 提出SkillMaster框架，使LLM智能体能够自主创建、精炼和选择技能。
引入轨迹驱动的技能回顾和反事实效用评估机制。
提出DualAdv-GRPO方法，稳定任务求解和技能管理的联合训练。
在ALFWorld和WebShop上取得SOTA性能，分别提升8.8%和9.3%的成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在ALFWorld和WebShop两个基准上评估，SkillMaster相比SOTA基线分别提升8.8%和9.3%的成功率，并展示了智能体识别技能失败、从轨迹中精炼程序性知识以及通过有限技能库编辑迁移改进的能力。
limitations: 实验仅在两个模拟环境（ALFWorld和WebShop）上进行，未在更复杂或真实世界任务中验证。
技能编辑的反事实效用评估可能计算成本较高，尤其是在大规模技能库下。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SkillMaster通过轨迹驱动的技能回顾、反事实效用评估和双优势GRPO训练，使LLM智能体能够自主创建、精炼和选择技能，在ALFWorld和WebShop上分别提升8.8%和9.3%的成功率。

papers.title: Reconciling Consistency-Based Diagnosis with Actual-Causality-Based Explanations
papers.abstract: We establish, from the point of view of Explainable AI (XAI), connections between Consistency-Based Diagnosis (CBD), on one side, and Actual Causality and Causal Responsibility, on the other. CBD has received little attention from the XAI community. Connections between these two areas could have a fruitful impact on XAI and Explainable Data Management.

analysis.tldr: 建立一致性诊断与实际因果解释之间的理论联系，推动可解释AI发展。
analysis.research_motivation: 可解释AI（XAI）领域主要关注实际因果性解释，而一致性诊断（CBD）方法虽在诊断领域有效，但在XAI中关注不足，两者之间的理论联系尚未建立，阻碍了XAI方法的丰富与数据管理可解释性的提升。
analysis.problem: 如何从理论上建立一致性诊断（CBD）与实际因果性及因果责任解释之间的形式化联系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过理论分析，建立CBD与实际因果性及因果责任之间的形式化连接。
contributions: 首次从XAI视角建立一致性诊断与实际因果性之间的理论联系
揭示CBD与因果责任概念的关联，为可解释数据管理提供新视角
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅提供理论连接，缺乏实证验证
可能未覆盖所有CBD或实际因果性变体
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 建立一致性诊断与实际因果解释之间的理论联系，推动可解释AI发展。

papers.title: Iterative Critique-and-Routing Controller for Multi-Agent Systems with Heterogeneous LLMs
papers.abstract: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems often rely on a controller to coordinate a pool of heterogeneous models, yet existing controllers are typically limited to one-shot routing: they select a model once and return its output directly. Such routing-only designs provide no mechanism to critique intermediate drafts or support iterative refinement. To address this limitation, we propose a critique-and-routing controller that casts multi-agent coordination as a sequential decision problem. At each turn, the controller evaluates the current draft, decides whether to stop or continue, and, if needed, selects the next agent for further refinement. We formulate this process as a finite-horizon Markov Decision Process (MDP) with explicit agent-utilization constraints, design a composite reward for controller decisions across turns, and optimize the controller via policy gradients under a Lagrangian-relaxed objective. Extensive experiments across multiple heterogeneous multi-agent systems and seven reasoning benchmarks show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines and substantially narrows the gap to the strongest agent, while using it for fewer than 25% of total calls.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种迭代式批评-路由控制器，将多智能体协调建模为MDP，通过策略梯度优化，在减少强模型调用次数的同时提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统的控制器仅支持一次性路由，无法对中间草稿进行批评或迭代优化，限制了异构模型的协作潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能够迭代评估和路由的控制器，在满足智能体使用约束的同时提升多智能体系统的推理质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一次性路由控制器缺乏反馈机制，导致无法利用弱模型的中间结果进行逐步改进。
analysis.method: 将多智能体协调建模为有限时域MDP，控制器每步评估当前草稿并决定停止或选择下一个智能体；设计复合奖励函数，通过拉格朗日松弛下的策略梯度优化控制器。
contributions: 提出迭代式批评-路由控制器，将多智能体协调转化为顺序决策问题。
将问题形式化为带智能体使用约束的有限时域MDP，并设计复合奖励和拉格朗日松弛优化方法。
在多个异构多智能体系统和七个推理基准上验证了方法的有效性，显著缩小与最强智能体的差距，同时将其调用次数降至25%以下。
analysis.experiments: 在多个异构多智能体系统和七个推理基准上进行实验，方法一致优于现有基线，且将最强智能体的调用次数降至总调用次数的25%以下。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的智能体池，未探索动态扩展。
MDP建模假设固定智能体集合，未考虑智能体失效或加入。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种迭代式批评-路由控制器，将多智能体协调建模为MDP，通过策略梯度优化，在减少强模型调用次数的同时提升推理性能。

papers.title: MIND-Skill: Quality-Guaranteed Skill Generation via Multi-Agent Induction and Deduction
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) powered AI agents have emerged as a promising paradigm for autonomous problem-solving, yet they continue to struggle with complex, multi-step real-world tasks that demand domain-specific procedural knowledge. Reusable agent skills, which encapsulate successful problem-solving strategies, offer a natural remedy by enabling agents to build on prior experience. However, curating such skills has largely remained a manual endeavor, requiring human experts to distill rich domain knowledge into actionable guidelines. In this work, we present $\textbf{M}$ulti-agent $\textbf{IN}$duction and $\textbf{D}$eduction for $\textbf{Skill}$s ($\textbf{MIND-Skill}$), a framework that automatically induces generalizable skills from successful trajectories with robust quality guarantees. MIND-Skill consists of an induction agent which is tasked to abstract reusable skills from successful trajectories, and a deduction agent which aims to reconstruct trajectories by following the induced skills. To guarantee the quality of the generated skills, we introduce a reconstruction loss that compares input and reconstructed trajectories, an outcome loss that enforces the correctness of the reconstructed trajectories, and a rubric loss that assesses the documentation quality and regularizes the abstraction level of the generated skills according to predefined criteria. These textual losses are jointly optimized with TextGrad, and the resulting skills are evaluated on held-out tasks unseen during optimization. Experiments on AppWorld and BFCL-v3 show that MIND-Skill consistently outperforms concurrent skill generation methods.

analysis.tldr: MIND-Skill通过多智能体归纳与演绎框架自动生成高质量可复用技能，并在AppWorld和BFCL-v3上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在复杂多步任务中缺乏领域特定程序性知识，而现有技能库构建依赖人工专家，成本高且难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何自动从成功轨迹中归纳出可泛化的、质量有保证的可复用技能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MIND-Skill框架，包含归纳智能体（从成功轨迹抽象技能）和演绎智能体（用技能重建轨迹），并通过三种文本损失（重建损失、结果损失、评分损失）联合优化技能质量。
contributions: 提出多智能体归纳-演绎框架自动生成可复用技能
设计三种文本损失函数保证技能质量，并用TextGrad联合优化
analysis.experiments: 在AppWorld和BFCL-v3上评估，MIND-Skill优于同期技能生成方法。
limitations: 依赖成功轨迹作为输入，可能不适用于无轨迹场景
文本损失优化可能受限于TextGrad的梯度质量
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MIND-Skill通过多智能体归纳与演绎框架自动生成高质量可复用技能，并在AppWorld和BFCL-v3上超越现有方法。

papers.title: C2L-Net: A Data-Driven Model for State-of-Charge Estimation of Lithium-Ion Batteries During Discharge
papers.abstract: Accurate state-of-charge (SOC) estimation is critical for the safe and efficient operation of lithium-ion batteries in battery management systems (BMS). Although data-driven approaches can effectively capture nonlinear battery dynamics, many existing methods rely on long historical input sequences, resulting in high computational cost and introducing padding-induced positional bias at the beginning of drive cycles. To address these limitations, we propose C2L-Net, a novel context-to-latest data-driven framework for realistic online SOC estimation using only a short historical window (20 s). Unlike existing short-receptive-field or long-history models, the proposed framework explicitly separates contextual encoding from latest-measurement updating, enabling both efficient temporal modeling and rapid adaptation to dynamic battery states. The proposed model incorporates a chunk-based feature extraction mechanism that combines Theta Attention Pooling with a Fourier-based Seasonality Basis to capture local temporal patterns while reducing sequence length. A causal context encoder, integrating a gated recurrent unit (GRU) with Causal Cosine Attention, models temporal dependencies without information leakage. Furthermore, a latest-measurement decoder, inspired by recursive filtering, updates the contextual state using the most recent measurement, enhancing responsiveness to dynamic operating conditions. Extensive experiments on a public lithium-ion battery drive-cycle dataset under multiple fixed-temperature conditions demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art or competitive accuracy while significantly improving computational efficiency. In particular, C2L-Net achieves up to 60 times faster inference and requires fewer parameters than recent data-driven baselines, while maintaining robust performance across unseen driving profiles.

analysis.tldr: 提出C2L-Net，用短历史窗口（20秒）实现高效准确的锂离子电池SOC估计，推理速度提升60倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据驱动SOC估计方法依赖长历史输入序列，计算成本高且存在填充引入的位置偏差，难以满足实时在线应用需求。
analysis.problem: 如何用短历史窗口实现高精度、低计算成本的锂离子电池SOC在线估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出C2L-Net框架，将上下文编码与最新测量更新分离；采用基于块的Theta注意力池化和傅里叶季节基提取局部模式；因果上下文编码器结合GRU和因果余弦注意力；最新测量解码器受递归滤波启发更新上下文状态。
contributions: 提出C2L-Net，一种仅需20秒历史窗口的上下文到最新数据驱动SOC估计框架。
设计因果上下文编码器和最新测量解码器，实现高效时序建模和快速状态适应。
在公开数据集上达到SOTA或竞争性精度，推理速度提升60倍，参数更少。
analysis.experiments: 在公开锂离子电池驱动循环数据集上，多固定温度条件下进行实验，与多种数据驱动基线对比，验证了精度和效率优势。
limitations: 仅针对放电过程，未考虑充电或复杂工况。
方法在极端温度或老化条件下的泛化性未在摘要中明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出C2L-Net，用短历史窗口（20秒）实现高效准确的锂离子电池SOC估计，推理速度提升60倍。

papers.title: DiagnosticIQ: A Benchmark for LLM-Based Industrial Maintenance Action Recommendation from Symbolic Rules
papers.abstract: Monitoring complex industrial assets relies on engineer-authored symbolic rules that trigger based on sensor conditions and prompt technicians to perform corrective actions. The bottleneck is not detection but response: translating rules into maintenance steps requires asset-specific knowledge gained through years of practice. We investigate whether LLMs can serve as decision support for this rule-to-action step and introduce \ours{}, a benchmark of 6{,}690 expert-validated multiple-choice questions from 118 rule-action pairs across 16 asset types. We contribute (i) a symbolic-to-MCQA pipeline normalizing rules to Disjunctive Normal Form with embedding-based distractor sampling, (ii) five variants probing distinct failure modes (Pro, Pert, Verbose, Aug, Rationale), and (iii) a benchmark of 29 LLMs and 4 embedding baselines. A human evaluation (9 practitioners, mean 45.0\%) confirms \ours{} requires specialist knowledge beyond operational experience. Three findings stand out. The frontier has closed: the top three LLMs lie within one Macro point, with Bradley-Terry Elo placing claude-opus-4-6 30 points above the next model. Yet \ours{}\,Pro exposes brittleness, with every model losing 13--60\% relative accuracy under distractor expansion. \ours{}\,Aug exposes pattern-matching: under condition inversion, frontier models still select the original answer 49--63\% of the time. The deployment bottleneck is not capability but calibration: frontier models handle template-style fault detection but break under structural perturbation.

analysis.tldr: 提出工业维护动作推荐的符号规则到多选题基准，揭示LLM在结构扰动下的脆弱性和校准瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业资产监控依赖工程师编写的符号规则，但将规则转化为维护步骤需要多年积累的资产特定知识，LLM能否辅助这一决策步骤值得研究。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM从符号规则推理出正确维护动作的能力，并揭示其失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿模型在模板式故障检测上表现良好，但在结构扰动（如干扰项扩展、条件反转）下准确率大幅下降，且存在模式匹配倾向。
analysis.method: 构建包含6,690道专家验证多选题的基准，将符号规则归一化为析取范式，采用基于嵌入的干扰项采样，并设计五种变体（Pro、Pert、Verbose、Aug、Rationale）探测不同失败模式。
contributions: 提出DiagnosticIQ基准，包含118个规则-动作对和6,690道多选题，覆盖16种资产类型。
设计符号到多选题的转换流水线及五种变体，系统评估LLM的鲁棒性。
对29个LLM和4个嵌入基线进行基准测试，揭示校准而非能力是部署瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在29个LLM和4个嵌入基线上进行实验，并进行了9名从业者的人工评估（平均45.0%准确率），确认基准需要专业知识。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖16种资产类型，可能无法代表所有工业场景。
未提供LLM在实际部署中的端到端性能评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出工业维护动作推荐的符号规则到多选题基准，揭示LLM在结构扰动下的脆弱性和校准瓶颈。

papers.title: Generalization Bounds of Emergent Communications for Agentic AI Networking
papers.abstract: The evolution of 6G networking toward agentic AI networking (AgentNet) systems requires a shift from traditional data pipelines to task-aware, agentic AI-native communication solutions. Emergent communication, a novel communication paradigm in which autonomous agents learn their own signaling protocols through interaction, is increasingly viewed as a promising solution to address the challenges posed by existing rigid, predefined protocol-based networking architecture. However, most existing emergent communication frameworks fail to account for physical networking constraints, such as bandwidth and computational complexity, and often lack a rigorous information-theoretical foundation. To address these challenges, this paper introduces a novel emergent communication framework that facilitates collaborative task-solving among heterogeneous agents through an information-theoretic lens. We propose a novel joint loss function that unifies the optimization of decision-making functions and the learning of communication signaling. Our proposed solution is grounded on the multi-agent and multi-task distributed information bottleneck (DIB) theory, which allows the quantification of the fundamental trade-off between task-relevant information representation and computational complexity. We further provide theoretical generalization bounds of the emergent communication protocol during decentralized inference across unseen environmental states. Experimental validation on a real-world hardware prototype confirms that our proposed framework significantly improves generalization performance, compared to the state-of-the-art solutions.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于信息瓶颈理论的涌现通信框架，为智能体AI网络提供泛化界，并在硬件原型上验证了性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 6G网络向智能体AI网络演进需要任务感知的通信方案，但现有涌现通信框架缺乏物理约束和严格信息理论基础，难以应对带宽和计算复杂度挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在考虑物理网络约束（如带宽、计算复杂度）的前提下，为异构智能体设计具有理论保证的涌现通信协议，并提升其在未知环境中的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于多智能体多任务分布式信息瓶颈（DIB）理论，提出联合损失函数统一优化决策函数与通信信号学习，并推导出涌现通信协议在分散推理中的泛化界。
contributions: 提出一种考虑物理网络约束的涌现通信框架，通过信息瓶颈理论量化任务相关信息与计算复杂度的权衡。
首次为智能体AI网络中的涌现通信提供理论泛化界，并在真实硬件原型上验证了优于现有方法的泛化性能。
analysis.experiments: 在真实硬件原型上验证，与现有最先进方案相比，所提框架显著提升了泛化性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的异构智能体任务，通用性有待进一步验证。
硬件实验规模有限，未在更大规模网络场景中测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于信息瓶颈理论的涌现通信框架，为智能体AI网络提供泛化界，并在硬件原型上验证了性能提升。

papers.title: The Echo Amplifies the Knowledge: Somatic Marker Analogues in Language Models via Emotion Vector Re-Injection
papers.abstract: Current language model memory systems store what happened but not how it felt. This distinction -- between semantic memory (knowing about a past event) and episodic memory (re-experiencing it) -- was identified by Tulving as the difference between noetic and autonoetic consciousness. Damasio demonstrated that humans with intact knowledge but absent emotional markers exhibit impaired decision-making. We bridge this gap for language models. Using Gemma 3 1B-IT with pretrained Gemma Scope 2 sparse autoencoders, we identify 310 emotion-exclusive features at layer 22 with psychologically valid geometry. We construct distinctive-feature emotion vectors during experience and partially re-inject them during recall, triggered by context similarity at layer 7. We test four conditions paralleling Damasio's framework: A (no memory), B (semantic labels), C (emotion echo), and BC (semantic + echo). For emotional orientation, the echo alone steepens the threat-safety gradient: the regression slope of threat rating on contextual similarity is 0.80 for C vs 0.56 for A ($p$=0.011, permutation test). For decisions, the echo amplifies knowledge into action: BC=80% good choices vs B=52% ($z$=+2.60, $p$<0.01), while the echo alone has no effect (C=22%, n.s.). The echo changes how the model feels independently, but changes what it does only when combined with knowledge -- replicating Damasio's core finding. The echo amplifies knowledge. It does not replace it.

analysis.tldr: 通过情感向量再注入，让语言模型在回忆时“感受”到情绪，从而改善决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前语言模型记忆系统只存储事件内容（语义记忆），缺乏情感标记（情景记忆），而人类研究表明缺失情绪标记会导致决策受损。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言模型在回忆时重新体验情感，以模拟人类情景记忆并改善决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 情感回响单独能改变模型对威胁的感知梯度，但只有与语义知识结合时才能改善决策，复现了Damasio的核心发现。
analysis.method: 使用Gemma 3 1B-IT和Gemma Scope 2稀疏自编码器，在层22识别310个情感专属特征，构建情感向量；在回忆时通过层7的上下文相似度触发部分再注入。
contributions: 首次在语言模型中实现情感回响机制，桥接语义记忆与情景记忆的差距。
通过实验复现Damasio的躯体标记假说，证明情感回响能放大知识对决策的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在情感定向和决策任务上测试四种条件（无记忆、语义标签、情感回响、语义+回响），使用置换检验和z检验，结果显著。
limitations: 仅在单一模型和特定层上验证，泛化性未知。
情感向量构建依赖预训练自编码器，可能遗漏其他情感特征。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过情感向量再注入，让语言模型在回忆时“感受”到情绪，从而改善决策。

papers.title: What Will Happen Next: Large Models-Driven Deduction for Emergency Instances
papers.abstract: Traditional simulation methods reproduce occurred emergency instances through presetting to assist people in risk assessment and emergency decision-making. However, due to the lack of randomness and diversity, existing simulation systems struggle to fully explore the potential risk as emergency instances are scarce. In contrast, Large Models (LMs) can dynamically adjust generation strategies to introduce controllable randomness, while also possessing extensive prior knowledge and cross-domain knowledge transfer capabilities. Inspired by it, we propose the LMs-driven World Line Divergence System (WLDS), which enables diversified visualization and deduction of emergency instances in different domains. WLDS leverages LMs to deduce emergency instances in various development directions, and introduces the factual calibration and logical calibration mechanism to ensure factual accuracy and logical rigor during the deduction process. The interactive module can independently select deduction directions to avoid potential hallucinations that are difficult for the system to identify. Furthermore, by introducing the visualization module, WLDS forms simulation and deduction that combine text and images, which enhances interpretability. Extensive experiments conducted on the proposed Emergency Instances Deduction (EID) benchmark dataset demonstrate that WLDS achieves high-precision and high-fidelity simulation and deduction of emergency instances in multiple specific domains. Relevant experiments further demonstrate that WLDS can generate more emergency instances deduction data for users and provide support for better decision-making in similar emergency instances in the future.

analysis.tldr: 提出大模型驱动的世界线发散系统（WLDS），用于应急事件的多方向推演与可视化。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统应急模拟缺乏随机性和多样性，难以充分探索潜在风险，而大模型具备可控随机性和跨领域知识迁移能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大模型实现高精度、高保真的应急事件多样化推演与可视化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出WLDS，利用大模型推演应急事件的不同发展方向，引入事实校准和逻辑校准机制确保准确性和逻辑性，交互模块独立选择推演方向避免幻觉，可视化模块结合文本和图像增强可解释性。
contributions: 提出大模型驱动的世界线发散系统（WLDS），实现应急事件的多样化推演与可视化。
引入事实校准和逻辑校准机制，确保推演过程的准确性和逻辑严谨性。
构建应急事件推演（EID）基准数据集，实验验证WLDS的高精度和高保真性能。
analysis.experiments: 在提出的EID基准数据集上进行了实验，结果表明WLDS在多个特定领域实现了高精度和高保真的应急事件模拟与推演，并能生成更多推演数据以支持决策。
limitations: 可能依赖大模型的先验知识，在罕见或全新应急场景中泛化能力有限。
交互模块的独立选择机制可能引入人为偏差，影响推演客观性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大模型驱动的世界线发散系统（WLDS），用于应急事件的多方向推演与可视化。

papers.title: Why Retrying Fails: Context Contamination in LLM Agent Pipelines
papers.abstract: When an LLM agent fails a multi-step tool-augmented task and retries, the failed attempt typically remains in its context window -- contaminating the next attempt and elevating the per-step error rate beyond the base level. This context-contaminated restart phenomenon is widely observed in practice yet entirely lacks formal treatment. We introduce the Context-Contaminated Restart Model (CCRM): a chain of T tool-call steps, each failing with base rate epsilon_0; after any failed attempt, the subsequent attempt operates in contaminated context with elevated error rate epsilon_1 > epsilon_0. Under this model we derive five main results. (R1) An exact closed-form formula for P(succeed in at most K attempts). (R2) A cascade-overhead theorem giving the additional attempts Delta K incurred by contamination versus the clean-restart baseline. (R3) An optimal budget-allocation theorem identifying the pipeline depth T* that maximises success probability for a fixed total budget B=KT; we prove the closed form T* = sqrt(B * log(1/(1-epsilon_1)) / log(1/(1-epsilon_0))), with K*=B/T*. (R4) An information-theoretic lower bound via Le Cam's method showing K_CCRM is tight up to O(1). (R5) A clean-restart dominance theorem quantifying the exact benefit of context-clearing before retry. We validate CCRM on real SWE-bench Verified data: the IID model overestimates pass@3 by 17.4 percentage points (98.6% vs. 81.2%), while CCRM fits with error less than 0.001, implying a cascade ratio of epsilon_1/epsilon_0 = 7.1. Monte Carlo experiments confirm all theoretical predictions.

analysis.tldr: LLM Agent重试时因上下文污染导致错误率级联放大，本文提出CCRM模型量化该现象并给出最优重试策略。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent在多步工具调用任务中失败后重试时，失败历史会污染上下文窗口，导致后续步骤错误率升高，这一现象在实践中广泛存在但缺乏理论建模。
analysis.problem: 量化上下文污染对LLM Agent重试成功率的影响，并推导最优重试策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：重试时失败尝试保留在上下文中，导致每步错误率从基础值epsilon_0升高到epsilon_1 > epsilon_0，形成级联效应。
analysis.method: 提出上下文污染重试模型(CCRM)，将过程建模为T步工具调用链，每步以基础错误率epsilon_0失败，失败后重试在污染上下文中以更高错误率epsilon_1运行，并推导出五个理论结果。
contributions: 推导了最多K次尝试下成功概率的精确闭式公式
证明了级联开销定理和最优预算分配定理，给出最优管道深度T*和尝试次数K*
通过Le Cam方法给出信息论下界，并证明清洁重试优势定理
